name: Ellen R. Malcolm, EMILYs List
subject: I'd love to see your name on the roster, Peter

This work is only possible with your support. |

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98982971/518466300/2025016054?refcode=WTEFEX43_20241219_ERMMem_PL_v1s2&sourceid=1055509&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2JhOTQ1OC02NWJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PKthy-bUNHDWvCP1MnGYvbUfzSYBtM59INutRv5l1mI=) Dear Peter,

Whether you're new to EMILYs List or you've been with us since 1985, you are part of a movement that has changed the face of power in American politics forever.

EMILYs List built a name for itself because we support Democratic pro-choice women who defy the odds and never back down from a tough fight. I created EMILYs List to help change the face of power in this country, and I know I can speak on behalf of the entire team when I say that the work will continue into 2025, 2026, and beyond. [**And that is why I want to personally invite you into our pro-choice community: Peter, will you become a 2025 EMILYs List member?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98982979/518466306/2025016054?refcode=WTEFEX43_20241219_ERMMem_PL_v1s2&sourceid=1055509&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2JhOTQ1OC02NWJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PKthy-bUNHDWvCP1MnGYvbUfzSYBtM59INutRv5l1mI=) | [JOIN THE FIGHT](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98982984/518466312/2025016054?refcode=WTEFEX43_20241219_ERMMem_PL_v1s2&sourceid=1055509&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2JhOTQ1OC02NWJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PKthy-bUNHDWvCP1MnGYvbUfzSYBtM59INutRv5l1mI=)

Your investments in our endorsed women last cycle were the reason we were able to elect and reelect so many champions like Elissa Slotkin, Tammy Baldwin, Marie Glusenkamp Perez, Laura Gillen, Angela Alsobrooks, Lisa Blunt Rochester, and many more women to be the voices we need in the halls of power. Without the support, courage, and determination of pro-choice supporters like you, Peter, none of those victories would have been possible.

So, as far-right Republicans attempt to eliminate abortion access for millions of Americans, we're rolling up our sleeves and preparing for the fight ahead.
[**EMILYs List candidates are counting on your support, and one of the best ways to make lasting change in the fight for reproductive rights is to become a 2025 member. So please, don't wait to join the millions who are ready to champion fearless women taking on tough battles in 2026 and beyond. name: Fair Fight Action
subject: An easy way to help protect voting rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
You can support our work year-round |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98983413/518469948/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241219_f_MonthlyAsk_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTljMzkyOS02NmJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uli_aVpCvMOdn078wXw_SibHKzH61NZ4GsGzTZYQ6wg=&emci=da60a622-66be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=b19c3929-66be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=1037277)

| | Our work to protect the right vote happens every month, every year — because elections don’t only take place every four years. And this is not the first time in our nation’s history that we’ve faced major threats to our democracy. What this means for Fair Fight Action is it’s more critical than ever that we assemble the resources to run our volunteer campaigns, ensure voters stay aware of changes to voting rules, and fight back against voter suppression wherever and whenever it takes place. **What if we told you there’s an easy way to help fund this work and champion voting rights, and it’s something simple that you can start doing today?** [**Our dedicated team of monthly donors — _Democracy Defenders_ — play a key role in supporting our work for free and fair elections.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98983414/518469949/1004321804?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241219_f_MonthlyAsk_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTljMzkyOS02NmJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uli_aVpCvMOdn078wXw_SibHKzH61NZ4GsGzTZYQ6wg=) Monthly donations make it easier to plan our budget, ensuring our team can build long-lasting programs, create comprehensive training and education plans, and invest consistently in increasing access to the ballot box for everyone. [**If you’re able to start a monthly gift today, we’ll send you our new Peach Vote button as a thank you for fueling access to the ballot box.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98983416/518469951/1004321804?recurring=1&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241219_f_MonthlyAsk_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTljMzkyOS02NmJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uli_aVpCvMOdn078wXw_SibHKzH61NZ4GsGzTZYQ6wg=) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98983417/518469952/1004321804?recurring=1&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241219_f_MonthlyAsk_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTljMzkyOS02NmJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uli_aVpCvMOdn078wXw_SibHKzH61NZ4GsGzTZYQ6wg=)

[GIVE MONTHLY, GET A BUTTON!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98983418/518469953/1004321804?recurring=1&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241219_f_MonthlyAsk_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTljMzkyOS02NmJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uli_aVpCvMOdn078wXw_SibHKzH61NZ4GsGzTZYQ6wg=)

We’re seeing a nationally coordinated scheme to keep ballot access as far out of reach as possible, especially for Black and brown, young, disabled, unhoused, and rural voters. Anti-voter extremists are paving the way here in Georgia, starting with mass voter purges, attempting to disrupt the election certification process, and upending election administration.
From training cohorts to provide educational information to voters, to empowering people who have been historically shut out of the process with accurate and timely voting information, the Fair Fight Action team is committed to making sure all voters can access the ballot box, freely and fairly.
Recurring, sustained support will help ensure we can revamp up our efforts before, during, and after elections. **It’s the best way to support voting rights year around.**
[**Will you take your commitment to protecting the freedom to vote a step further by becoming a monthly supporter? Start your monthly gift today and your Peach Vote button will be in the mail!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98983420/518469955/1004321804?recurring=1&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241219_f_MonthlyAsk_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTljMzkyOS02NmJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uli_aVpCvMOdn078wXw_SibHKzH61NZ4GsGzTZYQ6wg=)
Your support moves us forward — thank you.
The Fair Fight Action Team

clean_body: You can support our work year-round | | | Our work to protect the right vote happens every month, every year — because elections don’t only take place every four years. And this is not the first time in our nation’s history that we’ve faced major threats to our democracy. What this means for Fair Fight Action is it’s more critical than ever that we assemble the resources to run our volunteer campaigns, ensure voters stay aware of changes to voting rules, and fight back against voter suppression wherever and whenever it takes place. What if we told you there’s an easy way to help fund this work and champion voting rights, and it’s something simple that you can start doing today? = Monthly donations make it easier to plan our budget, ensuring our team can build long-lasting programs, create comprehensive training and education plans, and invest consistently in increasing access to the ballot box for everyone. = | = = We’re seeing a nationally coordinated scheme to keep ballot access as far out of reach as possible, especially for Black and brown, young, disabled, unhoused, and rural voters. Anti-voter extremists are paving the way here in Georgia, starting with mass voter purges, attempting to disrupt the election certification process, and upending election administration. From training cohorts to provide educational information to voters, to empowering people who have been historically shut out of the process with accurate and timely voting information, the Fair Fight Action team is committed to making sure all voters can access the ballot box, freely and fairly. Recurring, sustained support will help ensure we can revamp up our efforts before, during, and after elections. It’s the best way to support voting rights year around. = Your support moves us forward — thank you. The Fair Fight Action Team = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2024 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. That’s the energy state Democrats are counting on as they go toe-to-toe with Republicans in competitive races across the country. But we’ll be frank, we were disappointed to see you haven’t renewed your membership for 2025 yet. $1 to replenish our resources before the upcoming SPECIAL ELECTIONS in the House.

$1 to EXPOSE Donald Trump and Mike Johnson’s plans to cut Social Security and Medicare.

name: Robert Garcia
subject: President Elon Musk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98983501/518474428/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGI1ODQ3My02N2JlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3byHUvDPUJO6O7ESdLq-PJXTQblfHuxFKpm0UuNhjPw=)
Team, we have a looming government shutdown, and we have Elon Musk to currently blame for it. It's the start of the Elon Musk Presidency.
Earlier today, a bipartisan spending bill — meant to avoid a government shutdown over Christmas — was shot down due to Elon Musk politically pressuring Republicans to abandon the bill or face political retribution. This bill was backed by Republican’s very own Speaker Mike Johnson.
Musk used his platform to spread misinformation about the bill and forced lawmakers to abandon their duty to the American people after we reached a bipartisan agreement.
**I’ll be clear: The world’s richest man has just put the livelihoods of government employees and military members at risk right before the holidays.**
Republicans have lost complete control of their party and are now being controlled by a billionaire. Our democracy has never been more at risk.
Team, right now Democrats are the only thing standing between Trump and Musk’s fascist regime.
So we must start working to re-secure a Democratic House majority now, because there is too much on the line for us to sit back idly and watch Americans suffer.
[**Please, if you agree, contribute whatever you can afford to our grassroots movement today. Your contribution will be put to work immediately to flip the House blue.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98983502/518474429/-801280681?refcode2=54b58473-67be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&refcode=em241219&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGI1ODQ3My02N2JlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3byHUvDPUJO6O7ESdLq-PJXTQblfHuxFKpm0UuNhjPw=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98983503/518474430/-801280681?refcode2=54b58473-67be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&refcode=em241219&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGI1ODQ3My02N2JlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3byHUvDPUJO6O7ESdLq-PJXTQblfHuxFKpm0UuNhjPw=)**
Our work begins now, and I can’t do it without you by my side.
Robert Garcia

Dear Fellow Patriot,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Fellow Patriot, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Fellow Patriot, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c22a29446d784b2585660b72ee24f312&_e=T0Lg5cCTDfyQU-8TLq0Er0yDjJk-ffdr5VGHhU0On1VpKuz5ptrh7NQ6pzmSwgwEbdSW-MbHZrf3A3PKrujdu6nxcv2dlMgC_57t7m5enDsWxzkGaf-w0nMDWi_yctPXBMdKicY_ozd5fUA2Oc6oafgvaoqofX8LMFN8CcZ9EYyktMoY7vEZskiSNqoY8-WLfC1VoJldLayPfY2N_luqegF7ONR5ZTlY4w5cX_QSTo2XFh6uQYXUb0SlEcnNS6zUxBLUQKtk2xshWH9749-lfZ-k17HJDtOs6A4ANHtIi7zHTDoDb4BwTvxBjlIoYh1I9OXJjaP-bhoNmS3U-_DonioXt-a7Fkp7HHXCu72fb1tTpXukBVht5mgVungwwKofAl3UVI1LNMBmk085BOjw3jI-LZY_2yotAcfejToOz4g%3D)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. clean_body: PLEASE READ.| | | Friend—I wanted to make sure this message didn’t get lost in your inbox. Tom is just short of hitting his final fundraising goal of the year—I am talking within a few hundred dollars ($550 short to be exact). so we can get a final total tallied before the holidays. THANK YOU SO MUCH!!! Madi Valenziano Finance Director Kean for Congress Sent from my iPhone \---------- Forwarded message ---------From: Kean MacLelland (Campaign Manager) Date: Mon, Dec 16, 2024 Subject: We have a mandate | | | | What a year it has been, friend. Every victory we have achieved—from winning the House, Senate, and Presidency—has brought us closer to securing the American Dream. Americans delivered a mandate, but our mission is far from over. As we look to the future, we have an incredible opportunity to achieve even more, but it will require a continued commitment from supporters like you. Right now, Tom is just $3,706 away from hitting his year-end goal and he is counting on you to help close the gap and start the New Year off strong. | | | | | | | | With your help, we will head into 2025 with the strength and momentum needed to continue the fight for the future of our great nation. Join us as we write the next chapter of American history—ensuring that everyone has a chance to succeed. Your support will make all the difference. Thank you in advance for your generosity. Sincerely,Kean Kean MacLellandTom Kean for CongressCampaign Manager | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2024 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is: Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation. Peter,Republicans maintained a majority in the United States House of Representatives this November’s election — but only with a narrow, five-seat margin. And when we account for the upcoming vacancies of Elise Stefanik, Michael Waltz, and Matt Gaetz, we’re looking at just a two-seat margin: 217 - 215. Now consider this: The gerrymandered maps in North Carolina flipped _three_ seats held by Democrats. That’s right: **Without the seats that Republicans won through a brutal, egregiously partisan, mid-Census gerrymander, Democrats could have won a majority in the U.S. House.** [**Do you think this is unfair? Do you agree that gerrymandering is cheating? North Carolina is actually a perfect example of why we do this work — and the impact your support can have on fair maps across the country.
The maps drawn in North Carolina following the 2020 Census were some of the most extreme in the country. In fact, the state supreme court ruled that the maps were such blatant examples of partisan gerrymandering that they violated the state constitution.
So the court redrew the maps — and on those new court-drawn maps, voters in the battleground state elected seven Democrats and seven Republicans to Congress in 2022. The maps were fair and representative! A huge win for democracy!
But then, a Republican majority in the state supreme court _REVERSED_ the original ruling and the maps were, yet again, redrawn. These new maps make North Carolina again one of the most egregiously gerrymandered states in the country.
**Anti-democracy politicians pursued map manipulation in order to win unearned power — and it worked:**
Despite Democratic candidates receiving **43% of the total votes cast for Congress** in November, **only 4 of the 14 (29%)** seats were won by Democrats. That’s a sign that maps aren’t fairly drawn. [**If you believe that voters should choose their representatives — and not the other way around — contribute now to help restore fairness to our democracy.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98984274/518498008/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_NCGerrymandering_email_20241219-NDRC-Tier1-NCGerrymandering_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241219-NDRC-Tier1-NCGerrymandering_&utm_campaign=NCGerrymandering&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5ODU4YmJjLTZkYmUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DBvWjE1LF6Cp2Pxt1sh26fqvf1KvrfyGn6aQa_ksK6E=)
One piece of good news from the election is that North Carolinians re-elected Democracy Defender Justice Allison Riggs to the state supreme court. We threw our full support behind Justice Riggs in that race because she’s a fair-minded champion of every American’s fundamental rights, including voting rights. And during ongoing rounds of recounts (including outrageous efforts to throw out properly cast ballots), we’ve supported efforts to make sure every voter’s voice was heard.
Justice Riggs’s re-election will ensure that critical pro-democracy leadership remains a force on this massively influential court — and it also prevents yet another extreme partisan voice from joining the court.

clean_body: Do you agree that gerrymandering is cheating? | Peter,Republicans maintained a majority in the United States House of Representatives this November’s election — but only with a narrow, five-seat margin. And when we account for the upcoming vacancies of Elise Stefanik, Michael Waltz, and Matt Gaetz, we’re looking at just a two-seat margin: 217 - 215. Now consider this: The gerrymandered maps in North Carolina flipped three seats held by Democrats. That’s right: Without the seats that Republicans won through a brutal, egregiously partisan, mid-Census gerrymander, Democrats could have won a majority in the U.S. House. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = North Carolina is actually a perfect example of why we do this work — and the impact your support can have on fair maps across the country. The maps drawn in North Carolina following the 2020 Census were some of the most extreme in the country. In fact, the state supreme court ruled that the maps were such blatant examples of partisan gerrymandering that they violated the state constitution. So the court redrew the maps — and on those new court-drawn maps, voters in the battleground state elected seven Democrats and seven Republicans to Congress in 2022. The maps were fair and representative! A huge win for democracy! But then, a Republican majority in the state supreme court REVERSED the original ruling and the maps were, yet again, redrawn. These new maps make North Carolina again one of the most egregiously gerrymandered states in the country. Anti-democracy politicians pursued map manipulation in order to win unearned power — and it worked: Despite Democratic candidates receiving 43% of the total votes cast for Congress in November, only 4 of the 14 (29%) seats were won by Democrats. That’s a sign that maps aren’t fairly drawn. = One piece of good news from the election is that North Carolinians re-elected Democracy Defender Justice Allison Riggs to the state supreme court. We threw our full support behind Justice Riggs in that race because she’s a fair-minded champion of every American’s fundamental rights, including voting rights. And during ongoing rounds of recounts (including outrageous efforts to throw out properly cast ballots), we’ve supported efforts to make sure every voter’s voice was heard. Justice Riggs’s re-election will ensure that critical pro-democracy leadership remains a force on this massively influential court — and it also prevents yet another extreme partisan voice from joining the court. We’ll continue to build on this momentum to keep fighting for fair maps in North Carolina — and stop GOP mid-cycle gerrymanders across the country. = Thank you, National Democratic Redistricting Committee = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, Suite #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

The American People just scored a **HUGE** victory, and the Uniparty was **_EXPOSED_** for what it is.

Congress tried to sneak through a massive Omnibus bill overnight, **_packed with provisions that do_**** _NOTHING_**** _for the American people._**

Let me tell you what they tried to shove through:

\- **TRILLIONS** added to our debt.
\- Pay raises for members of Congress.
\- Pork-filled spending that benefits **THEM** --not **YOU**.

This bill was a **DUMPSTER FIRE** , plain and simple. But YOU, the people I represent, stood up and **_KILLED IT_**.

And I'm okay with shutting the government down.

Here's the truth:**_ when the government shuts down, only 15% of it actually stops working. The rest keeps running just fine. And honestly, it's better to shut it down than to keep funding this insanity._**

Imagine this: if we wait until January with a Republican-controlled House, Senate, and Presidency, **we can fix this mess**.

No more excuses. No more bloated spending. No more backroom deals.

We took Nancy Pelosi's broken budget and **ADDED** to it--**more debt, more deficit, more disaster. That has to stop.**

**Here 's what really gets me:** _when Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy presented their ideas for fiscal reform, members of Congress were falling over themselves to talk to them. But those same members are the ones voting for these**BLOATED BILLS** that add billions to our deficit_.

**It 's time for accountability.**
**Will you stand with me to SHINE a spotlight on these RECKLESS spending bills and DEMAND a government that works for YOU- not the Swamp?**
**[YES](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=6fa527150d6a4f498ce70bb0ac376b8d&_e=ZqxFwZ_WadWC0pIxPTVn7oGTGwKAo7nxdwihlUFWWO3GmvPyjz_Fd6ewv2NnyxoLSQwr49cBJTwGdRl6k9zSKRrICJJIu4Zm4YoR-d7tt-Q3_R3YSZ2pQZXQpAm-unfY3DJFWvg4zedI-aQhqGvITYQPuZPjO11OAzkXnu_vxebz_9eENsKy-uXc_-mgBlqNipEFeuivvh5VECh4ItZ5niKMH003NoSapXDdlz6bo--uQ9qzYgn_wf1PyzMlOMdSM3_13GT-25FfPEI3aiKWx4NzT4oQDY2QlWl1qZ8W8YJ0Nkpn3PzHD3Z4qFsxn4Et-XfEOGBq7lQ6l_U214K55r-M0KU8THYGFRGQK1suNeDCESy6DeRZjZZK4bDjrPizVWl25jZ9lpOUZqBatC_cG5GyUmYaoIFXTrxlEdmVy7-bViQXQ8LEGGE7Zq5G1RYVj2Z9jMZ9soqxP7Nsi4C_DQ%3D%3D)**** [ NO](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=6fa527150d6a4f498ce70bb0ac376b8d&_e=ZqxFwZ_WadWC0pIxPTVn7oGTGwKAo7nxdwihlUFWWO3GmvPyjz_Fd6ewv2NnyxoLSQwr49cBJTwGdRl6k9zSKRrICJJIu4Zm4YoR-d7tt-Q3_R3YSZ2pQZXQpAm-unfY3DJFWvg4zedI-aQhqGvITYQPuZPjO11OAzkXnu_vxebz_9eENsKy-uXc_-mgBlqNipEFeuivvh5VECh4ItZ5niKMH003NoSapXDdlz6bo--uQ9qzYgn_wf1PyzMlOMdSM3_13GT-25FfPEI3aiKWx4NzT4oQDY2QlWl1qZ8W8YL4dMRryZvW77BkbwrRsh_x7enxogg_6CweXoxo14rnahlNoVuU9JmDPLpNwFnFV3lKDUDFmRqlZ6laR7VAZ2jLsPs3Jd-7ZlftXie12M_ISp9S4ACyNsfZWkixoSjrauzTSyCi54Ucp5ORuzKC88cVMDs2dPIsWfIYZtBN4PXEXA%3D%3D)**

clean_body: "Eric Burlison for Congress" "Eric Burlison for Congress" The American People just scored a HUGE victory, and the Uniparty was EXPOSED for what it is. Congress tried to sneak through a massive Omnibus bill overnight, packed with provisions that do NOTHING for the American people. Let me tell you what they tried to shove through: \- TRILLIONS added to our debt. \- Pay raises for members of Congress. \- Pork-filled spending that benefits THEM --not YOU. This bill was a DUMPSTER FIRE , plain and simple. But YOU, the people I represent, stood up and KILLED IT. And I'm okay with shutting the government down. Here's the truth: when the government shuts down, only 15% of it actually stops working. The rest keeps running just fine. And honestly, it's better to shut it down than to keep funding this insanity. Imagine this: if we wait until January with a Republican-controlled House, Senate, and Presidency, we can fix this mess. No more excuses. No more bloated spending. No more backroom deals. We took Nancy Pelosi's broken budget and ADDED to it--more debt, more deficit, more disaster. That has to stop. Here 's what really gets me: when Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy presented their ideas for fiscal reform, members of Congress were falling over themselves to talk to them. But those same members are the ones voting for theseBLOATED BILLS that add billions to our deficit. It 's time for accountability. Will you stand with me to SHINE a spotlight on these RECKLESS spending bills and DEMAND a government that works for YOU- not the Swamp? We've exposed the Uniparty, but the fight isn't over. We MUST demand change and hold Congress accountable. Thank you, Congressman Eric Burlison Paid for by Eric Burlison for Congress 2135 E. Independence Ave. #1007 Springfield, MO 65807 "Eric Burlison for Congress" |

name: Bethany Hamilton
subject: Surfing Past Fear
body:
I was just 13 years old when I lost my arm in a shark attack. A lot of people thought I'd be too scared to ever surf again. | | | But the biggest reason I kept surfing was my belief that God had my back.
---
| | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2608dd3f07d34d7d9c6f27484e929d5f&_e=I2_DGRh1S1oaiTrZFm7_6uOhCS82JGZD0MJ4u2HMcQZNMavZYhBNRv73LzFLuHCYdbefwK-Qdd37oMrwdE7CCwK1Z8v1P6a2BSnje7Gl0GM7IzTQi4KThG0lc8ZR_cTJyKMAivDOQHATBTrlPjllPbvV5B1lmQAErSbKWvLzdKShB7FPMZvXTTuqg1m-AwV5-CTtDePESVHK7RKHwEC39fmyELd12631SO-rWU6UE5Zh8PsW75aaC0MZmjStYN0-JjPhJuG_9OxXfNnOdEXqw1W8E5vhvym9jC26OXJX6P30X2I3GTZUs3lxf5qOaTS8K6g8pK-mKRZovKOU-9oHra1jvyy_NLdI27E3se_SvnQcfluSGcllgBkNZUzVJf2X9Nn2Dlq1dCFcPMLeWU4B6w%3D%3D)

Dear Friend, I was just 13 years old when I lost my arm in a shark attack. A lot of people thought I'd be too scared to ever surf again.But just 4 weeks later I was back in the water.
---
| | Dear Friend,I was just 13 years old when I lost my arm in a shark attack. A lot of people thought I'd be too scared to ever surf again. But just 4 weeks later I was back in the water.
---
| [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2608dd3f07d34d7d9c6f27484e929d5f&_e=I2_DGRh1S1oaiTrZFm7_6uOhCS82JGZD0MJ4u2HMcQZNMavZYhBNRv73LzFLuHCYdbefwK-Qdd37oMrwdE7CCwK1Z8v1P6a2BSnje7Gl0GM7IzTQi4KThG0lc8ZR_cTJyKMAivDOQHATBTrlPjllPbvV5B1lmQAErSbKWvLzdKShB7FPMZvXTTuqg1m-AwV5-CTtDePESVHK7RKHwEC39fmyELd12631SO-rWU6UE5Zh8PsW75aaC0MZmjStYN0-SYmPw_A3ITfJVhNbo6KscrAUcVW9EsfqSCbaddQ06kfSorQGGrruVeQw3B5_ty09MZfWXKfAukUXtuf06FkwKXmpR7-nS1exi7heJjBxJXP19vicNNf7Iz818u-rNuscPzA5g_S5RXMcSV1vntSNuQ%3D%3D)
---
| | It was partly due to my parents’ unconditional support and my love of the ocean. But the biggest reason I kept surfing was my belief that God had my back. And I want more children to hear that message because too many of them are being trained up in fear, _not_ _faith_. That's why I wrote a children's book called "Surfing Past Fear" with an amazing Christian publisher called **Brave Books**. [**_I hope you'll consider giving a gift of $100 or any amount you can afford to support Brave Books_**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2608dd3f07d34d7d9c6f27484e929d5f&_e=I2_DGRh1S1oaiTrZFm7_6uOhCS82JGZD0MJ4u2HMcQZNMavZYhBNRv73LzFLuHCYdbefwK-Qdd37oMrwdE7CCwK1Z8v1P6a2BSnje7Gl0GM7IzTQi4KThG0lc8ZR_cTJyKMAivDOQHATBTrlPjllPbvV5B1lmQAErSbKWvLzdKShB7FPMZvXTTuqg1m-AwV5-CTtDePESVHK7RKHwEC39fmyELd12631SO-rWU6UE5Zh8PsW75aaC0MZmjStYN0-Vv6j3KZXCBTS2gmS0Jmp7WG1cN2aueSuKrFwS6pkpoDf0tHLFvSsa9d1_MMu4Th7_Q4n_OCAYD_aQw3vLiG4D5cjMKptZr8OJoIdaoCUq4sJ4zKyLdS9s4r-d9Ue5_4Y7s_m1aUK7_WE_k27vSck2A%3D%3D) as they help parents raise strong, resilient, God-loving children. In courage,
---
| | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2608dd3f07d34d7d9c6f27484e929d5f&_e=I2_DGRh1S1oaiTrZFm7_6uOhCS82JGZD0MJ4u2HMcQZNMavZYhBNRv73LzFLuHCYdbefwK-Qdd37oMrwdE7CCwK1Z8v1P6a2BSnje7Gl0GM7IzTQi4KThG0lc8ZR_cTJyKMAivDOQHATBTrlPjllPbvV5B1lmQAErSbKWvLzdKShB7FPMZvXTTuqg1m-AwV5-CTtDePESVHK7RKHwEC39fmyELd12631SO-rWU6UE5Zh8PsW75aaC0MZmjStYN0-gFL_-lQDIKwltwPBogNT-kl-wcB7R-Frb_hk5YExMhkbSb7BPO4Omh_sPPQAzpQCSrNVcVUb73KEue-kzLWlmagWLW-hxCwFgjqdNz8BPIgezR535FVso26vHQatF2d2Cp1rzDc-F0SG-62QzB-o0A%3D%3D)
---
**Bethany Hamilton** Professional Surfer and Mother
---
|
---
| | P.S. I've set aside a small number of copies of "Surfing Past Fear" just for the friends of **Brave Books**. **[When you support their work today with your gift of $100 or more, it'll be my honor to send you one.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2608dd3f07d34d7d9c6f27484e929d5f&_e=I2_DGRh1S1oaiTrZFm7_6uOhCS82JGZD0MJ4u2HMcQZNMavZYhBNRv73LzFLuHCYdbefwK-Qdd37oMrwdE7CCwK1Z8v1P6a2BSnje7Gl0GM7IzTQi4KThG0lc8ZR_cTJyKMAivDOQHATBTrlPjllPbvV5B1lmQAErSbKWvLzdKShB7FPMZvXTTuqg1m-AwV5-CTtDePESVHK7RKHwEC39fmyELd12631SO-rWU6UE5Zh8PsW75aaC0MZmjStYN0-sjFCiAdRZrop6jFZW9oN4hh1Ua1m3APbiAYgTJ8v4tFXLBJm-dgKXEPbdJ8MC-lquTpiMSriXKGFzK_i3_heu0FCQG5ojjKf8snXzJFLuSJJh8Kn7i2lCd4rbEPutU6NneJM2KIgOgqsjP6SETwrXg%3D%3D)** Thank you for helping America's children learn that God "has not given them a spirit of fear!" (2 Timothy 1:7) -- Bethany

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I want to hear directly from you, Derek
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8228%2E5257348%2EFRGMtu)
Hi Derek,
Throughout my campaign for the U.S. Senate, the question I asked most often was this: _"If I’m lucky enough to get this job, what can I do to help?"_
**Because of your support, I now get the honor of serving as a Senator — but my question is the same:**
**[Derek, what can I do to help you and your family? What are your top priorities for the upcoming months? What issues are you talking about at the dinner table? Please fill out my Senate Priorities Survey, it will only take a few moments.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20241220-senate-priorities-survey.ubzPFV&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20241219_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8228%2E5257348%2EFRGMtu)**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20241220-senate-priorities-survey.ubzPFV&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20241219_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8228%2E5257348%2EFRGMtu)
---
Your opinions will help us better understand the issues that matter most to you, your family, and your community.
I believe that every voice matters. It’s why I want to hear from you. It’s why we did not accept corporate PAC contributions during my Senate campaign and prioritized building such a massive people-powered campaign.
The information you provide will help my team and me plan on how to best make a difference for Californians.
There’s a lot to tackle in the coming months, Derek. Lowering costs, increasing housing supply, improving healthcare and childcare access, and more. Not to mention defending our democracy and our shared values from the Trump administration and the MAGA movement.
**[So, will you take a minute or two to fill out our Priorities Survey? Hearing directly from you is the best way I can address your top issues — so I appreciate anything you can add.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20241220-senate-priorities-survey.ubzPFV&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20241219_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=8228%2E5257348%2EFRGMtu)**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20241220-senate-priorities-survey.ubzPFV&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20241219_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=8228%2E5257348%2EFRGMtu)
---
Thank you for your input, Derek.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/4991?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20241219_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=8&akid=8228%2E5257348%2EFRGMtu)

Last week, we sent you our urgent poll asking if you support term limits for U.S. Supreme Court Justices.

**But our records indicate that you didn’t respond.** Our data for your state is incomplete without your responses.

Hey Friend, Do you feel like the policy solutions offered by the government often create more problems than they solve?

From education to healthcare and beyond, it's clear that good intentions don't always lead to good outcomes.
| | That's why I'm excited to share a free digital copy of Milton Friedman's thought-provoking eBook, "Why Government Is the Problem."

In this insightful read, Friedman dives deep into:
* Unveiling how government interventions can worsen the social and economic problems they're trying to fix.
* Revealing the influence of special interests in policymaking, often at the expense of everyday citizens.
* Explaining why limiting government involvement might be the key to solving our most pressing challenges.

It's a must-read for anyone curious about the impact of government actions on our society. Originally written in 1993, Friedman's analysis remains as relevant today as ever.

Are you ready to explore a new perspective? [Click here to get your free copy](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c82d4123c1944b0aa62bb219fad644d1&_e=l1HwN3WtBsLbqwhIEs_QGn7ceJiDCMfMz8oLjH67QBLJYBJrfVcE4KGhEE9wNw2DUHAVQSaZ0YiRWAMrbCEd5SQlzFccb1eA0wyHjoCqpd3TEtHqqnxrvadmAdEgMmA0sf7EuQ7OY2vsweeXwO3z3korDUcMnZdv9qQWXOYnO2DbquBKEmDqDtbeLcLurzIeqj-nnpB-1jwsN67mNl6B7_7GPgc0tV8YzAevQUrPO5jdkK0m0_WVqZhmclLEklubpEgZ6Q0C0y67TCuXPg_pxrJFFRQeYp8cvP58b-MJNmFGAesdDarOpHKLnR7NSFre9f5mEoZ3instHDkOpKVRCGWMEkfHzv9trCJRJ56Q828OR0cyuiMcEWc7zxxfNEwd4cVIal-bF75qPDGW8zqL0X0bar2D_KO2E_ZPiWjxEH4WmuiH4eTU48F-XaMwmVIL) of "Why Government Is the Problem" now.
Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

body:
Friend, do you? | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=390ff611ed704e53b2faa6f8c43f2bc4&_e=FraOaO-84ZOzEmz8domk3AHPvPdqH8VGPUrFO0TeN-d7WFrofw3ZM-CH5AFCBjI6yOnIHAkntUIRAJNvemX0kUN0VRs1nESe7cqaN5H7YKaQYx2VLmB7SDueq_pjNNM2xhNlJuuY6DgWKwI1Uxd6f4FyJ3xoJ9hvkPFJuqlVFoa9VNKDUWalAwzu8gFRT5ffMyDMnriTeawVQLL79AlwRRp2epGBxtYtN2NnVemWGG09-D9nsJJUpqh_oZuVHpK6tFO5uQNPyAX35mSDsvtUR8QGnVp2fV9O-g0uQ65WS7q6ZvUoh5plSj2rL_in1N04sgwSqy9oNq15OteTAd6Ge49uWv0N7gO7kri8HBTO3XS0hVdYq5wtkCj3v4iyXAQr3fNZBBKjOj0E51e6ZzHXy8ovHCcP_8bgxwcKnzbp1S_9cBc82cKkXCfcl8U5DsN2l1JmLzcgd18iurwqsWvHF4qgEbLQ8xNVFPuVlz7huulhfcLYE3B_W0tT-lolLvmylnGvaWPeUDUVv2blURg6jg%3D%3D)
Friend,

President Trump laid out a strong and powerful case for ELIMINATING Daylight Savings Time.
**1\. INCONVENIENT:_There 's too much timezone confusion between our great states._**
**2\. VERY COSTLY:_American businesses are losing out on millions in revenue._**

Friday, December 20, 2024 | Peter -- What a phenomenal showing from each and every one of you for this _silent(ish)* auction_ for**the lunches** **with Andrew Yang or Governor Christine Todd Whitman!**** We have just closed the auction and have a winning bid. Are you ready? _**Drumroll please.....**_ The total winning bids totaled **$33,500!** Amazing! Thank you all for your support. It means the world to us. We will reach out to the winners directly to congratulate them and to help connect them with Andrew Yang and Governor Whitman. Happy Holidays, The Forward Party [](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=auction_end_announcement&n=2)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=auction_end_announcement&n=3)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=auction_end_announcement&n=4)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=auction_end_announcement&n=5)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=auction_end_announcement&n=6)[https://home.forwardparty.com/](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=auction_end_announcement&n=7)

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zneic0aqj2nl3iro91sn6c598b1kddccvl7ctsrg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdgeaoj1cth2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zftq365bvfkj4sr8v5i4drdoj7o23d7eltpbrek0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdgeaoj1cth2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zloqbvr3orh708rt836h59k67vn2js5k2mkrgprg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdgeaoj1cth2bs)

What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdrpvteq5uoghmnjocjrbgp3b5v1tgt4lo5sme20_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdgeaoj1cth2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl6jfmk8qa0t4u2d9s7gc7p2v99getvu292q98u0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdgeaoj1cth2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrplq9jh2ia3kl2a4rfebar0v9rqb1jcplevtuc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdgeaoj1cth2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv2dlrq08r56k6rva23uf0n78rfqh67k18aldi3o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdgeaoj1cth2bs)**

body:
Friend:

After such a resounding VICTORY for not only President Trump, but also for Republicans in both chambers of Congress, I've decided to work hand-in-hand with the National Republican Senatorial Committee to **[audit](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/ChE9HCTV4v8Hik5o6ToZqA~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpR__k6TVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** the 2024 election and uncover __exactly__ what led us to such a landslide victory.

Early reports and investigation indicate that one of the BIGGEST factors in this election - particularly in battleground Senate races - was, quite simply, _money_.

"...all-time record set this year in Ohio - $421 million, and likely closer to a half-billion once the final bills come in."
[Source: _Cronkite News_]

You see, the Radical Left poured a historic sum of money into these key races in 2024, and when you break it down, the states where we could afford to go toe-to-toe with them, we then WON on the issues.

_But in states like Arizona where we were**[OUTSPENT 2:1,](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/ChE9HCTV4v8Hik5o6ToZqA~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpR__k6TVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** the Democrats effectively **[BOUGHT](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/ChE9HCTV4v8Hik5o6ToZqA~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpR__k6TVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** the race!_

So, when I look at what the Left is already projecting to spend on the 2026 midterms, it makes me nervous about our chances to defend the critical majority we just built for President Trump.

_Just like this election, Friend, patriots like YOU will be our last line of defense for the midterms - and rest assured, the left won't be sparing a single dollar._

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3uoa0d67u9euulqeoblg8av2gee69v1u5o9jggg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge6p31c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8knijcdj5qsa1foe02d05ahre51qp5dbjdi3r90_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge6p31c9h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z23s07mhokpbehol4mme9u9h73b8s9tlpshrg9b0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge6p31c9h2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z54cg8s3cmnft7v8lvnen6meh3g0ftu00j7758sg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge6p31c9h2bs)**

name: Aditya Pai from Pai's Politics
subject: Why Trump won
body:
And how; Part I: Blindspotting

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..R4GBhdtolYQL1xNpjapuydYf6fEejr0vm51fIZVgEWI?) for more
---
# [Why Trump won](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=111730&post_id=153255111&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzMjU1MTExLCJpYXQiOjE3MzQ2NzA3MzksImV4cCI6MTczNzI2MjczOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMTczMCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.ipOoWJXluFlOPGTvYkdaqMFYeeVwA4rMFhOBC-0kdGc)
### And how; Part I: Blindspotting
| | [Aditya Pai](https://substack.com/@adityapai)
---
| Dec 20
---
| [](https://substack.com/@adityapai)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=111730&post_id=153255111&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzMjU1MTExLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNDY3MDczOSwiZXhwIjoxNzM3MjYyNzM5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTExNzMwIiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.WoW86NenfvXEWLSnhbVZnpE46OULcDWhc1WeuOk8cW0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=111730&post_id=153255111&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzMjU1MTExLCJpYXQiOjE3MzQ2NzA3MzksImV4cCI6MTczNzI2MjczOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMTczMCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.ipOoWJXluFlOPGTvYkdaqMFYeeVwA4rMFhOBC-0kdGc&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=111730&post_id=153255111&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzMjU1MTExLCJpYXQiOjE3MzQ2NzA3MzksImV4cCI6MTczNzI2MjczOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMTczMCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.ipOoWJXluFlOPGTvYkdaqMFYeeVwA4rMFhOBC-0kdGc)
---
| | [](https://substack..R78YglImioogyE7_4L6au8yj4aNrYhtVDH8jStIENPk?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/paipolitics/p/why-trump-won?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

#### I. Blindspotting
It's not their fault. There is just something endemic to the educated liberal mind that makes it incapable of grasping Trump's appeal.
Here's my diagnosis:
Democrats are products of the Academy, which cultivates only intellect, and instructs only in **words and numbers** _._ As clever as its graduates become at manipulating language and data -- i.e., 'knowledge work' -- they gain little to no training in the real substrate of politics: **images, symbols, and myths** _**.**_
The Corporation draws largely from the Academy. So today's corporate managers, bankers, bureaucrats, non-profit executives, doctors, engineers, and lawyers toil for 4, 6, or 7, or 8 years to learn how to _think_ (science and [scientism](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7d4169e2-57f8-43e1-9a80-9bc3065f8045?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)). This neglects the core humanity and humanities required for citizenship:
* how to _see_ (art, cinema)
* how to _listen_ (music)
* how to _move_ (theater, dance, sports)
* how to be moved (philosophy, literature)
* how to surrender (religion)

Trump, like Reagan, is a humanist -- not an analyst.
Both are _masters_ of image: sight, sound, feel. Both were ridiculed by the left as mere entertainers. Both won -- twice; the second time, decisively.
And intellectuals don't understand why:
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/24a46b38-bfda-4ffc-893b-fb254031602b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e31281fa-9cd3-4823-a554-7914cadfa6e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d10e3437-c644-4b97-8e68-2464a6cb015e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/bc4a1b29-76fe-4c2e-a24f-8c20b50f3ad1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c904f409-6402-4187-86e0-1d82563f7c0a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
We all assume going to college and graduate school makes you smarter. But what if it makes you more arrogant, less empathetic, and less objective, too? Is that intelligence?
Experts like Bill Maher, James Carville, and [Dr. Allan Lichtman](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/0a3f0843-46b0-4bf3-b833-cd532a9f7d67?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) all got it not just wrong, but _so spectacularly wrong_ , that obstructed vision is the best explanation. You can't analyze what you can't see. And these brilliant but wishful thinkers couldn't even see what most Americans, especially the 2/3rds without a college degree, already felt:
**Joe Biden is comatose, Kamala Harris is vacant, Trump is already the president.**
No one is clairvoyant.
We all have blind spots as voters, viewers, and human beings.
Political experts have the biggest blind spot of us all: an insistence on data, logic, language -- _always and everywhere_ -- to make sense of a world governed by image, narrative, symbol, and myth.
To make sense of politics, you must use your senses.
Experts think too much and sense too little.
They deploy analysis alone for a task that demands observation, perception, and most of all, _empathy_ : feeling the feelings of people not like you.
And they apply **intellect** to a domain that primarily demands **intuition**.
This is a [category error](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/06ce967c-986f-436f-acda-a224e8b775f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of epic proportions -- and it made them blind.
* * *
_**Aditya Pai** is a 33-yr-old trial attorney, writer, and [recent Democratic congressional candidate](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/8fc297bb-e847-4556-ac68-a3d28204cb38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Orange County, CA. He earned a B.A. Summa Cum Laude from Claremont McKenna College, where he served as student body president, and M.Phil. and J.D. degrees in history and law from Cambridge University and Harvard Law School, under the supervision of Nobel Laureate in Economics Amartya Sen. Pai is a naturalized American citizen from Bombay._

clean_body: And how; Part I: Blindspotting | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more And how; Part I: Blindspotting | | | Dec 20 | | | | | | | | | | | | I. Blindspotting It's not their fault. There is just something endemic to the educated liberal mind that makes it incapable of grasping Trump's appeal. Here's my diagnosis: Democrats are products of the Academy, which cultivates only intellect, and instructs only in words and numbers . As clever as its graduates become at manipulating language and data -- i.e., 'knowledge work' -- they gain little to no training in the real substrate of politics: images, symbols, and myths . The Corporation draws largely from the Academy. So today's corporate managers, bankers, bureaucrats, non-profit executives, doctors, engineers, and lawyers toil for 4, 6, or 7, or 8 years to learn how to think (science and ). This neglects the core humanity and humanities required for citizenship: how to see (art, cinema) how to listen (music) how to move (theater, dance, sports) how to be moved (philosophy, literature) how to surrender (religion) Trump, like Reagan, is a humanist -- not an analyst. Both are masters of image: sight, sound, feel. Both were ridiculed by the left as mere entertainers. Both won -- twice; the second time, decisively. And intellectuals don't understand why: | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- We all assume going to college and graduate school makes you smarter. But what if it makes you more arrogant, less empathetic, and less objective, too? Is that intelligence? Experts like Bill Maher, James Carville, and all got it not just wrong, but so spectacularly wrong , that obstructed vision is the best explanation. You can't analyze what you can't see. And these brilliant but wishful thinkers couldn't even see what most Americans, especially the 2/3rds without a college degree, already felt: Joe Biden is comatose, Kamala Harris is vacant, Trump is already the president. No one is clairvoyant. We all have blind spots as voters, viewers, and human beings. Political experts have the biggest blind spot of us all: an insistence on data, logic, language -- always and everywhere -- to make sense of a world governed by image, narrative, symbol, and myth. To make sense of politics, you must use your senses. Experts think too much and sense too little. They deploy analysis alone for a task that demands observation, perception, and most of all, empathy : feeling the feelings of people not like you. And they apply intellect to a domain that primarily demands intuition. This is a of epic proportions -- and it made them blind. Aditya Pai is a 33-yr-old trial attorney, writer, and in Orange County, CA. He earned a B.A. Summa Cum Laude from Claremont McKenna College, where he served as student body president, and M.Phil. and J.D. degrees in history and law from Cambridge University and Harvard Law School, under the supervision of Nobel Laureate in Economics Amartya Sen. Pai is a naturalized American citizen from Bombay. | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Aditya Pai 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Teach children to love America
body:
Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools?

|
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zf0pqu93qquemholvaiharqcb70lebv61ibspkc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge1o74cdh2bs)
|
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zd22mr7eksoc0of7pscnq5nec28pgpoqukt5ljl0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge1o74cdh2bs)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zs77r567cd4eim5i9mog5r4vjmc97pp4fl3uo2r0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge1o74cdh2bs). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4rd7pph40n2t0i5thk6ppor98nq68pta1vqf2ao_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge1o74cdh2bs)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zir9vp106pqvieod109k01rm64apfrsdmhndpna0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge1o74clh2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpfb1aa731tmc417462snaqbiotrpjmo0tnq9m5o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge1o74clh2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm2i23rjiebk20ol46cigfqlakng0fjm16sp4nc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge1o74clh2bs)
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zge6e9nft9dofdsfapofnnvhs285oqvt3o8h52t8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge1o74clh2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z59kr1cehlmb3ffqt03cd4ou461ce0kdspj3q2c8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge1o74clh2bs)

name: Jamie Janosz, Managing Editor at Today in the Word
subject: Live Like Jesus in a Changing World
body:
Even as we celebrate the Christmas season and reflect on the incredible gift of hope we have in Jesus Christ

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zen4fc2the8cdjv2mu64njpsth3jcqie3fr37rs0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge1o74c1h2bs)
---

Hey there Friend, ____ Even as we celebrate the Christmas season and reflect on the incredible gift of hope we have in Jesus Christ, I am sure you are reminded of the challenge before us: how do we live out that hope in a world that seems so increasingly distant from God?

It's a question we all wrestle with, especially as we witness significant cultural shifts that oppose our biblical convictions. In times like these, we need practical wisdom, encouragement, and a clear vision for how to live as faithful followers of Christ.

[That's where This Light of Mine: Living Like Jesus in a Non-Jesus World comes in.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zducogjmnuik44sukooc7utji4sradh18pum2od8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge1o74c1h2bs)

In this powerful book, Dr. Joseph Stowell (a name you may recognize as the former president of Moody Bible Institute) offers a timely call for Christians to stop fighting battles for an earthly kingdom and instead embrace the privilege of advancing Christ's Kingdom. Drawing from Scripture and the life of Jesus, Dr. Stowell shows how we can respond to today's challenges with hope, courage, and grace.

As we interact with a culture that often feels divided and broken,_This Light of Mine_ encourages us to reflect Jesus' love and truth in a way that draws others to the Gospel--without alienating them. It encourages us to rise above the noise and shine God's light in a world desperately in need of it.

We'd love to send you an exclusive, pre-release copy of _This Light of Mine_ as a thank-you for your generous gift of any amount to support the mission of _Today in the Word_. Your gift today will help us continue providing Bible-centered resources to readers across the globe.

Whether you're seeking practical advice for living out your faith in a complex world or simply need encouragement to stay steady in your walk with Christ, _This Light of Mine_ is a timely and powerful tool for your journey.

Give today at this link and receive this book as a thank-you: [https://give.todayintheword.org/cye-tdw](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv6ja8jucnhchb2m7982l72gs77ol5gjd4kekihg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge1o74c1h2bs)

When you give today, you not only support the mission of _Today in the Word_ to spread the Gospel but you will also receive this transformative book that will inspire and equip you to live out your Christian faith with boldness and love.

[Can I count on you to partner with us in this season of giving? Together, we can shine the light of Jesus in a world that desperately needs it.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi8pnbh75e99ro5v413f4cd8q87e2dsaikeldabg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge1o74c1h2bs)

Thank you for your generosity and for being part of this important mission.

With gratitude,

Jamie Janosz
Managing Editor, _Today in the Word_
---
|

name: Olivia Krolczyk, Leadership Institute
subject: Stand bravely with me and Riley
body:
They failed me.

| Friend, They failed me.
Leftist college administrators impose more and more unconstitutional restrictions on students like me: what we can say, do, and -- in my case -- write.
Last year, I received a failing grade at the University of Cincinnati for **using the term “biological women.”** The university sided with my professor, refusing to recognize my right -- the right of every American -- to free speech. That’s why I joined the Riley Gaines Center here at your Leadership Institute -- to protect and train more young people to stand up against leftist persecution and speak out for their constitutional liberties, on campus and beyond. Here I am with Riley and our colleague Kaitlynn Wheeler:

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0d1d2jftccacsinl0fulh4mdsdvrn079i4fem3o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge9pr1c1h2bs)
18 million Americans are on college campuses across the country. Friend, if students aren’t free to write the truth in college classrooms, what freedoms can they count on? [Today I ask you to help conservative students fight for their rights this fall.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2r4k42jqka67ihe9ve8tolva51mhk0f1vkeh820_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge9pr1c1h2bs) With a new administration taking office, young conservatives’ preparedness to lead the battle for constitutional rights is more important than ever. Your Leadership Institute and its Riley Gaines Center train thousands of rising leaders coast-to-coast to lead that battle. [Will you stand bravely with me and Riley?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlrjsa3093rr4ajhe3q00c1tkdjnpf44bd3iomf8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge9pr1c1h2bs) Your special gift will help more conservative students defend our liberties. Please let me count on you now. Thank you. Fight on, Olivia Krolczyk Ambassador Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---

name: Hillsdale College via Real American Reporting
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Real American Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zdi8lpub07uopukclmkr60liqenbfj9vrb0mkasg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge9pr6c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z9qk304n14qlhlcgq2bs08n7hmim5makhbkq6f58_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge9pr6c5h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z6fkoiqu3oe0fagfnhts3eagpkoss7h4eapildo8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge9pr6c5h2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zb8ct1pcl46cep5a7ck8seapo8rva0c148cgneg0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge9pr6c5h2bs)**

clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Real American Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zdvevh84elaoronq0fb5mr2f1t09mne5davqsmu8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge9pr1c1h2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z2a2bj415113g8vg36u5ifec3sla9mh7qu0aqg60_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge9pr1c1h2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zjrgr43mthl3osi92pqnirjqs3barmh60lh9ku8g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge9pr1c1h2bs)
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z0aobl74kdcismdt95eee6cr65a7nkc23bmqtc08_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge9pr1c1h2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zf7nmp68f7185sgf8mob1vnid9u9majs39m9tbn8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdge9pr1c1h2bs)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Get your copy of Why America Matters
body:
Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools?

|
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zufmarau18hklu3maifeojhls498hb38fg0q5gqo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdie4ob4c3h2bs)
|
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrd293fpce9ocdm4v0hf70uclc60csusa11fb2uo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdie4ob4c3h2bs)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdid7uvv4eh1km6teoqcbs62p979gni53e4r6600_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdie4ob4c3h2bs). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zprjpjgprj32lbcpqtrtph91arbq01gcqfo5hbjo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdie4ob4c3h2bs)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

name: Olivia Krolczyk, Leadership Institute
subject: Stand bravely with me and Riley
body:
They failed me.

| Friend, They failed me.
Leftist college administrators impose more and more unconstitutional restrictions on students like me: what we can say, do, and -- in my case -- write.
Last year, I received a failing grade at the University of Cincinnati for **using the term “biological women.”** The university sided with my professor, refusing to recognize my right -- the right of every American -- to free speech. That’s why I joined the Riley Gaines Center here at your Leadership Institute -- to protect and train more young people to stand up against leftist persecution and speak out for their constitutional liberties, on campus and beyond. Here I am with Riley and our colleague Kaitlynn Wheeler:

[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z6hcajiqeauhgao32qambcnbngkdtk7op0i2ec18_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdiecpj4c3h2bs)
18 million Americans are on college campuses across the country. Friend, if students aren’t free to write the truth in college classrooms, what freedoms can they count on? [Today I ask you to help conservative students fight for their rights this fall.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zthl4ikcrjtck9ohln4djk80r6i0nl6s2vigriso_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdiecpj4c3h2bs) With a new administration taking office, young conservatives’ preparedness to lead the battle for constitutional rights is more important than ever. Your Leadership Institute and its Riley Gaines Center train thousands of rising leaders coast-to-coast to lead that battle. [Will you stand bravely with me and Riley?](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zcfn5cv9ophr139ptr9ce8r6mactrm861t4jnf18_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdiecpj4c3h2bs) Your special gift will help more conservative students defend our liberties. Please let me count on you now. Thank you. Fight on, Olivia Krolczyk Ambassador Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
