name: Jamie Janosz, Managing Editor at Today in the Word
subject: Live Like Jesus in a Changing World
body:
Even as we celebrate the Christmas season and reflect on the incredible gift of hope we have in Jesus Christ

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z06s51avlo6pnkl5kahg2n1g17isev800mgrdj88_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdie6o36cjh2bs)
---

Hey there Friend, ____ Even as we celebrate the Christmas season and reflect on the incredible gift of hope we have in Jesus Christ, I am sure you are reminded of the challenge before us: how do we live out that hope in a world that seems so increasingly distant from God?

It's a question we all wrestle with, especially as we witness significant cultural shifts that oppose our biblical convictions. In times like these, we need practical wisdom, encouragement, and a clear vision for how to live as faithful followers of Christ.

[That's where This Light of Mine: Living Like Jesus in a Non-Jesus World comes in.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z57hr8p5c1s3hokgoel6kjn88hrrhikg4u7lgndo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdie6o36cjh2bs)

In this powerful book, Dr. Joseph Stowell (a name you may recognize as the former president of Moody Bible Institute) offers a timely call for Christians to stop fighting battles for an earthly kingdom and instead embrace the privilege of advancing Christ's Kingdom. Drawing from Scripture and the life of Jesus, Dr. Stowell shows how we can respond to today's challenges with hope, courage, and grace.

As we interact with a culture that often feels divided and broken,_This Light of Mine_ encourages us to reflect Jesus' love and truth in a way that draws others to the Gospel--without alienating them. It encourages us to rise above the noise and shine God's light in a world desperately in need of it.

We'd love to send you an exclusive, pre-release copy of _This Light of Mine_ as a thank-you for your generous gift of any amount to support the mission of _Today in the Word_. Your gift today will help us continue providing Bible-centered resources to readers across the globe.

Whether you're seeking practical advice for living out your faith in a complex world or simply need encouragement to stay steady in your walk with Christ, _This Light of Mine_ is a timely and powerful tool for your journey.

Give today at this link and receive this book as a thank-you: [https://give.todayintheword.org/cye-tdw](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziv6imina0d4j3udr4gi1l6ann03rl9dbma95gd8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdie6o36cjh2bs)

When you give today, you not only support the mission of _Today in the Word_ to spread the Gospel but you will also receive this transformative book that will inspire and equip you to live out your Christian faith with boldness and love.

[Can I count on you to partner with us in this season of giving? Together, we can shine the light of Jesus in a world that desperately needs it.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z339jnf752916j5rhi4h78g3958hvpcvj0m2rpf8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdie6o36cjh2bs)

Thank you for your generosity and for being part of this important mission.

With gratitude,

Jamie Janosz
Managing Editor, _Today in the Word_
---
|
---

| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b88f3a4e2bd94bd1a961c250895fc911&_e=ursgNI8cM9-dmfVs72qpHmvU-yCKPl98GG39zjbALZvlVFu7QGJg2diLtBvuIBMx5KMNMUICcMHmKYlC5XGyd4JR4GpWS6yTIZcF-bJsv307zG6gsQPkCY5IJOwZonDo6xUYqNO8cNHFkzpf37_Ryu1aoIMS42vpIJPX2NN5Nj1gQA7Yt5bp3q4Gl1p7GTrOWzdUAUokuWopysjAIGBw6clXj6_prfp9PjZanIu69k5kBmZTqbPbDTgCvs03DHE-q-YaCZg17XmV4X5ZSJHaPTGZH1yzww1R6BKlarx5Rgg54iuewXBqhtWOz6AKwXZIt8-lSoiSvFEvFfh822HhyAx3RXhk-vJFgwgitJVe-NSv6P4OU-njweydBTJlgr2vxpEPZtUlWe3tYcOLlHnLALPiM2SH3qiPE1xUM38Jg5mPWOS94ZfmGWWpJAEZv4lWOyLWAqKTfJTAKr9Ttb_O7gQkF6UE8qjRNFuwSdbo1Fg%3D)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b88f3a4e2bd94bd1a961c250895fc911&_e=ursgNI8cM9-dmfVs72qpHmvU-yCKPl98GG39zjbALZvlVFu7QGJg2diLtBvuIBMx5KMNMUICcMHmKYlC5XGyd4JR4GpWS6yTIZcF-bJsv307zG6gsQPkCY5IJOwZonDo6xUYqNO8cNHFkzpf37_Ryu1aoIMS42vpIJPX2NN5Nj1gQA7Yt5bp3q4Gl1p7GTrOWzdUAUokuWopysjAIGBw6clXj6_prfp9PjZanIu69k5kBmZTqbPbDTgCvs03DHE-q-YaCZg17XmV4X5ZSJHaPTGZH1yzww1R6BKlarx5Rgg54iuewXBqhtWOz6AKwXZIt8-lSoiSvFEvFfh822HhyFnQkNR7QdQ5LJuXkkua2advA9CFmRUymfmQzTBW4xSCvl1dDe869DDTTfJHXJWI3a_oZ_mkZhl0Be__wIroN_mIJC3WD_ChL8yiqb_6IclmL4WZpLCcMA44Sq8k2zUJel_k3wNxGZjMJ04R0b-JE50%3D) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b88f3a4e2bd94bd1a961c250895fc911&_e=ursgNI8cM9-dmfVs72qpHmvU-yCKPl98GG39zjbALZvlVFu7QGJg2diLtBvuIBMx5KMNMUICcMHmKYlC5XGyd4JR4GpWS6yTIZcF-bJsv307zG6gsQPkCY5IJOwZonDo6xUYqNO8cNHFkzpf37_Ryu1aoIMS42vpIJPX2NN5Nj1gQA7Yt5bp3q4Gl1p7GTrOWzdUAUokuWopysjAIGBw6clXj6_prfp9PjZanIu69k5kBmZTqbPbDTgCvs03DHE-q-YaCZg17XmV4X5ZSJHaPTGZH1yzww1R6BKlarx5Rgg54iuewXBqhtWOz6AKwXZIt8-lSoiSvFEvFfh822HhyP-R_xw0gxBiQ22WQM2zKXns-YISTlHqf1t0GpwiuOQMRy900QPA7O9XtMTZ8IYblSEtYVR380xC_jD_bpLCQkKcD065hCdCu9uRdK-jlOfZXbU5fpP7xvixcBV9VE3a4thX92VISGDjNMX1I03Ivyk%3D) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b88f3a4e2bd94bd1a961c250895fc911&_e=ursgNI8cM9-dmfVs72qpHmvU-yCKPl98GG39zjbALZvlVFu7QGJg2diLtBvuIBMx5KMNMUICcMHmKYlC5XGyd4JR4GpWS6yTIZcF-bJsv307zG6gsQPkCY5IJOwZonDo6xUYqNO8cNHFkzpf37_Ryu1aoIMS42vpIJPX2NN5Nj1gQA7Yt5bp3q4Gl1p7GTrOWzdUAUokuWopysjAIGBw6clXj6_prfp9PjZanIu69k5kBmZTqbPbDTgCvs03DHE-q-YaCZg17XmV4X5ZSJHaPTGZH1yzww1R6BKlarx5Rgg54iuewXBqhtWOz6AKwXZIt8-lSoiSvFEvFfh822HhyBOkYp4ECfzh3npb0rfkAgp1egkFVcYpgAvzzbxK8w_2ikLfMkYTXqxoMoLIt5ydjFHPvyrRLypMr4nzFDwdL7FZ6nVxOlLLuLqkwTgxHIRe37BLcjxvoSCXzDDUGZuUu-guk0Xa5apbG2mwr0f1ecg%3D)
[ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b88f3a4e2bd94bd1a961c250895fc911&_e=ursgNI8cM9-dmfVs72qpHmvU-yCKPl98GG39zjbALZvlVFu7QGJg2diLtBvuIBMx5KMNMUICcMHmKYlC5XGyd4JR4GpWS6yTIZcF-bJsv307zG6gsQPkCY5IJOwZonDo6xUYqNO8cNHFkzpf37_Ryu1aoIMS42vpIJPX2NN5Nj1gQA7Yt5bp3q4Gl1p7GTrOWzdUAUokuWopysjAIGBw6clXj6_prfp9PjZanIu69k5kBmZTqbPbDTgCvs03DHE-q-YaCZg17XmV4X5ZSJHaPTGZH1yzww1R6BKlarx5Rgg54iuewXBqhtWOz6AKwXZIt8-lSoiSvFEvFfh822HhyKrRuc4q0ODjrO-QdmoxU-raJgzQn6eidTCrn7vhp_b-Uc3at1y7nY1dEHkmKu5mQVs_uMz8dcYt1t4EjP3BHe_ygA_PlsL6-aRKirk6M6-yIOrNy7dmgam59THeCNZxfQRi6Yzd8KdDqy3Fq1SvMTY%3D)
What makes [hear.com's](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b88f3a4e2bd94bd1a961c250895fc911&_e=ursgNI8cM9-dmfVs72qpHmvU-yCKPl98GG39zjbALZvlVFu7QGJg2diLtBvuIBMx5KMNMUICcMHmKYlC5XGyd4JR4GpWS6yTIZcF-bJsv307zG6gsQPkCY5IJOwZonDo6xUYqNO8cNHFkzpf37_Ryu1aoIMS42vpIJPX2NN5Nj1gQA7Yt5bp3q4Gl1p7GTrOWzdUAUokuWopysjAIGBw6clXj6_prfp9PjZanIu69k5kBmZTqbPbDTgCvs03DHE-q-YaCZg17XmV4X5ZSJHaPTGZH1yzww1R6BKlarx5Rgg54iuewXBqhtWOz6AKwXZIt8-lSoiSvFEvFfh822HhyGP8SWkn2O6ZWdPmEElPnapqt5_YUsuMDO9UCNAxokj1ZhDWna85b2GnkntUEDDH-rqY2MttF9MEmz0AAsonSgEfDosffuGyB6gcpX6bPPI6oC9Oo42BJUzW4awb-P3haHoLlmMsp9uuJO3L4ysHTQw%3D) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b88f3a4e2bd94bd1a961c250895fc911&_e=ursgNI8cM9-dmfVs72qpHmvU-yCKPl98GG39zjbALZvlVFu7QGJg2diLtBvuIBMx5KMNMUICcMHmKYlC5XGyd4JR4GpWS6yTIZcF-bJsv307zG6gsQPkCY5IJOwZonDo6xUYqNO8cNHFkzpf37_Ryu1aoIMS42vpIJPX2NN5Nj1gQA7Yt5bp3q4Gl1p7GTrOWzdUAUokuWopysjAIGBw6clXj6_prfp9PjZanIu69k5kBmZTqbPbDTgCvs03DHE-q-YaCZg17XmV4X5ZSJHaPTGZH1yzww1R6BKlarx5Rgg54iuewXBqhtWOz6AKwXZIt8-lSoiSvFEvFfh822HhyJQuFj-zU5Ni7Oz69zdQNWMrXcdhEYLr5a3FXvWiTl6-aI9_IPsiK2e3BMSXZLPa5EJKs-2d9uygmv8_30RKmnSczO3lbrlWl918fRUuxtOb5Sc1gPiyGQcgtAiK3PevKDeV-LNjCftEgl59gVgXb_U%3D) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b88f3a4e2bd94bd1a961c250895fc911&_e=ursgNI8cM9-dmfVs72qpHmvU-yCKPl98GG39zjbALZvlVFu7QGJg2diLtBvuIBMx5KMNMUICcMHmKYlC5XGyd4JR4GpWS6yTIZcF-bJsv307zG6gsQPkCY5IJOwZonDo6xUYqNO8cNHFkzpf37_Ryu1aoIMS42vpIJPX2NN5Nj1gQA7Yt5bp3q4Gl1p7GTrOWzdUAUokuWopysjAIGBw6clXj6_prfp9PjZanIu69k5kBmZTqbPbDTgCvs03DHE-q-YaCZg17XmV4X5ZSJHaPTGZH1yzww1R6BKlarx5Rgg54iuewXBqhtWOz6AKwXZIt8-lSoiSvFEvFfh822HhyPsjX6yiNKKRUDFHd4Rlsh4trxFxHa19AQxu66P1MNz1xv1b0YJzzzMtT44PRtkT9caVtDypa5dVe_YTVnPYrbq-pQ0PhLusbzq5nBvDO6Uhk45wuzY26YctfMAwNjCxhXWlrupjMYewoqntbIkGYa0%3D) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**

clean_body: Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts | | Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result. The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry, and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade. It's new IX hearing aid. And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It’s no wonder IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes IX hearing aid so special? It’s one of the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing. This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small. The result? An unprecedented amount of power and clarity. This means that IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. “It's not just about volume,” explains founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.” In other words: with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design! Limited no-risk trials now available Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. Get started today. Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

| We’re getting ready for what’s to come, Peter. In just one month, Trump will be back in the White House as the 47th President of the United States. Ugh. His administration’s plans are already in motion. From having a TV doctor to a Fox News host running this country, we know they’ll do EVERYTHING they can to sign any Project 2025 line item into law from the jump. Though things look bleak, we are the ones who decide how far Trump can go. But that means we have to come together, organize and unite our communities as one against these extremist, MAGA policies that will hurt our neighbors, economy, and democracy. Because before you know it, local and state elections for 2025 will be here to stop the chaos from the Trump administration. And in less than two years, Democrats are setting their sights to win back the House and Senate to stop all the nonsense. [But in order to fight back, we need to prepare for this next stage of defending our democracy. Will you chip in just $5 to ensure that we put up as many safeguards as possible before Trump gets inaugurated?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4cf1fd0d-dbd5-4d76-91d2-861e7cf49b2c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T07b8ccbc-7836-4d4b-b499-c16078c71daa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Before they're gone
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b0864f21bf1348399cf1a8f23095b8d0&_e=R-r7qP4-hKKm4PI6v8by1ob5jM2z2qHAZRqYa_i_f2Sxk7K2PN_lya_nLsL_EPSJe8g936d4pH0SnDTzTLJNgIThf_LWh7QlW24RkBswXqQ2aH5b4ogCnVOVUv3cq6lVYnfZw5UCk6ZSmukQgONqYD_2ApqhreZ_YwQn8dPjOenC_bjHNJcRQR4sa5F0Ghv-50iLwwuC5TdkR_BwTjrWCEC_j3O5h0l0rRG1gbmvLAK8X_Ige1LAbudl0h-l2GUZ98esqafDjdA8bOIxh_DrnaG2u16G7IANFj_zhwqcerO26D-D8yvMI79L3Vc1633GpzYhmGUWtgDU5QZmCiqs5JaXA3Y380VAO7I27umiedaytZccvdBFiIzJ9wcDtA9uB9UXP0GYGb78lmwwJx4bMxv89_zVP6_vuIBhg3PM8trq8aFT7nM4Ze4vBJ0zNiPn) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **" The Second World Wars."**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b0864f21bf1348399cf1a8f23095b8d0&_e=R-r7qP4-hKKm4PI6v8by1ob5jM2z2qHAZRqYa_i_f2Sxk7K2PN_lya_nLsL_EPSJe8g936d4pH0SnDTzTLJNgIThf_LWh7QlW24RkBswXqQ2aH5b4ogCnVOVUv3cq6lVYnfZw5UCk6ZSmukQgONqYD_2ApqhreZ_YwQn8dPjOenC_bjHNJcRQR4sa5F0Ghv-50iLwwuC5TdkR_BwTjrWCEC_j3O5h0l0rRG1gbmvLAK8X_Ige1LAbudl0h-l2GUZ98esqafDjdA8bOIxh_DrnQ2pFUlFQhsuBksuYWwq6rFJUT5FLsThnlKkcfKGRueaokkvWW58yfyNHLDnxP7dRDPPNssT1eA8Zc7jfx1_HoISpti7Z9sknlVW8BNb7Me9geAuk763yL4Gsv6wl6HqUP59Vz9Bhsgd3L_tC52YKmeWjm0w8EnTtcSb9Zrtar5s) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of **" The Second World Wars"** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b0864f21bf1348399cf1a8f23095b8d0&_e=R-r7qP4-hKKm4PI6v8by1ob5jM2z2qHAZRqYa_i_f2Sxk7K2PN_lya_nLsL_EPSJe8g936d4pH0SnDTzTLJNgIThf_LWh7QlW24RkBswXqQ2aH5b4ogCnVOVUv3cq6lVYnfZw5UCk6ZSmukQgONqYD_2ApqhreZ_YwQn8dPjOenC_bjHNJcRQR4sa5F0Ghv-50iLwwuC5TdkR_BwTjrWCEC_j3O5h0l0rRG1gbmvLAK8X_Ige1LAbudl0h-l2GUZ98esqafDjdA8bOIxh_DrnUeB_XlHFFDpCIz5G5nkJvJ4q237uUq4BOa9B0dy2ZBL7RZTUwTnzii2mzeSS8tAD-J-mVTXr2icIdjTz3w23sY4F4zTcsQ0fPpq3HNZbcaQ_tfu5eW0ksjtKptD6sZ_m4uHCxDe3WVdykvfB-1OCK09TUpbBeoQhheu_j9eGLY5)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **" The Second World Wars"** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b0864f21bf1348399cf1a8f23095b8d0&_e=R-r7qP4-hKKm4PI6v8by1ob5jM2z2qHAZRqYa_i_f2Sxk7K2PN_lya_nLsL_EPSJe8g936d4pH0SnDTzTLJNgIThf_LWh7QlW24RkBswXqQ2aH5b4ogCnVOVUv3cq6lVYnfZw5UCk6ZSmukQgONqYD_2ApqhreZ_YwQn8dPjOenC_bjHNJcRQR4sa5F0Ghv-50iLwwuC5TdkR_BwTjrWCEC_j3O5h0l0rRG1gbmvLAK8X_Ige1LAbudl0h-l2GUZ98esqafDjdA8bOIxh_DrnS49OYfgmu9r46GyYmyHeW61j9QvYhjtIrQmAKHpAiCWH4NKPy37DcqpsPrAVKDvN1INpMZ45UlbD595KxCSDOJmZMOb3e1TyRiNh66eVZXhf1XB4znJh-tZSNzLq3mR9iJhI3To782V2RRuR9gLtt3w06klqxnaEwFZGyPNqFK3)**

name: Jamie Janosz, Managing Editor at Today in the Word
subject: Claim your Hillsdale College Calendar
body:
Even as we celebrate the Christmas season and reflect on the incredible gift of hope we have in Jesus Christ

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=145b177ba8104aae9644d5e308d8283d&_e=JalPTWPjPFGgGnvqYzZaRQWJTlzQQWSMyj8YLT_CUdOehg4pi0SL033iIHnntRfqwSEvOZsAVjiSNhKpCeW-a81kQK6LleoTufM9-rmkyE-UT4IBxPQwv90P0H_h0wBeKg8xtl_UsEhNYAjVmWNDhrfMFky2mdYPq6wLVMWSqxG5oEiDk5YaOLE_hAaUvS1x5g2Uer7kEtMQysEd8OWxYa7hM8Nmk9RNsTvDVedCCQG1FyU_RNpmaWhLQF3l2X0oqD3YZHDiUwr3Q4OF4n1k0EuBsOcd_dorkRfx42o_RiKRUmSP0fgBMP5MgEZ5ztzctC2rAQ85kI9J-BZDY3CHJw%3D%3D)
---

Hey there Friend, ____ Even as we celebrate the Christmas season and reflect on the incredible gift of hope we have in Jesus Christ, I am sure you are reminded of the challenge before us: how do we live out that hope in a world that seems so increasingly distant from God?

It's a question we all wrestle with, especially as we witness significant cultural shifts that oppose our biblical convictions. In times like these, we need practical wisdom, encouragement, and a clear vision for how to live as faithful followers of Christ.

[That's where This Light of Mine: Living Like Jesus in a Non-Jesus World comes in.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=145b177ba8104aae9644d5e308d8283d&_e=JalPTWPjPFGgGnvqYzZaRQWJTlzQQWSMyj8YLT_CUdOehg4pi0SL033iIHnntRfqwSEvOZsAVjiSNhKpCeW-a81kQK6LleoTufM9-rmkyE-UT4IBxPQwv90P0H_h0wBeKg8xtl_UsEhNYAjVmWNDhrfMFky2mdYPq6wLVMWSqxG5oEiDk5YaOLE_hAaUvS1xW4W_d-jFU-sbh9yAtWIysYwRx0DBAu83HW0VNw0sN2TtY7dEY4dTC8sUoXoFps0xuGAS9uzJ3OP0GDxY911u_xV8w-uEthpyykD2m5c0VPKwuNfP272vSMN53f4MBFt705k0vHH12QzPBWl_Me1B8A%3D%3D)

In this powerful book, Dr. Joseph Stowell (a name you may recognize as the former president of Moody Bible Institute) offers a timely call for Christians to stop fighting battles for an earthly kingdom and instead embrace the privilege of advancing Christ's Kingdom. Drawing from Scripture and the life of Jesus, Dr. Stowell shows how we can respond to today's challenges with hope, courage, and grace.

As we interact with a culture that often feels divided and broken,_This Light of Mine_ encourages us to reflect Jesus' love and truth in a way that draws others to the Gospel--without alienating them. It encourages us to rise above the noise and shine God's light in a world desperately in need of it.

We'd love to send you an exclusive, pre-release copy of _This Light of Mine_ as a thank-you for your generous gift of any amount to support the mission of _Today in the Word_. Your gift today will help us continue providing Bible-centered resources to readers across the globe.

Whether you're seeking practical advice for living out your faith in a complex world or simply need encouragement to stay steady in your walk with Christ, _This Light of Mine_ is a timely and powerful tool for your journey.

Give today at this link and receive this book as a thank-you: [https://give.todayintheword.org/cye-tdw](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=145b177ba8104aae9644d5e308d8283d&_e=JalPTWPjPFGgGnvqYzZaRQWJTlzQQWSMyj8YLT_CUdOehg4pi0SL033iIHnntRfqwSEvOZsAVjiSNhKpCeW-a81kQK6LleoTufM9-rmkyE-UT4IBxPQwv90P0H_h0wBeKg8xtl_UsEhNYAjVmWNDhrfMFky2mdYPq6wLVMWSqxG5oEiDk5YaOLE_hAaUvS1xlFoMoptPx3zH2LChqEtvQTcxsmQPu-ZbWpSC3gLdgGi4GcKgGfwhFLdqOqJviCHUNTEJcvY6-KTOd_5R5wuLrCE9-huVzgUiivV8U4R6YWfamyvzhGYR-CrMiCVD0uelHabPLHVgR_08xwFaR1aSIA%3D%3D)

When you give today, you not only support the mission of _Today in the Word_ to spread the Gospel but you will also receive this transformative book that will inspire and equip you to live out your Christian faith with boldness and love.

[Can I count on you to partner with us in this season of giving? Together, we can shine the light of Jesus in a world that desperately needs it.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=145b177ba8104aae9644d5e308d8283d&_e=JalPTWPjPFGgGnvqYzZaRQWJTlzQQWSMyj8YLT_CUdOehg4pi0SL033iIHnntRfqwSEvOZsAVjiSNhKpCeW-a81kQK6LleoTufM9-rmkyE-UT4IBxPQwv90P0H_h0wBeKg8xtl_UsEhNYAjVmWNDhrfMFky2mdYPq6wLVMWSqxG5oEiDk5YaOLE_hAaUvS1xBV54jgl3Jt-lbmVPunEsh2I2V5lo4JW1_XSjjkV9_JYAkNkJiWDZTsC9k9GAVEf0JVb-5JMs6ssmxguOaCY1hcXcnr1rB2Stage3eYbnthqvtw0fzIhCNoP3aE_3iKl7D80kzAA2vs5zwXVWQsG7gw%3D%3D)

Thank you for your generosity and for being part of this important mission.

With gratitude,

Jamie Janosz
Managing Editor, _Today in the Word_

clean_body: Even as we celebrate the Christmas season and reflect on the incredible gift of hope we have in Jesus Christ | | | Hey there Friend, __ Even as we celebrate the Christmas season and reflect on the incredible gift of hope we have in Jesus Christ, I am sure you are reminded of the challenge before us: how do we live out that hope in a world that seems so increasingly distant from God? It's a question we all wrestle with, especially as we witness significant cultural shifts that oppose our biblical convictions. In times like these, we need practical wisdom, encouragement, and a clear vision for how to live as faithful followers of Christ. In this powerful book, Dr. Joseph Stowell (a name you may recognize as the former president of Moody Bible Institute) offers a timely call for Christians to stop fighting battles for an earthly kingdom and instead embrace the privilege of advancing Christ's Kingdom. Drawing from Scripture and the life of Jesus, Dr. Stowell shows how we can respond to today's challenges with hope, courage, and grace. As we interact with a culture that often feels divided and broken,This Light of Mine encourages us to reflect Jesus' love and truth in a way that draws others to the Gospel--without alienating them. It encourages us to rise above the noise and shine God's light in a world desperately in need of it. We'd love to send you an exclusive, pre-release copy of This Light of Mine as a thank-you for your generous gift of any amount to support the mission of Today in the Word. Your gift today will help us continue providing Bible-centered resources to readers across the globe. Whether you're seeking practical advice for living out your faith in a complex world or simply need encouragement to stay steady in your walk with Christ, This Light of Mine is a timely and powerful tool for your journey. Give today at this link and receive this book as a thank-you: When you give today, you not only support the mission of Today in the Word to spread the Gospel but you will also receive this transformative book that will inspire and equip you to live out your Christian faith with boldness and love. Thank you for your generosity and for being part of this important mission. With gratitude, Jamie Janosz Managing Editor, Today in the Word | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: Request Your Exclusive A Christmas Carol Keepsake Today
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsYZDleWNP

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osYZDleWNP

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in
London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge!
A squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous
old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever
struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and
solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer
Scrooge is one of my favorites.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm
always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I
missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' A
Christmas Carol."

Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst
the playful language of A Christmas Carol, Dickens reveals that
Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life,
Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything.
In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his
friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as
"self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the
busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps
explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to
"honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter the world of Ebenezer
Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew
and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday
lives.

You can request a hardcover Hillsdale College edition of A
Christmas Carol by clicking on the link below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/64077696:sYZDleWNP:m:3:2532013465:5665ACB9F4A7A5EFFDF046B3FED9A7FC:r

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep
Christmas well.

Merry Christmas to you and yours,

Bill Gray, '01

Vice President

Institutional Advancement

Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=467129a096e845c4b3a089aa39685435&_e=pj3g7OlNybl-6E-nlTC1AjF2YLfQwE7NLF1X3ejjYRa8Ofc1OYc-phrOoYpQ8tfwOR2Xrj3QdOhPyZZX1rWbzaeEiYNgcjaieBY1QfXswx9XTbsQxFpreYeFLOOe8u1P0GabpEffkdW54mlQ9w4G1TMFi7fFJgclIxYerH8dunq-KMO2IppBrSeisrlfjBy1xTh-KbBLhj7ZKfCIwH2FwvUqod-odyvd4ih1XtYCo-RFzfSgyMbHFKq0kY9BYyn2dofHYDb4csrAMaWZuLCDb2t2sJoIZZErFOTVMYaxZVz2auGuwagGMDKwmZPeCgw-oGsN1VUvLbw5RzZ3OY_BuA4IE6KJqt68ZXxL1wjvdmi1pEg9ZmsJ1LSpVjwpRDJm1rrCFCFR7wWjeEgoDpS0a47XLIvk4q02okdnacogN_a-mxUnYgU-msQBCtgoW8kz) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=467129a096e845c4b3a089aa39685435&_e=pj3g7OlNybl-6E-nlTC1AjF2YLfQwE7NLF1X3ejjYRa8Ofc1OYc-phrOoYpQ8tfwOR2Xrj3QdOhPyZZX1rWbzaeEiYNgcjaieBY1QfXswx9XTbsQxFpreYeFLOOe8u1P0GabpEffkdW54mlQ9w4G1TMFi7fFJgclIxYerH8dunq-KMO2IppBrSeisrlfjBy1xTh-KbBLhj7ZKfCIwH2FwvUqod-odyvd4ih1XtYCo-RFzfSgyMbHFKq0kY9BYyn2dofHYDb4csrAMaWZuLCDb0o0zOVtyvuiIOzIwMtTMGj3zyt1CF73eYh6R6Gud5md2nSOEVF8aK7shQadEKqw5-UbTG3gCeV4hTnjuCRacexmt4Tak9cMyQbEIZFJ2u_MoWZhyga9fbBcneCKYNGNCbXIYKl0HQ_TP7CE-3lE2iSquHcdPj5c8V716_fDzbse) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=467129a096e845c4b3a089aa39685435&_e=pj3g7OlNybl-6E-nlTC1AjF2YLfQwE7NLF1X3ejjYRa8Ofc1OYc-phrOoYpQ8tfwOR2Xrj3QdOhPyZZX1rWbzaeEiYNgcjaieBY1QfXswx9XTbsQxFpreYeFLOOe8u1P0GabpEffkdW54mlQ9w4G1TMFi7fFJgclIxYerH8dunq-KMO2IppBrSeisrlfjBy1xTh-KbBLhj7ZKfCIwH2FwvUqod-odyvd4ih1XtYCo-RFzfSgyMbHFKq0kY9BYyn2dofHYDb4csrAMaWZuLCDb4S3UBpexS5axwnkhllfHoUT5iinj4OMcP_KMmAF6LIfVPTtSFv6vTQjmQl2abee7VqMK7PmnNA3Vna4bNTQzodCIt-X60lLm9uif7cCdPfsBGg8aeGybXd-29F-SPOpa83-5u3QFTnk_iCiMMuui4jz0UkfhZoxA3AN5W5YXODq)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=467129a096e845c4b3a089aa39685435&_e=pj3g7OlNybl-6E-nlTC1AjF2YLfQwE7NLF1X3ejjYRa8Ofc1OYc-phrOoYpQ8tfwOR2Xrj3QdOhPyZZX1rWbzaeEiYNgcjaieBY1QfXswx9XTbsQxFpreYeFLOOe8u1P0GabpEffkdW54mlQ9w4G1TMFi7fFJgclIxYerH8dunq-KMO2IppBrSeisrlfjBy1xTh-KbBLhj7ZKfCIwH2FwvUqod-odyvd4ih1XtYCo-RFzfSgyMbHFKq0kY9BYyn2dofHYDb4csrAMaWZuLCDb0pa8NjhZW7DNr5wbrNSc4RJqWEloIVk76wK_wWmeKi4lwAU_WFpZhJmTBgpxP_taVYVnWBPyyeOYzUwmbdnliUvYTcV7rxS9e2ZlWnq2I663I05sQdfv5tla4exFJBCQA9TOpI5Xbxlpe-7kFGTY6d3f0fCYnUI4pGrLviobCMN)**

**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9TxLEMA4P0dVRtiZxC1SQA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpR-TYP0TqaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPVJPTi0yMDI0MTIwVwNzcGNCCmdVF0xlZ3nDA-hSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9TxLEMA4P0dVRtiZxC1SQA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpR-TYP0TqaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPVJPTi0yMDI0MTIwVwNzcGNCCmdVF0xlZ3nDA-hSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9TxLEMA4P0dVRtiZxC1SQA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpR-TYP0TqaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPVJPTi0yMDI0MTIwVwNzcGNCCmdVF0xlZ3nDA-hSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
[ ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9TxLEMA4P0dVRtiZxC1SQA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpR-TYP0TqaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPVJPTi0yMDI0MTIwVwNzcGNCCmdVF0xlZ3nDA-hSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
What makes [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9TxLEMA4P0dVRtiZxC1SQA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpR-TYP0TqaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPVJPTi0yMDI0MTIwVwNzcGNCCmdVF0xlZ3nDA-hSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9TxLEMA4P0dVRtiZxC1SQA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpR-TYP0TqaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPVJPTi0yMDI0MTIwVwNzcGNCCmdVF0xlZ3nDA-hSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9TxLEMA4P0dVRtiZxC1SQA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpR-TYP0TqaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPVJPTi0yMDI0MTIwVwNzcGNCCmdVF0xlZ3nDA-hSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[ Check if you qualify ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9TxLEMA4P0dVRtiZxC1SQA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpR-TYP0TqaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPVJPTi0yMDI0MTIwVwNzcGNCCmdVF0xlZ3nDA-hSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4de17083665a405fbdbf5c106546de0b&_e=KWLkvt7XOQfEncX14b2R8Z5q4B81gTeOilrUyw4XIoBeVumsx0N2EWX668431JylYmp2-uHyFihJKnwr_K5EC9q9dGqHCW6Vp7nbun9DOyQyAiJ8ETC5GIGeQgAkGQKkT_fyv4nmCQclUbtapGDODin0LeEhxZBK9csigMQUtFPypVRG3b_XyaCWIVb7QF8bND3nwRg-4-976r1zfKTVpGSxiElMjJ7xX0XVQm3Gg8yNUVPJxNvJcs_RxRbeqZQ5e1-Z65vAQL12-O279n6TaDe6J3Le8shki05j8pFlZ_8p_e7uVLshKgvJAp8f2SYsY5fvKQfbUU86y2M0GHc83la1-hkN3GyrNm-z0b_QsthTmZs18FPp3ECrcAYUkiCQRX5fM0NStEFfcNUrQIN6dDmwVoJhxXY6QjiUxfZ9aTEStbpi8hLfBcX2qodzMgzq) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4de17083665a405fbdbf5c106546de0b&_e=KWLkvt7XOQfEncX14b2R8Z5q4B81gTeOilrUyw4XIoBeVumsx0N2EWX668431JylYmp2-uHyFihJKnwr_K5EC9q9dGqHCW6Vp7nbun9DOyQyAiJ8ETC5GIGeQgAkGQKkT_fyv4nmCQclUbtapGDODin0LeEhxZBK9csigMQUtFPypVRG3b_XyaCWIVb7QF8bND3nwRg-4-976r1zfKTVpGSxiElMjJ7xX0XVQm3Gg8yNUVPJxNvJcs_RxRbeqZQ5e1-Z65vAQL12-O279n6TaFQ9LNcfHbjCsJwJSAWNehXrhlION4v4fwV-xpSEkm9qH63qe3yunJ-NkZ5WZH7-99ilrB_xNxIAzDuImMTFo0ZvQqrQHWM76e86EdYxlOZsYETSxL2lmC5yeUQm-7S2sjO6upeArbea8kJEGyT7jP-IwteOxJBCnhlpRIXZJN19) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4de17083665a405fbdbf5c106546de0b&_e=KWLkvt7XOQfEncX14b2R8Z5q4B81gTeOilrUyw4XIoBeVumsx0N2EWX668431JylYmp2-uHyFihJKnwr_K5EC9q9dGqHCW6Vp7nbun9DOyQyAiJ8ETC5GIGeQgAkGQKkT_fyv4nmCQclUbtapGDODin0LeEhxZBK9csigMQUtFPypVRG3b_XyaCWIVb7QF8bND3nwRg-4-976r1zfKTVpGSxiElMjJ7xX0XVQm3Gg8yNUVPJxNvJcs_RxRbeqZQ5e1-Z65vAQL12-O279n6TaHEgV61pBoUv656NTdgtgNPRuf6hlgOg9jGJ5qdHWt4CMQyOhm0KfqcjrFzkqHlbK81_vzb8CaUjT5kYHR1AWlPLl7bPiGDpqH7ev3OXK9kqwyq5P_9d9iCd6yBeiTtbUdIDf93A8s9rmRrbLwiUcr7-qH6pkU9MWUHPBbaGuOFc)**

Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=772ca74072124238a136c232e52e9d77&_e=g0cNBTftJek4j9PDnUFyXW3tnKZBATeWFLQPeoDE-i5Ctx9nslFPhDET5lXA3DxlK8joFeaUkjKEIwczlkyCgItmOab_Ct09hFQzrxpTAjFbP6F5JLpSiIDmIthWrnXKkRj0BoUHp6jZr80Y4QWJDJ72a3xM4FZwYQuhYM_SfU9OoYczbiLYfiOmPvUCnWXCUF-sr6_flBIBZaGHHOVtVSD9UIf5rBj_eCVYUoYO_lJ15lnWw3935cXOKfqIe42rpeADwJJ9pmBEuRfn8cbkgXxV9O9J16Ltf2OvCxLhHrE7obzog5DRoquseXJglD3lz6HZM4JH8gRT99vIrEFtTHrlB6FMei2-XvP1VYpyRC6osiPCTTFzvLsQ4JAh3VuDX81TixP9VQUsYmsaKGfH5zLFN5IK3uFCNMSoEKyeagoMGRPgxx_JuP5djr73J3u5NCHTwAvN1aZQUi3IwK75K_9wbjZObw83fKyhAg0sXvc%3D) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=772ca74072124238a136c232e52e9d77&_e=g0cNBTftJek4j9PDnUFyXW3tnKZBATeWFLQPeoDE-i5Ctx9nslFPhDET5lXA3DxlK8joFeaUkjKEIwczlkyCgItmOab_Ct09hFQzrxpTAjFbP6F5JLpSiIDmIthWrnXKkRj0BoUHp6jZr80Y4QWJDJ72a3xM4FZwYQuhYM_SfU9OoYczbiLYfiOmPvUCnWXCUF-sr6_flBIBZaGHHOVtVSD9UIf5rBj_eCVYUoYO_lJ15lnWw3935cXOKfqIe42rpeADwJJ9pmBEuRfn8cbkgXxV9O9J16Ltf2OvCxLhHrE7obzog5DRoquseXJglD3lz6HZM4JH8gRT99vIrEFtTK-TfM9jfV_eWtJhQYGkgI6ShhL7HCZgmqK45kFcJk8J5PZD_cVjXoK-pAjjHzTnpVqQUHZP3isBjffXTlA_EsuFwwIVW-rDpB40x4tCJt-OpBd2-T62ePnJ6D5XU2vRwAOUUmNxgdFIJTWs-BhIGpc%3D) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.

What makes [hear.com's](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=772ca74072124238a136c232e52e9d77&_e=g0cNBTftJek4j9PDnUFyXW3tnKZBATeWFLQPeoDE-i5Ctx9nslFPhDET5lXA3DxlK8joFeaUkjKEIwczlkyCgItmOab_Ct09hFQzrxpTAjFbP6F5JLpSiIDmIthWrnXKkRj0BoUHp6jZr80Y4QWJDJ72a3xM4FZwYQuhYM_SfU9OoYczbiLYfiOmPvUCnWXCUF-sr6_flBIBZaGHHOVtVSD9UIf5rBj_eCVYUoYO_lJ15lnWw3935cXOKfqIe42rpeADwJJ9pmBEuRfn8cbkgXxV9O9J16Ltf2OvCxLhHrE7obzog5DRoquseXJglD3lz6HZM4JH8gRT99vIrEFtTNiU1l1_UxJP2vP2JpgwH8mXQnl4Mi355Qj7YSJrJ3EGJvwD3Q0L0WtGd1o6CoPaKqMol9DMheIyBNGUHrHvx9c6I0Npp6SHNo0_odNGXM_AUxbXv3XLP3BAOQbiBo_5iDJYjajiusDOED6tBdwOHAM%3D) IX hearing aid so special?

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=772ca74072124238a136c232e52e9d77&_e=g0cNBTftJek4j9PDnUFyXW3tnKZBATeWFLQPeoDE-i5Ctx9nslFPhDET5lXA3DxlK8joFeaUkjKEIwczlkyCgItmOab_Ct09hFQzrxpTAjFbP6F5JLpSiIDmIthWrnXKkRj0BoUHp6jZr80Y4QWJDJ72a3xM4FZwYQuhYM_SfU9OoYczbiLYfiOmPvUCnWXCUF-sr6_flBIBZaGHHOVtVSD9UIf5rBj_eCVYUoYO_lJ15lnWw3935cXOKfqIe42rpeADwJJ9pmBEuRfn8cbkgXxV9O9J16Ltf2OvCxLhHrE7obzog5DRoquseXJglD3lz6HZM4JH8gRT99vIrEFtTO9d5bhWI4zRsviQMKEHzoSrpJnEAj3L0RuouhQK3RcJNgX9vJ0aEdl3pz2BZvLPmaJYLu17N6du2mk6OAP-v6s4G053fCPyk-rUcPK1A7e75WQB0sZi8uPQGp4HV8pg5kqOi52wSDN56OK4Gn0HQ5k%3D) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

name: Patti Reilly
subject: Free my police officer son
body:
I'm praying you will help me save my son

| | | I was going through our family photos when I found this one from a past Christmas.
---
| |
---
Dear Friend, My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do. This Christmas season is especially hard as I continue to fight for Terence. And though you and I have never met, I'm praying you'll help me save him. I've been looking through so many photos of Terence this holiday season. Here are some from when he was just a little boy.
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2cd347f88fa0421f9e6802a53aabac4d&_e=NXYCKllvC7KA8A3BBq0fiSchTSzOHqhLD7oMLahzEN3VzLWWzWaDIdcuYSQpPM5hvIN09_240Io0K8Yi77RopqJEBc8vMNBrFz9yUaXSv41sW7CK9IMaHTgigkgK98iuN1N5pGdnWyYD7n7TY6W-VLqd8t6RE7lRZD0BMT13TSwGPSmj2kBU2NSnlnS7CoRXAp0g4y114v7gFyTtqA0CzIzGadOpsB8V1nB7HRgNEKp5IUj2_v_kZquNrb6DuVNuowpou-cQPtRHhW_2i9Qlb0DYVMZpVRg987DM1Pw80UdiYpJSTYMo_DcxCoXH8ZU4D_Pdf9cAchbKbD-ZW_70WhcXTxZibcfQps7pbUZ-FGo55WM26ZcW8GWGXUWi6MufWHDylz2ezqoqgjpBCCF2R7cSvtcY0yY-LGYQjYhJKjA%3D)
---
He always dreamed of following in his dad's footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy. I was so proud that night. Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder --** murder of a criminal my son didn't even touch.** **[**I'm praying you will help me save my son**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2cd347f88fa0421f9e6802a53aabac4d&_e=NXYCKllvC7KA8A3BBq0fiSchTSzOHqhLD7oMLahzEN3VzLWWzWaDIdcuYSQpPM5hvIN09_240Io0K8Yi77RopqJEBc8vMNBrFz9yUaXSv41sW7CK9IMaHTgigkgK98iuN1N5pGdnWyYD7n7TY6W-VLqd8t6RE7lRZD0BMT13TSwGPSmj2kBU2NSnlnS7CoRXAp0g4y114v7gFyTtqA0CzIzGadOpsB8V1nB7HRgNEKp5IUj2_v_kZquNrb6DuVNu1g0gvW9PHeCh710x20LNbMW6D_HFax0HIGV4BoJ56ROdiB1rrVdztclqt8oukesqx9flXFIP6D5NV77olGDVMp0V1_lG03kN8DwP0qO9FI9UlTJlnE02hyRo4mSK6FoJtaF_ZvrWZ6XR_2gD8gaR_jkuIx4ZtAvIFiTliM8MrNg%3D)** \-- **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020. Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang's territory. Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long -- including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge. When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter. Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs. My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car. Then it happened. Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car. After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here's where the story takes a shocking turn... Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd's death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy. They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist. There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires. Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon's death. **The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with ****Second-Degree Murder.** **Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced -- to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.** Now you understand why I'm so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear. My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year! But unless Terence's appeal is successful, he's going to prison -- which is why I'm urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence's defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops -- and their families -- at their lowest moments. We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence's conviction. So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone: **[**Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2cd347f88fa0421f9e6802a53aabac4d&_e=NXYCKllvC7KA8A3BBq0fiSchTSzOHqhLD7oMLahzEN3VzLWWzWaDIdcuYSQpPM5hvIN09_240Io0K8Yi77RopqJEBc8vMNBrFz9yUaXSv41sW7CK9IMaHTgigkgK98iuN1N5pGdnWyYD7n7TY6W-VLqd8t6RE7lRZD0BMT13TSwGPSmj2kBU2NSnlnS7CoRXAp0g4y114v7gFyTtqA0CzIzGadOpsB8V1nB7HRgNEKp5IUj2_v_kZquNrb6DuVNuSIdlmcMWx8AUVrPVkrtKkvEDT4b6DrISBSZ4moxTK1ymenUI-7HiNyYGuKrQFFwLck0Kp111td4CXmFUswV6Gir4-A-ZnN9w7eZGzCUqNZ5aZO0XR-8LoVEZ7QMvrLtXoNHuX8io9Xok04Vf1mB7Ikj-LIAOkp1segP6Rmr8ecY%3D)** I'm not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself -- though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders and a true Christmas miracle if you are able to help that way. **[**But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence's appeal over the next 12 months.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2cd347f88fa0421f9e6802a53aabac4d&_e=NXYCKllvC7KA8A3BBq0fiSchTSzOHqhLD7oMLahzEN3VzLWWzWaDIdcuYSQpPM5hvIN09_240Io0K8Yi77RopqJEBc8vMNBrFz9yUaXSv41sW7CK9IMaHTgigkgK98iuN1N5pGdnWyYD7n7TY6W-VLqd8t6RE7lRZD0BMT13TSwGPSmj2kBU2NSnlnS7CoRXAp0g4y114v7gFyTtqA0CzIzGadOpsB8V1nB7HRgNEKp5IUj2_v_kZquNrb6DuVNum-aZZFMh8nz8Vs83_J_qLcYPrsf5DGXTsfS9juISc0nphmWew62uBzdbebXsGB4pgXbSoQl9aJthtfp4YzTpHb48nW2pCeYADpREzmbPrWkx4xH3Ghg019xxMeAofY-mbXPK1GmZYa21rYUaPcHUXEuhLxVGUd75A79mM2PS88A%3D)** If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help. But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps I simply can't bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me. **[**So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2cd347f88fa0421f9e6802a53aabac4d&_e=NXYCKllvC7KA8A3BBq0fiSchTSzOHqhLD7oMLahzEN3VzLWWzWaDIdcuYSQpPM5hvIN09_240Io0K8Yi77RopqJEBc8vMNBrFz9yUaXSv41sW7CK9IMaHTgigkgK98iuN1N5pGdnWyYD7n7TY6W-VLqd8t6RE7lRZD0BMT13TSwGPSmj2kBU2NSnlnS7CoRXAp0g4y114v7gFyTtqA0CzIzGadOpsB8V1nB7HRgNEKp5IUj2_v_kZquNrb6DuVNuhtgShIDafX9OIJ9AISCRLWldU0e1_yiaWpad0sGF3pQZf36lqMoAgjNMNeAxzi9FarX_IoUD4BCvPxmdR_tuvezOsPHLotKr4G_v9LIlv67IqAbTqmW7zvD2CWAU9gg2hBJ7L24oq_2OCuG2lMfH1evDZIi_y_bwUUjHzD-U35k%3D)** **Any amount -- $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more -- will help.** And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly. Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you. Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today. And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers. I wish a very Merry Christmas to you and your family and ask that you please pray for mine.
---
Gratefully,
---
Patti Reilly
---
P.S. Don't get me wrong, I'm thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn't have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence's conviction overturned, it's going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**Will you please help make a Christmas miracle to save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2cd347f88fa0421f9e6802a53aabac4d&_e=NXYCKllvC7KA8A3BBq0fiSchTSzOHqhLD7oMLahzEN3VzLWWzWaDIdcuYSQpPM5hvIN09_240Io0K8Yi77RopqJEBc8vMNBrFz9yUaXSv41sW7CK9IMaHTgigkgK98iuN1N5pGdnWyYD7n7TY6W-VLqd8t6RE7lRZD0BMT13TSwGPSmj2kBU2NSnlnS7CoRXAp0g4y114v7gFyTtqA0CzIzGadOpsB8V1nB7HRgNEKp5IUj2_v_kZquNrb6DuVNuRHCI_Ud0suxBYh2IjDPNiYU43B6kJzid8bLxQqycM7Av8Ork50mWoRSFMoexT02kc1eomXsnYUFg5euzQI_IWfGhD84oExynacqOktZjWTn8pt9ZNKDHxx7u3bsSG3KroBf4TcxmEV-mX5svLmAHSeKPf2F45i5BqYhMf1XEOwk%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.

clean_body: I'm praying you will help me save my son | | | I was going through our family photos when I found this one from a past Christmas. | | Dear Friend, My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do. This Christmas season is especially hard as I continue to fight for Terence. And though you and I have never met, I'm praying you'll help me save him. I've been looking through so many photos of Terence this holiday season. Here are some from when he was just a little boy. He always dreamed of following in his dad's footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy. I was so proud that night. Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder -- murder of a criminal my son didn't even touch. \-- but first, let me explain what happened. Our nightmare started in October of 2020. Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang's territory. Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long -- including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge. When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter. Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs. My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car. Then it happened. Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car. After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here's where the story takes a shocking turn... Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd's death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy. They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist. There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires. Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon's death. The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder. Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced -- to 5 1⁄2 years in prison. Now you understand why I'm so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear. My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year! But unless Terence's appeal is successful, he's going to prison -- which is why I'm urgently turning to you for help today. The Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence's defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops -- and their families -- at their lowest moments. We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence's conviction. So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone: I'm not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself -- though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders and a true Christmas miracle if you are able to help that way. If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help. But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps I simply can't bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me. Any amount -- $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more -- will help. And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly. Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you. Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today. And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers. I wish a very Merry Christmas to you and your family and ask that you please pray for mine. Gratefully, Patti Reilly P.S. Don't get me wrong, I'm thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn't have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence's conviction overturned, it's going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare. | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

A train derailed after colliding with an 18-wheeler in Pecos, causing it to crash into the local Chamber of Commerce building. Two Union Pacific workers were killed, and three people inside the building suffered minor injuries.

# Friday, December 20, 2024

**Good morning!** On this day in 1886, the famed [Driskill Hotel opened in Austin](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFvszAQgOFfY29B5-OAePDwLWz51o7I2Ec41cQRXNPk31fp3v3RK70fl-kSpcjt-j9uHPS51AkB6eTwhDDlKOU1kc1hhuyd5eCGlnpPLXV2DX3CSBzPDr1Li-_OyUPqIA_Ot8QAVsI75hDBOfQEjfcLprjMfpgBGMgQcBate6MrKz_jsZRXffDepLrZElbV-2HafwZHg2Pe5fiUUtaqXN7C4Bjn-qUGR5WNi9zY4Gj3kO_fUooc_WAIrluUX271z8NHwJ8AAAD__yUGUrQ). Touted by the _Daily Statesman_ as "One of the Finest Hotels in the Whole Country," the Driskill has been the site of numerous gubernatorial inaugural balls and remains a popular meeting place for lawmakers, lobbyists, and business leaders. Check out [this video](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGuozAQheGngc7IHgzBhYtt6LLtlmiwhzCSwch2ILz9Kre__aejo__fc3oiB95ff3EjWz5LnECCFgoEyMkjh3vStbez9EbVZNWj1b3Rre7q1cLSOhj6Wc5yGFplOkduaQFVBwCKhprtd0wBSKXAaNkYs4DDZTaPWUqSutKSPJeYmrJSoQ_mJdzxpNS4uNXBrqUcuWr_VDBWMF7X1Wx3xh33EneOX1TBOL8z75RzBSOmwi7Q1-K9ReETn5QC5SwcJoFnZJ8FvnPhXWQXY6EkEntKQhkzdL2RzbEedbL-uDgEzv2j0vK1IYefS-XXRqeF_wEAAP__gzRq9g) of a driverless Waymo vehicle avoiding a girl who fell on an electric scooter in Austin, then read our story on how the city has taken 2,000 scooters off the streets this year in _The Roundup._ We'd love to know if you've ever taken a ride on one and what you think about them! Enjoy reading _The Texas Flyover_? Today's sponsor is the [Voice of Martyrs](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOszAQhJ_GdEHrxYS4cPHrv6NKrr0SGe86rOTgCJyQvP2J668dzcwnfd-X4eIlyXz98jd25RXzgIDmoPGAMJCX9B5MRW4Esrpip7vGHK1pTFtNjjofgwX2QG203WjaEAhO5GEE0xJX4vYzjQhaozVQWxsx-DjabgRgMMoAk5S81GXiwi-_xvTOT17qkG9VclMp91U1_xT2Cvtt2-o7LyuHR5E87509nXiOXsoka8zLKEQ8K-yvEss-a_phzY8l8BAysWo-Ps_6eDqj-V8tju6bpCTrsVMGrjcv6Rdc_jTxdPgTAAD__6XEYZA), who are helping provide aid to Christians in hostile territories.

## 'Tough Medicine' Campaign Aims to Deter Illegal Immigration
Gov. Greg Abbott held a press conference in the border town of Eagle Pass on Thursday, announcing the state will [pay for billboards](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAURL8Gd1hwTYIpKF5Dl9duaYG5dpAwRIDj-O9XTr_NVKOZo_PzmB42xJDW_3ZD3T5LnoCBoBwosMnbEM9JdF475hXvUHM5iLsSg7h1Tz2gm-Xg1CDVLLgTbHRi5GoRN-GXwc9d0NcYB2CcgxKsV2qB2S5OSccYMkEEQx9aLn17YsOPrUs88xtLP-eti_rZ2quS4R8BQ8Acx9Hv1bbs7XkVCJjacjkJmIRHJWDCtoW12BZyImCucwKGwxWKgFnzm1rncmvUppT3NGOlCQ_qcvFYaMV5L6GddENb94KVhkS_WASMlGyUoxoZkwRMV7R_HSHGUO-SCLZuNsQvdftT41vDbwAAAP__7qRz-Q) throughout Mexico and Central America to discourage illegal immigration. The signs will [highlight the dangers of crossing the border](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2OwyAQBOCnwR0RXhM7FBTXuMu1V1qLWdtIa4iA_PjtT4muvXY0-jSan-t0xcAhrt-4k62vJU2gQMsWJKjJY-Bj0o23TnnTNmTbodO90Z0-N5s1_eVyVr3vDTowhNCh13oZNBhyHi5NsG-sBVBtC0arkzELzLg4MzilSGmhFflQUz7VjSq9sCx8pAfl05z2hu1W662I7kvAKGCM9Cy6YMRYUwzp3flLBYycZmQB45HuzDLTmqnKUOWSMj0oy48uGe9x3qhIF5hdwuzljPsNwxplTdJTpSz3sGaMtTTZ-tszMIfSD0KrdcfAn2X136seFn4DAAD__wW3bxU), with messages such as "Many girls who try to migrate to Texas are kidnapped," "Your wife and daughter will pay for their trip with their bodies," and "How much did you pay to have your daughter raped?" The signs are written in multiple languages, including Spanish, Russian, Chinese, and Arabic. Abbott described the [$100,000 "tough medicine" campaign](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOszAQhJ_GdEb2YpJs4eJv6PK3VyKD12QlgyPbCeHtT6S_duab0Wh-7uPdceRt-e9WsvUT0ggKjNQgQY3ecTxG03g7KY-6Iauvnbmg6UzfPCzOSD2GoLDre010A_QQOqc6j_p2oYbtWaYBlNaARrWIAWYXJrxOSpEywijyXFNu64MqfVwJ8Uhvyu2c1ibaR63PIrp_AgYBw77v7UZ72VzltG1pPykBw6vIUxYw8Lrykr-2gGHJtEg3TanWE5BTyp6yLDS_MtdDruTKK9MZbLL1z51j5HK5CqOW1XH8jqh_vvK28BsAAP__FmBm-A) as a warning to those making a "last-gasp effort" to cross the border before President-elect Donald Trump takes office. _"The people coming here, they could be raped, they could be assaulted, they could be killed. But the consequences also are, if they do make it across, they will be arrested, they will be jailed, and they will be deported. It is senseless, it is futile,"_ Abbott said.
## Two Killed in Pecos Train Derailment
A [train derailed](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOszAQhJ_GdEZmvUBcuPgbuvztlWhtrxNLBiPwheTtT1x_7cxo9On7us93Sjmtj_-0sK3vWGZQgLIDCWoOlPJnxiZYp4LpGrbdqHEwqLFvnnYkH1ix95qGOHiDLmrvwti7G4Fx0CR7nXUAquvAoGqNieApOjM6pVihQMUh1bK39cmV33TE_Ckv3ltflibbZ63bIfQ_AZOA6TzPduXzOPmo5loImGivyWcWMF2NgCkXT1nAVM8iF15lYApyY18OWXdKV7BTyguvVX6vqaxyI59i8gKmvtNyVIy33g2SIg4SnQqShpuW2vfG9wgITjW7DduZck7HMApUj4VS_kWufzp8WfgJAAD__9Rccwg) after colliding with an 18-wheeler in Pecos, causing it to crash into the local Chamber of Commerce building. Two Union Pacific workers were killed, and three people inside the building suffered minor injuries. Hazmat teams secured lithium batteries and airbags from two of the train cars involved in the incident. Officials confirmed [there were no chemical spills](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHO2yAURp8Gb1hwIXYZGLp4S9eOFoZLjITBgps4efsq3f_9-46Ozt_7encpp_L44w609I51BQGaS-Ag1uBS_qx6CHYTwcgBrZyVnoxW-jbsVqhfMWzKA24QI85TCGZ22hul5DzdxJDsFyYBhJRgtBiNieBd3My8CYFCMy0wJKptpB0J367H_KkvbKOvx5DtTnR2pn4zWBgs13WNn_psm-upfBcMloJXZ7BkR9iJ01W5ryWmdmDgAV3gqfATfe2cmkuF--b6zn1GV54nxxhro_79UCpPZLAMzYbzSjmnPs1Mi8fhUv6vQz_2eVn4FwAA__-K_2rh). U.S. Rep. Tony Gonzales, who represents the West Texas town, [expressed his condolences](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQRb_GdKDx4MS4cPEaurx2SzTYQ7BkbIStEP5-lfTbX91zdH4e04NCDOn5nza29b3kCQFVK7FFmDyFeE2q8XYGb2TDVupe3Y3q1a1ZLfqhvzmlewc8LN7TQA6HedaaFc5wa4L9nElEkBKNgs6YBR0ts9EzAIMSCtiHmo-urlz5TWWJV37x0bm8NdGute5F9P8EjgLH8zy77SqUKNWcQv6MBI6JzyJwjNlRFDjSUYOLLHCsB4XUej4oxI1TbXd2ubRfTiuNMQBGd_u6N4f1-xliDOWuhYLnRiF-FeqfTV4WfwMAAP__HtRk3Q) on social media and offered support and assistance with recovery efforts. The Pecos Police Department is leading the investigation into the crash with the assistance of Union Pacific and the Texas Department of Public Safety.
## Fewer Austin Sidewalks Blocked by Scooters
Six months after Austin [removed 2,000 scooters from service](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOnDAQxvGngc6r8TDguHCRhu7SpkTGHt9OYvAJe5fbt4_YPt1If-knzff7Y_nwkmX__OU3du07lQUBSWlUCEv0kl8L9dGtEK3u2Wkz0GRpoLG_u0BmpJFgSEQcDBnUQLxiMibEGH704i5MI4LWaAlu1iYMPq3WrAAM1BFwlFaOW7tz429fU36VJx-3ULY-u3trX7UbfnY4dzif53n7-3zwFTuc_dEkZO5w3vmsHc65BJ-v8KhNdvX2VA2lND6q2iQcZSurZGkvhQCgOMsmu28c1cZRQlWyB4m8t-v68ziELxcnqyCEASlF5ckkRSNPyps0KYza0phsGBj7w8WvU3KWOpmO4HPzkt-ftP9O-3T4LwAA___95ns_) amid significant changes to its micromobility program, officials report fewer issues with cluttered streets and blocked sidewalks, increasing public safety and providing improved accessibility in the congested downtown area. Earlier this year, the city limited the number of scooter rental companies allowed to operate in Austin to just two. Users were required to park scooters in designated areas. [Their maximum speed was also reduced](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOrCAUxvGngQ5zOKBeCorb2M22WxqUw0iCYoQZnbffzGy9_T-_L9_3bby5mOJ2_3Ir2XqFPCKgFhIFwuhdTK9Rc28n8EZysrJXujNa6ZYvlmbdGTCtopkoGCX7rpX0zxA612pQPNo3JhFBSjQaGmMCzi5Mpp8ACDTTQD7WfDR1oUqXKyG98pOOZs4rT3apdS9M_Wc4MBzO82xCvnr3KDVu74ThsNFZGA4kypxzpUM8du8qFRE38RuKD8wP6_czphRL1zMN99XF9Jmpf_5-WvwJAAD__yqTW54) from 15 mph to 10 mph in the main entertainment districts. Medics have noted that these adjustments have made it easier to respond to emergencies, particularly during large events where scooter congestion previously posed challenges. However, scooter incidents have slightly increased to 125 in the past six months, compared to 98 during the same period in 2023, likely due to the city's growing population. The Transportation Department plans to solicit public feedback about its micromobility program in the coming months and [provide another update in April](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOwyAQRL8Gd1iwxuEoKK5xl2uvtLBZkpWwiWATJ39_SvprR5qZp_d7ns-BMu2Xn7Ch52cqMygwUoMENcdA-TWbLvpFRac79NoO5uTMYMbu6nEJJ4gj6tFCsBadxjRGsKsdjR3wqyP_HtMASmtwRvXOJVhDWpxdlEJlhFEYiUvt-YqMz9BSfpUH1n4tW5f9lfnWxPAtYBIwHcfRh3tj2reyf1pr2QRMjUslbAKm952AScM7XUthrPJ-i4FRJtpjkwkPrLJSxNpk2KPM2Jpc850Zq4Cpqz7eDsqZ2skKoy5boPyB4X_tPDz8BQAA___NpWg4).

His mission? To meet the courageous men and women who have faced persecution for their unwavering faith in Christ. Todd has traveled far and wide to hear their powerful stories firsthand and to bring their voices to the world, sharing their extraordinary testimonies of faith and resilience. In his new book, _When Faith Is Forbidden: 40 Days on the Frontlines with Persecuted Christians_ , Todd invites you to meet these bold believers. Each stop on this journey will challenge you to reflect on your own walk with Christ along the sometimes-difficult path toward our heavenly home. Through their incredible stories of courageous faith, we pray you will be inspired to a deeper, bolder walk with Christ. This compelling book is free for you with any gift--simply [request your copy today](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOszAQhJ_GdEHrxYS4cPHrv6NKrr0SGe86rOTgCJyQvP2J668dzcwnfd-X4eIlyXz98jd25RXzgIDmoPGAMJCX9B5MRW4Esrpip7vGHK1pTFtNjjofgwX2QG203WjaEAhO5GEE0xJX4vYzjQhaozVQWxsx-DjabgRgMMoAk5S81GXiwi-_xvTOT17qkG9VclMp91U1_xT2Cvtt2-o7LyuHR5E87509nXiOXsoka8zLKEQ8K-yvEss-a_phzY8l8BAysWo-Ps_6eDqj-V8tju6bpCTrsVMGrjcv6Rdc_jTxdPgTAAD__6XEYZA)!

Greg Abbott held a press conference in the border town of Eagle Pass on Thursday, announcing the state will throughout Mexico and Central America to discourage illegal immigration. The signs will , with messages such as "Many girls who try to migrate to Texas are kidnapped," "Your wife and daughter will pay for their trip with their bodies," and "How much did you pay to have your daughter raped?" The signs are written in multiple languages, including Spanish, Russian, Chinese, and Arabic. Abbott described the as a warning to those making a "last-gasp effort" to cross the border before President-elect Donald Trump takes office. "The people coming here, they could be raped, they could be assaulted, they could be killed. But the consequences also are, if they do make it across, they will be arrested, they will be jailed, and they will be deported. It is senseless, it is futile," Abbott said. Two Killed in Pecos Train Derailment A after colliding with an 18-wheeler in Pecos, causing it to crash into the local Chamber of Commerce building. Two Union Pacific workers were killed, and three people inside the building suffered minor injuries. Hazmat teams secured lithium batteries and airbags from two of the train cars involved in the incident. Officials confirmed . U.S. Rep. Tony Gonzales, who represents the West Texas town, on social media and offered support and assistance with recovery efforts. The Pecos Police Department is leading the investigation into the crash with the assistance of Union Pacific and the Texas Department of Public Safety. Fewer Austin Sidewalks Blocked by Scooters Six months after Austin amid significant changes to its micromobility program, officials report fewer issues with cluttered streets and blocked sidewalks, increasing public safety and providing improved accessibility in the congested downtown area. Earlier this year, the city limited the number of scooter rental companies allowed to operate in Austin to just two. Users were required to park scooters in designated areas. from 15 mph to 10 mph in the main entertainment districts. Medics have noted that these adjustments have made it easier to respond to emergencies, particularly during large events where scooter congestion previously posed challenges. However, scooter incidents have slightly increased to 125 in the past six months, compared to 98 during the same period in 2023, likely due to the city's growing population. This compelling book is free for you with any gift--simply ! | ➤ A rarely seen ringtail cat was spotted in a wooded area close to I-35 in the San Antonio suburb of Live Oak. The nocturnal animal was "sporting a getup that's equal parts similar to a domestic cat, fox, ferret, and raccoon," according to a Facebook post by city staff. () ➤ Cryptic graffiti messages in Galveston--such as "My wife and kids are held here," "I'm being sold here," and "I am held against my will"--have sparked social media debate about whether the messages are an ill-conceived prank or legitimate cries for help. () ➤ In a follow-up to a story we featured last week, Natasha and Patrick Mach of Ennis reunited with a couple who crashed their wedding three years ago dressed as Santa and Mrs. Claus. () Flying together with our sponsor ➤Muscle Cramps? Your Body Might Be Missing This Crucial Mineral While most doctors check for vitamin D or iron deficiency, they often miss that could be behind these mysterious symptoms. What you're about to learn about magnesium could explain years of unexplained symptoms. () | How frequently do you drive on a toll road? 1. 2. 3. 4. Yesterday's Results: Are you allergic to cedar pollen? 1. Yes: 53% 2. No: 47% | What famous Texas politician met his future wife at the Driskill Hotel for their first date? | (Step One) The Texas Flyover 448 W 19th St. Suite #356 Houston, TX 77008 | ---|---

name: The Flyover
subject: Georgia DA Removed from Trump Case, Dog vs. Snowman, and Best Christmas Movies
body:
A Georgia appeals court Thursday [disqualified Fulton County District Attorney](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQRb_GdEbjsYNJ4eI1dHntlsixxzArg7PgBOXvV-zW29zmSOdK5-M23jxnXqf_fiFXUxkR0EiFEmGMnvN7NE10iQhJN-SU1aa7movum9kluAey9toTgFWggk59MEmjsT32F9-wO20KEZTSF921BJ2JsUsWSMcIXhigyLVs7Wfhtc6U8ru8aGtDWZrs5lofu9D_BA4Ch-M42rDewwkFDqda4KDwnKvAoW7P5SEnKtvEXkYvk19ZHpwz7zLy_vX0mRNTbOe65GZz8fELOysMTIvn_PNb_-rwcvgdAAD__53fXlQ) Fani Willis from leading the criminal election interference case against President-elect Donald Trump and others.

| | |
