| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80L2OqzAQhuGrMV3QeMaYULg4UpQup90SOXgAr_yDjJMod78i_W49j0Z6v6_beLM--LT8t5FNnfOIgOok8YQwOuvDe1SNMzMzMjVsZE9KD6qjc7Ma0LOeiIdhIA29VB2BxWG-wx00K8TGm-ObRAQpqSPdMmjlnJ57YHIOrFDAztdc2u_sU115Du_85NJOOTbBrLVuu6B_Aq8Crz49ea8tT7kW5q3kpdh4yONM10eN454fZWJBFxfLK5fgDhlscj4tm11YoD5YZOcfUdBls6UmLvvqN3mGE3U0ftIF6pps5P0PM8peQtch9b1sinHby4fgd90LBUu0Pnwi6m-jPg3-BAAA__86WHe3) | |
# Friday, December 20, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1940, [Captain America](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOozAQhJ_GdI7sxUBSuLiGLtdeiRbvAntnbGScRHn7U9L_3Wg0Gn36_tynO0qUtP7GnX1d8gQGnLagwUyEEt-Ta8gvzMBtw94OretvrmuvzeYd3Uw_WFwC4wydnZFgHq49zYPtZmca8Z83C2Csbbu2v7DpHVG_DIZbIoPKGSapuVz-Zkl14yW-85PLJeS9iX6r9ThV-0vBqGA8a8G0cnnlEun8TBSMYMAoGC18s4IxJ00cNBhtb87ogEdFSRp3LhJQ7_iPT73JqYnnR9XHI4VN0qo3qZGLxkR65pD3T4dJS8hJwdgUT8dLYpSzH5Qz644Sv5T1J2tPD_8DAAD__7wObkE) made his comic book debut by punching Adolf Hitler in the face, quickly becoming a cultural icon. Speaking of icons, Superman is making headlines again with a new movie directed by James Gunn. Check out all the details below, and don't forget to watch the [new teaser trailer](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL9ugzAYxJ_GbEb-h3EGD13Y0rUjcvAHfKmxLWOC8vZV0qlDx7v76XS6r-t4dRgwLp9uA1vnNAomFOWCCjZ6h-E5qsbbGUCAbMDyXip9UZ00zWpvvGc3N3MJyhumDPhOd_6igcEkjTQN2lcbF4JxLjupW2Baea_nnoH0njmiGHisqbT3hLGuMIdnekBpp7Q1wa615p3IDyIGIobzPNt4myKc-ysnYsgp0-kI9SjwV9EXRMSwHxnK5iKtxWGAQo_4AAw7vbsNdrocMdI3s0JJFDJO9Ls8c02_rk8LLVN03Chz6ZpifT4xBNx1TxRbNofhvbT-99zDip8AAAD__9rZdDo). Today's new sponsor, [WorldTree,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80L2OqzAQhuGrMV3QeMaYULg4UpQup90SOXgAr_yDjJMod78i_W49j0Z6v6_beLM--LT8t5FNnfOIgOok8YQwOuvDe1SNMzMzMjVsZE9KD6qjc7Ma0LOeiIdhIA29VB2BxWG-wx00K8TGm-ObRAQpqSPdMmjlnJ57YHIOrFDAztdc2u_sU115Du_85NJOOTbBrLVuu6B_Aq8Crz49ea8tT7kW5q3kpdh4yONM10eN454fZWJBFxfLK5fgDhlscj4tm11YoD5YZOcfUdBls6UmLvvqN3mGE3U0ftIF6pps5P0PM8peQtch9b1sinHby4fgd90LBUu0Pnwi6m-jPg3-BAAA__86WHe3) has an exciting ecological investment opportunity you won't want to miss.
|
---
## House GOP Spending Bill Voted Down
The House [voted down](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOwjAQRL_G7ozstXFC4eKadFx7ZbSw62RPjoOIAfH3p9BfN9Jo3mjm5zyeUYrU6RsXTi2vI1gIxoEBOxJKeY9BU8rMwF5zcp0P8RSOvtdzsoiRCQm6mJFtzLHHK1yCiz1Hl1FL2mkOwDrnjz4e2MZAFHNn2RNZVMEySVvvh99Vaps5l_f65Pvhui66pLm126b8l4JBwdBmnqWU3VMwzOvClV_bRz42VjAcbTh1sTfTjqgL12byo5LUyRBfmrnyZ6q5SCkmo5Q9rO-Jbi8pRbbYqWCnBeXTodt_fzwT_AUAAP__UBljOQ) a revised spending bill 174-235-1 on Thursday, leaving lawmakers to start over as the government funding deadline expires today. House Republicans had [reached an agreement](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OtCAYha8GOwx_olNQfI3dfO2W5hVelA2CAWbM3P3G7bc7yUnOefJ8PZcnhBjS9h8ONM3nRTChKBdUsMVBiJ9Fdc54RIGyQ8NHqfRDDXLqdsO9njwHBn7wK0yWw-CVfYwoEXEdZBfMvcaFYJzLQeoemVbOaT8ylM4xIIqhCy2X_juH1Hb08ZPfWHqbjy6avbWzEvmPiJmI-bquPq024VXvnoj5zDG0YCsRs81pK1jv2MrrOCt1eEBylUaEN9KC52uNwUKqNGV6Rkh0u6_SganRur-ay1eixSbgk5q07opx5xViDFWPRLHtgBB_wdpfot5G_AQAAP__8cJukA) on a new spending bill late Thursday, attempting to avoid a government shutdown after President-elect Donald Trump said he opposed the original bipartisan agreement. The revised [116-page bill](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3u4yAQxJ8GdxvBGn-koLjGXa690iJhsbnDYME6Vt7-5PT_ZosdzW9G8-cxP2yIIS2_7UaGfZ5RogaFgHJ2NsTPrBtnPBFS25BRQ6v7u-7asVmNH1_Sj1L5sVOdHOT41FrRC-lJtlf-2QRz0RSiVKrt2v5GstfO9X6Q1DonrdCSXOBcbn9zSLySj5_8pnJ75a2JZmXeq2h_CZwETumz58qXJHC6wAInhde5C5yOConOKnBa81EJlrxD5RL-UQW7FKKNEgNn8LlQZRsjLFdU-v7rerDLZwKbHHA5th1Om7hC-Hp2WytwTmFZWeDUFOP2M8QYaj8ILZfNhvjtzD9t-Db4PwAA___isnW7)—a so-called "Plan B"—was much shorter than the previous 1,500-page proposal. It provided three months of funding to keep the government running, suspended the debt limit until 2027, replenished disaster relief, and blocked a pay increase for lawmakers. The original agreement was re-done by the GOP at the urging not only of Trump but also of DOGE chief Elon Musk, who used social media to call attention to controversial provisions.

Congress has until midnight tonight to pass a spending bill or close down parts of the government.
## Georgia DA Fani Willis Removed from Trump Case
A Georgia appeals court Thursday [disqualified Fulton County District Attorney](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQRb_GdEbjsYNJ4eI1dHntlsixxzArg7PgBOXvV-zW29zmSOdK5-M23jxnXqf_fiFXUxkR0EiFEmGMnvN7NE10iQhJN-SU1aa7movum9kluAey9toTgFWggk59MEmjsT32F9-wO20KEZTSF921BJ2JsUsWSMcIXhigyLVs7Wfhtc6U8ru8aGtDWZrs5lofu9D_BA4Ch-M42rDewwkFDqda4KDwnKvAoW7P5SEnKtvEXkYvk19ZHpwz7zLy_vX0mRNTbOe65GZz8fELOysMTIvn_PNb_-rwcvgdAAD__53fXlQ) Fani Willis from leading the criminal election interference case against President-elect Donald Trump and others. The court declined to dismiss Trump's indictment, keeping the charges in place for now, but noted that Willis's relationship with former special prosecutor Nathan Wade created a [significant appearance of impropriety](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp8GNiK4_NgZGLp4S9eOFjEX-1bYuBinyttXaefO36dzpPNxG2-BMm3ze1jRt1RGkGCEAgFyjIHyczQ8-oQIqDl61Wnjrsbqni_e2clO0iVjOpv0tYM7YB8m1al7b2w_cfIvmgKQSmmr3QWlMzG61EnUMcrAjMRIrdTLZ6GtLZjyszywXqay8uyX1vaD6TcGA4OhLbhQzq-NwVBxPnNoVDYGw1TO2sQ9tJbxYDBYaXpjrUhhI_FNOdMhIh1fZ8iUCKNo9Vx3MWOpMwUGA68-7n9H1zEj5zXQr4m3_6o8PPwEAAD__-x4ZNE), leading to Willis's disqualification. This marks [Trump's latest legal victory](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFyszAQhJ9GdGKOkyx-ChV_Q-e0KRlZd7IvIywCsonfPkNSp9lmd76d-d7P0zlIlvv1LczsayoTAlrdoUaYKEh-TbYhn5iRTcO-6411gz2Zf83Nu0R9isGCi0O62D4MYFJMHC2cCIdLI_6gdYjQdeZkXMvgLJFLPbAhgqAsMEkta_tR5F5vnPKrPHltY5mb7G-1Lpsy_xWOCsd939vwJWU7WoXjwVY4dnjEoHBM4S56l5xl0yTb5yNkScKk6_qYF42AoGPYuFk9Lb871ysL1zlI_rmsfyl4evwOAAD__5k5XN4), following the dismissal of two previous federal cases since his election win. The Georgia case was the only remaining criminal trial scheduled to proceed.
## Teamsters Strike Amazon Ahead of Holidays
Amazon workers at seven facilities nationwide launched what the [Teamsters called their largest-ever strike](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO8yAQhJ_G7ojYBWNTUPxNuvztlRbxLsneYTsClCj39Cdff92MRhp9-j4u8yVKlu32P64cWtpn1GgVoEI9U5T8nm1PITEjm54DjMY6bwcz9ffAw0AwuasFzQTsLYIlQx6ct36hoZdwvAGiBjCDcSfWzhK5NGo2RDp2VjNJ28vpc5et3Tnl9_7kclr2tc_h3tqjduZfh-cOz_Gx8ase01FKkyXzkdb4vW-qtiJfrBrHtTYuVRFneXJ5q5ukVhVwxIlxvC6GiKaJfNLLuAwmjX4ioL4EerwkZ6lu7Ky-rVHyL0f7y8sz4E8AAAD__7TAZMA) against the company at 6 a.m. Thursday, after Amazon missed the union's deadline for contract negotiations. The strikes involve facilities in Southern California, New York City, Atlanta, and Skokie, Illinois, with the Teamsters claiming to represent nearly [10,000 workers at 10 Amazon facilities](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGSpCAUAL9GMywEBpyA4BKzufRC6x089N0hWMCM63791my-eVdXV_95LA-gSGn9DTvaFvIiuFBsFEzwxQPFa1G9twFRoOzRjkYqfVc3OfWb5TxMN9D3STgIEJQHE7SZnNFywtHwnuzbNgrBx1HepB6Qa-W9Doaj9J5Dpzh6arkM_zKltmGIV35hGVze-2i31o7ayV-dmDsxn-c5hPzx91kpYa1vphMzupzyfnVibgh7bVgqeybKiUV4JrdhZRvVlgs5lqBRTid5ZLUV-o8MVqBUG4MdPnNiB1yUVnYUctgX64-TYqSqTaf4ugPF77D206iXFV8BAAD__6rJb2I). Amazon employs a total of 800,000 workers at its warehouses. While Amazon spokesperson Kelly Nantel disputed this claim, saying the union doesn't represent Amazon employees and drivers, the Teamsters argue that Amazon should recognize delivery drivers as employees rather than contractors. The strike strategically targets the holiday shopping rush though Amazon says it doesn't expect any operational impacts. [Watch a video report here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FqwzAQxvGnkbYY6e4s1YOGQvHQkkJbSkejWOdYQY6Co9j47Yu7d_0--MH_59gdfUzxen73E7sy5A4U0EHDAVQXfExbRzK4gRkYJTttkUxDNT7J0WGotbVM3jJ6bUMzGGpO3lDdK10rkNHtmgZQWmONpmJlKAQzWMUYgvKCFIdY8lxdcryWkYe05YXnqs-TTG4s5XYX-CygFdCu61pt-VEeJ97_ffGlHwW2i8CX1_5rffv4hO8LydmF2xpTindjBanz5GP6I8t_iYuD3wAAAP__CWRR5Q).
|
---

House Republicans had on a new spending bill late Thursday, attempting to avoid a government shutdown after President-elect Donald Trump said he opposed the original bipartisan agreement. The revised —a so-called "Plan B"—was much shorter than the previous 1,500-page proposal. It provided three months of funding to keep the government running, suspended the debt limit until 2027, replenished disaster relief, and blocked a pay increase for lawmakers. The original agreement was re-done by the GOP at the urging not only of Trump but also of DOGE chief Elon Musk, who used social media to call attention to controversial provisions. Congress has until midnight tonight to pass a spending bill or close down parts of the government. Georgia DA Fani Willis Removed from Trump Case A Georgia appeals court Thursday Fani Willis from leading the criminal election interference case against President-elect Donald Trump and others. The court declined to dismiss Trump's indictment, keeping the charges in place for now, but noted that Willis's relationship with former special prosecutor Nathan Wade created a , leading to Willis's disqualification. Teamsters Strike Amazon Ahead of Holidays Amazon workers at seven facilities nationwide launched what the against the company at 6 a.m. Thursday, after Amazon missed the union's deadline for contract negotiations. The strikes involve facilities in Southern California, New York City, Atlanta, and Skokie, Illinois, with the Teamsters claiming to represent nearly . Amazon employs a total of 800,000 workers at its warehouses. While Amazon spokesperson Kelly Nantel disputed this claim, saying the union doesn't represent Amazon employees and drivers, the Teamsters argue that Amazon should recognize delivery drivers as employees rather than contractors. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Get your copy of Why America Matters
body:
Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools?

|
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bcbe1eb591644b288e1ba98759915da2&_e=e05NHwGYD-n25GcUH0Acb4YJXiGd00PiYA425X80TdNOuAUIzASJmOH95QEh2A-m-a5nI2gWMpsFYrZqLCWVOfrffH4R4aEdiF83fv5CEhSU4PpVq0tppE6NrQPEhDiT2ySORsVaG-f-0PbkGzBxDeDA25wVs4-kI_tcrg2OCN6DW_GQUvDse14EqiOMwvXCTfT21nNBE8ZZYr4yr_4UlCauHBlQ6o7VxAipxqfn-zP8eKWqLuWcLqUT9evKea1zssdXU_OxU4h5S8gpTvJH73tmbjCAQqOd2zfV0kswLjmUxB8mNxJhDAqf6fzjhSTmEocn5iA1CQi0EcEALIi2GUXvYQUAoSMrEtyDh6cGMn6ohQkQ8X9pDoMDZElKYSK1iI2iFQ8tcUXz5TBWGZ4inA%3D%3D)
|
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bcbe1eb591644b288e1ba98759915da2&_e=e05NHwGYD-n25GcUH0Acb4YJXiGd00PiYA425X80TdNOuAUIzASJmOH95QEh2A-m-a5nI2gWMpsFYrZqLCWVOfrffH4R4aEdiF83fv5CEhSU4PpVq0tppE6NrQPEhDiT2ySORsVaG-f-0PbkGzBxDeDA25wVs4-kI_tcrg2OCN6DW_GQUvDse14EqiOMwvXCTfT21nNBE8ZZYr4yr_4UlCauHBlQ6o7VxAipxqfn-zP8eKWqLuWcLqUT9evKea1zRJeUVMdGDoyz2CQn9AkWInhwqqc06xhlefiDGhW9BiZJq0muPlF1_inB_Uib3i2Qmk1Jyx79CehWt4bI4YgD7_2RI39kkpKn_2MpNnN2YAxX5zz4n5vMVz2urZ18MRPYfaZVVBAPBtKoBa3wyzANuQ%3D%3D)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bcbe1eb591644b288e1ba98759915da2&_e=e05NHwGYD-n25GcUH0Acb4YJXiGd00PiYA425X80TdNOuAUIzASJmOH95QEh2A-m-a5nI2gWMpsFYrZqLCWVOfrffH4R4aEdiF83fv5CEhSU4PpVq0tppE6NrQPEhDiT2ySORsVaG-f-0PbkGzBxDeDA25wVs4-kI_tcrg2OCN6DW_GQUvDse14EqiOMwvXCTfT21nNBE8ZZYr4yr_4UlCauHBlQ6o7VxAipxqfn-zP8eKWqLuWcLqUT9evKea1z9oOxe9aLzSyqWsq9QfUgJGjPjL_7lDwEI3TCzih_SukjnY-Yp6_K2-GK0lwJBLw49wky8G6kfPi_66jIC8HuoXN8niJRrHE8exqAkudgWwMaWUEkkba6ij_-oyH2i4zy3H0l1keXfksQVjePbH4Txg%3D%3D). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bcbe1eb591644b288e1ba98759915da2&_e=e05NHwGYD-n25GcUH0Acb4YJXiGd00PiYA425X80TdNOuAUIzASJmOH95QEh2A-m-a5nI2gWMpsFYrZqLCWVOfrffH4R4aEdiF83fv5CEhSU4PpVq0tppE6NrQPEhDiT2ySORsVaG-f-0PbkGzBxDeDA25wVs4-kI_tcrg2OCN6DW_GQUvDse14EqiOMwvXCTfT21nNBE8ZZYr4yr_4UlCauHBlQ6o7VxAipxqfn-zP8eKWqLuWcLqUT9evKea1zL34-4m7JzLAiChWAF3PKaQrWK9LauOsrdZi5zvlPwDJ8gfkVlCGFnU6zbA1S4ABAQcHm5bMdF1cOcArcZhBuaAKzTOvqlUjrfp2VAKImB8RQYikR-rN2umLnyI-szxmjuaAubAet6XthPpl6mqfzGQ%3D%3D)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

name: Jamie Janosz, Managing Editor at Today in the Word
subject: Live Like Jesus in a Changing World
body:
Even as we celebrate the Christmas season and reflect on the incredible gift of hope we have in Jesus Christ

| | | [](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkMvOmzAQhZ_G7Ix8oQYWXkSN2FSpqm66RMaemlF8QcYkyttXROkD_NvzzYzmO39u881gwOR_mgj6bstc9jmZOS5ItwKRBvRrpRETzIKJjnJBBZt547QbrTKqAc172amxHxRrVi3ZwMGarod-UZYBd4uyI-Od5MZ9c0OD-rzDhWCcd0qydrR_-dj3CxfSDE5I0jEToNT2DrDZnHyBfS-wHUtAa1Jrc2yCXmvddiIvRExETB4f0NbszAtTXeGZi2tz8URM9gW0uieR01HjbE3cDPpE5PW0wyMSoU6w56NYeMd538BWTP6DIrhzTl4hGgyf0OZUIVUir78u9Mf33_S_VFO0254YAu6qJx3z59L75_qVeh9a_AsAAP__WkeGDQ)

Hey there Friend, ____ Even as we celebrate the Christmas season and reflect on the incredible gift of hope we have in Jesus Christ, I am sure you are reminded of the challenge before us: how do we live out that hope in a world that seems so increasingly distant from God?

It's a question we all wrestle with, especially as we witness significant cultural shifts that oppose our biblical convictions. In times like these, we need practical wisdom, encouragement, and a clear vision for how to live as faithful followers of Christ.

[That's where This Light of Mine: Living Like Jesus in a Non-Jesus World comes in.](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkMvOmzAQhZ_G7Ix8oQYWXkSN2FSpqm66RMaemlF8QcYkyttXROkD_NvzzYzmO39u881gwOR_mgj6bstc9jmZOS5ItwKRBvRrpRETzIKJjnJBBZt547QbrTKqAc172amxHxRrVi3ZwMGarod-UZYBd4uyI-Od5MZ9c0OD-rzDhWCcd0qydrR_-dj3CxfSDE5I0jEToNT2DrDZnHyBfS-wHUtAa1Jrc2yCXmvddiIvRExETB4f0NbszAtTXeGZi2tz8URM9gW0uieR01HjbE3cDPpE5PW0wyMSoU6w56NYeMd538BWTP6DIrhzTl4hGgyf0OZUIVUir78u9Mf33_S_VFO0254YAu6qJx3z59L75_qVeh9a_AsAAP__WkeGDQ)

In this powerful book, Dr. Joseph Stowell (a name you may recognize as the former president of Moody Bible Institute) offers a timely call for Christians to stop fighting battles for an earthly kingdom and instead embrace the privilege of advancing Christ's Kingdom. Drawing from Scripture and the life of Jesus, Dr. Stowell shows how we can respond to today's challenges with hope, courage, and grace.

As we interact with a culture that often feels divided and broken,_This Light of Mine_ encourages us to reflect Jesus' love and truth in a way that draws others to the Gospel--without alienating them. It encourages us to rise above the noise and shine God's light in a world desperately in need of it.

We'd love to send you an exclusive, pre-release copy of _This Light of Mine_ as a thank-you for your generous gift of any amount to support the mission of _Today in the Word_. Your gift today will help us continue providing Bible-centered resources to readers across the globe.

Whether you're seeking practical advice for living out your faith in a complex world or simply need encouragement to stay steady in your walk with Christ, _This Light of Mine_ is a timely and powerful tool for your journey.

Give today at this link and receive this book as a thank-you: [https://give.todayintheword.org/cye-tdw](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkMvOmzAQhZ_G7Ix8oQYWXkSN2FSpqm66RMaemlF8QcYkyttXROkD_NvzzYzmO39u881gwOR_mgj6bstc9jmZOS5ItwKRBvRrpRETzIKJjnJBBZt547QbrTKqAc172amxHxRrVi3ZwMGarod-UZYBd4uyI-Od5MZ9c0OD-rzDhWCcd0qydrR_-dj3CxfSDE5I0jEToNT2DrDZnHyBfS-wHUtAa1Jrc2yCXmvddiIvRExETB4f0NbszAtTXeGZi2tz8URM9gW0uieR01HjbE3cDPpE5PW0wyMSoU6w56NYeMd538BWTP6DIrhzTl4hGgyf0OZUIVUir78u9Mf33_S_VFO0254YAu6qJx3z59L75_qVeh9a_AsAAP__WkeGDQ)

When you give today, you not only support the mission of _Today in the Word_ to spread the Gospel but you will also receive this transformative book that will inspire and equip you to live out your Christian faith with boldness and love.

[Can I count on you to partner with us in this season of giving? Together, we can shine the light of Jesus in a world that desperately needs it.](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkMvOmzAQhZ_G7Ix8oQYWXkSN2FSpqm66RMaemlF8QcYkyttXROkD_NvzzYzmO39u881gwOR_mgj6bstc9jmZOS5ItwKRBvRrpRETzIKJjnJBBZt547QbrTKqAc172amxHxRrVi3ZwMGarod-UZYBd4uyI-Od5MZ9c0OD-rzDhWCcd0qydrR_-dj3CxfSDE5I0jEToNT2DrDZnHyBfS-wHUtAa1Jrc2yCXmvddiIvRExETB4f0NbszAtTXeGZi2tz8URM9gW0uieR01HjbE3cDPpE5PW0wyMSoU6w56NYeMd538BWTP6DIrhzTl4hGgyf0OZUIVUir78u9Mf33_S_VFO0254YAu6qJx3z59L75_qVeh9a_AsAAP__WkeGDQ)

Thank you for your generosity and for being part of this important mission.

With gratitude,

Jamie Janosz

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Russia and the United States
body:
Winston Churchill once described Russia as “a riddle, wrapped in a mystery, inside an enigma”—words that still ring true.

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=ba7d50a446744e5ea4f64035b9c6ea96&_t=agBVwavBK2Qc4aqdON5KhBnpILCce07u3gJNrEU2xxL5KrrGTX0sAA34uHpz8wSviDnayNQcBQXXl6XPv43zv3eAlORl-7UA4yTbq-IuEOmzoqL0P5lpJNM4_UwxiD5i)_
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ba7d50a446744e5ea4f64035b9c6ea96&_e=ZOcpmy_dpymZXJMGsysyD2IVlubgdv7mLuyRfdxaanKe27n7a_46gAUthJKIaHI5yjVraE9jJuQFiaxaXw0Q3lSUCJvOIge4fJoLf9rhWtCXa2V0r9lLzS_EZmjYUX8tOZ5KUxNNvqzXsEC-W7Frb2eLaEb7Df04Uzx7YwSvVINz9OFosGVxchhppoD74vQnhoe5b9tArXQODQhGMWYGwAzn-mUHBjlxs_DXhzOTKiBQ6CcV3YEM0TBHrFL8mY39daNADA82qHndptnhKAZWsqDrPM9nsrSQ-pjmGeCULHWlx2CWbYJbmwq4y8256YvCkkUleXlrn5hoMXJvfKfIbbh2gJNRTYmAR80JKauJ1Nw%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

Winston Churchill once described Russia as "a riddle, wrapped in a mystery, inside an enigma"--words that still ring true.

But given Russia's current war with Ukraine--and Russia's role in the shifting balance of power in today's world--a better understanding of Russia is critical.

Since Peter the Great, Russia's place among nations has only grown. As it transformed itself from a regional backwater to a great power, its politics and culture influenced significant events in our own history.

At the time of the American Revolution, for instance, Russia was the first nation to recognize the U.S. as a sovereign state. And in the Cold War period between World War Two and the fall of the Soviet Union in 1991, American-Russian relations became the focus of world attention.

**The need for a better understanding of post-Cold War Russia, in light of its current importance and its long history as one of the world 's great powers, is why Hillsdale College has created a [FREE online video series on Russia](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ba7d50a446744e5ea4f64035b9c6ea96&_e=ZOcpmy_dpymZXJMGsysyD2IVlubgdv7mLuyRfdxaanKe27n7a_46gAUthJKIaHI5yjVraE9jJuQFiaxaXw0Q3lSUCJvOIge4fJoLf9rhWtCXa2V0r9lLzS_EZmjYUX8tOZ5KUxNNvqzXsEC-W7Frb2eLaEb7Df04Uzx7YwSvVINz9OFosGVxchhppoD74vQnhoe5b9tArXQODQhGMWYGwDdAy0_sxchKzBNgY2shXmlas2R7Ru3wP6k6whkMw278fD4REus0vn4e6lZe4CZ64ciFqu8PiBua3VYCELpsilFEmeYVpkU41sT_asHZf1FR9deG3bMAehFyTGNG2I1UerIZdsu5ZuV0mNITFHpiLFM%3D). **

In our online video series, based on a recent conference held at Hillsdale College, you'll learn more about Russian history--including the "Greats" such as Peter and Catherine--with special attention to the Russian Revolution through the fall of the Soviet Union.

The video series also explores Russia's significant contributions to literature, through such authors as Dostoyevsky and Tolstoy--and to classical music, through such composers such as Tchaikovsky and Rachmaninoff.

**You 'll also gain a deeper understanding of Russia's enigmatic relationship with the West today, and about the causes and complications of the current Ukraine war. **

You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/russia-cca](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ba7d50a446744e5ea4f64035b9c6ea96&_e=ZOcpmy_dpymZXJMGsysyD2IVlubgdv7mLuyRfdxaanKe27n7a_46gAUthJKIaHI5yjVraE9jJuQFiaxaXw0Q3lSUCJvOIge4fJoLf9rhWtCXa2V0r9lLzS_EZmjYUX8tOZ5KUxNNvqzXsEC-W7Frb2eLaEb7Df04Uzx7YwSvVINz9OFosGVxchhppoD74vQnhoe5b9tArXQODQhGMWYGwGGKVhXcZXkhWSiYbnWJppkTVaFSruOO3FW6l5HhqRcRY1KIYH6SZ_d9c8pVTuZ_LRE0AEatadi-idltUcROKj28cLfRRjE2qYyimsiBlv2mL3DzT5K5eQHzSbFu1cXtc2Hc3_HcQ61xfyj_oADFJak%3D)

**Please use the secure link above to immediately receive your video series on Russia.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 ** **
---

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=ba7d50a446744e5ea4f64035b9c6ea96&_t=agBVwavBK2Qc4aqdON5KhBnpILCce07u3gJNrEU2xxL5KrrGTX0sAA34uHpz8wSviDnayNQcBQXXl6XPv43zv3eAlORl-7UA4yTbq-IuEOmzoqL0P5lpJNM4_UwxiD5i).

name: Brian Tyler Cohen
subject: 🗣 One month until inauguration
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
Why I'm fighting for climate action and how you can join me
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3169455/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hey Friend, it's Brian Tyler Cohen. I'm not going to sugarcoat it: in a month, we'll have a new administration that will be hostile to environmental protections. That puts the onus on us to step in where the federal government won't.

**That's why I'm standing with Evergreen Action.

**[**Their work will be more important now than ever—but they can't do it alone. Our contributions help keep the organization running. They need $25,000 by the end of the year to ensure that they can mobilize national policy and drive state-based action—which is going to be critical over the next four years.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3169456/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[GIVE NOW](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3169457/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| I'm proud to support Evergreen Action because they're not only mobilizing national policy but driving _state-based action_ —which is going to be critical over the next four years. [**But Evergreen can't do it alone, friend.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3169458/87SdQ4wZ)

Here's what I know: **Evergreen isn't just about talking big—they're all about _doing_.** The Trump administration will open the floodgates for their Big Oil cronies, but Evergreen's team has the experience, connections, and policy chops to continue to push forward major climate action even under a hostile administration.

**The truth is that we all need to work together to protect our future.** The next few years will be difficult but critical, and every dollar you give right now will help Evergreen fight for policies that prioritize people, protect what we've already achieved, and push us forward toward a just and thriving clean energy economy.

[**I'm in. And I'd love for you to join me.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3169459/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[GIVE NOW](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3169460/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Let's keep the momentum going—for all of us who care about making sure we don't go backwards. Let's keep climate action at the top of the agenda. |
---
| Thank you for being in this with me. |
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Get your copy of Why America Matters
body:
Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools?

|
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c770e8ee749046a28f7ba14cc7a863a0&_e=jqyhsESpnQjU8-NVxVsbqvRXmZyv9qiT7dU6-SEWKyajBYdyIx5B0ctK0KbkHnnDSnXUb5BlMmw13Y_nRwWs22CqiWIPgRPugpDFk3PcWGt65xeyEmfk9fK7t-Q1N3WfZVyrEhP7wvjiWuMhzY4ZqQyY9WRx4N-GxS9p9f69E5_tKxxK35AnsMXgK7p8K_Yhv8FDS1KmJj4KTSjNloP4V2Qnd0DXMPPwXoyMOJ2d1f92Gw7ZaafAeVNBGgvzkhEFITQnumvA5GEjSc6TnetHjkzbV0yfI_xqTZgqvdUeUX_gBGFhsfPjxqCskupITOuu7wxIzq5vnAjMJbiZ7bEv_5y6ypo-QNzB4QeXT1scCB1Sgt1SOx2hWW0xoACxyx-ywiOarl9x12rahkL7c3hoTg%3D%3D)
|
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c770e8ee749046a28f7ba14cc7a863a0&_e=jqyhsESpnQjU8-NVxVsbqvRXmZyv9qiT7dU6-SEWKyajBYdyIx5B0ctK0KbkHnnDSnXUb5BlMmw13Y_nRwWs22CqiWIPgRPugpDFk3PcWGt65xeyEmfk9fK7t-Q1N3WfZVyrEhP7wvjiWuMhzY4ZqQyY9WRx4N-GxS9p9f69E5_tKxxK35AnsMXgK7p8K_Yhv8FDS1KmJj4KTSjNloP4V2Qnd0DXMPPwXoyMOJ2d1f92Gw7ZaafAeVNBGgvzkhEFZiWglbrDDTFgCWRvrhyOO6r6n0R7qryiO9iZiodUqHZkL4o1o9zl9kdUdk8E5ry0ydGqnTM9xaKCfZJyAXkuYWR-vJWqXa-JhzUxWk8tspt_tdvhNCSzOAO7AkHOYWGIpTLd0J0PvaZwYPNWg2jifQ%3D%3D)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge,** I need your support.

name: History Facts
subject: The seventh-century battle won with flamethrowers
body:
Modern flamethrowers emerged at the turn of the 20th century, but the Eastern Roman Empire, also known as the Byzantine Empire, was far ahead of the curve. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cnjguy4yp83s95u3a5t9fqutfc2ro7s32v9b7wlkashaotwqico2chy2dgt68628czsivhysp4wj1tggd3o0d369rkqugu1bhen7lt0u493qg76zwmwspy0uag8nkm3wuh6xs2gx4sftf9z&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sosk89&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Roman ships used flamethrowers as far back as the seventh century.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sosk89&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sosk89&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sosk89&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| M odern flamethrowers emerged at the turn of the 20th century, but the Eastern Roman Empire, also known as the Byzantine Empire, was far ahead of the curve. The empire’s most closely guarded secret — its exact formula is a mystery even today — was its recipe for [Greek fire](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sosk89&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), a napalm-like incendiary substance. The Byzantines first deployed it to defend Constantinople from an Arab attack, loading it into bronze siphons and firing it under pressure at enemy ships, like an early version of a [flamethrower](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sosk89&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). (They would also fill pots with Greek fire and hurl them like grenades.) Because it caught fire spontaneously and couldn’t be extinguished by water, it was a powerful and destructive naval weapon, and it helped the Byzantines stay in power for centuries.
---
Callinicus of Heliopolis, a Greek-speaking refugee who fled to Constantinople from Syria after the city was conquered and became part of the Rashidun Caliphate, is widely credited for inventing Greek fire. Historians are pretty confident that it was petroleum- or naphtha-based, possibly sourced from Crimea. Other possible ingredients include quicklime, sulfur, and saltpeter. Its volatility meant that it was extremely dangerous to manufacture — and distilling the petroleum product would have been pretty advanced tech for the time. The weapon was a mainstay of the Byzantine arsenal for centuries, and despite one of their flamethrowers [being captured once](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sosk89&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), nobody else managed to crack the code.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sosk89&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sosk89&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Sword fighters in Renaissance Italy had lantern shields.
Sword fighters in Renaissance-era Italy would often duel at dawn, carrying lanterns to both light their way and also use as weapons in their own right. Fencing manuals at the time instructed students on how to use lanterns to blind opponents and deflect blows. Armorers started adding a hook for hanging these lanterns on shields, sometimes even [embedding lanterns](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sosk89&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) into them. Eventually, things got a little out of hand; one particularly famous lantern shield also includes a gauntlet and a dagger. Ultimately, lantern shields turned out to not be very practical, since it was pretty easy to accidentally snuff out the lantern or scald yourself with lamp oil.

clean_body: Modern flamethrowers emerged at the turn of the 20th century, but the Eastern Roman Empire, also known as the Byzantine Empire, was far ahead of the curve. | M odern flamethrowers emerged at the turn of the 20th century, but the Eastern Roman Empire, also known as the Byzantine Empire, was far ahead of the curve. The empire’s most closely guarded secret — its exact formula is a mystery even today — was its recipe for , a napalm-like incendiary substance. The Byzantines first deployed it to defend Constantinople from an Arab attack, loading it into bronze siphons and firing it under pressure at enemy ships, like an early version of a . (They would also fill pots with Greek fire and hurl them like grenades.) Because it caught fire spontaneously and couldn’t be extinguished by water, it was a powerful and destructive naval weapon, and it helped the Byzantines stay in power for centuries. Callinicus of Heliopolis, a Greek-speaking refugee who fled to Constantinople from Syria after the city was conquered and became part of the Rashidun Caliphate, is widely credited for inventing Greek fire. Historians are pretty confident that it was petroleum- or naphtha-based, possibly sourced from Crimea. Other possible ingredients include quicklime, sulfur, and saltpeter. Its volatility meant that it was extremely dangerous to manufacture — and distilling the petroleum product would have been pretty advanced tech for the time. The weapon was a mainstay of the Byzantine arsenal for centuries, and despite one of their flamethrowers , nobody else managed to crack the code. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Year Constantinople fell to the Ottoman Empire 1453 | | Kilotons of napalm dropped on Dresden, Germany, during WWII 3.4 | Kilotons of napalm dropped on Dresden, Germany, during WWII 3.4 | | Year grindcore band Napalm Death’s debut album, Scum , was released 1987 | | Cost of the Thermonator, a robot dog with an attached flamethrower $9,420 | Cost of the Thermonator, a robot dog with an attached flamethrower $9,420 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Sword fighters in Renaissance Italy had lantern shields. Sword fighters in Renaissance-era Italy would often duel at dawn, carrying lanterns to both light their way and also use as weapons in their own right. Fencing manuals at the time instructed students on how to use lanterns to blind opponents and deflect blows. Armorers started adding a hook for hanging these lanterns on shields, sometimes even into them. Eventually, things got a little out of hand; one particularly famous lantern shield also includes a gauntlet and a dagger. Ultimately, lantern shields turned out to not be very practical, since it was pretty easy to accidentally snuff out the lantern or scald yourself with lamp oil. name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Discover the True Meaning of Christmas with A Christmas Carol
body:
Great literature teaches you about human nature and draws you toward the good.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zafpjdfqcv8cm458v7n8vf43jgjed03siea53m8g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cti62o32cph2bs)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

Great literature teaches you about human nature and draws you toward the good. Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ is a wonderful example.

You're likely familiar with Ebenezer Scrooge--literature's most famous miser. His choices corrupted his soul and left him miserable. The drama of this beloved Christmas tale consists of his education at the hands of the three Ghosts of Christmas and its effects on his soul.

The story is rich with meaning. Among its chief lessons is that one's happiness depends upon learning to choose well and to love the good. [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvvml17id2rpp0ngje28gaoj9v8r56cs1bu93pn0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cti62o32cph2bs)
**This Christmas, I want to send you an exclusive hardcover Hillsdale College edition of _A Christmas Carol_ for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more.**

This beautiful volume features an inspiring introduction and 26 exclusive illustrations. You can treasure this meaningful keepsake or even gift it to a loved one.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-carol-book](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zt90gugjuiusslmqitoi85gefi9vqjur3e3d5j0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cti62o32cph2bs)

I wish you and yours a blessed Christmas season,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: James O'Keefe
subject: VITAL: Join me to Expose the Deep State
body:
The Deep State will be working harder than ever this time around, and OMG is taking an offensive stance to root them out and expose them . . . and we've already started.

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2hadbije87mng6eevrbald9qt4tic5q0n11hj9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cti62o32c5h2bs)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl3ammq7rbng1tq935g8mubaho3flcf7qfhmhrl8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cti62o32c5h2bs)
Dear Friend,

In the last week, O'Keefe Media Group has exposed two high-level Biden insiders who were eager to express their contempt for President Trump as we count down the days until the inauguration.

We have MANY more subjects on the hook and investigations that are advancing, but **[it will take your support to keep going](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr8la0qbklrnr8l2gad909smo4qtkqnarrfe9em0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cti62o32c5h2bs).**

I predict that the next four years of the Trump Administration will be an ongoing game of cloak and dagger as Deep State operatives - embedded federal employees - work to undermine his policies just as they did during his first term.

**The Deep State will be working harder than ever this time around, and OMG is taking an offensive stance to root them out and expose them . . . and we've already started.**

While we work to identify and expose the bad actors who will remain in government, **DROVES of whistleblowers will come forward** with the desire to right the wrongs they witnessed during the four years of the Biden Administration.

This is a dual-track process, and **[I need you to join me by donating now so that we can move fast, strike hard, and keep that pace going until Deep State actors are driven out of our federal government.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za4c8plq3l5grevr3io2ghhu7tcgj8275pf4q1og_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cti62o32c5h2bs)**

While I rarely do interviews, the other day, I appeared on Benny Johnson's show to

send this very clear message to both the "good guys" and the "bad guys" in our government:

**For those good people** who are inside the federal government, who have witnessed corruption and are brave enough to step forward as a whistleblower, I want them to know these things:

* I'll tell your full story.

* I'll legally protect you.

* The heads of these agencies WILL SEE YOUR STORY so that change can occur.

* And to those bad actors in government:

* OMG's cameras are EVERYWHERE.

* You ARE going to meet with one of my undercover journalists.

* I will expose you.

My team at OMG is already working at breakneck speed seven days a week, and to be candid, this month has been rough financially. We're already behind, and I need your help to catch up, pay the stack of bills on my desk, and meet the next payroll.

Any help you can provide will help get me caught up and get OMG off to a strong start in 2025.

**[So please, help us accomplish this critical mission.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2ld3t5diauiuppjegp1lfu033f70a4egnlh6m20_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cti62o32c5h2bs)**

Starting now, we're already entering an endless game of "whack-a-mole" as employees within our federal government conspire against Trump. As long as President Trump controls the White House, there will be bad actors within government - the people we refer to as the "Deep State" who are trying to undermine his policies, take down his people, or worse.

We have to be unrelenting in our work, which will require you and me to work together to make that happen: **[You keep OMG going with your support, and I'll work like hell to get the job done.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoe570lalda7setaqfarggprc5tak1i3nluiqc0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cti62o32c5h2bs)**

**[Are you in?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztjboaohddf8flqbfocovudjsaqaop3duksq5oqo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cti62o32c5h2bs)**

Thank you for your time and support, and please stay tuned for more.

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. December is always a tough month for organizations that rely on the public for support. **[Help us get caught up and keep building our team to take on the Deep State actors who are working to take down the Trump Presidency.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlr344dlf9aqhr7oagoqcq4ijji9su917od1uvbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cti62o32c5h2bs)**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Get your copy of Why America Matters
body:
Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools?

|
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a819476f616546f39502880ace4ea9de&_e=hM6qACTV9ZI_B76rqkGcV3apFT-Opb6YAIPiNdsffKRNf1DC3r09iYzCWNJ3IHb7afSQeHBexKjJCKwTZZcf2JviZiCEH8FwTzKS5tcs2JDuwSsvLqk8WACw_WCYlsvEnYFcMGtfhgg2ot7Qy99H33Qb2Q3-4UAAqBqoWKrPYRe63SUvLwhGntgk-A5yAA1APXLKzROeoAD5oTdQjN7NwyyZtUUjOPIC6nzW41Ei0fuTKXe57bd4IqE_eCyCHBMOPnVHguhR9muAP6y5Szi7ZZ1_RN-nNEDduKwtrjISJQn3BmnYJozGujtscn8TZT5c5ydu6uZ8FxANK95qyCFIiy7c6HkmLWpF7VAlaMokKJuqVIMw36OuTAYOjHodFQcrmGBQilvezpv7zff7PZarOyUT8FQY4w-I4Zyfhhsxm30%3D)
|
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a819476f616546f39502880ace4ea9de&_e=hM6qACTV9ZI_B76rqkGcV3apFT-Opb6YAIPiNdsffKRNf1DC3r09iYzCWNJ3IHb7afSQeHBexKjJCKwTZZcf2JviZiCEH8FwTzKS5tcs2JDuwSsvLqk8WACw_WCYlsvEnYFcMGtfhgg2ot7Qy99H33Qb2Q3-4UAAqBqoWKrPYRe63SUvLwhGntgk-A5yAA1APXLKzROeoAD5oTdQjN7NwyyZtUUjOPIC6nzW41Ei0fuTKXe57bd4IqE_eCyCHBMO4YFcfyVESQfaXUx5A7WU-FONPSYHtwKXc9Ni9mHrzI3lR9ilJI4Vdd6VA9a0W8WXLWtYqtXbuSzTMg_j_h46-yMP-61f-m69CPCp1P-QC-GjoKuB-qewVuFEFXdfSF_O-iT_0_pve8YxdyFlmX_63-4QwCRaf9CieAtgDoO1VgA%3D)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a819476f616546f39502880ace4ea9de&_e=hM6qACTV9ZI_B76rqkGcV3apFT-Opb6YAIPiNdsffKRNf1DC3r09iYzCWNJ3IHb7afSQeHBexKjJCKwTZZcf2JviZiCEH8FwTzKS5tcs2JDuwSsvLqk8WACw_WCYlsvEnYFcMGtfhgg2ot7Qy99H33Qb2Q3-4UAAqBqoWKrPYRe63SUvLwhGntgk-A5yAA1APXLKzROeoAD5oTdQjN7NwyyZtUUjOPIC6nzW41Ei0fuTKXe57bd4IqE_eCyCHBMOS97wOOW7pPp1I5ICkNckQu_qk-kK5UFYiCA367aFCJUuSJwvDliteWWnwxmX9Rhvi_q5xLSqIREpNdrPMSFJYvhkrVbJkBrcuIDO86A9_xuXgnnKpyPsGfkqDTuq2C859uZNMQWVgKb1l6BnA6Kvdm6VRwqTJjRstc3VC8pQ7fE%3D). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a819476f616546f39502880ace4ea9de&_e=hM6qACTV9ZI_B76rqkGcV3apFT-Opb6YAIPiNdsffKRNf1DC3r09iYzCWNJ3IHb7afSQeHBexKjJCKwTZZcf2JviZiCEH8FwTzKS5tcs2JDuwSsvLqk8WACw_WCYlsvEnYFcMGtfhgg2ot7Qy99H33Qb2Q3-4UAAqBqoWKrPYRe63SUvLwhGntgk-A5yAA1APXLKzROeoAD5oTdQjN7NwyyZtUUjOPIC6nzW41Ei0fuTKXe57bd4IqE_eCyCHBMOcUzsnajO-RjOKFogfOwoBfbA2fmHHollIX2hi3YWnULgVUVm_qXl7bPGr7X8V-LTgij8Kv6YO5cXNOi5GRAjDj8wYgFpp1MRdl1sPDND2MS2p_6NkS7LMBZfIx9_vFoaLv6Aii0G4sCWKWx5i3wyH2IsnKeESiRctKH_OXYtxkc%3D)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson

name: Jamie Janosz, Managing Editor at Today in the Word
subject: Live Like Jesus in a Changing World
body:
Even as we celebrate the Christmas season and reflect on the incredible gift of hope we have in Jesus Christ

| | | [](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUkMHOnCAQgJ8GbxgYUOqBw59svG3T9NKjQZjVaQQM4m727Rub7QP0-n0zk3zz6z7dHW2Ulu8uoi1xKseU3BRn4nvByDda1sojJZxAgOYSOIhJNsH2A5hvskErjdJGSDWIZrVGGh3Q6Dl4NXRC9t7Mfhh0J2SYu0E3ZK87EkBI0D10rQjSQS8dzA8Uj_7BtCi4n_NG3qXofudC9d0mrM1m11r3g6kvBiODcaEntjUH96ZUV3zlEtpcFgajfyOv4cXUeNY4eRd3R0ti6nY10RkZ9Jc48lk8_sX52NFXSstHRQzXnLphdLR9oM-pYqpM3X588Z93_q-kKTbsL9o2OnrDtFiundbn2NT_eOnTwp8AAAD__1xagJ8)
---

Hey there Friend, ____ Even as we celebrate the Christmas season and reflect on the incredible gift of hope we have in Jesus Christ, I am sure you are reminded of the challenge before us: how do we live out that hope in a world that seems so increasingly distant from God?

It's a question we all wrestle with, especially as we witness significant cultural shifts that oppose our biblical convictions. In times like these, we need practical wisdom, encouragement, and a clear vision for how to live as faithful followers of Christ.

[That's where This Light of Mine: Living Like Jesus in a Non-Jesus World comes in.](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUkMHOnCAQgJ8GbxgYUOqBw59svG3T9NKjQZjVaQQM4m727Rub7QP0-n0zk3zz6z7dHW2Ulu8uoi1xKseU3BRn4nvByDda1sojJZxAgOYSOIhJNsH2A5hvskErjdJGSDWIZrVGGh3Q6Dl4NXRC9t7Mfhh0J2SYu0E3ZK87EkBI0D10rQjSQS8dzA8Uj_7BtCi4n_NG3qXofudC9d0mrM1m11r3g6kvBiODcaEntjUH96ZUV3zlEtpcFgajfyOv4cXUeNY4eRd3R0ti6nY10RkZ9Jc48lk8_sX52NFXSstHRQzXnLphdLR9oM-pYqpM3X588Z93_q-kKTbsL9o2OnrDtFiundbn2NT_eOnTwp8AAAD__1xagJ8)

In this powerful book, Dr. Joseph Stowell (a name you may recognize as the former president of Moody Bible Institute) offers a timely call for Christians to stop fighting battles for an earthly kingdom and instead embrace the privilege of advancing Christ's Kingdom. Drawing from Scripture and the life of Jesus, Dr. Stowell shows how we can respond to today's challenges with hope, courage, and grace.

As we interact with a culture that often feels divided and broken,_This Light of Mine_ encourages us to reflect Jesus' love and truth in a way that draws others to the Gospel--without alienating them. It encourages us to rise above the noise and shine God's light in a world desperately in need of it.

We'd love to send you an exclusive, pre-release copy of _This Light of Mine_ as a thank-you for your generous gift of any amount to support the mission of _Today in the Word_. Your gift today will help us continue providing Bible-centered resources to readers across the globe.

Whether you're seeking practical advice for living out your faith in a complex world or simply need encouragement to stay steady in your walk with Christ, _This Light of Mine_ is a timely and powerful tool for your journey.

Give today at this link and receive this book as a thank-you: [https://give.todayintheword.org/cye-tdw](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUkMHOnCAQgJ8GbxgYUOqBw59svG3T9NKjQZjVaQQM4m727Rub7QP0-n0zk3zz6z7dHW2Ulu8uoi1xKseU3BRn4nvByDda1sojJZxAgOYSOIhJNsH2A5hvskErjdJGSDWIZrVGGh3Q6Dl4NXRC9t7Mfhh0J2SYu0E3ZK87EkBI0D10rQjSQS8dzA8Uj_7BtCi4n_NG3qXofudC9d0mrM1m11r3g6kvBiODcaEntjUH96ZUV3zlEtpcFgajfyOv4cXUeNY4eRd3R0ti6nY10RkZ9Jc48lk8_sX52NFXSstHRQzXnLphdLR9oM-pYqpM3X588Z93_q-kKTbsL9o2OnrDtFiundbn2NT_eOnTwp8AAAD__1xagJ8)

When you give today, you not only support the mission of _Today in the Word_ to spread the Gospel but you will also receive this transformative book that will inspire and equip you to live out your Christian faith with boldness and love.

[Can I count on you to partner with us in this season of giving? Together, we can shine the light of Jesus in a world that desperately needs it.](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUkMHOnCAQgJ8GbxgYUOqBw59svG3T9NKjQZjVaQQM4m727Rub7QP0-n0zk3zz6z7dHW2Ulu8uoi1xKseU3BRn4nvByDda1sojJZxAgOYSOIhJNsH2A5hvskErjdJGSDWIZrVGGh3Q6Dl4NXRC9t7Mfhh0J2SYu0E3ZK87EkBI0D10rQjSQS8dzA8Uj_7BtCi4n_NG3qXofudC9d0mrM1m11r3g6kvBiODcaEntjUH96ZUV3zlEtpcFgajfyOv4cXUeNY4eRd3R0ti6nY10RkZ9Jc48lk8_sX52NFXSstHRQzXnLphdLR9oM-pYqpM3X588Z93_q-kKTbsL9o2OnrDtFiundbn2NT_eOnTwp8AAAD__1xagJ8)

Thank you for your generosity and for being part of this important mission.

With gratitude,

Jamie Janosz
Managing Editor, _Today in the Word_

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 12/20/2024
body:
Overwhelming ‘wolves are not welcome’ message the result of Garfield Co. ‘come to Jesus’ meeting
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Happy Friday!
We had a GREAT first night at Turning Point's AmericaFest with speakers like Charlie Kirk, Donald Trump Jr., Ben Shapiro, and Tucker Carlson! Make sure you're following us on [social media](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for live updates from the event 💥 we may even have some exclusive interviews with Colorado attendees and speakers...
Here's a summary of today's newsletter:
**🏔️ Here in Colorado...** Garfield County residents strongly opposed the [state’s wolf reintroduction plan](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) during a packed public meeting, citing concerns over livestock and wildlife safety, with officials acknowledging limited options for wolf release locations. Meanwhile, the Bustang Outrider now [connects Sterling to Denver International Airport](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), offering affordable transit options for rural residents to access Front Range amenities.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** Congress faces backlash over its [proposed spending bill](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), criticized for controversial provisions such as lawmaker pay raises and disaster aid allocations, with high-profile figures like Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy expressing strong opposition.
**🗣️ RMV Commentary Spotlight...** Cory Gaines urges Logan County residents to educate themselves about Metro Districts as plans for a [new special district](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) near Sterling could reshape local governance. C.J. Garbo highlights the establishment of the 23rd Judicial District as a model for [tackling crime through bold leadership](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), contrasting it with the perceived failures of urban jurisdictions like Denver and Aurora.
This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, December 20, 2024.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Overwhelming ‘wolves are not welcome’ message the result of Garfield Co. ‘come to Jesus’ meeting](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY LINDY BROWNING, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
More than 300 residents from Garfield, Eagle and Pitkin Counties flocked recently to the New Hope Church in New Castle at the invitation of the Garfield County officials.
The purpose of the meeting was to allow them to hear more about the imminent release of up to 15 wolves that are being captured from British Columbia, Canada, and transplanted into their ranching and agricultural community in January 2025.
Elected officials in attendance included Garfield County Commissioners Mike Samson, John Martin, Tom Jankowski, former Commissioner Russell George, current state Sen. and newly-elected Commissioner Perry Will, newly-elected state Sen. Marc Catlin, and newly-elected U.S. Congressman Jeff Hurd, among others.
To say that the mood of the room was somber would be the understatement of the year. With passions running high and tension so thick that you could almost see it in the air; more than 80 people signed in to speak at the meeting it was clear that the attendees were there to send a strong message to their government officials, and to Colorado Parks and Wildlife employees. The message being sent to CPW and the governor was resoundingly, “We don’t want these wolves!”
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[The ‘Bustang’ now connects from Sterling to DIA with low-cost fare](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The Bustang Outrider now connects Sterling and surrounding communities to Denver International Airport, providing affordable transit options starting at $5.
* The service addresses a long-standing gap in transportation for Northeast Colorado’s rural areas, making travel to Front Range destinations easier for those without personal vehicles.
* With amenities like Wi-Fi, USB ports, and bike racks, the service offers a cost-effective alternative to driving, helping residents save on fuel and parking.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Here’s what’s in the spending bill that’s drawing the ire of Elon Musk, Vivek Ramaswamy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [FOX NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* A proposed continuing resolution has drawn criticism for including a $6,600 annual pay raise for members of Congress, $100 billion in disaster relief, and $8 billion for rebuilding a privately-owned bridge, all without addressing the national debt.
* The bill allows lawmakers to opt out of the Affordable Care Act, extends ethanol sales mandates, and reauthorizes a controversial State Department agency accused of censorship, fueling opposition from conservatives and public figures like Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy.
* Critics, including President-elect Trump, have denounced the legislation, calling for fiscal responsibility and warning against provisions that fail to cut spending or address long-term financial challenges.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Gaines: Educate yourself, Logan County, a Metro District may be coming](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY CORY GAINES, [COLORADO ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_Sage Pointe, a neighborhood just outside of Sterling, Colo., in Logan County, might have a Metro District coming._
_Since such things might be new to a lot of people out here; I thought it worth taking a minute to hit the high notes on Metro Districts._ ___Before anything else, let me take a second to say that nothing of what I write below should be taken as an accusation against anyone in Sage Pointe, nor as any sort of alarm call. Metro Districts have been and can be problematic, but they don’t have to be as long as you’re informed._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Garbo: The people’s will to stand tall against crime manifested in JD23](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY C.J. GARBO, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_In an era when too many jurisdictions have abandoned the very principles that uphold civilized society, the 23rd Judicial District (JD23) emerges as a bastion of bold, unified leadership._
_Under the steady hand of District Attorney George Brauchler and the resolute support of Douglas, Elbert and Lincoln County officials, this district has sent a clear and unwavering message: criminals will find no haven here._ __
_The launch of JD23 represents more than just a reorganization of judicial boundaries; it is the realization of a community’s demand for governance rooted in justice, accountability and respect for its citizens. These counties have made it clear that apathy toward criminal behavior and anti-law enforcement rhetoric have no place in their vision for the future._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
**[Tina Peters has been transferred from Mesa County to Larimer County jail](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | DECEMBER 18** _Former Mesa County Clerk and Recorder Tina Peters has been transferred from the Mesa County jail to the Larimer County jail._
**[Sloan: CEO killing is case study in Left’s anarchical view of law](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY KELLY SLOAN****| NATIONAL | DECEMBER 18** _The political diagnosticians poking around at the remains of the last election, on behalf of the Democratic Party, are compiling a gestating list of items seeking to explain why what happened on Nov. 7._
[**Garbo: The alarming normalization of murder in Brian Thompson’s death**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[****](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**BY C.J. GARBO****| COMMENTARY |****DECEMBER 18** _A recent poll revealing that 41% of young voters find the murder of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson acceptable is deeply troubling._

**🤔 DID YOU KNOW?** John Tyler became the **first vice president to assume the presidency** following William Henry Harrison's death in 1841. At the time, the Constitution didn’t explicitly state that the vice president would fully assume the role of president, making Tyler's actions controversial. The process was officially clarified with the passage of the 25th Amendment in 1967.

clean_body: Overwhelming ‘wolves are not welcome’ message the result of Garfield Co. ‘come to Jesus’ meeting | | | | PRESENTED BY | | Happy Friday! We had a GREAT first night at Turning Point's AmericaFest with speakers like Charlie Kirk, Donald Trump Jr., Ben Shapiro, and Tucker Carlson! Make sure you're following us on for live updates from the event 💥 we may even have some exclusive interviews with Colorado attendees and speakers... Here's a summary of today's newsletter: 🏔️ Here in Colorado... Garfield County residents strongly opposed the during a packed public meeting, citing concerns over livestock and wildlife safety, with officials acknowledging limited options for wolf release locations. Meanwhile, the Bustang Outrider now , offering affordable transit options for rural residents to access Front Range amenities. 🇺🇸 On the National Stage... Congress faces backlash over its , criticized for controversial provisions such as lawmaker pay raises and disaster aid allocations, with high-profile figures like Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy expressing strong opposition. 🗣️ RMV Commentary Spotlight... Cory Gaines urges Logan County residents to educate themselves about Metro Districts as plans for a near Sterling could reshape local governance. C.J. Garbo highlights the establishment of the 23rd Judicial District as a model for , contrasting it with the perceived failures of urban jurisdictions like Denver and Aurora. This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, December 20, 2024. – Heidi Ganahl | TODAY'S TOP STORIES BY LINDY BROWNING, More than 300 residents from Garfield, Eagle and Pitkin Counties flocked recently to the New Hope Church in New Castle at the invitation of the Garfield County officials. The purpose of the meeting was to allow them to hear more about the imminent release of up to 15 wolves that are being captured from British Columbia, Canada, and transplanted into their ranching and agricultural community in January 2025. Elected officials in attendance included Garfield County Commissioners Mike Samson, John Martin, Tom Jankowski, former Commissioner Russell George, current state Sen. and newly-elected Commissioner Perry Will, newly-elected state Sen. Marc Catlin, and newly-elected U.S. Congressman Jeff Hurd, among others. To say that the mood of the room was somber would be the understatement of the year. With passions running high and tension so thick that you could almost see it in the air; more than 80 people signed in to speak at the meeting it was clear that the attendees were there to send a strong message to their government officials, and to Colorado Parks and Wildlife employees. The message being sent to CPW and the governor was resoundingly, “We don’t want these wolves!” | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | The Bustang Outrider now connects Sterling and surrounding communities to Denver International Airport, providing affordable transit options starting at $5. The service addresses a long-standing gap in transportation for Northeast Colorado’s rural areas, making travel to Front Range destinations easier for those without personal vehicles. With amenities like Wi-Fi, USB ports, and bike racks, the service offers a cost-effective alternative to driving, helping residents save on fuel and parking. | A proposed continuing resolution has drawn criticism for including a $6,600 annual pay raise for members of Congress, $100 billion in disaster relief, and $8 billion for rebuilding a privately-owned bridge, all without addressing the national debt. The bill allows lawmakers to opt out of the Affordable Care Act, extends ethanol sales mandates, and reauthorizes a controversial State Department agency accused of censorship, fueling opposition from conservatives and public figures like Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy. Critics, including President-elect Trump, have denounced the legislation, calling for fiscal responsibility and warning against provisions that fail to cut spending or address long-term financial challenges. | BY CORY GAINES, Sage Pointe, a neighborhood just outside of Sterling, Colo., in Logan County, might have a Metro District coming. Since such things might be new to a lot of people out here; I thought it worth taking a minute to hit the high notes on Metro Districts. _Before anything else, let me take a second to say that nothing of what I write below should be taken as an accusation against anyone in Sage Pointe, nor as any sort of alarm call. Metro Districts have been and can be problematic, but they don’t have to be as long as you’re informed. | BY C.J. GARBO, In an era when too many jurisdictions have abandoned the very principles that uphold civilized society, the 23rd Judicial District (JD23) emerges as a bastion of bold, unified leadership. Under the steady hand of District Attorney George Brauchler and the resolute support of Douglas, Elbert and Lincoln County officials, this district has sent a clear and unwavering message: criminals will find no haven here. The launch of JD23 represents more than just a reorganization of judicial boundaries; it is the realization of a community’s demand for governance rooted in justice, accountability and respect for its citizens. These counties have made it clear that apathy toward criminal behavior and anti-law enforcement rhetoric have no place in their vision for the future. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | DECEMBER 18 Former Mesa County Clerk and Recorder Tina Peters has been transferred from the Mesa County jail to the Larimer County jail. KELLY SLOAN| NATIONAL | DECEMBER 18 The political diagnosticians poking around at the remains of the last election, on behalf of the Democratic Party, are compiling a gestating list of items seeking to explain why what happened on Nov. 7. C.J. GARBO| COMMENTARY |DECEMBER 18 A recent poll revealing that 41% of young voters find the murder of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson acceptable is deeply troubling._ Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\)) or send us a message on social media to chat! | | 🤔 DID YOU KNOW? John Tyler became the first vice president to assume the presidency following William Henry Harrison's death in 1841. At the time, the Constitution didn’t explicitly state that the vice president would fully assume the role of president, making Tyler's actions controversial. The process was officially clarified with the passage of the 25th Amendment in 1967. | CARTOON OF THE DAY | QUOTE OF THE DAY “The way I see it, if you want the rainbow, you gotta put up with the rain!” — Dolly Parton | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Elon Brings America to a Halt
body:
MAGA chaos is already failing Americans.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vt48t-p9xsk8-kyd76rh0/)

# **Elon Musk is about to shutdown the government.**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vt48t-p9xsk9-kyd76rh1/)
---
| | | | folks, The government is on the verge of shutting down, and there’s one person at the center of the chaos: Elon Musk. Yes, the billionaire tech mogul, now the MAGA overlord, has stepped in to dictate Republican strategy, controlling Congress like his own personal chessboard. A bipartisan deal was within reach—a chance to keep the government open, protect essential services, and ensure millions of Americans wouldn’t suffer. But Elon Musk said no. As Representative Rosa DeLauro so sharply put it: “President Musk said, ‘Don’t do it, shut the government down.’ Imagine that. What does he know about what people go through when the government shuts down?” And she’s right. Musk doesn’t live in the real world. While hardworking families are left without paychecks and vital government services, he sits in his billionaire bubble, immune to the consequences of his reckless meddling. House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries laid it out clearly: “One or two puppet masters weigh in, and the extreme MAGA Republicans decide to do the bidding of the wealthy.” Elon Musk, the wealthiest among them, is calling the shots, and Republicans in Congress are falling in line. It’s Musk’s whims that killed a bipartisan deal, plunging the government into disarray. This isn’t just a shutdown; it’s a dangerous shift in power. When one man can override elected officials and derail a government, we’re no longer living in a democracy. We’re sliding into an oligarchy where billionaires like Musk control the levers of power, leaving everyday Americans behind. [**_The time to act is now. Join us in holding Republicans accountable for their failure to lead. Donate today to help us fight back and build a government that works for the people, not the billionaires. Let’s remind the chaos caucus that their recklessness has consequences—at the ballot box in 2026 and beyond._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vt48t-p9xska-kyd76rh1/)

name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: Discover the True Meaning of Christmas with A Christmas Carol
body:
Great literature teaches you about human nature and draws you toward the good.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9571u4hp0k213ivceuberjahj6mnk0p7p6i72jg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cti6eor4c5h2bs)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

Great literature teaches you about human nature and draws you toward the good. Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ is a wonderful example.

You're likely familiar with Ebenezer Scrooge--literature's most famous miser. His choices corrupted his soul and left him miserable. The drama of this beloved Christmas tale consists of his education at the hands of the three Ghosts of Christmas and its effects on his soul.

The story is rich with meaning. Among its chief lessons is that one's happiness depends upon learning to choose well and to love the good. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z378cmb25c9s0tdsflg1fec19k9fakrk9rqitn58_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cti6eor4c5h2bs)
**This Christmas, I want to send you an exclusive hardcover Hillsdale College edition of _A Christmas Carol_ for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more.**

This beautiful volume features an inspiring introduction and 26 exclusive illustrations. You can treasure this meaningful keepsake or even gift it to a loved one.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-carol-book](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znbr35hv9rvnoq46ia3bcnr9bvpg3p5dne08koig_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cti6eor4c5h2bs)

I wish you and yours a blessed Christmas season,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

clean_body: Great literature teaches you about human nature and draws you toward the good. This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, Great literature teaches you about human nature and draws you toward the good. Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol is a wonderful example. You're likely familiar with Ebenezer Scrooge--literature's most famous miser. His choices corrupted his soul and left him miserable. The drama of this beloved Christmas tale consists of his education at the hands of the three Ghosts of Christmas and its effects on his soul. The story is rich with meaning. Among its chief lessons is that one's happiness depends upon learning to choose well and to love the good. This Christmas, I want to send you an exclusive hardcover Hillsdale College edition of A Christmas Carol for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more. This beautiful volume features an inspiring introduction and 26 exclusive illustrations. You can treasure this meaningful keepsake or even gift it to a loved one. I wish you and yours a blessed Christmas season, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College | | Trump Train News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

A Historic Moment: Robert F. Kennedy on Capitol Hill
[A HEALTHIER FUTURE FOR ALL AMERICANS](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=capitol_hill_12_20_24_nd1&n=5)
Dear Peter,
This week, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is on Capitol Hill meeting with more than 20 senators as he prepares for Senate hearings next month.
As President Trump’s nominee for Secretary of Health and Human Services, Kennedy is talking with Senators to hear what matters most to them and their constituents.
This moment is about more than one nomination. It’s about reimagining what health can look like in our country—addressing chronic disease, getting toxins out of our food, and ensuring transparency throughout the entire agency.
[**Kennedy has always been a voice for healthier, stronger families—and now he needs our support. >>**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=capitol_hill_12_20_24_nd1&n=6)
When Robert F. Kennedy Jr. launched his campaign, he knew the road ahead would require extraordinary commitment. He made every sacrifice to ensure his message reached the people.
Now, as he works to execute President Trump’s vision for a healthier America, _we can lighten his load and strengthen his efforts to Make America Healthy Again._
[**Will you stand with Kennedy today and be part of this historic moment? >>**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=capitol_hill_12_20_24_nd1&n=7)
[Chip in $25, $50, or $100](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=capitol_hill_12_20_24_nd1&n=8)
Every contribution helps close out the necessary campaign debt from the road we’ve traveled together, freeing Kennedy to focus fully on this mission: improving health policies, promoting transparency, and prioritizing the well-being of every American.
**Together, we can Make America Healthy Again.**
Thank you for being part of this extraordinary journey.
Team Kennedy
[Mahanow.org](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=y_k5EP27yTOsxSw3tqBFMOXUy1MXBZnG7PhKqYOpRo0&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=capitol_hill_12_20_24_nd1&n=9)

| | Fellow Conservative, The Verdict with Ted Cruz podcast has been rolling strong since January 2020 - in the modern era, long-form content has proven to be a powerful way to break through the corporate media filter to break down the news of the day - and we're not letting up as we work to advance our conservative agenda and get America back on track.

It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19429/6374453/c07f94bc583b9c40d402a0a91730fed9aec27171/d749fa6cd22efdaf528f16fd2e3b988d1d165740). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19429/6374453/c07f94bc583b9c40d402a0a91730fed9aec27171/d749fa6cd22efdaf528f16fd2e3b988d1d165740).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19429/6374453/c07f94bc583b9c40d402a0a91730fed9aec27171/d749fa6cd22efdaf528f16fd2e3b988d1d165740)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!

name: Hillsdale College via Old Glory Today
subject: Before they're gone
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Old Glory Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/eEqaPMkehHtfx0ysnuPocg~~/AARclAA~~~) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/eEqaPMkehHtfx0ysnuPocg~~/AARclAA~~~) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/eEqaPMkehHtfx0ysnuPocg~~/AARclAA~~~)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/eEqaPMkehHtfx0ysnuPocg~~/AARclAA~~~)**
---

Old Glory Today
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
