name: Bill Gray
subject: God bless us...
body:
Honor Christmas with A Christmas Carol

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=537617ba55354388b390d86fb1b43626&_e=7fACmxbevCb0jdsDwWaXKG6887si3dl68veqS92cjBR8rhPr0Q9KfeC5koSPcgPkMdcgg0WQKZGh2WhrTG-fz0L1p6JVL0J0xvTZ5B3noPhUGBid5kKTsRnk9JG0PZFCYJDWpYCAkeDpwf2zRAgWlC34DTdrA1X5BSOBNDe04pUH0daWLRIpXxByPMgi4akMM8H7Rh2qYFOZEuk5mXyxZnkoH9Vbll1zDqKub3JENM_V71oX3BjraHnE4ZU_6KUzJ5VKt2KOpfpLtOa9DmTYpfSC-8CwuMWxO0u171Qn14MuttGMTFEOBGWMtAiyiN_4VFE4D-DBlV8OUAlZlNB3DwdLe9-hQBDg5z-XjblKsvlGsiTZRuusRVtxdH8W9FzIYZzeBnoiST9psp5vX1JLMnFIjsST94caqxAUht_dvI0%3D)
---
---
| | Peter,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

_" Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! A squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." _

Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol."

Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives. [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=537617ba55354388b390d86fb1b43626&_e=7fACmxbevCb0jdsDwWaXKG6887si3dl68veqS92cjBR8rhPr0Q9KfeC5koSPcgPkMdcgg0WQKZGh2WhrTG-fz0L1p6JVL0J0xvTZ5B3noPhUGBid5kKTsRnk9JG0PZFCYJDWpYCAkeDpwf2zRAgWlC34DTdrA1X5BSOBNDe04pUH0daWLRIpXxByPMgi4akMM8H7Rh2qYFOZEuk5mXyxZnkoH9Vbll1zDqKub3JENM_V71oX3BjraHnE4ZU_6KUz708I-YraWoO_TAOGjpe7W-bsuVLs456RzMzWsV591PgOPcE_S_q5ASJXSnmDgPxmyfOaCfYY2tGHICL5D93kLq7CF5GFoFpW8IckD_xpf4yo8ddRspVbrYY3bEzrX3uEkNQc9aTveCiTj3BKg4GhFC53Kq2HS_jDSiSTKdixBQo%3D)
**You can request a hardcover Hillsdale College edition of _A Christmas Carol_ by clicking on the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-carol-book](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=537617ba55354388b390d86fb1b43626&_e=7fACmxbevCb0jdsDwWaXKG6887si3dl68veqS92cjBR8rhPr0Q9KfeC5koSPcgPkMdcgg0WQKZGh2WhrTG-fz0L1p6JVL0J0xvTZ5B3noPhUGBid5kKTsRnk9JG0PZFCYJDWpYCAkeDpwf2zRAgWlC34DTdrA1X5BSOBNDe04pUH0daWLRIpXxByPMgi4akMM8H7Rh2qYFOZEuk5mXyxZnkoH9Vbll1zDqKub3JENM_V71oX3BjraHnE4ZU_6KUzxi79JnEI4fA3rcrxn1WQDHn7d27Gbwci7RQT6It1N3BeohrnCi0QmGLJcOJCKZAdjkqfUaJohjgm72tFDRRTHve1mV4esbIlbxpAy2ytJHeD3UNfuRjh9DlMeSaCM-oQM8qQ2cBsBE2VZ18v0N3GGg9_Ni9OUo7yDwyXeoK5aRE%3D)

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Merry Christmas to you and yours,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| | [

Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=537617ba55354388b390d86fb1b43626&_t=b0qFsoA3Hax1K4d6I9CfLh_c6LrSGslkI4Nf2B5OiyQFXRnBbDaJiT3nnINE_bzefRmdE4dP7-_nCZhOvA85K_eLnID0ifb8eq7imw0qxURKDrAKYn_yzvJNrsJamUnn)

name: Lily Tomlin & Jane Wagner
subject: Let’s celebrate Jane Fonda in style 🎉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Join me in honoring my dear friend.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98995709/518522270/1328794144?refcode=ea.759dc472-d9be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ms=ea.759dc472-d9be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1OWRjNDcyLWQ5YmUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZJxa269HsaQITqVOX3f46ik_oCJrkeOVoMNFVQU5f3w=&emci=8448c843-86bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=759dc472-d9be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=4823105)
---
Hi there! Lily Tomlin and Jane Wagner here. Can you believe it? Our dear friend Jane Fonda is turning 87 tomorrow! We’ve known Jane for decades, and let me tell you, she only gets more fabulous with age. Jane isn’t just a cultural icon or a brilliant actor. She’s a force of nature. Whether she’s leading a protest or going head-to-head with Big Oil executives, she does everything with passion and the kind of energy many people could only dream of. To celebrate this milestone, her team created a design inspired by Jane’s quote: _“Anybody can be young, but only the lucky get to be old.”_ Together, we can celebrate Jane’s birthday, reflect on the privilege we all have to work together towards a common goal, and do it all in style! body:
🔠🎓The future of Nebraska is our children | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/db055c814a11/n41kepo7ku-12724771?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=33ca67cead&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter, Chairman Underwood here.

The NEGOP is preparing to represent your voice in the upcoming Unicameral session. Our PRIORITY POLLS Series will give you an opportunity to have a greater impact on the future of Nebraska. NO donation is required...just take 5 minutes to fill out.

How can we fund public education and take the burden off the property payers?
How can we support our Teachers so we can provide quality education to ALL 244 school systems from the Panhandle to the Missouri?
How can we grow the relationships between parents and schools, mothers and fathers who want the best for their children with educators that have a passion to see kids grow?

We will send results to all who respond as well as communicate the will of the people to our lawmakers. [**> > TAKE THE SURVEY <<**](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=42a843efa1&e=25844e23a8)

| [TAKE THE POLL > ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=427870bf14&e=25844e23a8 "TAKE THE POLL > ")

| Your feedback is invaluable to us.

Please take a moment to click on the survey link below and share your thoughts:

[**[CLICK HERE]**](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=1831289669&e=25844e23a8)

Thank you for your dedication and participation.

Warm regards,
Eric Underwood
NEGOP Chairman

Sen. Josh Hawley **[lost his temper at NCAA President](https://substack.com/redirect/7880b87b-13fe-4111-85cc-f95a54b85790?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Charlie Baker during a heated senate hearing on transgender athletes threatening the competitive fairness of women's sports.
"Everyone is to blame except you, right?!!" Hawley exploded at Baker, who wouldn't take any responsibility for his organization's absurd policies. **[Watch what happened next below:](https://substack.com/redirect/7880b87b-13fe-4111-85cc-f95a54b85790?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

Our service members stationed across the world are always on guard to defend us on land, at sea and in the air. But for missions that go above and beyond our world, it's our U.S. Space Force heroes tasked with protecting us.
That's why the motto of our Space Force is "Semper Supra" -- which is Latin for "Always Above."
Many of us can't even imagine the threats our nation faces from space, and this military branch will only become more integral to our national interests and security as technology advances.
**Today is our first time sending a birthday card to our Space Force, so please don 't miss your chance to be one of the first to say happy birthday to the youngest branch of our military! ---
MERRY CHRISTMAS _From Kari, Jeff, Ruby, and Leo_
---
| | From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=0c3e551834694e04bcbba6a9c539fe26&_e=fuVqcnick8eHe83ZOGSq7BR-2PiLZMM1G_ou2h_7lrGf1rjuNqDm9lZsdZboP2tces1KUK8_Q7ps3eg2n7KfoahULdM-ZgqM3mksEQq-zAm21LbAt58c4pPpgA1zb5pAFfrvYKINIUeadlgIpnEzQ0HcSziuCl5WH08XOT4bIxGLfqOnaxr1HmE2cLLbiOWh4bBHKF1VcrTEJRBoKSSRKWJ-1CsY01naj8R44YnDtBJbJH9V72zDB2jRFjpBKC1xJHKEpQADiFujpagDnUFn5w295nLF1Zo10SI7CG-yBYypVhOmqOjsy55lGHf-BAOr-5A1-um_Eh3oKVmnJ3-JlDVNkmarTtg7lTCp9ACMGR8iVesPkxiYr10zCe5xlbDY9VRpK7vFPQLNRfV4O8udjFj_CWy0e53WEbWNOEeEhSg%3D)**
---
|
---
Dear Peter,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Peter, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Peter, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=0c3e551834694e04bcbba6a9c539fe26&_e=fuVqcnick8eHe83ZOGSq7BR-2PiLZMM1G_ou2h_7lrGf1rjuNqDm9lZsdZboP2tces1KUK8_Q7ps3eg2n7KfoahULdM-ZgqM3mksEQq-zAm21LbAt58c4pPpgA1zb5pAFfrvYKINIUeadlgIpnEzQ0HcSziuCl5WH08XOT4bIxGLfqOnaxr1HmE2cLLbiOWh4bBHKF1VcrTEJRBoKSSRKWJ-1CsY01naj8R44YnDtBJbJH9V72zDB2jRFjpBKC1xJHKEpQADiFujpagDnUFn55ldGkIQPyQNYMCsz8YxcQfyPovBLRGVlZPKRVHjUOYDEQKI5zTkiTjDPINHjyKNNlURyo26RWtnjdYDgvQz7JDf0MgYDlxeeoS0iVwin3ncr1SLGZ4bFQuhAcCrr_PQO24aO5FLGcKfioW3SNq8zIU%3D)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Peter, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Peter, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---
[Will you help me defeat the left’s lawfare by rushing back a generous contribution to my “**First Amendment Fund** ”?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=0c3e551834694e04bcbba6a9c539fe26&_e=fuVqcnick8eHe83ZOGSq7BR-2PiLZMM1G_ou2h_7lrGf1rjuNqDm9lZsdZboP2tces1KUK8_Q7ps3eg2n7KfoahULdM-ZgqM3mksEQq-zAm21LbAt58c4pPpgA1zb5pAFfrvYKINIUeadlgIpnEzQ0HcSziuCl5WH08XOT4bIxGLfqOnaxr1HmE2cLLbiOWh4bBHKF1VcrTEJRBoKSSRKWJ-1CsY01naj8R44YnDtBJbJH9V72zDB2jRFjpBKC1xJHKEpQADiFujpagDnUFn50g4S883i2_gPhZvqYkUmUUE-2av6vTKv0Dfgwkm4uIQ6BxX52IHiq3W7UyDsO7prl6pGmlYPNyu9ZodOmn5T6bydeBAy1MwzU0AxIuxpINaAXm0cxh_GbUwRvSLrwtt7tm2bG8KML2M4fYTAGniO9o%3D)Your generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Peter, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... name: Diane Sare
subject: Friday Symposium: The Strategic Importance of the LaRouche Case Today
body:
| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HPeLIFflw7WCajMEVGvmb9S&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241220_symposium&n=1)
---
| Friend – In a 1995 letter to Janet Reno, former U.S. Attorney General Ramsey Clark stated unequivocally that “I believe [the LaRouche case] involves a broader range of deliberate and systematic misconduct and abuse of power over a longer period of time in an effort to destroy a political movement and leader, than any other federal prosecution in my time or to my knowledge.” In his August 1995 testimony to an independent hearing on Department of Justice corruption, Lyndon LaRouche issued an ominous warning that “...until we remove from our system of government a rotten permanent bureaucracy which acts like contract assassins using the authority of the justice system to perpetrate assassination, this country is not free nor anyone in it.” Although most thinking Americans are now quite familiar with many of the more recent such abuses by the F.B.I., DOJ, and the legacy news media in the array of attacks on former President Donald Trump as well as on many other Americans of lesser notability, far fewer Americans are aware of the actual precedent that created this state of affairs, namely the years-long attacks on Lyndon LaRouche at the hands of a coordinated “Get LaRouche” task force. This week, join myself and EIR editor Dennis Small (one of the original targets of the "Get LaRouche" operation) and learn exactly _why_ the Anglo-American war party believed that such a heavy-handed deployment to crush LaRouche and his ideas was so central to their deadly world agenda, and why a full exoneration of LaRouche has now become a vital strategic issue today.
* * *
### [ Friday Symposium, December 20, 2024, 8:00 PM](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=2fVGP-PhvXIwVfYRj2FCFsxXAjO_U_sdHxoQEqqmRMCiYmGlTKnb3Yd4_neEnc5OkypnUQhxyidpzcpTPAp2yg&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241220_symposium&n=2)

Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uymtUNjjFkNKAgnhWJC0sQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSBdkP0S9aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvd2h5LWFtZXJpY2EtbWF0dGVycy1kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdhbSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9cHJlbWl1bV9BRS1QQVRWRDU5NjcxJnNvdXJjZV9jb2RlPXByZW1pdW1fQUUtVVNDTjU5NjcyVwNzcGNCCmdVq4NlZ3Z-XTRSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. #
Peter,
One month from today, Donald Trump will return to the White House as the 47th President of the United States.
Trump and his cabinet nominees will do everything they can to implement Project 2025 starting on **Day One**. And we know that this second Trump administration will be more difficult and daunting than before.
But we can determine how far Trump can go right now by coming together and organizing our communities against harmful and hateful policies, fighting Trump's extremist agenda, and looking out for each other.
Before we know it, the 2026 midterm elections will be here. And our eyes are set on **winning back Congress, including the Democratic Senate Majority.**
Once we take back the Senate, we can stop Donald Trump's most extreme policies, block his MAGA judicial nominations, and defend our democracy from hatred and division.

name: PoliticsPA
subject: Good news for 2025
body:
Tune into the latest installment of the Voices of Reason podcast. | | | |
---
| | | Welcome to the latest edition of _Voices of Reason_ where we’ll recap exclusive news and data featured in our most recent podcast.

This segment dives into the bi-partisan, pro-growth initiatives members of the House GOP caucus will be prioritizing for 2025.

**Rep. Bryan Cutler, **and President and CEO of the Pennsylvania Chamber, **Luke Bernstein** share insights you don’t want to miss.
---
| **Big Names Make News**
---
| **PA State Rep. Bryan Cutler** explains that professionals are PA's "number one export," and outlines how to incentivize young professionals in key industries to stay and plant roots in the state. [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0377fc305c&e=b7b3eddce2)]

**CEO of the Pennsylvania Chamber Luke Bernstein** describes the urgency of pro-economy reforms, stating "every day that's delayed is a day that people are not working. It’s a day we're not getting our economy moving. It's a day that projects and progress are coming to a halt.” [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d84327f3c5&e=b7b3eddce2)]
---
|
* * *
---
| **Numbers You Need to Know**
---
| _Voter Interests_
* All PA state lawmakers, judges, and top executive branch officials will get a **pay raise of 3.4% in 2025**. [[PoliticsPA](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=fd22513cc1&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* That will be about one-third higher than private sector employees who will be receiving a **2.6% average wage increase** over the 12-month October-to-October period. [[WHYY](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8836a01bef&e=b7b3eddce2)]

_Elections_
* State Supreme Court justices are elected to 10-year terms, with three Democratic Justices — **Christine Donohue, Kevin Dougherty, and David Wecht** — up for retention in 2025. [[Democracy Docket](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e399d58bba&e=b7b3eddce2)]

_Public Opinion_
* About 7% of Medicare enrollees used a telehealth service in 2020 and by 2024, that number **has increased to 12%**. [[WHYY](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1e9171053a&e=b7b3eddce2)]

---
|
* * *
---
| **Rep. Bryan Cutler talks policy priorities for the New Year**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=336c37c843&e=b7b3eddce2 "Tim DeFoor & Bryan Cutler Talk 2024 Policy Priorities – Keystone Candidate Forum")
---
|
* * *
---
| **In Case You Missed It...**
---
| The _Voices of Reason_ podcast has covered the most important issues in Pennsylvania politics – from [education funding](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3b02118dad&e=b7b3eddce2) to [trust in elections](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=792a98cb43&e=b7b3eddce2). Secretary of the Commonwealth [Al Schmidt](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d8b6dc56a2&e=b7b3eddce2), PA Treasurer [Stacy Garrity](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=12ac8bffcd&e=b7b3eddce2), and House Appropriations Chairman [Jordan Harris](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=70e56b418a&e=b7b3eddce2) are just a few of many influential guests who have joined us for exclusive interviews and roundtable discussions.
Visit the _Voice of Reason_ [YouTube page](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2b7a2330f3&e=b7b3eddce2) to experience all the great moments you missed.
---
|
* * *
---
| **Get in Touch**
---
| We like smart ideas and want to hear from you.

Send feedback and inquire about appearing on _Voices of Reason_ , at [press@politicspa.com](mailto:press@politicspa.com?subject=Voices%20of%20Reason%20Podcast%20Inquiry).
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=dddc4b9e00&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
[](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e56e43d9c1&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
[](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=88b66f38a2&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2024 Broad + Liberty, All rights reserved._
You're getting _Voices of Reason_ updates due to your interest in the PoliticsPA & Broad + Liberty websites, plus stories with impact in Pennsylvania, the Greater Philadelphia area, and beyond.

**Our mailing address is:**
Broad + Liberty323 West Front StreetSuite 200Media, PA 19063
[Add us to your address book](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7902855e75)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/profile?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7902855e75&e=b7b3eddce2&c=ba6f1f2315) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7902855e75&t=b&e=b7b3eddce2&c=ba6f1f2315).

[](https://login.mailchimp.com/signup/email-referral/?aid=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1)
---
|

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Jordan and Patel: partners in conspiracy chaos
body:
alt [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/LOGO.jpg]
Friends,
Jim Jordan just hit a new low.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20241220_jordan_patel_image [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20241220_jordan_patel_image]
On Fox News this week, Jordan raved about Kash Patel as the perfect pick to lead the FBI.
Yes, the same Kash Patel who has pledged to use the FBI to go after Trump’s political enemies and spread Q-Anon-level conspiracy theories.
These two are peas in an unhinged pod.
Let’s break it down:
Jim Jordan has spent years abusing his position in Congress to push dangerous conspiracies.
From baseless claims that the FBI spied on parents at school board meetings to saying the Bureau is “targeting” and attacking pro-life Catholics, Jordan’s constantly created chaos instead of addressing the real issues facing Americans.
Let’s not forget, Jordan also continues to defend the idea that the January 6 domestic terrorists were patriots, and claims the 2020 election was stolen – all with zero evidence.
Now he wants to install Kash Patel, a conspiracy theorist who has promised to weaponize the FBI, as the next Director.
We can’t afford to sit back while Jordan and Patel push their extremist agenda. That’s why we’re building the next phase of our movement to hold Jordan accountable and fight back against this dangerous road he’s taking us down. Will you pitch in $25, $50, or more to fuel this fight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20241220_jordan_patel_link1]
Patel isn’t just unqualified – he’s dangerous.
This is the guy who pushed the “Deep State” narrative to undermine federal investigations, promoted lies about Hunter Biden’s laptop, and insists Trump is the victim of an elaborate global plot.
And Jordan thinks this is the guy to “reform” the FBI? Give me a break.
Let’s be clear: Jordan isn’t focused on everyday people and never has.
He’s not working to lower prescription costs, protect seniors, or support veterans. He’s spending his time cozying up to conspiracy theorists and creating distractions to protect his ULTRA-MAGA cronies.
This isn’t just bad politics – it’s a direct threat to our democracy.
If Jordan has his way, we’ll have an FBI that’s entirely focused on violence and political vengeance.
This is the kind of unhinged extremism that has no place in our government, and we can’t let it stand.
The time to act is now.
Help us launch the next phase of our movement to stop Jordan’s reckless agenda and protect the future of our country.
We’ve gone toe to toe with Jordan before, and we’re not stopping.
Will you rush a contribution now to keep this fight going strong? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20241220_jordan_patel_link2]
Together, we can expose his dangerous alliances and show the people of this country that there’s a better way forward.
Working for US,
Tamie Wilson

name: Caitlyn, Team Trump
subject: Have you checked your inbox recently?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc

body:
We're helping to build a warchest of funds for the two Democrats who run for these open Florida seats - we need your urgent help!
Chip in NOW so we can flip these red seats blue >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111624_2]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111624_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111624_2&amount=5]

Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard.
They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress.
We CANNOT let them get away with it!
Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111624_2]

name: Justice Democrats
subject: The richest presidential cabinet in U.S. history
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

One month from today on January 20th, Donald Trump will be inaugurated as
President of the United States for the second time.

To make matters worse, he’s filling his administration with billionaires —
so far, 13 of them to be exact, and they’re worth more than $450 billion.

It’s the richest presidential cabinet in U.S. history.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241220?refcode=em20241220-36248&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36248_1203867_bV_rMU&akid=36248%2E1203867%2EbV_rMU ]Quartz headline: The Trump administration’s billionaires are worth more
than $450 billion. Here’s who they are. Donald Trump has once again
assembled the richest cabinet in history — blowing past his previous
record

This just goes to show how much power corporate interests and billionaires
have bought themselves in Washington, D.C., and why it’s crucial for the
Democratic Party to finally reject them.

If we’re going to win more elections, take back power from Trump and his
MAGA extremists, and make real progress on the issues that impact everyday
people, the Party must reject big checks from corporate and Super PACs,
and start listening to and rebuilding trust with the working class.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241220?refcode=em20241220-36248&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36248_1203867_bV_rMU&akid=36248%2E1203867%2EbV_rMU ]We’re building the grassroots pressure and recruiting working-class
progressives to challenge out-of-touch incumbents in 2026, but we won’t
get far without your support. Can we count on you to chip in any amount
today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241220?refcode=em20241220-36248&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36248_1203867_bV_rMU&akid=36248%2E1203867%2EbV_rMU ]Contribute $5

The Democratic establishment got us into this mess by prioritizing their
corporate and billionaire donors while ignoring their base, leading to
another four years of Trump. If they’re going to get out of it, the Party
needs to urgently clean house and return to its working-class roots.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241220-36248-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36248_1203867_bV_rMU&akid=36248%2E1203867%2EbV_rMU

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36248%2E1203867%2EbV_rMU

name: Jim Jordan
subject: A mere “toss-up” majority?
body:
I refuse to let all of our hard work be for nothing.
| Peter – since I last emailed you, this situation has become far more serious.
---
With numerous special elections just around the corner in the new year, our _new_ majority was _already_ going to be facing a razor-thin margin of just 1 seat.
---
But now, with reports indicating that yet another special election will soon be announced, the majority we fought tirelessly for all year long could now be a mere **TOSS-UP!**
---
Trust me, I know just how much time, effort, and resources from hardworking Americans like YOU went into securing such a big victory this November.
---
_That’s why I pulled**$2.5 MILLION** from my own 2024 campaign funds to help defend our majority from Kamala and the Democrats' warchest._
---
And now, with everything on the line, I REFUSE to let all of our hard work be for _nothing_.
---
So, before we officially close the books on 2024, I’m looking for **2.5 million PATRIOTS** to match my 2024 commitment with a contribution of truly ANY amount to help defend our new majority.

clean_body: I refuse to let all of our hard work be for nothing. | Peter – since I last emailed you, this situation has become far more serious. With numerous special elections just around the corner in the new year, our new majority was already going to be facing a razor-thin margin of just 1 seat. But now, with reports indicating that yet another special election will soon be announced, the majority we fought tirelessly for all year long could now be a mere TOSS-UP! Trust me, I know just how much time, effort, and resources from hardworking Americans like YOU went into securing such a big victory this November. That’s why I pulled$2.5 MILLION from my own 2024 campaign funds to help defend our majority from Kamala and the Democrats' warchest. And now, with everything on the line, I REFUSE to let all of our hard work be for nothing. So, before we officially close the books on 2024, I’m looking for 2.5 million PATRIOTS to match my 2024 commitment with a contribution of truly ANY amount to help defend our new majority. Thank you, Jim Jordan \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Jim Jordan Date: Fri, December 6, 2024 Subject: Just 1 SEAT?! To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, Please don’t misunderstand... I don’t want this email to come across as a message of doom and gloom. After all, no one can deny the sweeping mandate that President Trump and Republicans were just given by voters like YOU, sweeping the White House AND both chambers of Congress. But we also must face a glaring reality: Very soon – with a number of special elections already on the books for 2025 – our new majority will be narrowed to just 1 SEAT. Yes, you read that right. 1 seat. I know how hard you fought for this new majority, Peter. I’m right there with you... Over the course of the election, I transferred $2.5 million from my own campaign to help counter Kamala’s plot to buy our House majority. And now that our new majority could be hanging on by a thread next year, I refuse to let those efforts go to waste. That’s why I have no choice but to reach out before year’s end. I’m asking 2.5 million patriots to match my 2024 commitment with a contribution of ANY amount to help defend our NEW majority that will soon be cut down to just 1 SEAT. Thank you, Jim Jordan Paid for by Team Jordan a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed between Jim Jordan for Congress, Buckeye Liberty Fund, and American Liberty Foundation PAC. name: Stand with Bernie via Our Revolution
subject: Billionaires plan to privatize and plunder under Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1011?refcode=email-20241220_v&akid=7422%2E5885482%2EktMFzj ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis — we’re in an
existential fight for our country.

On one side, Trump, Musk and the billionaire class want to privatize the
government and plunder our tax dollars to pad their pockets. Through
de-regulation, de-unionization, and slashing taxes for the rich, they
aren’t shy about their plans to destroy public education, Social Security,
Medicare, and much more. All so they can profit even more.

On the other side is Bernie and our movement. Bernie just said that
Oligarchy is THE most important issue facing our country and our fight for
a progressive future. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20731?t=1061&akid=7422%2E5885482%2EktMFzj ]Can you chip in right now to help Bernie & Our
Revolution organize to stop the privatization of critical public goods by
Trump, Musk, and the Oligarchs?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20731?t=1062&akid=7422%2E5885482%2EktMFzj ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20731?t=1063&akid=7422%2E5885482%2EktMFzj ][IMG]

Privatization means taking popular public programs and jacking up costs to
produce a profit for billionaires. Musk is already $200 billion richer
after just this past year when he spent $277 million backing Trump and
other far right candidates. Big Tech monopolies like Zuckerberg’s Facebook
and Bezos’ Amazon are jumping on board to kiss the ring and pour big money
into Trump’s inauguration fund.

The ultra-wealthy are coalescing around the Trump admin and preparing to
profit from policies that will harm working-class people. Bernie is
calling on us to take on the Oligarchs, and the only way we can do it is
with the resources to mount massive campaigns to hold the line.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241220nd&akid=7422%2E5885482%2EktMFzj ]Can you donate today to Bernie & Our Revolution's fight to take on the
Oligarchs and billionaire class? We need to take up Bernie's rallying call
and stop Trump-Musk from their privatize and plunder agenda.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20241220nd&akid=7422%2E5885482%2EktMFzj ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241220nd&akid=7422%2E5885482%2EktMFzj ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1045?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20241220nd&akid=7422%2E5885482%2EktMFzj ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20241220nd&akid=7422%2E5885482%2EktMFzj ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1047?express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20241220nd&akid=7422%2E5885482%2EktMFzj ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1048?&amount=9&refcode=email-20241220nd&akid=7422%2E5885482%2EktMFzj ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

The Musk-Trump agenda will impact all of us. It will touch every part of
society. Just one example: Housing.

Trump wants to privatize Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac, which would jack up
mortgage payments — hurting homeowners while allowing private operators to
get even richer. This is an outright assault on the American Dream.

We’re already in a housing crisis — with a supply shortage, mortgage rates
high, home prices up, and Wall Street jacking up rent prices. The
privatize and plunder agenda would make things even worse, except for the
billionaire class, of course.

Banks already make plenty of money off of mortgages. Private equity
already makes outrageous profits from buying up whole neighborhoods and
inflating rent prices. This is all part of the cost of living crisis —
which Trump and his cronies are lining up to exploit even more.

Bernie and Our Revolution won’t just let Trump-Musk get away with this.
There’s too much on the line, and we need a mass movement at our back,
speaking out and exposing their plan to plunder the American people.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1054?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241220nd&akid=7422%2E5885482%2EktMFzj ]Donate now to make sure we have the resources to fight the Trump-Musk
privatize and plunder agenda. We gotta start NOW before Trump takes office
Jan 20th.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20731?t=1060&akid=7422%2E5885482%2EktMFzj ]DONATE NOW

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Troy Downing
subject: I’ll take the oath of office in just a couple of weeks!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I’m ready to serve my country once again.

| | | Peter,

In just a couple short weeks, I’ll take the oath of office and take my seat in Congress!

I served this country for 8 years in Afghanistan in Combat Search and Rescue (CSAR), and now, I’m ready to serve this country in a new capacity. I promise always to defend the Constitution and promote policies that help you and your family. You have my word that I will put you first and defend our values from the radical Left.

As a new member, I need to get off to a hot start if I’m going to get my message across in the House. [**Will you chip in one more time this year to help me get off to a head start in the 119th Congress?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI0MTIyMF9LQy1GQi4xMTAxMTdfdDE1ODk0MTYtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNDEyMjBfS0MtRkIuMTEwMTE3X3QxNTg5NDE2LTI4OTkifQ/GjGWcDJzVLi5hBGaNMDXxg)

name: New PA Project Education Fund
subject: Cozying Up This Holiday With The Courts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New PA Project Education Fund
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/NPP_Ed_logo_RGB_green1-01.jpg]
Hi Friend,
Welcome to the latest New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) newsletter!
Your voice matters, and we’re here to ensure you have the information and resources needed to shape Pennsylvania’s future.
Thank you for doing your part to stay informed and engaged!
NPPEF on the Ground
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/2B757A4769663336315672517864344A36556B5051776F754936633751355163356B41436A59722B52696153696D47736432525348706A2B6D7A514472396162/editor_images/-_%20DAYS%20LEFT%20TO%20REGISTER%20TO%20VOTE%20NPPEF%20%281%29.jpg]
We are back at work!!! Did you know PA has another upcoming election on May 20, 2025?
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/2B757A4769663336315672517864344A36556B5051776F754936633751355163356B41436A59722B52696153696D47736432525348706A2B6D7A514472396162/editor_images/-_%20DAYS%20LEFT%20TO%20REGISTER%20TO%20VOTE%20NPPEF%20%281%29.jpg] Judges are on the ballot, including three PA Supreme Court ones!!!
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/2B757A4769663336315672517864344A36556B5051776F754936633751355163356B41436A59722B52696153696D47736432525348706A2B6D7A514472396162/editor_images/-_%20DAYS%20LEFT%20TO%20REGISTER%20TO%20VOTE%20NPPEF%20%281%29.jpg] That's why we're back on the ground just two weeks after Election Day.
Do not miss the opportunity to elect who makes the final decisions in courts.
REGISTER TO VOTE [https://vote.pa/?org=nppef]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/2B757A4769663336315672517864344A36556B5051776F754936633751355163356B41436A59722B52696153696D47736432525348706A2B6D7A514472396162/editor_images/-_%20DAYS%20LEFT%20TO%20REGISTER%20TO%20VOTE%20NPPEF%20%281%29.jpg]
Inspiring the next generation
NPPEF's founding CEO, Kadida Kenner, participating at one of Senator Hughes’ See Me-Imagine YOU! Career Day [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/Screenshot%202024-11-21%20214123.png]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/Screenshot%202024-11-21%20213852.png] This experience is designed to empower 6th-8th grade students by exposing them to potential careers and jobs through professionals that look like them.
NPPEF in the News
Eight Temple affiliates listed among Philly’s most influential figures [https://temple-news.com/eight-temple-affiliates-listed-among-phillys-most-influential-figures/]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/505A7834704C4B39726533563351566F766E4965417A712F6A684E30756E696159776F565850693535724C7848346132716B76554E4169625550396E2F683466/editor_images/unnamed%20%284%29.png]
In the lead-up to the 2024 election, hundreds of election-related lawsuits brought across the country present a complex litigation landscape well before all ballots are cast and counted.
In a top 10 list [https://www.justsecurity.org/103478/2024-election-litigation-top-10/] , Just Security identifies the most important of these hundreds of cases for their rule of law implications and to convey an overall sense of the election litigation landscape. At the top of their list, is our case regarding mail-in ballots.
While it’s disappointing that our motion for review was denied, the Pennsylvania Supreme Court still has not ruled on the merits of our argument that enforcing the handwritten date rule violates voters’ constitutional rights. We hope that, when the next case is before them on this issue, they’ll consider the important constitutional issue at stake.
Make no mistake: That day could and should come very soon. The next appeal raising this issue is already working its way up from the Philadelphia Court of Common Pleas.
READ FULL ARTICLE [https://temple-news.com/eight-temple-affiliates-listed-among-phillys-most-influential-figures/]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/505A7834704C4B39726533563351566F766E4965417A712F6A684E30756E696159776F565850693535724C7848346132716B76554E4169625550396E2F683466/editor_images/AP22263596446736-e1700149066801-jpg-e1707319768500.webp]
image: Keystone Newsroom
[https://www.cbsnews.com/philadelphia/news/pennsylvania-court-mail-in-ballot-issues/] IN THE SUPREME COURT OF PENNSYLVANIA [https://www.google.com/url?rct=j&sa=t&url=https://electionlawblog.org/wp-content/uploads/rnc-v-67-counties.pdf&ct=ga&cd=CAEYACoTMjIzMTY0Njg4MTg4MTgwNDI0MTIaMmRlYjgzYjE2NTIzNDAwZTpjb206ZW46VVM&usg=AOvVaw31UqzB7lO_NZVtbTKZsPPU] [https://www.cbsnews.com/philadelphia/news/pennsylvania-court-mail-in-ballot-issues/] State Supreme Court ducks mail-in ballot enforcement [https://www.chestnuthilllocal.com/stories/state-supreme-court-ducks-mail-in-ballot-enforcement,33945?]
The Election Law Blog also made a summary of top suits mentioning our organization. "The Pennsylvania Supreme Court has declined to step in and immediately decide issues related to mail-in ballots in the commonwealth with early voting already under way in the few weeks before the Nov. 5 election. The commonwealth’s highest court on Saturday night rejected a request by voting rights and left-leaning groups to stop counties from throwing out mail-in ballots that lack a handwritten date or have an incorrect date on the return envelope, citing earlier rulings pointing to the risk of confusing voters so close to the election."
READ FULL ARTICLE [https://electionlawblog.org/wp-content/uploads/rnc-v-67-counties.pdf] READ FULL ARTICLE [https://www.chestnuthilllocal.com/stories/state-supreme-court-ducks-mail-in-ballot-enforcement,33945?]
Social Media of the Week
https://www.instagram.com/p/DAjsLitSdta/ [https://www.instagram.com/p/DAjsLitSdta/]
SHARE ON TWITTER [https://x.com/PAStateDept/status/1859719058171797611]
#CourtsMatter
Pennsylvania Undated and Wrongly Dated Mail-in Ballots Challenge (RNC) [https://www.democracydocket.com/cases/pennsylvania-undated-and-wrongly-dated-mail-in-ballots-challenge-rnc/]
“The Republican petitioners claim that some counties — including Bucks County, Centre County and Philadelphia — chose to count undated or wrongly dated mail-in ballots in the November 2024 general election. They argue this violates the state Supreme Court’s orders in two related [https://www.democracydocket.com/cases/pennsylvania-philadelphia-undated-and-wrongly-dated-mail-in-ballots-challenge/] lawsuits [https://www.democracydocket.com/cases/pennsylvania-undated-and-wrongly-dated-mail-in-ballots-challenge-new-pa-project-education-fund/] , which prohibited the counting of undated or wrongly dated mail-in ballots in the November election.”
Republicans Try to Block Counting of Undated Ballots in Pennsylvania [https://www.democracydocket.com/news-alerts/republicans-are-trying-to-block-counting-of-undated-ballots-in-pennsylvania/]
“On Thursday, the RNC and McCormick filed [https://www.democracydocket.com/cases/pennsylvania-centre-county-undated-or-wrongly-dated-mail-in-ballots-challenge/] a lawsuit in Centre County, challenging [https://www.democracydocket.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/2024-11-14-Petition.pdf] the Centre County Board of Elections’ decision to count three mail-in ballots submitted with undated or wrongly dated outer envelopes in the general election. The plaintiffs argue that this violates the Pennsylvania Supreme Court’s decision in a similar recent lawsuit, which prohibited undated or wrongly dated ballots from being counted in the general election.”
New York Judge Strikes Down State’s Voting Rights Act [https://www.democracydocket.com/news-alerts/new-york-judge-strikes-down-states-voting-rights-act/]
“On Thursday, a New York trial court judge struck down the state’s 2022 Voting Rights Act (NYVRA), which was created to make up for deficiencies in federal law following Congress’s 2021 failure to pass the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Act... Citing the 2023 U.S. Supreme Court ruling that determined race-based affirmative action in college admissions was unconstitutional, Vazquez-Doles wrote that the NYVRA similarly “provides enhanced rights” to protected classes, in violation of the Constitution. ”
After Court Order, Ohio Attorney General Approves Pro-Voting Amendment Proposal [https://www.democracydocket.com/news-alerts/ohio-voters-sue-state-attorney-general-over-most-recent-rejection-of-pro-voting-amendment/]
“Ohio Attorney General David Yost (R) approved [https://www.ohioattorneygeneral.gov/Media/News-Releases/November-2024/Summary-of-Petition-to-Amend-Voting-Laws-Accepted] the petition summary of the Ohio Voters Bill of Rights, a proposed pro-voting constitutional amendment that would greatly expand ballot access in the Buckeye State.”
News You Can Use
[https://www.democracydocket.com/news-alerts/5-takeaways-from-this-years-state-supreme-court-races/] [https://www.nytimes.com/2024/11/17/us/pennsylvania-election-ballots-recount.html] In Pennsylvania, the Election Litigation Continues, With a Twist [https://www.democracydocket.com/news-alerts/5-takeaways-from-this-years-state-supreme-court-races/]
In an election defined in part by a tsunami of litigation before polls even opened, few states saw as much legal haggling over which ballots should count as Pennsylvania... In at least four counties — Bucks, Philadelphia, Centre and Montgomery — local election officials are acting in open defiance of a ruling from the Pennsylvania Supreme Court that arrived weeks before the election. The court found that mail ballots that are missing the date on the outer envelope, or have the wrong date, cannot be counted for this election... The commissioners were advised that they were likely to be sued no matter how they ruled. “So we’re going to get sued either way, I’d rather be on the side of counting ballots than not counting them,” Mr. Harvie said.
5 Takeaways From This Year’s State Supreme Court Races [https://www.democracydocket.com/news-alerts/5-takeaways-from-this-years-state-supreme-court-races/]
“This year’s general election saw dozens of candidates win seats on state high courts, with Democrats and Republicans securing respective majorities in Michigan and Ohio. One new justice even made history. Although most of the supreme court races weren’t partisan, the two political parties vied for the opportunity to control the court’s ideological balance, which can impact how high courts rule.”
Two Black Women Make History in U.S. Senate, Here’s How They’ll Fight For Democracy [https://www.democracydocket.com/news-alerts/two-black-women-make-history-in-u-s-senate-heres-how-theyll-fight-for-democracy/]
“Though a woman of color will not be heading to the White House this year, history was still made with the election of Angela Alsobrooks (D) in Maryland and Rep. Lisa Blunt Rochester (D) in Delaware – marking the first time ever that two Black women will serve together in the U.S. Senate.”
An Overlooked — and Increasingly Important — Clue to How People Vote [https://www.politico.com/news/magazine/2024/11/09/social-media-traditional-news-elections-00188548]
“Latinos, young men, non-college-educated white people, suburban women. The exit polls and political analysis invariably focuses on the changing behavior of demographic groups. That ignores a big determinant of political behavior: where people get their news and information. It’s odd how little attention has been given to this, given that in the past decade we’ve had a revolution in how information flows.”
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/58424E4F2F44684678414D614879785778552B485333725833465A534B7974636C7649323270705A4565412B5A4E4F6D376B316E306633463464394C69626D4C/editor_images/Yom%20Kippur%20Instagram%20Post.jpg]
Next week the U.S. will celebrate Thanksgiving
Super voters vote twice a year, every year!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/NPPEF%20newsletter%20dates.gif]
05/05/2025 is the last day to register before the 05/20/2025 election.
Last day to register to vote: Monday, May 5, 2025
Primary Election: Tuesday, May 20, 2025
Last day to register to vote: Monday, October 20, 2025
Last day to request mail-in ballot: Tuesday, October 28, 2025
General Election: Tuesday, November 4, 2025
Important Links:
PA Department of State Website [vote.pa.gov]
Return Your Ballot [vote.pa.gov/Voting-in-PA/Pages/Return-Ballot]
Track Your Ballot [https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/pages/ballottracking]
Find Your Polling Place [https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/Pages/PollingPlaceInfo]
Voter Hotlines:
Voter Protection Hotline: 1-866-OUR-VOTE
DOS PA Voter Hotline: 1-877-VOTESPA
Spanish/English Hotline: 1-866-VE-Y-VOTA
Asian Languages Hotline: 1-888-API-VOTE
Arabic/English Hotline: 1-844-YALLA-US
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/8.16.24/NPPEF%20polaroid%20email%20tag.png]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/4D702F6773506D674B4A437847415641695A426A316179624C2B3677737251617655506E376A782F346845434F6737676F4370636A6E7039516A6B506E423945/editor_images/3430447.png]
Help Us Expand the Vote
We're on a mission to register new voters in the Commonwealth and expand the electorate
Every dollar helps us host more events, reach more people, and ultimately, register more voters ahead of this incredibly high-stakes election!
Thank you for taking the time to stay informed.
In Solidarity,
The New PA Project Education Fund
Invest in Year-Round Civic Education [https://bit.ly/NPPEFDonate2024]
Donations to the New PA Project Education Fund (C3) are tax deductible.
Paid for by the New PA Project Education Fund
New PA Project Education Fund
PO Box 453
West Chester, PA 19381
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/eTvv1eYlREi8TFpa7DUshg2?unsubscribedata=bkZ86k7tHqLcQJTXRLfnS1HOGHMmU6w9LK5mEQmURb9LSGhDuWvGzFeKPhcQQA%2F94QHAz2AqCqHHsSEnJQRzJq6YEm0yo9%2BkTRtNRgrqe03awQnft5IYfsUqrKRqLHHDpFtuD8h22DtItQ3tvJh4lIBI0bCVt0sJ%2BV3nZ5zUwtvw4tZwPiIaCeQDhJyKI%2BXJjBMkAhgbV%2F44qNI2e%2F9YJ1uFedy7cZPTOAuKh99NCVx5IffEzlcc1Gzhsu48VYkivtavkGmHqkumOaolIwh4wB3LssnC7cDnkKCJUb02Zou%2B27ANt9EUqAbgTS0hx2o17UXpd8zG0XoX4caw80iFQeGMPkQgKpCnpHAiJR%2BaqrdDiKw2q8UjD7DodC%2BW1tLMolQBVzgKqVE4CkbOWr%2Fxrpi%2BfirdNTZLPcFdnzHSjDU%3D .

subject: ALERT: Special Elections to fill Matt Gaetz’s, Mike Waltz’s, and Elise Stefanik’s seats!

body:
We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House – so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

| |
---
| | | Of all the emails you've received today, this is BY FAR the most important. Why? Because...

_We 're about to have a NEW Special Election in NY-21 for Elise Stefanik's seat, a NEW Special Election in FL-06 for Mike Waltz's seat, and a NEW Special Election in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat!_

**Remember:** We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House - so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

**Remember:** If they take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.

**Remember:** If they jam up Trump's agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE.

**_[Friend- we need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the year to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority. ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/oAVjNHzi8BjIchnw5561zw~~/AARclAA~~~ "Friend – we’re racing to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three. We need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the year to help win these Special Elections and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority.")_**

If there was ever a moment to pitch in a few bucks, that moment is right now. Our Conservative House Majority - and the fate of President Trump's legislative agenda - hangs in the balance.
_***** CALLING ALL CONSERVATIVES *** **_
**THREE SPECIAL ELECTIONS**

_This final deadline of 2024 was important before but now that our House Majority may depend on winning three Special Elections ..._

name: Neil Parrott
subject: Time to pray for Congress
body:
Even though Biden is still President and the US Senate is controlled by the Democrats until early next year, President-Elect Trump and the Republicans | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us2.campaign-archive.com/?e=5a45ee1154&u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=d1beaedff9)
---
|
---
| | In this email:
1) CR Update
2) Campaign debt retirement update

Good morning, Peter,

Even though Biden is still President and the US Senate is controlled by the Democrats until early next year, President-Elect Trump and the Republicans are facing their first big test right now with a bill that is needed to fund the government for the next few months.
---
| [Help Close the Campaign Debt](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=38f777d114&e=5a45ee1154 "Help Close the Campaign Debt")
---
| Thankfully, a 1,500 page, very expensive, continuing resolution bill (CR) was voted down earlier this week. This came after concerns about the cost of the bill were raised from President Trump, Elon Musk, and the Freedom Caucus. They exposed what was in the CR bill, including a hidden pay raise for Congress.

A new CR bill was brought forward and voted on last night that removed much of the waste, but called for a huge increase in the debt ceiling.

That bill also did not pass. All but two Democrats voted against the bill because it didn't have the excess spending that they wanted. In addition, several dozen Republicans voted against it mainly because of the increase in the debt limit without meaningful cuts.

The fact is, our country is $37 trillion in debt with payments on the debt of about $1 trillion per year. We are spending more on just the interest on the debt than we are spending on the military and Medicare combined.(1) This is not sustainable, we are bankrupting our future, and many Republicans are working to start the process to balance the budget now.

Another bill will be introduced today and needs to be passed by midnight in order to avoid a government shutdown. I encourage you to pray for Speaker Johnson, Congress, and President-Elect Trump to be wise at this time as their record, fair or not, begins now.
---
| [Help Close the Campaign Debt](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=1f98b0f7c6&e=5a45ee1154 "Help Close the Campaign Debt")
---
| 2) Campaign Debt Retirement Update:

**Good news!** Thanks to so many people, we are now down to under $5,000 owed after spending the $50,000 last-minute match required to air our last commercial with the NRCC.

We are so close; could you help us put an end to the campaign debt? _If you are able, would you please consider making a donation of_ _ $10, _$____25__ __, $____50__ __, $____100, or more ___to Parrott for Congress to help us take care of these amounts?_

May God Bless you, and May God continue to bless the USA,
Neil
---
| [Help Close the Campaign Debt](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=3529106d34&e=5a45ee1154 "Help Close the Campaign Debt")
---
| (1) https://www.crfb.org/blogs/interest-costs-just-surpassed-defense-and-medicare
---
| | | | | | | [](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=fd678ee686&e=5a45ee1154) | [Share](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=851e44fc59&e=5a45ee1154)

name: Team Tina
subject: Believe what he does, not what he says
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Team, If we learned one thing from the first Trump administration, it’s this: **Believe what he does, not what he says.** Donald Trump has flip-flopped his position on medication abortion more times than we can count. His latest position is that he’s going to protect it — but this is a man who lies as much as he breathes. Considering the extremists he surrounds himself with, and the plans contained in Project 2025, we can’t take anything for granted in our efforts to preserve reproductive rights. **Tina is being proactive in her efforts to protect abortion access: She’s proposed legislation to repeal the _Comstock Act_ and is leading the way to pass the _Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act._** We need to do all we can to protect reproductive freedoms for women from the Trump Administration. That’s why we’re urgently asking: **[Will you sign on in support of Tina’s work to protect medication abortion access? As the only Senator to have worked at Planned Parenthood, she knows the importance of reproductive healthcare access.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99015586/518581151/1594043909?refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241220_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmM4MjQxYy1lY2JlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BoBvetv5JTD3y17i60WVmsbzkRstIW7jKbsch6TLjgI=&emci=6bc8241c-ecbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=7bc8241c-ecbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=6227932)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99015587/518581153/1594043909?refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241220_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmM4MjQxYy1lY2JlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BoBvetv5JTD3y17i60WVmsbzkRstIW7jKbsch6TLjgI=&emci=6bc8241c-ecbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=7bc8241c-ecbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=6227932)

Thanks for voicing your support. We need to be in this fight together to stand up to Trump and his far-right allies.

clean_body: | Team, If we learned one thing from the first Trump administration, it’s this: Believe what he does, not what he says. Donald Trump has flip-flopped his position on medication abortion more times than we can count. His latest position is that he’s going to protect it — but this is a man who lies as much as he breathes. Considering the extremists he surrounds himself with, and the plans contained in Project 2025, we can’t take anything for granted in our efforts to preserve reproductive rights. Tina is being proactive in her efforts to protect abortion access: She’s proposed legislation to repeal the Comstock Act and is leading the way to pass the Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act. We need to do all we can to protect reproductive freedoms for women from the Trump Administration. That’s why we’re urgently asking: | Thanks for voicing your support. We need to be in this fight together to stand up to Trump and his far-right allies. — Team Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Celebrate Christmas with Hillsdale College and Receive a Special Ornament
body:
Christmas is a time to reflect on the blessings we’ve been given, the principles we hold dear, and the opportunities we have to give back.

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=2e1f9682e37844608a5bf4e1f002a681&_t=gIWfOm-5x04QliTwZTALoIV5_2Xl4x9WIPDZ_veLPNefpbIq_-T_MtE5v5ElterQp90JRx-T658FgfkI57pX5MYx77PcP9IofTLGBh8DcIHSQgnB-NmQhYYF3wa_66Te)_
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2e1f9682e37844608a5bf4e1f002a681&_e=MSbKP0pTBENMbFrmhbUDcyew449OBMt38kBq68z25HpJV0DwCQjaTpfj0AX-uVtaS3IK_Ru_nP09Z3_UsR_z6PC6qcyPJcErkHJe0GzMBV-aJCjp2pjJgvF4EiWY5z9yA_RxWj1IAQqZB_6762QL9fpkJJG0I6khkWmhBfu_NZ_C9Wp2_crkWAi3CexNtqyxnHmkioTe7z-tddoW2SrCpppnXYqDJdJ7ltGBXtiXnvdeVJdGI_9EbWZy-6YRHNtngeMevCDgrSNz7TxdNREUA8VOxeZreQp9oFT7nwCAVbDM9E12g8pkFADEFXL__nzzFQs7HVGoe81r0QIAYL0LP3bJoau4t73QHYVlVWgwUbBsTaj6-zAaDEdiiSFjQgNu3KuH05cyBMKezjhHZHiB2g%3D%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Christmas is a time to reflect on the blessings we've been given, the principles we hold dear, and the opportunities we have to give back.

It's also a season to remember the meaning of Christmas--faith, hope, and generosity.

Since our founding in 1844, we have been dedicated to learning, character, faith, and freedom. And we accomplish this work entirely through the support of generous individuals like you--not one penny of government funding.

**This Christmas, we invite you to join us in this mission by making a special year-end gift. As a symbol of our gratitude, we 'll send you a limited-edition Hillsdale College Christmas ornament for your gift of $50 or more.**

Each ornament is a beautiful reminder of the Christmas season. Supplies are limited. It's a meaningful keepsake to hang on your tree or share with a loved one.

Your generosity will have a lasting impact by helping Hillsdale College:

* **Provide** free online courses to millions of Americans, such as "The Genesis Story," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity."
* **Reach** over 6.6 million households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our free "digest of liberty."
* **Restore** excellence to K-12 education through our network of classical charter schools, which teach American history and civics.

We accomplish all this while remaining independent of all government funding, thanks to your generous support. Your gift today will help us continue to provide these free resources and promote the principles of liberty and faith far and wide.

**You can reserve your ornament by making a tax-deductible gift here:** [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-ornament](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2e1f9682e37844608a5bf4e1f002a681&_e=MSbKP0pTBENMbFrmhbUDcyew449OBMt38kBq68z25HpJV0DwCQjaTpfj0AX-uVtaS3IK_Ru_nP09Z3_UsR_z6PC6qcyPJcErkHJe0GzMBV-aJCjp2pjJgvF4EiWY5z9yA_RxWj1IAQqZB_6762QL9fpkJJG0I6khkWmhBfu_NZ_C9Wp2_crkWAi3CexNtqyxnHmkioTe7z-tddoW2SrCpppnXYqDJdJ7ltGBXtiXnvdeVJdGI_9EbWZy-6YRHNtn5pH_qtonV4SEku0veGEt9BGZo3SjFWK7fltZ_5UKa-wyk5LU1su60NfAJ7IeGQpxMbLnBsJyJctUKFxCfqvghmBmtKV3d9A4j_v2OyUrH49sij_j5UzuCGkC1aJ7IAzKiwYahZ94RG8YFQ84Niz4rA%3D%3D)

Thank you for your kindness and support.

On behalf of everyone at Hillsdale College--our students, faculty, and staff--I wish you and your loved ones a very Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year.

Warm regards,

Labin Duke, Th.M.
Associate Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Easy to see why we need fair maps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122024_1&amount=25]
BCJ: Gerrymandering Decided House Control [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-redistricting?refcode=122024_1&amount=25]
Post-election analysis has shown this to be true, Team: Unfair maps helped opponents of voting rights win a razor-thin majority. .
It's clear that control of the House of Representatives will matter greatly. Right now that control is very, very narrow. And it turns out to rest on a shaky foundation of gerrymandering and manipulated maps, all encouraged by the Supreme Court.
Analysis from the nonpartisan Brennan Center for Justice has found that " Republicans won a net 16-seat advantage due to manipulated maps drawn for party advantage. (Democrats garnered an edge in 7 seats through gerrymandering, but the GOP gained a total of 23 seats that way — hence, 16 seats.) " With such a close margin -- 220 to 215 -- it's clear that one party's 16-seat advantage via gerrymandering got them control.
Gerrymandered districts have long been a tool to silence voters and have been under fire for decades. It's time to put people's interests first and make sure that everyone is able to have their voice fairly heard.
We’re mobilizing a grassroots effort to fight rigged electoral maps across the country, and we need your help. Pitch in $25 or whatever you can right now so we can fund this critical work and protect the voice of the people in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-redistricting?refcode=122024_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122024_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122024_1&amount=25]

name: Big Trump Knife
subject: Introducing The 10" BIG Trump Knife 2024...
body:
The fixed blade knife comes with a belt sheath for ease of carry...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19430/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/de4c8f09ae6985eebf78d344ae150ad9afe6c7d6). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.

If you believe in **“Taking America Back”** with President Donald Trump in 2024, then you need this massive statement-making fixed blade knife.

The BIG Trump Knife is [laser-etched on a stainless steel blade with a waving American Flag and a stainless steel half-guard keeps your fingers from slipping.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19430/6374453/724ee67a09ed9a941394fcf906eed0e0a96c7291/de4c8f09ae6985eebf78d344ae150ad9afe6c7d6)

The fixed blade knife comes with a belt sheath for ease of carry. **Get Your Trump Knife Today &
Let Folks Know Where You Stand** The Limited Edition Trump Knife is not just a rare collectible, but a symbol of your support for President Trump, who always stood for "True American" freedom.

name: Mike Lawler (Personal)
subject: I’m their number one target
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lawler for Congress, Inc
body:
House Democrats just launched their 2026 Recruitment Fund.

| | Peter, House Democrats are already gearing up for 2026 and **I’m their number one target.**
Just days ago, the Democrats launched their **_2026 Recruitment Fund_** to build a war chest to take back the House Majority.
They’ve made it clear: they’re starting **_earlier than ever before_** to ensure they can flip seats like mine.
But we’re not going to let them succeed. We need to fight back. **RIGHT NOW.**
[**_Will you please chip in $25, $50, $100, or even $1000 to help me counter the Democrats Recruitment Fund?_**](https://links.lawler4congress.com/els/v2/q9rAS9VxrkTX/TExRUzNwMWJYOGlPeXNZVWp0cXJYNXN2N29HSXEvQ0hldlhtVjNMVDhmaFdKWEpZNmFVUVZpbUJLMUt1eTI5VkcxdjhSREhuRHZZLzJLM2lCdEtLakRnZXhVTzlVNlAzYXVsTG9pSnF6eGs9S0/)

| | The Democrats are organizing, fundraising, and preparing to spend millions to flip seats like mine so every minute that goes by puts them one step closer to their goal.
[**_Will you please help me take on their 2026 war chest and defend our seat?_**](https://links.lawler4congress.com/els/v2/ex2aHgDdGYc7/TExRUzNwMWJYOGlPeXNZVWp0cXJYNXN2N29HSXEvQ0hldlhtVjNMVDhmaFdKWEpZNmFVUVZpbUJLMUt1eTI5VkcxdjhSREhuRHZZLzJLM2lCdEtLakRnZXhVTzlVNlAzYXVsTG9pSnF6eGs9S0/)

Mike Lawler

name: Indiana Democrats
subject: In 49 other states, it's just football...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, Indiana is buzzing with excitement with Notre Dame hosting the Indiana Hoosiers tonight for the first game of the College Football Playoff! Mayors Kerry Thomson of Bloomington and James Mueller of South Bend will be cheering on their schools as they kick off tonight at 8pm. Tickets for this Hoosier State showdown have been more expensive than any other game in the country, showing the passion we have for our teams here in Indiana. With all the bad headlines we see about our state, this event is also a nice break to showcase some of the best college towns in the country led by Democratic leadership in South Bend and Bloomington. **[By making a donation today, you can help us elect more local Democratic leaders in 2026 and 2027.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99017274/518586322/405560545?refcode=241220playoff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzlmNWMzYy1lZWJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XpDg6f-LWPUHn1W5QRRbs2boRsNtw4INyAiNRfxuaxc=)** While there will only be one winner tonight, our whole state is the real winner. **Hoo Hoo Hoo Hoosiers!** **Go Irish!** _\- Indiana Democrats_

..._and so much more._ We can't afford to fall short. We're facing at least three crucial special elections in states like Virginia, and we need to be ready to not just compete, but WIN, in every race. **And after securing a federal trifecta in Washington, MAGA Republicans are itching to do a full sweep in the states – and missing our fundraising goal would play right into their hands.** That’s why a generous coalition of donors has agreed to match every donation to our grassroots movement _seven times_ until midnight on December 31st. This is our largest match of the year – don’t miss this opportunity to optimize your gift to the DLCC. clean_body: Will you rush a 7X-matched $7 gift right now to help hit our end-of-year fundraising goal to elect state Dems and show MAGA Republicans that we’re NOT backing down? | | | | | ---|--- We’ve got 11 days to raise $150,000. That's 11 days to raise the funds that will help... 📣 Elevate our messaging 🗳️ Mobilize voters 📋 Train volunteers 💰 Invest in competitive races ...and so much more. We can't afford to fall short. We're facing at least three crucial special elections in states like Virginia, and we need to be ready to not just compete, but WIN, in every race. And after securing a federal trifecta in Washington, MAGA Republicans are itching to do a full sweep in the states – and missing our fundraising goal would play right into their hands. That’s why a generous coalition of donors has agreed to match every donation to our grassroots movement seven times until midnight on December 31st. This is our largest match of the year – don’t miss this opportunity to optimize your gift to the DLCC. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | If we fall short of our end-of-year goal, we may not have the resources in place to go head-to-head with our extreme opponents in states like Virginia and beyond. That’s why we’re calling on you: Let’s do this. Team DLCC | Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee is dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. Our success depends on grassroots donors like you. Ninety-eight percent of our donors give less than $200, and two-thirds give less than $20. To make a contribution, please . Hi, it's Lisa. In one month, Donald Trump will become president again. I was first elected to serve Delaware in 2016, the same year Trump first won the presidency, so I know firsthand the hard fight Democrats took on to defend our rights and democracy from MAGA threats. I'm going to be honest: **It was tough, and it's not going to be any easier this time around. There will be many, many long days ahead – but we can’t lose hope in our democracy.** As we head towards 2025, our fight is more important than ever – and having help from supporters like you can shift our momentum in the new year. As a former Congresswoman, I know that early investments in our movement give Democrats the resources they need to take a stand against Republicans’ extremist agenda. **That is why I need your help today. Trump's Inauguration is in one month and we're already watching chaos unfold with his Cabinet nominations. We can't waste any time in getting to work, so please step up to support Democrats now.** [**This is a critical moment, team. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Respectfully asking you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We need to send a message that we won’t back down
#

| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
Hi there, it's Gabby Giffords. Today, I'm reaching out to respectfully ask you to make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC.

Our gun violence prevention movement is at a crossroads, and we need your help to send a strong message to our gun lobby adversaries that we won’t let this year’s election results deter us in our critical work to save lives.

[**Will you please make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today? Help fuel our work to end our nation's gun violence crisis.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec24.MAKoxe&refcode=em241220-1-b&t=1&akid=9648%2E3935704%2EYuuivZ) Gabby Giffords |

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Sign on NOW to support NPR>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/20800?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241220-BreakingNews-DOGEDefundNPR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241220-BreakingNews-DOGEDefundNPR-Pros-sl1&akid=19230%2E9716520%2EFXbfxi)**
