Team, Republicans and Elon Musk are _already_ retaliating against institutions that won't fall in line behind Trump **\-- and now they're planning to _DEFUND_ NPR!**

It's clear: Trump and his administration will go after ANY media institution that dares to provide accurate, non-biased reporting to the American people.

**We can't stay silent while Musk tears down long-trusted sources of critical information and reporting, so we've launched an URGENT Live Petition to prove where Americans stand.** But right now, your signature isn't on our list!

**Please add your name right away:****[Sign on to back NPR against Musk's revenge attacks>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/20800?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241220-BreakingNews-DOGEDefundNPR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241220-BreakingNews-DOGEDefundNPR-Pros-sl1&akid=19230%2E9716520%2EFXbfxi)**

Team DSCC

body:

The climate crisis, child hunger and poverty, limited access to affordable health care, insufficient quality public education, a gun violence epidemic, and a diminished democracy — our nation’s children are facing a LOT.

That’s why Their Future Fund is taking action. We’re equipping families with knowledge, raising awareness about policies affecting children, and empowering communities to advocate for real change.

To keep this work going strong in 2025, we need your help. Our goal is to raise **_$10,000_** by the end of the year — and every dollar you give helps us fight for a brighter future for kids. **[Will you chip in $5 today to power our mission into the new year?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtp_gPQ8YxNWLpLEnIZqVkAzQwCuqDDTlB_XsbHXe-aR63Y-TfdHtXamVg2fGhwB5ofF941H8Z39IpJgGEg4hSPYaJygourGuIOP0gNdGG33V7oAi95k8vK2rRj9OUewkNbCiOQyikBhRgwGnBWIQfBh-HKL_z4o7NFbXJ7EMpi2YYtvUCvbdoYYAjli7RxM6XXUMXdhWJYuVD-f2bx1TpDEV6YW8RqJBbcJN2ONcnQZZmjylWw1FNqZZYR-UgyBMd5lU3q2Vu4BaIrvZhp2CEwPIYbcbLBNnOhqwqTeMUdNJvz66-Ny8qN1SR1JfKGW_2-n_lRh02_U1UkN6be5oxC/4cg/hDZwn3jaQcWtAAKqEEsR0A/h1/h001.TDAArehGLpwyVX7KtDIT7IxjvPmCMoqNVLQvQGXtwuw)** | | [Donate $5](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtp_gPQ8YxNWLpLEnIZqVkAzQwCuqDDTlB_XsbHXe-aR63Y-TfdHtXamVg2fGhwB5ofF941H8Z39IpJgGEg4hSPYaJygourGuIOP0gNdGG33V7oAi95k8vK2rRj9OUewkMnTxbHb5z1R0Yg1iHrAjDnRrWYI-TRkARV8cbbuv1kbM9fTbb7ABFmAyg840b6W_Uc8oA5CSDhMjIDuozuDrL3u8dPvBBLg4phKBv_rzXTny-tSwG9IV_YIstapCFCuxFcsoJyDXiloolSo7xYz218ya8VK-wNIvDJFQPyKKXWs7w25YKmkUVkEDRgOPcJoikCYhpW9I49mm5zz88Fm8f2/4cg/hDZwn3jaQcWtAAKqEEsR0A/h2/h001.CxQ_IlnLGhmX2szyyRk5caqyl58xFr1vxtqeSUo9twc)

Children’s needs are too often overlooked when it comes to policymaking. Their Future Fund is working to close that gap, ensuring that kids and their caregivers are heard and supported — because when policies fall short, it’s kids who suffer the most.

Let’s make 2025 a year of action and progress. **[Will you step up now to help us prioritize their future by contributing a donation of $5 or more now?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtp_gPQ8YxNWLpLEnIZqVkAzQwCuqDDTlB_XsbHXe-aR63Y-TfdHtXamVg2fGhwB5ofF941H8Z39IpJgGEg4hSPYaJygourGuIOP0gNdGG33V7oAi95k8vK2rRj9OUewkME5Ea4OWC3dhI5tsBMeW7w4DKJMuqo-TFheQn6VLJ2Zch3e9_SfyNKs0kn3VAskVqRwMV7ACr4UVJDlK4I5KAtnNuyAbVR618uxCI1AOG1pFjVSncxD6mJQRZg8scHwtjvjl7kxYEv8PzE96eQinePExW35CLxMnvrj12UMmxVs9sFMkHVbn5fAXFLgWF6I79HtwrMIJmqeaetzVylfjyk/4cg/hDZwn3jaQcWtAAKqEEsR0A/h3/h001.GbczZ2GPsVU2SRzS61Of-rDmRT4aatzREyQ5TRn522Y)**

clean_body: | | | If you'd like to unsubscribe, | | The climate crisis, child hunger and poverty, limited access to affordable health care, insufficient quality public education, a gun violence epidemic, and a diminished democracy — our nation’s children are facing a LOT. That’s why Their Future Fund is taking action. We’re equipping families with knowledge, raising awareness about policies affecting children, and empowering communities to advocate for real change. To keep this work going strong in 2025, we need your help. Our goal is to raise $10,000 by the end of the year — and every dollar you give helps us fight for a brighter future for kids. | | Children’s needs are too often overlooked when it comes to policymaking. Their Future Fund is working to close that gap, ensuring that kids and their caregivers are heard and supported — because when policies fall short, it’s kids who suffer the most. Let’s make 2025 a year of action and progress. **MERRY CHRISTMAS FROM #WalkAway!**
No matter how you celebrate this holiday season, I hope it is filled with warmth and happiness.
This is a time to give thanks for the **MANY** blessings we have had this year.
It's Brandon Straka, founder of #WalkAway.
I wanted to take this opportunity to say **THANK YOU** for the overwhelming amount of support received throughout the year to help countless Democrats #WalkAway.
Your support does **NOT** go unnoticed and has made a tremendous impact on #WalkAway's mission.
**As 2024 comes closer to an end, I 'm humbly asking for one final $10 Christmas gift in the season of giving.**
Without folks like you, #WalkAway would be dead in the water and fewer people would have **WALKED AWAY** from the Dems.
With the 2025 cycle **RIGHT** around the corner, we must keep up our great momentum.
**2024 was such a blessing for ALL of us with a HUGE RED WAVE.**
Please consider sending #WalkAway a small Christmas gift to make this holiday season bright for **ALL** Republicans!
**Thank you, MERRY CHRISTMAS, and God Bless.**

clean_body: The next four years will be an uphill battle – especially if Jason Miyares stays in charge. | | | | | One month, team.One month from now, Trump will return to the White House. One month from now, Trump and his nominees will do everything they can to wreak havoc and chaos on this country.The next four years will be an uphill battle – especially if Jason Miyares stays in charge. But Virginians will determine how far Trump can take Project 2025 because we have the chance to protect Virginians against any overreach by the Trump administration. Whether it’s preventing higher healthcare costs and grocery prices or keeping our communities safe from gun violence, we need to do everything we can to defend our freedoms once Trump is sworn in. = = = = = = = \- Jay Jay Jones for Virginia PO Box 2501 Arlington, VA 22202 United States | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| Hi, Friend!
---
What a year this has been!
We have never seen the level of prayer, engagement, commitment, discernment, perseverance and, yes, spiritual warfare, that we did in 2024; however, we stayed the course and together - by the grace of God - we overcame. Now, the real work begins.
While we understand that the process of implementing change takes time, we are all living proof that persistence establishes desired outcomes. At times, “The Machine” may seem impossible to overpower, but never forget: _American patriots are the soul of our nation_. The fight is far from over, so it’s time to shift into a new battle formation.
Addressing and resolving weaknesses within our electoral system is at the top of our docket for 2025. This is where we begin ...
We’ve put together a comprehensive ten-point reform plan entitled “[The Way Forward](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6XnSdcrSmzbZQfStcjy751i_QC9U02jiWmOrnGy8lYJ2wj_EW3lSzLIcoaGNaP507bjL-xZ6wXUHQKPDT8qXraA2oObPvgKoli-99-Ntc7PnOc4bkWCDgL3626muRIYzdz3x7r_PNnmrCKEnGVtkq0X3D1vIYId_Q6D7cFEVWAtZd2WDvr_rk19ePuLW5NnhN8lWRRplfz1XWhyK8ftw-3UvOnzJ2EAPBYVXCr2_h3wESHo6v3_1aouKmS-gXGCH0Q/4cg/V-Rk395bSQmI5D44kMIovg/h2/h001._1rlyBQyvUxah6xlaoD334TtALGz0h3JGyDiymZitUE)”. Our hope is to start a dialogue, improve the plan with your feedback, and together, advocate for common sense improvements to our election process by presenting reforms and solutions to both local and state officials. It will require a new team approach to organizing and advocacy - and we hope you’ll be part of the team in your state! Stay tuned for more details coming in the New Year!
| [](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6Uv_zI6ORG-2dl91JLqNhJNRmno19XjJNGTkt5hzpvq4cljvvACFjBe4VprdRiX-Tsrst4bI3TVp_3A3XADFmLfk7Xzckv1z0amL3XB7Z6hGaOWVHNXGn0lBVwOZ43dYmMeAFqMtbGypRfK78qpiv9_o7F7OK0QZ1MS9diVKoEraIVyf5Vm5CeUlF_O8Y1jKfxSeruLpi8Xu_P9cyzX4bJeu4FgBTns5HjqpHsjdxeXddaFL4mkoawLbpSYFKEMnr2iKgeAWZFt6hi2P8K6d099wXN2OcVDisTMTKOFWH6qvqmldfhFCyATNnzLLWMWpBg/4cg/V-Rk395bSQmI5D44kMIovg/h3/h001.7q6AJMvadVfzVo26bLa3fghq_KocBmRARNShfttucJo)
---
[_The Way Forward_](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6XnSdcrSmzbZQfStcjy751i_QC9U02jiWmOrnGy8lYJ2wj_EW3lSzLIcoaGNaP507bjL-xZ6wXUHQKPDT8qXraA2oObPvgKoli-99-Ntc7PnOc4bkWCDgL3626muRIYzdz3x7r_PNnmrCKEnGVtkq0X3D1vIYId_Q6D7cFEVWAtZd2WDvr_rk19ePuLW5NnhN5XICm91Jha0VGsIVaQFaIXZRgs4bjAKjmQhKNRS2p7nb-Eo9IyHWtAQkVvtWUrlQA/4cg/V-Rk395bSQmI5D44kMIovg/h4/h001.kl6j3gbGtr81HCIHggZ3ChI4n7MJZ1b568WUhiD4cfY) provides actionable items for all of us to truly - once and for all - identify process problems, confer with our representatives, and provide tangible solutions.
But, wait, there’s more! We’ll also be [relaunching IV3](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.ZOvxkEhKDw9DETb6Ummm9zQuo-zt7v1AcpXkOLMbvNt6YrZM562R3uGahNjwIn7jkGt_IWnw-uSgtquK_mdpjjdISa-tLImUGCjFLnGJ8wjy4BoN3G3ymrOzkOA7fHhl1J-HC3ve3R5hHBZhNgGDyt0rZwlJ1WO4WcPSlSAgaprzO8F4BUrYqZVD5g9gBTtrqfzoyT7RQkUVFruDcEc5w008vCdyC4grgKcOpvgr2BOBjvqs6bkGLu7HeXRpslfe/4cg/V-Rk395bSQmI5D44kMIovg/h5/h001.TUQ805mBMEO0EBJjcdx5Hny4x9yeHBCkFvtBIKEkBnM), retooling our trainings, and continuing to support research and ongoing litigation.
There’s lots of good work ahead and we’re excited to jump in in January, with a new administration and new possibilities.
Until then, let us take rest in the Lord during this holiday season, refresh, spend time with our loved ones, and come back rejuvenated in 2025 - ready to get back to work.
God bless you all, God bless America, and have a Merry Christmas!
Ever Onward,
**Your TTV Team**
P.S. The Onward Podcast will be **returning on January 6th**! [Join Catherine in the New Year on Locals](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.flIQTCCIxNEqWg_ApxSzTossZ5Xb3HKShiqufGpW6VYMiwkt80ofJqYGCezS8DIlhbyXdrs7DE90FnaXiuxaDAupt1UdH0SsED7fNKQAryz7Y9gyXJgPOi6EDOyj9HlM5bhopjE4yvFz4Hr6hfwqm79NL8S2g0pO40Hm4ZDP8Z9qktG4ru8uUZBU2Fn7IrBGQsq17FWHd3ReTOk1ZWWE-QLWe4VhVJAl0pIKnqdCrW2lz8YGaSsOfbmgFhYPb5mjROhDR1ogw-47s60ykY0zAMMY7hXb3su80vxu-e7xFPu6KLpWabAOMW3l8YbXtbJ_a8udnPvN44uy1jOqg5yW_Q/4cg/V-Rk395bSQmI5D44kMIovg/h6/h001.hHyTQARvcTqR7BnH7ewUBia3MEIsv-0ZSOhePC07B50) every Monday at 7pm et where she will begin a deep dive into The Way Forward, expand on what each step entails, and how you can (further!) be a part of securing our elections.

The Onward Podcast will be returning on January 6th! every Monday at 7pm et where she will begin a deep dive into The Way Forward, expand on what each step entails, and how you can (further!) be a part of securing our elections. | P.P.S. If you can help support our work, please consider making an We exist only through the support of patriots like you! | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | | Update your email preferences or unsubscribe (C) 2024 True the Vote PO Box 3109 #19128 Houston, Texas 77253-3109, United States of America

name: THREE SPECIAL ELECTIONS -- From House GOP

body:
We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House – so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

| |

_We 're about to have a NEW Special Election in NY-21 for Elise Stefanik's seat, a NEW Special Election in FL-06 for Mike Waltz's seat, and a NEW Special Election in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat!_

**Remember:** We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House - so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

**Remember:** If they take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.

**Remember:** If they jam up Trump's agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE.

**_[Friend- we need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the year to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority. ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/EBME_TgEV-NCptAsX21ioQ~~/AARclAA~-Ws9SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "Friend – we’re racing to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three. name: Bill Gray
subject: Share the Timeless Lessons of Dickens’ A Christmas Carol
body:
Midnight visitors

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=179faa042dfc46129ac07ef2196a9a79&_e=l0o_o0HbJ5KD4LHUMRZix4WiZ0dlKdETNI6-U2Ma9pFCths8ddZpJrHCkV3IlQAIdcPXZwXuCRxihwYDJnGFMMBkSuLVn_bkOJZjEj6BpA2ZiP9O7VKKsQWbZjVKp45_XdT_yUXvH87NqMdFnG_hyJCTORWkizqhG17MbR_EINiWxs7zCZYaovz_SohBGoQF1ZvP1VLgyM07sZfU_n2Yett6kR6fmxcrJgvdbhcZQN2ZSIC5NoUTwn73G5_nQ3EEVgl9M9ZhHSWMwYBor7iMv3F0-7NyLU8X-9BC-ul34jSlyxrFHb6aPUOcqMGbcbXeFU4Waw7pwsX_is9jBdm9M76zsptj68tzHhxtz254TagZvYrW3BSX3zeE3dFlfSs6IjH6P12Qpxr6LxD91PVjeYXfJiVmsfyQulTp-CZfzjY%3D)
---
---
| | Peter,

Great literature teaches you about human nature and draws you toward the good. Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ is a wonderful example.

You're likely familiar with Ebenezer Scrooge--literature's most famous miser. His choices corrupted his soul and left him miserable. The drama of this beloved Christmas tale consists of his education at the hands of the three Ghosts of Christmas and its effects on his soul.

The story is rich with meaning. Among its chief lessons is that one's happiness depends upon learning to choose well and to love the good. [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=179faa042dfc46129ac07ef2196a9a79&_e=l0o_o0HbJ5KD4LHUMRZix4WiZ0dlKdETNI6-U2Ma9pFCths8ddZpJrHCkV3IlQAIdcPXZwXuCRxihwYDJnGFMMBkSuLVn_bkOJZjEj6BpA2ZiP9O7VKKsQWbZjVKp45_XdT_yUXvH87NqMdFnG_hyJCTORWkizqhG17MbR_EINiWxs7zCZYaovz_SohBGoQF1ZvP1VLgyM07sZfU_n2Yett6kR6fmxcrJgvdbhcZQN2ZSIC5NoUTwn73G5_nQ3EEXL8w0VZKcl63MUFGET5lZBAxQLMHloOYO8Yc6i47hBykJgtyB_Exru8UgY3pUUlZPjwhJDliQ-QSwjPrixYV_0Kv9Xe7z0KL0upOUy66C66wAsiSzguIwphJ58466J7zju3XhEboFOljDrYgCO58zro9PH7v8akkdvQYZlaW7OE%3D)
**This Christmas, I want to send you an exclusive hardcover Hillsdale College edition of _A Christmas Carol_ for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more.**

This beautiful volume features an inspiring introduction and 26 exclusive illustrations. You can treasure this meaningful keepsake or even gift it to a loved one.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-carol-book](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=179faa042dfc46129ac07ef2196a9a79&_e=l0o_o0HbJ5KD4LHUMRZix4WiZ0dlKdETNI6-U2Ma9pFCths8ddZpJrHCkV3IlQAIdcPXZwXuCRxihwYDJnGFMMBkSuLVn_bkOJZjEj6BpA2ZiP9O7VKKsQWbZjVKp45_XdT_yUXvH87NqMdFnG_hyJCTORWkizqhG17MbR_EINiWxs7zCZYaovz_SohBGoQF1ZvP1VLgyM07sZfU_n2Yett6kR6fmxcrJgvdbhcZQN2ZSIC5NoUTwn73G5_nQ3EEoCVDcRj1zZH8H6s5hlTqe79yJITKNqQNWRG1bTM3nxBMpN7NpERfzItodP1VGG8fixeq_oQVgIkkst1nkq2gtobcW2M9xVWT2unBC9ULVJ5onKyIDBIWSVR54rPANLR1IwfAuEOt4a9ziF41lsqGCYVhmVZTu4oKi43Ws33e60c%3D)

I wish you and yours a blessed Christmas season,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College [

Unsubscribe](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_s=179faa042dfc46129ac07ef2196a9a79&_t=3ff88_YckbOep5cq-fYZDJMbMgYvRsESo02kz2035pQqPJhuYhm6uPAqR-INqZ2wK_z56Cp2J2gCq7xCXCfYLesGjmdoa0-SFyLKrpwEtpHCs_KY4UBEPyOijyUG9yrA)

---
| |
---

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Despite their attacks, we’ve won.
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20241220-1157-foote&t=1001&akid=1157%2E342411%2EVvjcqt ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Our Squad has been the target of tens of millions in spending by
Republicans and special interests over the last year. When our Squad stood
up unapologetically for progressive values, it was no surprise that
special interests and the corporate elite tried to strike back.

They bankrolled conservative primary challengers, funded Republican
opponents, and flooded our races with millions in dark money, all in a
desperate attempt to silence the people-powered movement we’ve built.

But despite their attacks, we didn’t back down. We won.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241220-movement.KNwVsL&refcode=em20241220-1157&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1157%2E342411%2EVvjcqt ]Will you chip in right now to ensure our Squad has the resources they
need to keep up the fight for our rights in Congress?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241220-movement.KNwVsL&refcode=em20241220-1157&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1157%2E342411%2EVvjcqt ]Contribute ››

Four of our Squad members won reelection — and we need to carry that
momentum forward.

Our Squad is committed to their communities' needs, and is fueled by their
passion to fight for progressive values. The more good we do, the more
far-right Republicans and ultra-wealthy lobbyists seek to undermine our
efforts. Without your support, we’ll be at a disadvantage against our
challengers and their wealthy donors.

With Donald Trump headed back to the White House, everything is on the
line and we cannot waste any time. We need you now.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241220-movement.KNwVsL&refcode=em20241220-1157&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1157%2E342411%2EVvjcqt ]If you stand with our Squad, please rush a donation today of $5 or
more to help prepare our Squad for the fights ahead.

Together,

Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1157%2E342411%2EVvjcqt

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Cori Bush for Congress, and Bowman for Congress.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Cori Bush for Congress, Politivist PAC, Jamaal Bowman for Congress, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Cori Bush for Congress, and Jamaal Bowman for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

---

Since Trump's election we've seen a massive capitulation of legacy media to 'bend the knee' to the President-Elect. As scholar Tim Snyder points out, this compliance in advance is dangerous and destructive. In this article, I document several of the main outlets 'complying in advance,'--and just as importantly--what we can do to ensure we remain informed on the critical issues that will impact us over the next four years and beyond. **Let 's Address This**.
As Legacy media continues to fail to hold the powerful accountable, your support of _Let 's Address This_ remains more critical than ever. **Please become an active member of this community and subscribe.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..SSUYQijNjGKyli2gHi9QXVHHVYo79S7U-5nhaS-aJnc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153333439)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ba42c0cd-1edf-429f-bdc9-3c4bf771f5c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
CNN logo distorted on cracked phone screen (Photo by Salon/Getty Images)
### Media Walk of Shame
The tragically long and growing list of media platforms and major media personalities who--while claiming journalistic independence and integrity--have capitulated to Trump, is deeply concerning. Rather than promising to hold him accountable, they have betrayed the very purpose of their existence, and we need to call them out:
* **ABC News:** ABC News settled a $15M defamation lawsuit with Donald Trump. George Stephanopolous alleged Trump was a "rapist," a fact attested to by the New York civil court when it awarded E. Jean Carroll a resounding victory against Trump for sexually assaulting her. Rather than defend the factually accurate statement that quoted the judge, ABC settled and promised to donate $15M to Donald Trump's Presidential Library. MSN reported my remarks on this capitulation as, "_Human rights lawyer Qasim Rashid said, "This is the cowardice of legacy media out to make profit, rather than uphold principle. The ongoing failure of legacy media is a stark reminder that Independent and independently funded voices are now more critical than ever before_.""
* **Time Magazine:** I understand the argument that the "_Person of the Year_ " does not necessarily need to be a positive example, but TIME's misrepresentation of how Trump won is deplorable. TIME stated, "_His grievances resonated with suburban moms and retirees, Latino and Black men, young voters and tech edgelords_." This grotesque simplification fails to hold accountable the powerful, or truly assess why Trump won. Zero discussions around voter suppression, more than 100,000 closed polling locations, gerrymandering, or racist Voter ID laws.
* **Los Angeles Times:** Prior to the election, the LA Times refused to issue their endorsement of Kamala Harris. The billionaire owner of the LA Times had reportedly sought a position in the 2016 Trump administration, and is still vying or his chances to land one in the 2024 administration. The LA Times decision was based not on principle or merit, but on personal gain for its billionaire owner.
* **Washington Post:** Similar to the LA Times, the billionaire owner of the Wash Post kiboshed the Kamala Harris endorsement. He later remarked he does not believe newspapers should have opinions on who the President should be--an absurd position undermining the very purpose of the fourth estate. The Post's billionaire owner made a business decision, knowing full well a Trump administration would mean a massive tax cut for him at the expense of working people. The largest casualty of this decision is The Post's journalistic integrity.
* **' Morning Joe' Hosts Mika Brzezinski Joe Scarborough:** Both hosts confessed they traveled to Mar-a-Lago and agreed to 'reset' with Donald Trump. There's not much to be said about wealthy privileged white Americans finding common ground with a man who has demonized every single marginalized community for personal gain, except that we all got to witness that capitulation in broad daylight.

### **Ratings Collapses**
While the above list will likely continue to grow, the backlash to capitulation of corporate media is already clear. For example, CNN and MSNBC are experiencing historic ratings collapses, as viewers recognize the lack of transparency in too many of each network's programs.
News watchdog organization Mediaite reports that since Trump's election to the White House, CNN's prime time viewership has slumped by 52%. You'll recall that when CNN hosted the Presidential debate, they refused to fact check either candidate, allowing Trump to lie at will. Likewise, the Independent reports that MSNBC has lost more than 50% of its viewership as well, as even startup outlets like NewsNation are gaining ground, and in some cases have higher viewership. Of course, 'Morning Joe' (discussed above) capitulating to Trump has not helped these ratings.
This does not mean that we are relegated to staying uninformed. It requires we arm ourselves with the necessary tools to stay accurately informed.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..SSUYQijNjGKyli2gHi9QXVHHVYo79S7U-5nhaS-aJnc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=153333439)
### So How Do We Stay Informed?
I welcome the 85,000+ remarkable people who have subscribed to _Let 's Address This. _Our articles are being read by nearly 2 million people monthly, and our platform continues to grow. If you're thinking about [subscribing, now is an excellent time](https://substack.com/redirect/b050a01d-bc28-404c-8dbc-f16e65637b27?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Now obviously I am one person and cannot possibly report on all the critical stories that exist. So, while encouraging you to continue to subscribe here, write to me with your questions, and share my content--I also want to arm you with the tools needed to stay informed. I rely on tools and resources designed to verify and cross-check the sources I cite, so when you read a fact cited in one of my articles, it is backed by verifiable data. How do I make that determination?
One of the most valuable tools I use is [Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/024aa0ea-fed0-4f9c-b079-4bcbe31705b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which helps me provide the trustworthy analysis you expect and deserve. The problem is that up until now, there has not been an easy way to discern which media headline is accurate, which is misleading, or which is simply false. Ground News is the solution to the challenges we face in navigating today's media landscape--empowering you to see the bigger picture and make informed decisions. Here's how Ground News works.
In any given story, Ground News does three things really no one else does:
1. First, they gather related articles globally in one place so you can compare coverage and see what details are emphasized, exaggerated, or left out entirely.
2. Next, they provide context about the source of the information--like whether they have a political bias, the factuality of their reporting, and who owns them.
3. Finally, they cut through partisanship, sensationalism, the lack of transparency, editorial bias, and instead focus on facts and context.

The end result is that you know Ground News has given you the tools to help you form your own opinions and decisions. Ground News is subscriber supported so by subscribing it directly supports my newsletter and contributes to keeping the media transparent. And happy holidays--if you subscribe to Ground News at the below link, you'll get 50% off their Vantage Plan or gifting it to your friends or family for the holidays. But make sure to [sign up soon](https://substack.com/redirect/024aa0ea-fed0-4f9c-b079-4bcbe31705b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) because this offer is only available for a limited time.

### Conclusion
Billionaires keep buying media outlets, and it's skewing the reliability and accuracy of the information we receive. This is why I take the time to fact check everything I research and write, and why I'm grateful to each of you for subscribing and supporting my advocacy. My goal is for us to take control of what's happening in our country and world, and that starts by ensuring we have accurate information. Your investment in independent media and in tools like [Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/024aa0ea-fed0-4f9c-b079-4bcbe31705b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) help us all become better empowered to understand the world around us.
**Quick Ask!** I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.**Subscribe and join the movement.**

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Celebrate Christmas with an Exclusive Edition of A Christmas Carol
body:
Great literature teaches you about human nature and draws you toward the good.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/XxZ2Bz7ZVnTJZBcZrd553g~~/AARclAA~~)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

Great literature teaches you about human nature and draws you toward the good. Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ is a wonderful example.

You're likely familiar with Ebenezer Scrooge--literature's most famous miser. His choices corrupted his soul and left him miserable. The drama of this beloved Christmas tale consists of his education at the hands of the three Ghosts of Christmas and its effects on his soul.

The story is rich with meaning. Among its chief lessons is that one's happiness depends upon learning to choose well and to love the good. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/XxZ2Bz7ZVnTJZBcZrd553g~~/AARclAA~~)
**This Christmas, I want to send you an exclusive hardcover Hillsdale College edition of _A Christmas Carol_ for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more.**

This beautiful volume features an inspiring introduction and 26 exclusive illustrations. You can treasure this meaningful keepsake or even gift it to a loved one.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-carol-book](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/XxZ2Bz7ZVnTJZBcZrd553g~~/AARclAA~~)

I wish you and yours a blessed Christmas season,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Wr-WZEn6rH3fIddc0PvseQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSDkuP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmdVS6RlZ3tADWZSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Ai6ms1hvQtAwTD2AKtG5xA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSDkuP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpnVUukZWd7QA1mUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: Team Crow
subject: This is a big deal

body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team —

At the end of this month, we’ll be facing our very last FEC deadline of 2024. This is a big deal.

Once the clock strikes midnight on January 1st, 2025, we’ll close the books on our fundraising numbers for the year.

Friend, Jason works for YOU. The numbers we report to the FEC are a reflection of that — because they show just how committed our grassroots team is to bringing servant leadership to Washington.

Especially as we get ready for the new Congress and the incoming Trump administration.

We have an uphill battle ahead of us in 2025 to deliver real, lasting results for Coloradans — but we know this grassroots team will continue to support us through thick and thin.

Now, we need your help to prove it. Pitch in today to get us one step closer to our end-of-year fundraising goal and help Jason close out the year strong >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-december-2024]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Ben Ray, EMILYs List
subject: Democratic governors are a major line of defense
body:
Here's why pro-choice governors matter: |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99021680/518600044/162262288?refcode=WTEFEX44_20241220_Govs_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055513&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWZjMDZlYS1mNGJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mPFWE2zlPqNMMiOP33uimr-q3vDXSdLyTSQfclnc19c=) Peter,

Democratic governors are going to be a _major_ line of defense against the new Trump administration.

That's why we've proudly endorsed Rep. **Mikie Sherrill**(NJ-GOV) and Rep. **Abigail Spanberger**(VA-GOV) to stand on the frontlines against GOP extremism. [**Before I tell you more about these incredible candidates, will you donate now to support women like Mikie and Abigail who will stand up to extremist Republicans?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99021681/518600045/-1512887892?refcode=WTEFEX44_20241220_Govs_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055513&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWZjMDZlYS1mNGJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mPFWE2zlPqNMMiOP33uimr-q3vDXSdLyTSQfclnc19c=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99021682/518600046/162262288?refcode=WTEFEX44_20241220_Govs_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055513&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWZjMDZlYS1mNGJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mPFWE2zlPqNMMiOP33uimr-q3vDXSdLyTSQfclnc19c=)
---
In the United States Navy and in Congress, Rep. **Mikie Sherrill** has shown her unwavering commitment to serving our country and the people of New Jersey. Her record passing bipartisan legislation to bring down health care costs, lower taxes for New Jersey residents, and fight for our reproductive rights is clear. Mikie could be New Jersey's first Democratic woman governor, and we're proud to support her as she campaigns to keep this critical office in Democratic control.

We're equally proud to endorse Rep. **Abigail Spanberger** , who could also make history as Virginia's first woman governor! In Congress, she's fought tirelessly for Virginians — lowering costs, creating jobs, and defending reproductive rights. Abigail's entire career has been driven by public service and a commitment to keeping Americans safe. She can stop Republican Winsome Earle-Sears' extremist agenda and give Virginia the pro-choice leadership it wants and deserves.

**Mikie and Abigail are committed to protecting our fundamental freedoms.**
[**Will you donate to help elect Democratic pro-choice women who will stand against extremism and defend our rights?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99021683/518600047/-1512887892?refcode=WTEFEX44_20241220_Govs_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055513&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWZjMDZlYS1mNGJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mPFWE2zlPqNMMiOP33uimr-q3vDXSdLyTSQfclnc19c=)

clean_body: Here's why pro-choice governors matter: | = Peter, Democratic governors are going to be a major line of defense against the new Trump administration. That's why we've proudly endorsed Rep. Mikie Sherrill(NJ-GOV) and Rep. Abigail Spanberger(VA-GOV) to stand on the frontlines against GOP extremism. = | = In the United States Navy and in Congress, Rep. Mikie Sherrill has shown her unwavering commitment to serving our country and the people of New Jersey. Her record passing bipartisan legislation to bring down health care costs, lower taxes for New Jersey residents, and fight for our reproductive rights is clear. Mikie could be New Jersey's first Democratic woman governor, and we're proud to support her as she campaigns to keep this critical office in Democratic control. We're equally proud to endorse Rep. Abigail Spanberger , who could also make history as Virginia's first woman governor! In Congress, she's fought tirelessly for Virginians — lowering costs, creating jobs, and defending reproductive rights. Abigail's entire career has been driven by public service and a commitment to keeping Americans safe. She can stop Republican Winsome Earle-Sears' extremist agenda and give Virginia the pro-choice leadership it wants and deserves. Mikie and Abigail are committed to protecting our fundamental freedoms. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for your support, Ben Ray, EMILYs List (he/him/his) Interim Vice President of Federal and Gubernatorial Campaigns, EMILYs List = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. body:
And Trump’s priorities? Carrying out political vendettas and favoring billionaires.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99022158/518601825/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzBkZWNlZC1mNWJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GIGV6ATKeefhxxQbxTnvGGI5nNFBStLAlgX3GNRlDrc=&emci=3094d7c5-92bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=730deced-f5be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Want a preview of just how extreme, divisive, and harmful to the American people Donald Trump's incoming administration will be? Look no further than his cabinet picks. Here are just a few examples:
* Trump's nominee for Secretary of Defense, Pete Hesgeth, is a Fox News commentator. He has faced a series of disturbing allegations involving sexual assault and substance abuse. He opposes letting women serve in combat, has called for a "new crusade," has a history of Islamaphobic comments, and absolutely zero experience leading an organization anywhere near the size of the Defense Department.
* After his initial pick of Matt Gaetz was rightly laughed out of the room, Trump nominated Pam Bondi for Attorney General. **Bondi spent years trying to overturn the Affordable Care Act through the courts, and she infamously took campaign contributions from Trump while ignoring the many complaints her office received that Trump University was defrauding students.**
* Trump's pick to lead the Treasury Department is Scott Bessent — a billionaire hedge fund manager and longtime champion of **massive tariffs that are likely to raise prices astronomically on everyday goods.**
* Kash Patel, his pick for FBI Director, is a full-blown conspiracy theorist who's spent the last few years urging the prosecution of journalists who've dared to criticize Trump and the GOP.
* And speaking of conspiracy theorists, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. became Trump's pick for Secretary of Health and Human Service by railing against vaccines and pledging to make drinking water less healthy.

Trump's hand-picked cabinet tells us everything we need to know about his priorities on day one: raise costs on families and make it easier for his billionaire buddies and corporations to milk the American people dry by gouging prices and running free of virtually all regulations. I'm under no illusion that most (if not all) of Trump's nominees will make it through a Republican-controlled Senate. But I pledge to do everything I can to sound the alarm on what these nominees would mean for the American people, to explain what they signal for the four years ahead, and to urge the public to demand accountability from every cabinet official. More soon, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly:

name: Zahraa, Emily Randall for Congress
subject: I’m thrilled to be on Team Emily
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
Voters sent Emily to Congress to be a voice for working people — and we’ll be using every tool in the toolbox to bring down household costs, preserve and expand Union rights, and stop cuts to healthcare and basic services.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99022623/518603856/1938114812?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.12.20_Zahraa_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDgyZjY5Zi1mNmJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LqDlkbGyIG8bMQgE81bknhD9M7Zc95uoWEXd7OsGWOw=) Peter, **My name is Zahraa Saheb, and I’m thrilled to join Congresswoman-elect Emily Randall’s team as Chief of Staff!** I am excited to support Emily’s vision of running a transparent, responsive, community-focused Congressional office. It’s an honor to serve the people of Washington’s 6th District, from Tacoma to Neah Bay and from Port Townsend to Westport. Voters sent Emily to Congress to be a voice for working people — and we’ll be using every tool in the toolbox to bring down household costs, preserve and expand Union rights, and stop cuts to healthcare and basic services. It won’t be easy. The incoming Trump administration is talking about massive cuts to our social safety net programs and tariffs (better known as sales tax) that could hit working families hard. Many of us are feeling uncertain about what 2025 will bring. **No matter what happens, Emily is ready to hit the ground running and work as hard for her neighbors as they are working – she’s ready to build a stronger future together. Can you show your support for Emily’s fresh, dynamic leadership by setting up a monthly contribution of $6 or any amount?** [MAKE A MONTHLY GIFT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99022626/518603859/1938114812?recurring=auto&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.12.20_Zahraa_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDgyZjY5Zi1mNmJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LqDlkbGyIG8bMQgE81bknhD9M7Zc95uoWEXd7OsGWOw=) [_**Or, make a one-time contribution to support Emily →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99022630/518603863/1938114812?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.12.20_Zahraa_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDgyZjY5Zi1mNmJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LqDlkbGyIG8bMQgE81bknhD9M7Zc95uoWEXd7OsGWOw=) Thanks again, Peter. It’s great to meet you! — Zahraa Saheb
Chief of Staff, Congresswoman-elect Emily Randall It’s an honor to serve the people of Washington’s 6th District, from Tacoma to Neah Bay and from Port Townsend to Westport. Voters sent Emily to Congress to be a voice for working people — and we’ll be using every tool in the toolbox to bring down household costs, preserve and expand Union rights, and stop cuts to healthcare and basic services. It won’t be easy. The incoming Trump administration is talking about massive cuts to our social safety net programs and tariffs (better known as sales tax) that could hit working families hard. Many of us are feeling uncertain about what 2025 will bring. No matter what happens, Emily is ready to hit the ground running and work as hard for her neighbors as they are working – she’s ready to build a stronger future together. Can you show your support for Emily’s fresh, dynamic leadership by setting up a monthly contribution of $6 or any amount? = = Thanks again, Peter. It’s great to meet you! — Zahraa Saheb Chief of Staff, Congresswoman-elect Emily Randall = | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. Box 1883 Port Orchard, WA 98366 United States | | If you would like to receive only our most important messages, . subject: VITAL: Join me to Expose the Deep State
body:
The Deep State will be working harder than ever this time around, and OMG is taking an offensive stance to root them out and expose them . . . and we've already started.

| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d73e7cef189b49dd9d7c85844be4722b&_e=9MzugSrnJoGIBMeAtqqfU0AH1ASAiR4R8U6-14DhiEbBCM8eeqzLTKFiinzsROJbsrZOiF5tX2EzTKkUyZG9cNwO_g2yaRIQsw_KvnGgXJdg1jnb-3COyKx5w71ZGBefOqt6-oYjYlfmReQIpxMa0l3yWWeXpEyFhFPs5xtBtZAWDxsRhuBhqtUn3K5bC879WrUe5atZPyPACdtJhPDX1mvy3dSxM3G3E1Zrx3id7a5pMyZ4ad2KuxfY2ixFNbM6bIdlsjZXKgSrvGCjy6TcKJ2FmHU-nuZVX-7839nHvvslWuK3RRTokAwti2bHzh-4HlVhlLX7AksQIHM_VgMMTKgjzsHXiURzVu9oJDHGSMcmYecSVLUsNZhpUKymCepx)
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d73e7cef189b49dd9d7c85844be4722b&_e=9MzugSrnJoGIBMeAtqqfU0AH1ASAiR4R8U6-14DhiEbBCM8eeqzLTKFiinzsROJbsrZOiF5tX2EzTKkUyZG9cNwO_g2yaRIQsw_KvnGgXJdg1jnb-3COyKx5w71ZGBefOqt6-oYjYlfmReQIpxMa0l3yWWeXpEyFhFPs5xtBtZAWDxsRhuBhqtUn3K5bC879WrUe5atZPyPACdtJhPDX1gVpgijpz0Gko12l8xze3J8uOmFvDDy_GY8697qoKaBnD_7An8yIhME7uugjcm8hVorWyG0MFhgSC0M-silifAo8nihoYgNaJZGoUy_E8D8AnkoDPFn635ECllqPocWkDqx1MKpIU5fnUlEA_uTxdzZnRgqlQ987WeEhk5_t9494)
Dear Friend,

In the last week, O'Keefe Media Group has exposed two high-level Biden insiders who were eager to express their contempt for President Trump as we count down the days until the inauguration.

We have MANY more subjects on the hook and investigations that are advancing, but **[it will take your support to keep going](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d73e7cef189b49dd9d7c85844be4722b&_e=9MzugSrnJoGIBMeAtqqfU0AH1ASAiR4R8U6-14DhiEbBCM8eeqzLTKFiinzsROJbsrZOiF5tX2EzTKkUyZG9cNwO_g2yaRIQsw_KvnGgXJdg1jnb-3COyKx5w71ZGBefOqt6-oYjYlfmReQIpxMa0l3yWWeXpEyFhFPs5xtBtZAWDxsRhuBhqtUn3K5bC879WrUe5atZPyPACdtJhPDX1uAytT6l2D1E3uaC6pK1hlAuCHRLEcTOI7ovYaqbdH67OgtGn-sIUQ62fpwB8qoANUhoUUsrThBod7bIDQ7zap6oykA564SqJeAbDyiWNUO3J2h45oioC7xE-TI4wrXtGAb-j9jTH-yl96OG-AybQBBgHQra17P-MozI2mdad9fe).**

I predict that the next four years of the Trump Administration will be an ongoing game of cloak and dagger as Deep State operatives - embedded federal employees - work to undermine his policies just as they did during his first term.

**The Deep State will be working harder than ever this time around, and OMG is taking an offensive stance to root them out and expose them . . . and we've already started.**

While we work to identify and expose the bad actors who will remain in government, **DROVES of whistleblowers will come forward** with the desire to right the wrongs they witnessed during the four years of the Biden Administration.

This is a dual-track process, and **[I need you to join me by donating now so that we can move fast, strike hard, and keep that pace going until Deep State actors are driven out of our federal government.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d73e7cef189b49dd9d7c85844be4722b&_e=9MzugSrnJoGIBMeAtqqfU0AH1ASAiR4R8U6-14DhiEbBCM8eeqzLTKFiinzsROJbsrZOiF5tX2EzTKkUyZG9cNwO_g2yaRIQsw_KvnGgXJdg1jnb-3COyKx5w71ZGBefOqt6-oYjYlfmReQIpxMa0l3yWWeXpEyFhFPs5xtBtZAWDxsRhuBhqtUn3K5bC879WrUe5atZPyPACdtJhPDX1vHHEjR9NoH2sWaGY1fqFE8usH0r1n9lr0nPCmabG0h63ju1EHuzVM9FMfjGj-LSJ-dopCxekQrSJNKjh2gj0cNHUKco1STPOLZTJx6WPJia1iVl5xmy1m4bvaO6InZVQq9xhh7fRKMjWqnQVFYmbeJ9WcqOmxdri8Qmhtoj2U3_)**

While I rarely do interviews, the other day, I appeared on Benny Johnson's show to

send this very clear message to both the "good guys" and the "bad guys" in our government:

**For those good people** who are inside the federal government, who have witnessed corruption and are brave enough to step forward as a whistleblower, I want them to know these things:

* I'll tell your full story.

* I'll legally protect you.

* The heads of these agencies WILL SEE YOUR STORY so that change can occur.

* And to those bad actors in government:

* OMG's cameras are EVERYWHERE.

* You ARE going to meet with one of my undercover journalists.

* I will expose you.

My team at OMG is already working at breakneck speed seven days a week, and to be candid, this month has been rough financially. We're already behind, and I need your help to catch up, pay the stack of bills on my desk, and meet the next payroll.

Any help you can provide will help get me caught up and get OMG off to a strong start in 2025.

**[So please, help us accomplish this critical mission.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d73e7cef189b49dd9d7c85844be4722b&_e=9MzugSrnJoGIBMeAtqqfU0AH1ASAiR4R8U6-14DhiEbBCM8eeqzLTKFiinzsROJbsrZOiF5tX2EzTKkUyZG9cNwO_g2yaRIQsw_KvnGgXJdg1jnb-3COyKx5w71ZGBefOqt6-oYjYlfmReQIpxMa0l3yWWeXpEyFhFPs5xtBtZAWDxsRhuBhqtUn3K5bC879WrUe5atZPyPACdtJhPDX1h8vQKCumoVTiDLQzJrswEb8tT3AJYqUs48q4algD9c_R_GV7xw3li2tOPUa116zD3Q2jNtvsEyZY1z3dXSTRguCIkEvq9hJonnoHCCCguOihZHtzlwp2EmXfGE8_OiTXqB6o-s_QdQOaUbF5y3FgD-hAIfXNSG_qCcfOVEXY2cR)**

Starting now, we're already entering an endless game of "whack-a-mole" as employees within our federal government conspire against Trump. As long as President Trump controls the White House, there will be bad actors within government - the people we refer to as the "Deep State" who are trying to undermine his policies, take down his people, or worse.

We have to be unrelenting in our work, which will require you and me to work together to make that happen: **[You keep OMG going with your support, and I'll work like hell to get the job done.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d73e7cef189b49dd9d7c85844be4722b&_e=9MzugSrnJoGIBMeAtqqfU0AH1ASAiR4R8U6-14DhiEbBCM8eeqzLTKFiinzsROJbsrZOiF5tX2EzTKkUyZG9cNwO_g2yaRIQsw_KvnGgXJdg1jnb-3COyKx5w71ZGBefOqt6-oYjYlfmReQIpxMa0l3yWWeXpEyFhFPs5xtBtZAWDxsRhuBhqtUn3K5bC879WrUe5atZPyPACdtJhPDX1mdYN7RLXxjGoiz5-Z4ja9Fs0NZs9TVxn6PjASupc00r4WwE2VoqWH0tuDFS6pM7Rst-A4BX-MXbMHUSD-vbllErKGnCeyTFfozBFI00f7RiU9OqPTwta-z7Ew93fIq2fL6SyCJWS1SbCZaDS1lvuIyTq7dPisG4q3wqHH0iPueF)**

**[Are you in?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d73e7cef189b49dd9d7c85844be4722b&_e=9MzugSrnJoGIBMeAtqqfU0AH1ASAiR4R8U6-14DhiEbBCM8eeqzLTKFiinzsROJbsrZOiF5tX2EzTKkUyZG9cNwO_g2yaRIQsw_KvnGgXJdg1jnb-3COyKx5w71ZGBefOqt6-oYjYlfmReQIpxMa0l3yWWeXpEyFhFPs5xtBtZAWDxsRhuBhqtUn3K5bC879WrUe5atZPyPACdtJhPDX1gW2021LyvxfD3eEsesrqUqzRSo7GNNPFOD3w4pAc10WzOIglnRig75FJ7MPUSgN35z_MDqQcJWd8eccDDjm--p-x8Yf98zdqyk9qAEkgtxImn_jPp9Jha7DM81wbOptnHYOMrXmKfhL_E7XHLfoqCQttCfMe6EIHejqmbZnjBBQ)**

Thank you for your time and support, and please stay tuned for more.

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. December is always a tough month for organizations that rely on the public for support. **[Help us get caught up and keep building our team to take on the Deep State actors who are working to take down the Trump Presidency.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d73e7cef189b49dd9d7c85844be4722b&_e=9MzugSrnJoGIBMeAtqqfU0AH1ASAiR4R8U6-14DhiEbBCM8eeqzLTKFiinzsROJbsrZOiF5tX2EzTKkUyZG9cNwO_g2yaRIQsw_KvnGgXJdg1jnb-3COyKx5w71ZGBefOqt6-oYjYlfmReQIpxMa0l3yWWeXpEyFhFPs5xtBtZAWDxsRhuBhqtUn3K5bC879WrUe5atZPyPACdtJhPDX1tH5bRSvLV6mjaJTiF_amTHSZ7LoKMN0x27edc_ovw2ATudDp9G6i2LzO9fALlke0xZucRYEJaeeUI2d99zIJGZ0IrOnQtbYCdjSxwkUuOMPWq3Bh-MmUQ1fblKtHsqXeJyIYGAXYu4PCPJ3VuVZ5zIREPP3M0sBckp3ol1QcZaA)**

## Husband Sparks 15-Year Christmas Tree Mystery
For the past 15 winters, [a mysterious decorated pine tree](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kDGvozAQhH8NdIvsxYmhcHENXa69Ehm8Dj7ZOGdvQPz7U5702teNRqPRp-_PY37YEMP-_G0TGf_0M_s8o0AFEgHF7GyI16xaZzwRUt-SkbpXWt5GObSbsaOjQboR9YCollXdnBsIe6WW1QmkNpjPm0QUUuOodLdK0btF94I8We99owS5wLl0f3PYeSMfr3xQ6dac2mg25ldt-l8NTg1O53l2vBGHRPUz-FS5RNfg9K7wHW3hsEZqcEpXZSoXrFsJlZOtwIUIwg4p72x3C_wue4X8ZuAMC4GFmA-CSMxUgO_34o5_p2iLca8zxBjqXTdKPJMN8QuRf9J2GPwfAAD__8zYdMs) along Montana's Interstate 90 has captivated passing motorists, with local residents speculating about its origins. The tradition began in 2009 when long-haul trucker German Segura playfully promised his worried wife he would "dress" a lonely tree he spotted during an icy drive. Segura[ returned each year](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kLGOqzAQRb_GdEZ4cMKjcPEaumy7JXLsGZiVsZGZJOLvV1lp262vdHXO-bzNN8-J8_LhN3S00CxUZujAagMaujl6Tudsm-gIEbBv0Jmht4O5jOZfszrqydx7sDCiNWGkqxkRR7oSeTteAjTs3m8GoDMDjHZog-n6eB_6Dgk9ESnbYWQptf0qnGVFSmd5Ym1D2ZrkVpH9UP1_BZOC6bXiveUVfZX3rmAi9PKoGBVMCXPUXq-Yds6LDj4rmELJglkUTL9Wxmh6pHTqiKFULxh1WCsfsvlD75xRS0XU23kI1lNz1lvJ4rNXMDXVxf3FKfFxHZTtls1z-iGVv-o9HXwHAAD__-eWdQk) to decorate the tree, and the private act has grown into a community tradition, with residents now joining him to mark the start of the holiday season.
## Dad Finds Unreleased Michael Jackson Tracks
Former California Highway Patrol officer turned stay-at-home dad made an extraordinary discovery through his ["treasure hunting" hobby](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kLtuxCAUBb8Gd1hwwa-CIo27TZvSYuFis8FgAV5r_z5KorQpj3Q0Gs3HbblpH3xc3_WOyq1uqS4twEBSDhTYYrUPr0U2VjlEQNGg4oOQA-8mPjabYkZK00_W3k3Xi3Eyk2Wj4eYupBZd1zVefdM4AOMDTHJoDWfC3gfB0KF2zhHJ0PqacvtIPtYNXXilJ-bWpL0Jaqv1KES8EZgJzNd1tVsK4XWlZDMeKdffJ4E54lUIzPtZvKF_w5tNY6APbT5LivSMGQPqgpZWfWChLp3R0lJT1ivSM_pKOYiejZ1ggsDcZGWPy4fgSz8QydZd-_CjVv_L9VTwFQAA___iPHB0): a collection of unreleased Michael Jackson recordings. Gregg Musgrove, 56, described getting "goosebumps" while listening to the recordings, which due to copyright and ownership issues can't be released publicly. He found the recordings in an abandoned San Fernando Valley storage unit that [once belonged to producer Bryan Loren.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kLFuwyAUAL8Gb0S8h23MwNDFW7p2tLB52KQYIqBp8_dV-gGdT7qT7uO6XG2IIe3v9iTjd780nxcU2HNAjmJxNsTn0nfOeCIk2ZEBJXsFg4apO8wwuhVGtYpVkJXjpDbQMA1yGPRgxeS6YF42QBSgUPfqsoGQblVSkCfrvWe9IBdaLpdbDqkd5OMzP6hctnx20Ryt3SuTbwxnhnPdClEqNrUXZjifYTssRX6z22fNiX-lQpFsJcdrTnvloCfNQWvg9HOPNiRyDOeuGHf_DjGGOirWi_20If4V238XHgZ_AwAA__-qJmCp) They date back to 1989 and include 12 songs and candid studio conversations. Among the highlights is a collaboration with LL Cool J, as well as moments of Jackson joking and discussing his creative process.
## Ice Cream Parlor Becomes Syria's Symbol of Freedom
Since the fall of Assad's regime, Syrians have been flooding into Damascus to celebrate newfound freedom--and many are heading straight to[ the historic Bakdash ice cream parlor](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kLGO8yAQhJ8Gd1iw4BAXFH_jLn97pbUHS8IJTAQ4Vt7-5JOuvW70jTSamY_besOY4nb_j5lsuIe1h7KCAM0lcBCrx5jeqx68DURAaiArjdJGTrO8Dg_rp-D8pNXsJjcJAdoIY7S4Xi5XibOUQ7RnmgQQ0sCszeikUP7TKEGBMITAtCAfe6njV4lbf1BI7_KiOrqSh2QfvT8bU_8YLAyW4zjGvW10tNNmsJzy5KUmz2DB2qNLdKLfEVIwWNq7Rtwa79g68VCJfMkcOw-Yy964x4zN7Y1HR9xVwsyfWFPZ61Ctfx4xpdguhmlxzxjTT7f-118vC98BAAD__1fPbyI). Known for its mastic-infused gelato, the shop's iconic $1 pistachio-topped dessert has become a symbol of resilience and reawakening. For over a century, the family-run parlor has endured wars and upheaval. Customers say its signature orchid-root ice cream--pounded to a chewy perfection with meter-long mallets--tastes sweeter than ever amid Syria's new chapter. [Watch a video here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8z7GOrCAUxvGngW4MHFCkoLjJjc1mtptsaY5yUDY4TJTR-PYb9wG2_b7kl_y_7v0dY4rP6RMXcmEKfQm5BwH6JuEGovcY09lr7l0gAlKcnDRKG1lb2fLZNY2lekQJNdrBa0ArUGMwZHGwrQEe3aVJACENWG2qUQrlB6MEBcIQAtOCfCx5rb5zfJaZQjrzTms15oUnN5fy2pj6x6Bj0B3HUZ35Xd4DXf-1YBlnprqdqf-PNm7zo_uYaOSr868jphS3xjAtpgVj-iXLX5m7g58AAAD__8vqVmQ).

clean_body: For the past 15 winters, along Montana's Interstate 90 has captivated passing motorists, with local residents speculating about its origins. | | | | | | Friday, December, 20, 2024 ---|--- Good Afternoon! Sometimes hope arrives in unexpected forms--like a that's become a symbol of resilience and renewal in Syria. Read about it below. The Feel Good Flyover returns with more uplifting stories, including three siblings who turned their into a heartwarming trip down memory lane. We are sponsored this Friday by . Check out their products in today's edition. | Husband Sparks 15-Year Christmas Tree Mystery For the past 15 winters, along Montana's Interstate 90 has captivated passing motorists, with local residents speculating about its origins. The tradition began in 2009 when long-haul trucker German Segura playfully promised his worried wife he would "dress" a lonely tree he spotted during an icy drive. Segura to decorate the tree, and the private act has grown into a community tradition, with residents now joining him to mark the start of the holiday season. Dad Finds Unreleased Michael Jackson Tracks Former California Highway Patrol officer turned stay-at-home dad made an extraordinary discovery through his : a collection of unreleased Michael Jackson recordings. Gregg Musgrove, 56, described getting "goosebumps" while listening to the recordings, which due to copyright and ownership issues can't be released publicly. He found the recordings in an abandoned San Fernando Valley storage unit that They date back to 1989 and include 12 songs and candid studio conversations. Among the highlights is a collaboration with LL Cool J, as well as moments of Jackson joking and discussing his creative process. Ice Cream Parlor Becomes Syria's Symbol of Freedom Since the fall of Assad's regime, Syrians have been flooding into Damascus to celebrate newfound freedom--and many are heading straight to. Known for its mastic-infused gelato, the shop's iconic $1 pistachio-topped dessert has become a symbol of resilience and reawakening. For over a century, the family-run parlor has endured wars and upheaval. Customers say its signature orchid-root ice cream--pounded to a chewy perfection with meter-long mallets--tastes sweeter than ever amid Syria's new chapter. . | Flying together with our sponsor Many people suffer from magnesium deficiency without realizing it, experiencing symptoms like poor sleep, low energy, anxiety, and difficulty losing weight. This issue affects , even those taking magnesium supplements. Magnesium is essential for over , but many supplements on the market fail to deliver effective results. Even supplements with magnesium glycinate or citrate often lack the full spectrum of magnesium forms needed to address deficiencies comprehensively. Fortunately, a solution exists in the form of for optimal health benefits. This complete blend supports better sleep, improved energy, a calm mental state, and enhanced fat-burning metabolism. | ➤ A Gen X-inspired Christmas song delights fans, blending witty lyrics and retro visuals. Highlights include wood paneling, flammable toys, and indoor smoking memories. () ➤ Three siblings surprised their dad with a nostalgic carpool ride on his final day of work, recreating their cherished morning routine complete with their favorite songs and a bagel shop visit. () ➤ Obi-Wan, a tiny chihuahua in the French Alps, has become the country's most famous sheepdog, helping his owner herd mountain flocks. () ➤ A tiny Christmas tree bought by a husband and wife for $6 in 1978 has grown into a 52-foot community landmark, where thousands gather annually for its lighting ceremony. () ➤ Two Polish sisters separated into different Nazi forced labor camps as teenagers during World War II have reunited at ages 100 and 96. () ➤ A 2-year-old golden retriever named Charley has joined Montclair State University's women's basketball team as their official "director of pawsitivity." () | Rare footage of someone really excited to get a tiny roommate who will steal all their toys. | What did the janitor say when he jumped out of the closet? | Flying together with our sponsor Currently, through a special flash sale with , including a free bottle for a limited time. If you're serious about improving your health, now is the time to act. Supplies are limited, so don't miss out on this opportunity to experience the benefits of a . | " It was good before, but it's changed because now we are happy inside." -- , on tasting legendary Damaskus gelato 15 years after the Syrian civil war made him a refugee. | | The Flyover, LLC 1910 Thomes Ave. Cheyenne, WY 82001-3527 | ---|---

subject: Discover the True Meaning of Christmas with A Christmas Carol
body:
Great literature teaches you about human nature and draws you toward the good.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7a15a0953bb04b71bc022e114fd3e79f&_e=13rnU1Jn89kH9Af9g0dH_fkjW1Wq-aT9SYx5tSRb2n92oKQqijmgZbrIYyTmvsF9z-y9GHs3MYLN-_1MHE2uSKN2qliKhKF5qckzS5fRqcr6JOKCC49UIdeDS6h0y8VySWtGe3TA7DJo1LnJ8WnNVyFwc79-IXppSSWhGQ8BSTGcuRw9k-E3jwIKZLvlAoKAM18-sdlowtlyVIds7CAwpjZcpknT3ntV_q4KAJ4_oYC3EnhPJDc1LkHhRJ9htRkrtvo1nLjF3leBzQmedAoeN2rAYjFlwsFU9JzOu9F8m093cjk_A2Nemqd8rw6rUXlI00hpz_ATARMi-A-TWbQEdykzZKHVI0JypCugqQgyDsSuGqsum7lkTItsQwi9SB5u5od1a9fxiEPz1MZ0fdxp9CLhKf4wvHR0OICJyoWqy8w%3D)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

Great literature teaches you about human nature and draws you toward the good. Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ is a wonderful example.

You're likely familiar with Ebenezer Scrooge--literature's most famous miser. His choices corrupted his soul and left him miserable. The drama of this beloved Christmas tale consists of his education at the hands of the three Ghosts of Christmas and its effects on his soul.

The story is rich with meaning. Among its chief lessons is that one's happiness depends upon learning to choose well and to love the good. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7a15a0953bb04b71bc022e114fd3e79f&_e=13rnU1Jn89kH9Af9g0dH_fkjW1Wq-aT9SYx5tSRb2n92oKQqijmgZbrIYyTmvsF9z-y9GHs3MYLN-_1MHE2uSKN2qliKhKF5qckzS5fRqcr6JOKCC49UIdeDS6h0y8VySWtGe3TA7DJo1LnJ8WnNVyFwc79-IXppSSWhGQ8BSTGcuRw9k-E3jwIKZLvlAoKAM18-sdlowtlyVIds7CAwpjZcpknT3ntV_q4KAJ4_oYC3EnhPJDc1LkHhRJ9htRkruZ_qMPxmjXj3bf2bKd33D-uEpPzwWk-IeFdBpqsrF1UZA9i8wAFrqoZORJiscuyAzrd8kIcPYDn_-Fm_-XtsA2PK0sR-_Tnqos1K95_koYgIohhBXgowaTDSodTWDNCxydav7--SDCasXfXcn8_Nbb4qrmHcm2SOCFF0jrHSwA4%3D)
**This Christmas, I want to send you an exclusive hardcover Hillsdale College edition of _A Christmas Carol_ for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more.**

This beautiful volume features an inspiring introduction and 26 exclusive illustrations. You can treasure this meaningful keepsake or even gift it to a loved one.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-carol-book](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7a15a0953bb04b71bc022e114fd3e79f&_e=13rnU1Jn89kH9Af9g0dH_fkjW1Wq-aT9SYx5tSRb2n92oKQqijmgZbrIYyTmvsF9z-y9GHs3MYLN-_1MHE2uSKN2qliKhKF5qckzS5fRqcr6JOKCC49UIdeDS6h0y8VySWtGe3TA7DJo1LnJ8WnNVyFwc79-IXppSSWhGQ8BSTGcuRw9k-E3jwIKZLvlAoKAM18-sdlowtlyVIds7CAwpjZcpknT3ntV_q4KAJ4_oYC3EnhPJDc1LkHhRJ9htRkr29iFTwR4HegXyyJ2HYjCntR9-gFCDO3oa7UTZdkjuqHhGTDuN1Wustki6i8wzTb2O824ilzjZP1XoxEwnDb3Nx-rgvFIm9po7BKp3bDmSAaGRrffu8pLSACsURwAgIm41U4eTHzMnjKxFyocGjJ9I9voL2ixkr2xpWugQJq-UiU%3D)

I wish you and yours a blessed Christmas season,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President

clean_body: Great literature teaches you about human nature and draws you toward the good. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, Great literature teaches you about human nature and draws you toward the good. Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol is a wonderful example. You're likely familiar with Ebenezer Scrooge--literature's most famous miser. His choices corrupted his soul and left him miserable. The drama of this beloved Christmas tale consists of his education at the hands of the three Ghosts of Christmas and its effects on his soul. The story is rich with meaning. Among its chief lessons is that one's happiness depends upon learning to choose well and to love the good. This Christmas, I want to send you an exclusive hardcover Hillsdale College edition of A Christmas Carol for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more. This beautiful volume features an inspiring introduction and 26 exclusive illustrations. You can treasure this meaningful keepsake or even gift it to a loved one. I wish you and yours a blessed Christmas season, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College | | Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: RE: the government shutdown
body:
Republicans are dangerously close to shutting down the federal government. Here’s what will happen if they get their way:
---
Derek, Republicans are dangerously close to shutting down the federal government. If they have their way:
* More than 3 million Americans, _including more than 1 million active duty service members_ , would miss their paychecks over the holidays.
* Holiday travel would be disrupted during the busiest week of the year, _leaving Americans with longer wait times at airports_.
* The shutdown they’re threatening could cost taxpayers and the economy __billions__ of dollars.

But do you think that Donald Trump and Elon Musk, the richest guy in the world, care about the consequences? Absolutely not. Trump, Musk and their MAGA cronies are sowing chaos, and working families are going to pay the price. **It has never been more important that we have a strong Democratic party to fight back.** [**Please rush a $3 donation to the Democratic Party right now. body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1421%2E791427%2EjClKY2)

Friend — With the end of the month coming up, we are facing down our big end-of-year FEC fundraising deadline on the 31st.
That means as we head into the first few days of 2025, all of our fundraising information for all of 2024 will be made public. Our opponents, the press, and the entire political establishment will be looking to see how we performed.
Does Ilhan Omar still have the support of a wide grassroots movement?
Do our progressive values still inspire regular people to join our fight?
These are questions we want to answer with a definitive yes.
But we can't do that if we miss our goals and file a weak FEC report. Especially with the GOP set to take full control of all three branches of government, we have to prepare to play defense (and even sometimes offense) for much of the next two years.
**[Chip in a contribution of $3 or whatever you can afford today. Our deadline will be here before we know it, and we have to hit our goals.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec24.I7B4JF&refcode=em241220-1-60&t=2&akid=1421%2E791427%2EjClKY2)**

If you're like most Americans, you're concerned about the
economy, the rising inflation, and of course… the value of
your money.

It's well known that when you purchase precious metals like
gold and silver, you get…

Stability

Wealth Protection

Long Term Financial Growth

But you don't just want this basic foundation of financial
security, do you?

You want…

Money that YOU can control.

Money that isn't easy to confiscate or hold ransom.

Money that YOU can HOLD in your hands.

You want your assets to be in your physical possession, right?

Where only you have access to it.

You DON'T want someone else holding it for you.

You DON'T want someone else calling the shots.

You DON'T want someone else to have all the control.

If you want to learn more about owning and storing your own
physical gold and silver…

Precious metals that you can take immediate possession
of…

And be in complete charge of…

Where you rely on yourself and no one else…

This is for you!

body:

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: This is the season for reflection.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Friend,
I wanted to take a moment to wish you a very happy holidays.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=x_122024_happyholidays [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=x_122024_happyholidays]
Looking back at 2024, I truly feel so grateful: for my loved ones, who grounded me through the chaos of campaigning; for the people of CA-12, who elected me to represent them in Congress, and for you, who believed in me and our shared dream of a better, brighter future.
I’m not naive to the challenges that lay ahead. But I also feel genuine determination and hope, because I know our values — justice, equality, and community — are stronger than any obstacles we may encounter.
So, let’s take this time to recharge and prepare for the work ahead. Whether you celebrate Christmas, Hanukkah, Kwanzaa, another tradition, or none at all, I hope you find time to rest, reflect, and connect with loved ones. Wishing you joy, love, and laughter this holiday season. You deserve it.
Happy Holidays!
Lateefah
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=x_122024_happyholidays]

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
National Republicans will have full control over the government next year, and they’ll be working to undermine everything we’ve accomplished since I was elected back in 2020.
#

Team -
I’ll be direct here. I am about to ask you to chip in to my campaign. I know you’re probably wondering why, so please — give me a chance to explain why your donation is so important.
December is an official FEC deadline month. By now, you probably know what that means. When the clock hits midnight on December 31st, we close the books on our fundraising for the year. And in early January we’ll be legally required to report both how much we raised and how many donations we received.
This deadline — alongside a strong FEC report — really matters. National Republicans will have full control over the government next year, and they’ll be working to undermine everything we’ve accomplished since I was elected back in 2020. And, believe it or not, they’re also beginning to lay the groundwork to defeat me in my next Senate campaign.
The way we fund our work is a symbol of strength and resolve in the face of everything that Trump and National Republicans plan to do. It’s a sign that this team — you, me, and everyone with us — isn’t going anywhere.
And that’s why I’m asking:
[**Can you make a donation of anything at all today? Every donation, no matter the amount, makes a difference. And we’re going to need a big team with us to make it through the next four years.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-dec24.KA0iD9&refcode=em241220-1-120&t=1&akid=5936%2E6688874%2E1QHQF-)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

| | **[Donate $50](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1390?c0=mek-em-dec24.85OjOB&refcode=em241220-1-120&t=22&akid=5936%2E6688874%2E1QHQF-)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1391?c0=mek-em-dec24.wguv_x&refcode=em241220-1-120&t=23&akid=5936%2E6688874%2E1QHQF-)**
---

| | **[Donate $250](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1392?c0=mek-em-dec24.MrR5lU&refcode=em241220-1-120&t=24&akid=5936%2E6688874%2E1QHQF-)**

Thanks so much for everything you’ve done for us.
It means a lot to me, personally.
Mark

name: Elizabeth Banks
subject: How are YOU feeling?
body:
Multiply your impact 5X for reproductive rights | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99028047/518617549/-1586972746?sourceid=1150212&utm_campaign=25emjge-1212aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=elizabethbanks&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODFmMjhkNy1mZGJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U7-ESgDxHhhUe8MbZc-4SJiJNHOxfGtztwW5xaC-LKA=&emci=fa3d028f-90bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=381f28d7-fdbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=954237)
---
Hi Peter,

If you're feeling uncertain, angry, or nervous about the future of reproductive rights, you're not alone.

I've been in this fight for a long time, and here's where I am: every day I see the incredible work the Center for Reproductive Rights is doing—fighting tooth and nail for all of our reproductive freedoms—and _I feel inspired._

This fight is far from over—and the Center needs our support more than ever. | [**MAKE 5X THE IMPACT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99028048/518617567/-1586972746?sourceid=1150212&utm_campaign=25emjge-1212aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=elizabethbanks&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODFmMjhkNy1mZGJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U7-ESgDxHhhUe8MbZc-4SJiJNHOxfGtztwW5xaC-LKA=&emci=fa3d028f-90bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=381f28d7-fdbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=954237 "MAKE 5X THE IMPACT")
---
It's been more than a decade since I first met the Center's President and CEO, Nancy Northup, and learned about their mission. She and her team of bad-ass lawyers have been _relentless_ in the fight to protect and expand reproductive rights for you, me, and everyone around the world. [**And they're not slowing down any time soon!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99028049/518617580/-1586972746?sourceid=1150212&utm_campaign=25emjge-1212aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=elizabethbanks&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODFmMjhkNy1mZGJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U7-ESgDxHhhUe8MbZc-4SJiJNHOxfGtztwW5xaC-LKA=&emci=fa3d028f-90bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=381f28d7-fdbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=954237)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99028050/518617593/-1586972746?sourceid=1150212&utm_campaign=25emjge-1212aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=elizabethbanks&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODFmMjhkNy1mZGJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U7-ESgDxHhhUe8MbZc-4SJiJNHOxfGtztwW5xaC-LKA=&emci=fa3d028f-90bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=381f28d7-fdbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=954237)
[**Right now until midnight on December 31, every gift to the Center will be multiplied 5X thanks to the generosity of dedicated supporters.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99028051/518617606/-1586972746?sourceid=1150212&utm_campaign=25emjge-1212aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=elizabethbanks&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODFmMjhkNy1mZGJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U7-ESgDxHhhUe8MbZc-4SJiJNHOxfGtztwW5xaC-LKA=&emci=fa3d028f-90bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=381f28d7-fdbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=954237) This means your gift will go _five times further to power the Center's work_ —filing groundbreaking lawsuits, representing courageous plaintiffs in abortion ban states, and fighting for essential reproductive care.

**This is why I'm so passionate about the Center's work and proud to support them in this fight.** [**Will you join me now while your gift will be matched 5X? There's never been a better time to give.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99028057/518617617/-1586972746?sourceid=1150212&utm_campaign=25emjge-1212aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=elizabethbanks&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODFmMjhkNy1mZGJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U7-ESgDxHhhUe8MbZc-4SJiJNHOxfGtztwW5xaC-LKA=&emci=fa3d028f-90bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=381f28d7-fdbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=954237)
[**MATCH YOUR GIFT 5X**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99028064/518617633/-1586972746?sourceid=1150212&utm_campaign=25emjge-1212aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=elizabethbanks&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODFmMjhkNy1mZGJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U7-ESgDxHhhUe8MbZc-4SJiJNHOxfGtztwW5xaC-LKA=&emci=fa3d028f-90bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=381f28d7-fdbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=954237 "MATCH YOUR GIFT 5X")
---
We all deserve a future where people—not politicians or judges—control their own bodies and make their own personal medical decisions. That's the future the Center is working toward every single day.

[**Let's power this fight together. Your gift will go 5X as far and will make a life-changing impact.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99028073/518617644/-1586972746?sourceid=1150212&utm_campaign=25emjge-1212aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=elizabethbanks&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODFmMjhkNy1mZGJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U7-ESgDxHhhUe8MbZc-4SJiJNHOxfGtztwW5xaC-LKA=&emci=fa3d028f-90bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=381f28d7-fdbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=954237)

With wishes for a warm and happy holiday season,

Elizabeth Banks
Chair, Center for Reproductive Rights Cultural Ambassadors Council
