clean_body: Multiply your impact 5X for reproductive rights | Hi Peter, If you're feeling uncertain, angry, or nervous about the future of reproductive rights, you're not alone. I've been in this fight for a long time, and here's where I am: every day I see the incredible work the Center for Reproductive Rights is doing—fighting tooth and nail for all of our reproductive freedoms—and I feel inspired. This fight is far from over—and the Center needs our support more than ever. | "MAKE 5X THE IMPACT" It's been more than a decade since I first met the Center's President and CEO, Nancy Northup, and learned about their mission. She and her team of bad-ass lawyers have been relentless in the fight to protect and expand reproductive rights for you, me, and everyone around the world. This means your gift will go five times further to power the Center's work —filing groundbreaking lawsuits, representing courageous plaintiffs in abortion ban states, and fighting for essential reproductive care. This is why I'm so passionate about the Center's work and proud to support them in this fight. "MATCH YOUR GIFT 5X" We all deserve a future where people—not politicians or judges—control their own bodies and make their own personal medical decisions. That's the future the Center is working toward every single day. With wishes for a warm and happy holiday season, Elizabeth Banks Chair, Center for Reproductive Rights Cultural Ambassadors Council "JOIN NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

Dear Peter,

We thought you may be interested to receive this conservative news alert from Illinois Review, the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump.
http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=df5ec660a2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=df5ec660a2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)

IR in the News

This week Illinois Review published a story titled, "Blagojevich Urges Trump Legal Team to File Massive Defamation Suit Against Billionaire Pritzker After ABC News Agrees to $15M Suit (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/12/blagojevich-urges-trump-legal-team-to-file-massive-defamation-suit-against-billionaire-pritzker-after-abc-news-agrees-to-15m-settlement.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=df5ec660a2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823) ." Shortly after its publication, it was shared by Trump allies Bernie Kerik and Roger Stone. Then, Politico picked up the Illinois Review story and put it on its front page! Since that time, the Illinois Review article has been covered by several other national outlets, many even crediting Illinois Review and citing the article.

name: Kari Lake
subject: There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=05256b3a069e45b4b91dc10a0cb655d5&_e=7nBAKwh_XgUhyg_tCok1rMjSXrvX9Uy9CCuy9HKmRsJnVR3OBhK9oJAHnBb4ucHXcXOLcT9I9Ee2aitz5RcHdjodACPwryLNIRGAxGn5IitCaWt9Yhx8uL6wtqNG9WER7xIQbz9i_w_f6J0zAbAZW6eJmeL2ffM3sXu6pmiX-dH4LdCHi73wG4cIu2YLOhyh3MQSuEN6kN_0_u7yesfTovkIwmt3qxI2nheBCUQgcGiFxgK-0zTBKw9HZVnXlHhnTPQUjJFWi3dJ20mZnI3kGvrkEYSBMvF1RN0O3xyk_v98BAB_deYbJPISl0GpdUm_wutYKyPnYsQtZyBCDgC5HoqsXw8N9R2EuMxXy45XAUERY19o3hKoVkBGoBdpmhtSu1mGUxdHRCUj4sUPxWLsNh4vss2epTgPYbVd01L2B5s%3D)
---
MERRY CHRISTMAS _From Kari, Jeff, Ruby, and Leo_
---
| | From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=05256b3a069e45b4b91dc10a0cb655d5&_e=7nBAKwh_XgUhyg_tCok1rMjSXrvX9Uy9CCuy9HKmRsJnVR3OBhK9oJAHnBb4ucHXcXOLcT9I9Ee2aitz5RcHdjodACPwryLNIRGAxGn5IitCaWt9Yhx8uL6wtqNG9WER7xIQbz9i_w_f6J0zAbAZW6eJmeL2ffM3sXu6pmiX-dH4LdCHi73wG4cIu2YLOhyh3MQSuEN6kN_0_u7yesfTovkIwmt3qxI2nheBCUQgcGiFxgK-0zTBKw9HZVnXlHhn5o292WbPxDnQAAZbK3dRBwP0CAnZidgkn2sdu7PGPXulkKHQPVNpcaFLoN_ue0E12mfZSEokYVhfv-Pvm-mJxceWdcAifYExTSZeadlBwV2nhchaQlm9l5_FA1VCpmrDP1a92cAvrXdaIG8WStt5oh8305ssDfWCnH3av7d0DOA%3D)**
---
|
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Fellow Patriot, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Fellow Patriot, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=05256b3a069e45b4b91dc10a0cb655d5&_e=7nBAKwh_XgUhyg_tCok1rMjSXrvX9Uy9CCuy9HKmRsJnVR3OBhK9oJAHnBb4ucHXcXOLcT9I9Ee2aitz5RcHdjodACPwryLNIRGAxGn5IitCaWt9Yhx8uL6wtqNG9WER7xIQbz9i_w_f6J0zAbAZW6eJmeL2ffM3sXu6pmiX-dH4LdCHi73wG4cIu2YLOhyh3MQSuEN6kN_0_u7yesfTovkIwmt3qxI2nheBCUQgcGiFxgK-0zTBKw9HZVnXlHhngLSu4mWPrU9XxUV3ofQJo9uLKRTBCl147ODSGxy3J4ZUB6FKvyr4mIc9OelSBlf5KfW9ClbCpOCqEy-4vSF7mpXIvhi7SrOB2lybpPFigJINatyWQ9ERFu7Cjt_tlTr3jfflSUQSZTNEVRUswDbtLiyKM6wRH07o50tUzo1PFVg%3D)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Fellow Patriot, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Fellow Patriot, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---

I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Fellow Patriot, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to “Make life hell” for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Fellow Patriot, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Fellow Patriot, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones. Fellow Patriot, I’m not giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you. You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country. body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99029170/518619609/176159279?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc4NzcwNjVlLTAwYmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=i5lnGTl7sT0SNa-lyvKEb1zWuuo2F1ppAmEFpMQuvgU=&emci=cb59784b-90b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=7877065e-00bf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=2107230)
---
| | **Dear Peter, need a last minute gift idea for a loved one who is passionate about climate action?**
---
Look no further! [**Surprise someone this year with a donation to OLCV and take part in the spirit of giving!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99029171/518619610/176159279?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc4NzcwNjVlLTAwYmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=i5lnGTl7sT0SNa-lyvKEb1zWuuo2F1ppAmEFpMQuvgU=&emci=cb59784b-90b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=7877065e-00bf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=2107230) This year is a great time to give someone the gift of climate action. It’s dark to think of, but the truth is, the state of our climate is not great with the newly elected federal government. Despite this, there is so much we can continue to do right here at home to protect our beloved Oregon. The rest of the country is looking to us to lead, and provide hope for what is possible. I know all of you give me hope, because together, I know we can make a difference.
---
| [Give a gift!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99029172/518619611/176159279?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc4NzcwNjVlLTAwYmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=i5lnGTl7sT0SNa-lyvKEb1zWuuo2F1ppAmEFpMQuvgU=&emci=cb59784b-90b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=7877065e-00bf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=2107230)
---
Sneak peak of the ecards:
---
---
|
---
---
| | [Give a gift!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99029173/518619612/176159279?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc4NzcwNjVlLTAwYmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=i5lnGTl7sT0SNa-lyvKEb1zWuuo2F1ppAmEFpMQuvgU=&emci=cb59784b-90b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=7877065e-00bf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=2107230)
---
You’re one of our committed supporters, so I don’t need to convince you that OLCV is committed to fighting relentlessly for our climate. You know OLCV will do whatever it takes to protect Oregon’s clean air and water, public lands, wildlife, and climate, because we know you will too. **In times like these, a donation to OLCV is a powerful one, it shows our country what we as Oregonians value.**[**We’re challenging our members to show their gratitude this holiday season by giving the gift of an OLCV membership!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99029174/518619613/176159279?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc4NzcwNjVlLTAwYmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=i5lnGTl7sT0SNa-lyvKEb1zWuuo2F1ppAmEFpMQuvgU=&emci=cb59784b-90b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=7877065e-00bf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=2107230) By giving on behalf of someone else, you get to pick a special ecard to send their way with your own personalized message. (_Psst! This means it's also a great gift for someone who lives far away!) _ The holidays are a time for giving and hope. I hope you’ll all find that this holiday season, and take part in the season of giving. As always, thank you for your support of OLCV. All of us at OLCV wish you the best for this holiday season!
---
[Give a gift!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99029175/518619614/176159279?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc4NzcwNjVlLTAwYmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=i5lnGTl7sT0SNa-lyvKEb1zWuuo2F1ppAmEFpMQuvgU=&emci=cb59784b-90b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=7877065e-00bf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=2107230)

Sarah Kline OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator _P.S.: We are in the big push for end of year fundraising. name: George Whitesides
subject: My first major test
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q4-2024?refcode=em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q4-2024?refcode=em-header]
Peter,

I’ll get straight to the point: We’re quickly approaching our end-of-year fundraising deadline.

This is my first major test as Congressman-elect. Republicans know this, too.

We were one of the few Democratic challengers to flip a red district in November. Even though I haven’t been sworn in yet, our win makes us a top target for the razor-thin GOP majority come January.

Our final quarterly fundraising deadline of 2024 is an important opportunity to show that a blue CA-27 is here to stay. And remember, this end-of-year report will go public for all to see– supporters, the media, even Republican leadership.

I know I’ve asked a lot of you this year, and I thank you for sticking with me during this transformative moment. Today, I’m humbly asking you to chip in $3 – or any amount you can – to cement our progress in CA-27.

Thank you,

George

Donate >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q4-2024?refcode=em-12.20.24-all-a
https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/? [https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/?] https://www.instagram.com/whitesidesforcongress/? [https://www.instagram.com/whitesidesforcongress/?] https://twitter.com/gtwhitesides? [https://twitter.com/gtwhitesides?]George has spent his career solving problems. name: Tina Kotek
subject: Improving access to mental health and addiction care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, our mental health and addiction crisis will not be solved until every single Oregonian has access to care, no matter where they live or what they can afford. In my conversations with folks around the state, I’ve heard time and time again that health care providers struggle to meet their community’s needs. I’ve also heard from people who’ve considered a career in behavioral health care, but don’t have access to affordable educational opportunities or face long wait times for certification or licensure. We need to keep increasing capacity, both for treatment beds and for providers. We can do it — but only with continued investment. That’s why my recommended budget sets aside **$90 million to build hundreds more treatment beds** and **$50 million to support a strong behavioral health workforce. ** These are just two key strategies of my efforts to improve mental health care and addiction treatment over the next two years — but they can only happen with the state legislature approving my latest budget. [_**Peter, will you add your name to become an official supporter of my proposed budget and planned investments to solve the behavioral health crisis?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99030820/518622595/12476288?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241220_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGFiYWU4My0wMmJmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bf30Gn-OwiRgLkk0vvCI5rbZF3HPdU4iUna1tNedajQ=&emci=25445979-dcbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=adabae83-02bf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=15353729) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99030821/518622596/12476288?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241220_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGFiYWU4My0wMmJmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bf30Gn-OwiRgLkk0vvCI5rbZF3HPdU4iUna1tNedajQ=&emci=25445979-dcbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=adabae83-02bf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=15353729)

clean_body: | Peter, our mental health and addiction crisis will not be solved until every single Oregonian has access to care, no matter where they live or what they can afford. In my conversations with folks around the state, I’ve heard time and time again that health care providers struggle to meet their community’s needs. I’ve also heard from people who’ve considered a career in behavioral health care, but don’t have access to affordable educational opportunities or face long wait times for certification or licensure. We need to keep increasing capacity, both for treatment beds and for providers. We can do it — but only with continued investment. That’s why my recommended budget sets aside $90 million to build hundreds more treatment beds and $50 million to support a strong behavioral health workforce. These are just two key strategies of my efforts to improve mental health care and addiction treatment over the next two years — but they can only happen with the state legislature approving my latest budget. | Thank you, Tina | Tina Kotek is working hard to make Oregon a better place to live and work for all Oregonians – and making real progress on issues like housing and homelessness, education and child care, and mental health and addiction services. Can you chip in any amount now to support her work? | = Tina for Oregon PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 | mailto:info@tinafororegon.com | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

body:
You have shown incredible dedication to the conservative movement this year and ALWAYS stood by our country- no matter what.
You have been selected as the patriot of the day!
|
---
| | |
**_CONGRATULATIONS_**** _!_**

You have been selected as today's Patriot of the Day, Friend!
---
| | | [CLAIM YOUR PRIZE ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=06630be1b87343f0a717c6f771dd3f2b&_e=dL3fHca1Dt6ugF9lAY93GI5o1rZj7Ol2_fBOc9E6pg_-qT7xqK7tmlJP3HDa316iiHi5wgnnWnomuMsY0C12u83_T_hP7eLThEZpoKFBfaBC-65pYi_Ffv_-zqzdzkKwc4wlqbfoS7qceybNAbbSf-q6IlxXIWmpCW__VwVm3KN07D_kFl2Tb7mNZLIJayXcSl5eBGi89HST6qZ-MXOkppuDEoOfboP3OWFWH03Qn6H00hX1TenaS5WERNfzHzpKgB5ZDiLBSpz5H26JasFcJWelNLARVIMC4waNO3klyou55EEWvIF-hFGl4SPXNemCx58zwX7_i_tYXBSojb096z8GuCp1dpSMQISo-WQiqo1CTECs0XsZA1TDfn9ddq4BEDWDPdT5xHJb7mD6n5Np7qnzgwaJOT31bdmwdE2tf2U%3D "Generic Button")

A TREMENDOUS honor!

You have shown incredible dedication to the conservative movement this year and ALWAYS stood by our country- **no matter what.**

For that, you have our thanks. **[As a token of our appreciation, we are honored to present to you the Patriot of the Day award!](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=06630be1b87343f0a717c6f771dd3f2b&_e=dL3fHca1Dt6ugF9lAY93GI5o1rZj7Ol2_fBOc9E6pg_-qT7xqK7tmlJP3HDa316iiHi5wgnnWnomuMsY0C12u83_T_hP7eLThEZpoKFBfaBC-65pYi_Ffv_-zqzdzkKwc4wlqbfoS7qceybNAbbSf-q6IlxXIWmpCW__VwVm3KN07D_kFl2Tb7mNZLIJayXcSl5eBGi89HST6qZ-MXOkppuDEoOfboP3OWFWH03Qn6H00hX1TenaS5WERNfzHzpKor0GDcQ47nugD9XLGpYBGzi0j_GGVS1s9_GYdlO8iAPWyuIXPbbaXlD2J8Ga2LP_ec61DZFSqYeP5zlCZsjfDNafoVegBclY3YnsVNT3EFCCXENPp2X6v-Ojn5GHE8I78g6AL_ZepnXdvjFfOtraJupbvE4wmfvZ5mRQdOuipyw%3D "As a token of our appreciation, we are honored to present to you the Patriot of the Day award!")**

| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=06630be1b87343f0a717c6f771dd3f2b&_e=dL3fHca1Dt6ugF9lAY93GI5o1rZj7Ol2_fBOc9E6pg_-qT7xqK7tmlJP3HDa316iiHi5wgnnWnomuMsY0C12u83_T_hP7eLThEZpoKFBfaBC-65pYi_Ffv_-zqzdzkKwc4wlqbfoS7qceybNAbbSf-q6IlxXIWmpCW__VwVm3KN07D_kFl2Tb7mNZLIJayXcSl5eBGi89HST6qZ-MXOkppuDEoOfboP3OWFWH03Qn6H00hX1TenaS5WERNfzHzpKLRKk6P-NgCpFszi6W08hPOjLCq72iLxDmFd8Yf9NV0w0WeBzT8P62HKn9ay0wxdMeoqDrTybcuufEoU9PZqmqrlWidX79TBXIciQ1Xa-ayU05udTqrmDUM02H6hxagmD0glSeB2ZXZHQRVZ1PGi-oSsp0jeHdBMwHrtW_I83c4I%3D)

Many noteworthy patriots have been the recipients of this award over these past few months, and you are the latest winner.

I hope you realize what a tremendous honor this is, Friend.

**_But this tremendous honor won 't last forever_ \- [will you please accept this award before it expires at 11:59 tonight?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=06630be1b87343f0a717c6f771dd3f2b&_e=dL3fHca1Dt6ugF9lAY93GI5o1rZj7Ol2_fBOc9E6pg_-qT7xqK7tmlJP3HDa316iiHi5wgnnWnomuMsY0C12u83_T_hP7eLThEZpoKFBfaBC-65pYi_Ffv_-zqzdzkKwc4wlqbfoS7qceybNAbbSf-q6IlxXIWmpCW__VwVm3KN07D_kFl2Tb7mNZLIJayXcSl5eBGi89HST6qZ-MXOkppuDEoOfboP3OWFWH03Qn6H00hX1TenaS5WERNfzHzpKUu-bMbzjkOo2kEV1aNA1BsmQL2uTqzhiqUWmw0J5f9j0n54PTzMK1zj6WwmcOVVeM9rMN7z-476njoZD6mfrVno0E7lumQDMrfHFYHTwRUki6Oarh4HUJE4GHIrX_QNP9d1eb9FfpsxCZlnxwEe_8nMxTIfBAOJUXVD3ceN30h0%3D "will you please accept this award before it expires at 11:59 tonight?")**

**Then:** Elon Musk went on a social media rampage to try and kill the bill:

name: Marina, All On The Line
subject: Incredibly grateful
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
There’s no grassroots team I’d rather have by our side as we head into 2025.
|
---

Peter,
Before the year officially ends, I wanted to reach out and say _**thank you.**_
Your commitment and passion for All On The Line’s mission has helped so much this year — and for that, we are incredibly grateful.
Together, the fair maps movement helped...
* **Defeat “The Judicial Accountability Act of 2024” in Arizona.** This high-stakes ballot initiative would have essentially ended term limits for state supreme and appellate court judges. But instead, you helped hold the line against a tremendous, partisan abuse of power, and Arizonans will continue to have a say over who sits on their highest court.

* **Protect voters and build power in states all across the country.** All On the Line and affiliates recruited over 6,800 poll workers and sent over a million text messages to voters.

* **Stand for fair representation, voting rights, and justice.** With new, more representative maps in place (as a result of one of our affiliates’ victory at the U.S. Supreme Court), Black voters in Louisiana and Alabama each had the opportunity to elect two candidates of their choice, instead of just one — for the first time in nearly three decades in Louisiana and the first time ever in Alabama.

**There’s no grassroots team I’d rather have by our side as we head into 2025.** Together, we’ll keep working to restore fairness to our democracy — advancing fair maps, ending gerrymandering, and protecting voting rights for all Americans.
Here’s to the year ahead,
Marina Jenkins
Executive Director, All On the Line

name: Indiana GOP
subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | _**Merry Christmas and Happy New Year**_
---
Friends, This month marks a time of transition for our party, but one thing remains constant: the strength and resilience of our grassroots. I am honored to step into the role of Interim Chairwoman and continue the impactful work we’ve accomplished together.

As we move forward into 2025, our focus will remain on empowering local leaders and strengthening grassroots engagement across Indiana. Together, we’ll continue to build a movement that connects with voters, delivers results, and ensures a brighter future for Hoosiers in every corner of the state.

We have accomplished so much as a party this year. So, please use the upcoming holiday season to rest, recharge, and spend time with loved ones. We will come back together in 2025 ready to continue the great work our party does.

Please don’t hesitate to reach out to me and our team at State Party HQ with your ideas or questions—we are here to support you.

Wishing you a blessed holiday season.

Thank you for all you do!
---
| |
---
| | Erin Lucas, Indiana GOP Interim Chairwoman
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---

**Governor-elect Mike Braun** [received](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=5a2d24fe298441ec9aa81ac78809972c&_e=_cmYc0sHlk_aPvxh6d9j7TGp-cfqUHZTLeWIRFz_vKFLKW-ri6cDAHh1B63zoBwHYAu0MXTsii8i9eKi3BpRDAiJwAYTNK7KdU_JOi8ZZg9z0FtIa2uU9p4KRYUp_tC_HQMbrWCbOncuKBTXhv5k3ClN4s1zpenYQ7TOxPXQAAwRrHuQ8ulsBF6ztijZ-kKF0sypKXngjpz0orqVBnME1lvBhoXscJmC8CuCDxVucDsocQFYVN2LW0nwemUpcGly) the Laffer award at the 2024 ALEC's summit. **What's they are saying** : "This year, we recognize a man who put those skills to work to build a thriving business, craft impactful bills in the U.S. Senate, and now lead Indiana as its 52nd governor." [@Lisabnelson ](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=5a2d24fe298441ec9aa81ac78809972c&_e=_cmYc0sHlk_aPvxh6d9j7YPQB-e0bhSEWiilhrWGWMFvUVieYnPJqIlP5skgBM0HHTKED1MfCm91MDL_LV8nkucruKX2B0cHcpvssXFau-mwkb5XtQiaz6KeWIPvpkVpMS5EhtdoRaa1DTfr0zul8rSCMhlhT0hgwd5tjqjlLtaCTuvhSm6tJqJ_pzqDunctOKHR8cnjUKbZ9UTW8nfSTg%3D%3D)honored [@SenatorBraun ](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=5a2d24fe298441ec9aa81ac78809972c&_e=_cmYc0sHlk_aPvxh6d9j7Y23h_MIUeE32zsJEAVYQsJ88TopH9Wxib85wfgSJKVqww2uX_i1ykPi1fbOPON1kG8raBdTysx1BKqOSVJkO66BLCSLAKAWYHzdkwPRfIYUNlD69ZD8JBTdF7VVveUhQwylOniq5thCF9BrXZCMZFnCJRCLosw70k3tbJPDHzf-x6i1JEE-iPFvwA_SjnwAfg%3D%3D)with the Laffer Award at ALEC's 2024 summit." \- **Governor-elect****. _**Governor-Elect Mike Braun**_ _**Named Indiana's Next Adjutant General**_
---
**Governor-elect Mike Braun** [named](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=5a2d24fe298441ec9aa81ac78809972c&_e=_cmYc0sHlk_aPvxh6d9j7a8lXpYC9GgVg-GiL-6oMk8SQf25BOm2SAyXyvl2mWJ5ibJM2fKSW-YUtKh10dISDy7mGxTl45_3uT0sR7D7I35balRSOsjQB9NMaF8G1X_KCaeSxCah-YdQxRGV-gaR6ayGTRVbupZ0pD7Wwsf6L3q38hydC6MxyUfPJjrscwRZz0tp1t9Rdp8Xk1MylXw1Zdj3pqeSn7GqMktYIsYNkih6QfU8jl7qt4GrqgdA5Mw8) Brigadier General Larry Muennich as the next Adjutant General of Indiana. **What's he saying** : “It's my honor to announce Brigadier General Larry Muennich as the next Adjutant General of Indiana. He will lead the Indiana National Guard and more than 12,000 soldiers. Brigadier General Muennich brings over 32 years of military experience and serves as Division Director of Strategic Initiatives for the Indiana National Guard. Nobody will do a better job than Brigadier General Muennich, and on behalf of all Hoosiers, I am thankful for his service.” \- **ALEC** said via [X.](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=5a2d24fe298441ec9aa81ac78809972c&_e=_cmYc0sHlk_aPvxh6d9j7a8lXpYC9GgVg-GiL-6oMk8SQf25BOm2SAyXyvl2mWJ5ibJM2fKSW-YUtKh10dISD0_QmssyZ80ZDAv4Tt-7GDJw-EvAlUcNHMsyxiTwDIJgO8nVdWn2nR6F0hTm44OGdtnTYvOGO3ps1qz--po78U8_5bL4-0hNxDgDE355DvCYxBGO25iOZ1BfCmhEsmmD5DPxvsf1rfxqEX6_ixW7Llw3EHCkxQzYTOuq1Zdomh9Y)

clean_body: | | | | | | | Merry Christmas and Happy New Year Friends, This month marks a time of transition for our party, but one thing remains constant: the strength and resilience of our grassroots. I am honored to step into the role of Interim Chairwoman and continue the impactful work we’ve accomplished together. As we move forward into 2025, our focus will remain on empowering local leaders and strengthening grassroots engagement across Indiana. Together, we’ll continue to build a movement that connects with voters, delivers results, and ensures a brighter future for Hoosiers in every corner of the state. We have accomplished so much as a party this year. So, please use the upcoming holiday season to rest, recharge, and spend time with loved ones. We will come back together in 2025 ready to continue the great work our party does. Please don’t hesitate to reach out to me and our team at State Party HQ with your ideas or questions—we are here to support you. Wishing you a blessed holiday season. Thank you for all you do! | | | | Erin Lucas, Indiana GOP Interim Chairwoman | | | | | | Governor-Elect Mike Braun Won the Laffer Award at the ALEC 2024 Summit Governor-elect Mike Braun the Laffer award at the 2024 ALEC's summit. What's they are saying : "This year, we recognize a man who put those skills to work to build a thriving business, craft impactful bills in the U.S. Senate, and now lead Indiana as its 52nd governor." the Laffer Award at ALEC's 2024 summit." \- Governor-elect. Braun said via . | Governor-Elect Mike Braun Named Indiana's Next Adjutant General Governor-elect Mike Braun Brigadier General Larry Muennich as the next Adjutant General of Indiana. What's he saying : “It's my honor to announce Brigadier General Larry Muennich as the next Adjutant General of Indiana. He will lead the Indiana National Guard and more than 12,000 soldiers. Brigadier General Muennich brings over 32 years of military experience and serves as Division Director of Strategic Initiatives for the Indiana National Guard. Nobody will do a better job than Brigadier General Muennich, and on behalf of all Hoosiers, I am thankful for his service.” \- ALEC said via To stay up-to-date, follow Sen. name: Voter Action Project
subject: Petition: Don't privatize the U.S. Postal Service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122024_2&amount=25]
Folks,
The United States Postal Service has served every corner of our nation for nearly 250 years. But Trump and his billionaire allies want to rip it apart, placing profits over an essential public service. Their dangerous plan to privatize the USPS threatens rural communities, Indigenous communities, seniors, veterans, small businesses, and many millions of Americans who rely on affordable, reliable mail service.
It's simple: Privatization means higher costs, reduced access, and the elimination of mail services in areas where private companies refuse to deliver. For rural Americans, this isn’t just inconvenient, it’s catastrophic, especially for mail-in ballots.
Please, step up and tell Congress: Do NOT privatize the USPS now or ever! >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/do-not-privatize-the-usps-ever/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1224usps]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/do-not-privatize-the-usps-ever/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1224usps]
A coalition of groups stopped Trump’s last privatization push in 2018 with overwhelming, bipartisan public outcry. But this time, the stakes are higher. Trump is working with his billionaire friends Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy and other MAGA allies to pressure Congress into dismantling this beloved institution.
The USPS isn’t just a service; it’s a promise to every American. That’s why both parties came together in 2022 to pass the Postal Service Reform Act with overwhelming bipartisan support. Even Postmaster Louis DeJoy stepped up to lobby Congress at the time. They knew privatization was wrong then, and it’s wrong now .
The USPS is America’s lifeline, delivering to every corner of the nation. We cannot let it be picked apart, sold for its parts, and placed into the hands of Wall Street billionaires. We must raise our voices louder than ever to protect the USPS.
Add your name and make it clear to Congress: We won't let you privatize our critical postal service >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/do-not-privatize-the-usps-ever/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1224usps]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/do-not-privatize-the-usps-ever/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1224usps]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122024_2&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122024_2&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122024_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122024_2&amount=25]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=xm2Ot60DAvtiGXDytLfTkannDIC8m3cMO7fByVSi7una8Rn286Zk%2FzFZKJDLAGktv1yqtcRt2bUEbyU6wIdNI7zqB7B5Q8hlz4Bv8XqUsCw7G%2BWgfLzgjNSBgTS1fVXuBdcEN2oGzHYjKSlfsF4%2Fc2OchUZvKPGBrbirvanKnh%2FG4SPDF2o2anGw%2FeHj4rHdjifZbclriZ4znBen6ce58VLxmeFVM14HC0stYxk6kihaTFmkOCz%2FpkGzLc%2BkP37E2ZWYHPrEOwzB8%2FQwc1F87KQDd5SbUtXAh3TeIh1OBSv8wRjvwSQbB7Sw4SaiK3j66CRvnLBitpgxWYFbQ%2B7Ia58O7ezBxQ0lqjMTW0hi%2FAGMTte%2BanXGVQaS4lypbIZ7auB%2B81OITlkuVaQXwehAmERouqsCdAp1ELfYf64SfEQ%3D .

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Peter In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99033916/518627163/604658357?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2024.12.20_Cruz-Bday_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDQ3YjQ5OTEtMDZiZi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M0LsgcD9KyA-d5qHa2-ixby9YlHDxZWtBxK0IaISt6g=#)

Look, you know we loathe Ted Cruz – and we know you do too.

It's for good reason. **He's got an A+ rating from the NRA, pushed the Big Lie that claimed the 2002 election was rigged, and has pushed harmful misinformation about the LGTBQ+ community.**

So when we heard his birthday is in just a couple days, we knew we needed to do something special. We're sending Ted Cruz a very UNHAPPY birthday card – and we want you to sign it.

[**Be one of the first: Wish Ted Cruz an unhappy birthday in the next 48 hours before the card closes.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99033917/518627164/1247981187?contactdata=&quick=true&refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2024.12.20_Cruz-Bday_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDQ3YjQ5OTEtMDZiZi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M0LsgcD9KyA-d5qHa2-ixby9YlHDxZWtBxK0IaISt6g=&emci=83d8b222-88bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=d47b4991-06bf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=1446461) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99033918/518627165/-900298422?contactdata=&quick=true&refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2024.12.20_Cruz-Bday_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDQ3YjQ5OTEtMDZiZi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M0LsgcD9KyA-d5qHa2-ixby9YlHDxZWtBxK0IaISt6g=&emci=83d8b222-88bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=d47b4991-06bf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=1446461) | [SIGN NOW →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99033919/518627166/1247981187?contactdata=&quick=true&refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2024.12.20_Cruz-Bday_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDQ3YjQ5OTEtMDZiZi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M0LsgcD9KyA-d5qHa2-ixby9YlHDxZWtBxK0IaISt6g=&emci=83d8b222-88bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=d47b4991-06bf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=1446461)

name: Team Hawley
subject: MUST WATCH: Senator Josh Hawley Clashes With NCAA President Over Transgender Inclusion Guidelines For Women's Sports
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
Must see TV!!| | | [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=884718d215af49699cf7c7990821ccfa&_e=5Kqp0pZw6PGctb2ddPBC56AWPMGV6U95qAJfHVOvmaEHYhWQvrGFTIs5q6AkFE2lo8fk8_6IT8VWu5x9beAlbjmr_yawEOhIGC4CF5VoACO1wCdZ98LAW6JNLzR_i5Ks09M4XNOW5UpC_-GSLmNuqvEZkyojliPU-0zlb9ausNE8lc5x0QEshgcdDVrEiE3Bt71k3NK5pYxeu7PO7qC_ZWq1mEttcHzy28wuoKcDQveL4e4X087p78SQyvOHPOhL6DzXMWXaujAmeBZZJ8kzwm4ChS68nQJvGe1ISP1ndTJbtM2mcWEJLatt0kh_P6Sn8ZYhCaEtfjgTDmZR2XYcFKmQNiuS-Cay-hx_gMawOty3WImEVFCxucuWxRkNlN73)
---
Peter,
---
The left has led the charge against our female athletes. Female athletes are now losing opportunities to biological males, and are being forced to share locker rooms with biological males who are changing and showering with them. It's sick and it's wrong. Title IX provides protections for women _in law_ , but the NCAA president shamefully testifies that Title IX doesn't apply to the NCAA, and makes it clear that his organization prioritizes transgender athletes at the expense of all others. Watch the NCAA president twist, turn, stumble and bumble while being _grilled_ by Josh this week. It's embarrassing and shameful, but Josh doesn't let him off the hook.
---
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=884718d215af49699cf7c7990821ccfa&_e=5Kqp0pZw6PGctb2ddPBC56AWPMGV6U95qAJfHVOvmaEHYhWQvrGFTIs5q6AkFE2lo8fk8_6IT8VWu5x9beAlbjmr_yawEOhIGC4CF5VoACO1wCdZ98LAW6JNLzR_i5Ks09M4XNOW5UpC_-GSLmNuqvEZkyojliPU-0zlb9ausNE8lc5x0QEshgcdDVrEiE3Bt71k3NK5pYxeu7PO7qC_Za8t05-YumdIZ2DfEupXfRMFfSs_GUy1v8pgInaW6hwL4hX-gaRS0aHNI8L-OouQABtc_OGQFETV5yFLehJt4mt_tStNxGubPTrqg26Xv1KaEEeaLvlJh0f_KvccI4PLFL7uoMAvPdLJp1V7kspl1bLtZbspiRQyb3oQsc09MG9j)
---
**READ THE TAKEDOWN TRANSCRIPT** **Hawley** : Why are you, Mr. Baker, why are you allowing biological men to play in women's sports?**Baker** : Because we believe that it's consistent with federal policy. **Hawley** : So we're right back to your testimony, is you believe you're compelled to do it by federal law— you would change it otherwise?**Baker** : I said in my opening comments to Senator Kennedy that clarity on this issue at the federal level would be very helpful.**Hawley** : Oh that is such a copout. In other words, somebody else, please do it for us, keep sending us the money, we'll go to court and argue that Title IX doesn't even apply. **Baker** : We do not take a dime in federal money, not a dime.**Hawley** : Is that why you're arguing Title IX doesn't apply? **Baker** : No, yes, part of it, yes.**Hawley** : You honestly think you shouldn't be subject to Title IX? **Baker** : We don't believe we currently are— in federal court has amazing federal court has affirmed that. **Hawley** : Absolutely amazing. You have a pending lawsuit right now from female athletes who are suing you because you allow biological men, not only in their sports, but also in their locker rooms. Why do you do that by the way? Why do your guidelines allow biological men into women's locker rooms without the women's consent, without the women's foreknowledge? Why do you do that? **Baker** : That’s not what our guidelines say. **Hawley** : They do say that. I've got them right here. Your guidelines say that transgender student athletes should be able to use the locker room shower and toilet facilities in accordance with their gender identity here. They are _right here!_
---
[**SUPPORT JOSH'S FIGHT FEMALE ATHLETES >>>**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=884718d215af49699cf7c7990821ccfa&_e=5Kqp0pZw6PGctb2ddPBC56AWPMGV6U95qAJfHVOvmaEHYhWQvrGFTIs5q6AkFE2lo8fk8_6IT8VWu5x9beAlbjmr_yawEOhIGC4CF5VoACO1wCdZ98LAW6JNLzR_i5Ks09M4XNOW5UpC_-GSLmNuqvEZkyojliPU-0zlb9ausNE8lc5x0QEshgcdDVrEiE3Bt71k3NK5pYxeu7PO7qC_ZeZO4zKe7nKFmecn28v3LEnd5HY3QNyebqDMIz553scDuviOmqOq_8gh-9YsgtBPrstZYbl-T5D6wtVzQd30nsTSmTe4vjQJ51dXGfM2nvS3q32F6LuPe6iMqpZu3syTyE0mg8x6FEjbodhkPQC9eVDbnEFHOPVQNNytTfdIAVm5)
---
In Liberty,
---
Team Hawley

| | Friend.

| | Here’s something you might not know: **when you donate to the Oregon GOP, it can cost you nothing out of pocket.** Oregon has a **_Political Tax Credit_** that lets you:
* Get up to **$50 back** if you file individually, or
* **$100 back** if you file jointly as a couple.

It’s not a deduction – it’s a dollar-for-dollar credit that reduces what you owe on your state taxes. _Then, when it’s time to file your taxes, just check the box to indicate you made a political contribution, and you’ll be all set!_ **That means you can support conservative values in Oregon and get your money right back.** _But don’t wait – this opportunity disappears at the end of the year!_

Oregon GOP

body:

Biden Rushes Back to DC as Harris Cancels Holiday Trip, Sparking 25th Amendment Rumors After Explosive Report Reveals Extensive Health Coverup Scheme (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/12/biden-rushes-back-to-dc-as-harris-cancels-holiday-trip-sparking-25th-amendment-rumors-after-explosive-report-reveals-extensive-health-coverup-scheme.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=be321393b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/12/biden-rushes-back-to-dc-as-harris-cancels-holiday-trip-sparking-25th-amendment-rumors-after-explosive-report-reveals-extensive-health-coverup-scheme.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=be321393b9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
President Joe Biden disembarks from Marine One as he arrives at the White House in Washington, on Dec. 19, 2024. (Francis Chung/POLITICO)
By Illinois Review

Late on Thursday, President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris abruptly canceled their holiday travel plans as the frail president was seen returning to the White House after dark aboard Marine One from Delaware where he was planning to hunker down until after the holidays.

On Wednesday, The Wall Street Journal published an explosive story that detailed a four-year coverup by the White House to hide the president’s deteriorating mental health condition and how top aides protected the ailing president from the public, his staff and even the cabinet.

With the Middle East on the verge of World War III, and the thought of a mentally incapacitated man in control of the nuclear codes – a 25th Amendment discussion seems completely plausible. Especially after cabinet members just recently learned that even top White House aides hid the president’s deteriorating mental health condition from them as well.

name: David Hogg
subject: Uncomfortable truths
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Thousands of you have already committed to the fight.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20241220-1&t=1&akid=1554%2E587540%2EJAyI0r)
It’s been an exciting week, Peter.
Since announcing my run for DNC Vice Chair earlier this week, we’ve already seen a major outpouring of support from Democrats all across the country.
I’m honored that so many people are joining this movement. Thousands of you have already committed to the fight to bring new perspectives to the Democratic Party and face the uncomfortable truths that have gone ignored for far too long.
Democrats have real work to do building a party that listens to and speaks to young people – **and that starts by putting a young person at the DNC table.**
**[If you can, will you split a $5 contribution to back my campaign for DNC Vice Chair and to support the work we’re doing here at Leaders We Deserve?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241220-1?refcode=em20241220-1554&amount=5&refcode2=1554_587540_JAyI0r&akid=1554%2E587540%2EJAyI0r)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241220-1?refcode=em20241220-1554&amount=5&refcode2=1554_587540_JAyI0r&akid=1554%2E587540%2EJAyI0r)
Peter, the reasons we started Leaders We Deserve are some of the same big reasons I am running for DNC Vice Chair. We’ve all heard it said that young people are the future – but young people are ready to lead now. We need to start building our bench of young progressives and helping elect them to positions on the local, state, and federal levels. That’s how young people can actually shape the future.
**Yes, young people _are_ the future. That’s why we need a seat at the table _today._**
**[Your $5 contribution will support my campaign for DNC Vice Chair along with the work we’re doing at Leaders We Deserve to elect young progressives. Please give if you can – this grassroots team is powering these critical fights.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241220-1?refcode=em20241220-1554&amount=5&refcode2=1554_587540_JAyI0r&akid=1554%2E587540%2EJAyI0r)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241220-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241220-1554&refcode2=1554_587540_JAyI0r&akid=1554%2E587540%2EJAyI0r)**
Thank you for all of your support,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20241220-1&t=2&refcode2=1554_587540_JAyI0r&akid=1554%2E587540%2EJAyI0r)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1554%2E587540%2EJAyI0r)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1554%2E587540%2EJAyI0r)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)

| [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=9a4edab4d8bb4dc59bb93b2bb14209e3&_e=oVtZrYxn5E6fIK022vA-XlGSbBDjbSYjfTDHWPRsw34qd1I8tPG4CqPayd-atDG_9pP7KGLIcGRYRFTsADCqPvi5vSv89SLBSebvt0x0mn6eNNo0BmxqqSsaY0Zm6B0mKP22MOHizjtNbXYvz79Z3YHbnG_viDl8JbF4b9Vnl8oKREGz-TZEhFM8XBPNWt7tWz4_jkb-2cVIiNAy4pvI9sBIIR2PhXhra8v2ZVbz8xUXh47DkcGs-fh9YU3JEMfEuF2EDqJbHULCrpR56MhtMrVLM1IsfsQHrWA3SWrOSbGRmXJ7yr1K34mOTX96OCeonHrTthYJC-abWt98ZVHMwJ1dr1WRzOw1510KqFu0h-utwbxXJafRWEsk0yU0nZdZSoJ-2p0iv73pCTQiBW9uPfISP67XeLjW-3HdZwDn8k4Xj6zInW5BwdMWUtuT18Kx)

Dear Peter,
---
The Democrat Deep State wants **$146 MILLION** from me – all because I dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections.
---
To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up **_everything_** I own – including my dignity.
---
That’s why I have **officially _APPEALED_** this outrageous ruling that would leave me on the streets.
---
_As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater “heavenly treasures” await us._
---
Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth _infinitely_ more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen and will never rust, decay or lose their value.”
---
**And when I see that TWO of the rigged cases brought against President Trump have now been dismissed and “delayed indefinitely,” I have hope that I can win mine too!**
---
_But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind souls like you, Peter._
---
Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give if you can’t!
---
[**But if you can fund my battle to appeal this unjust ruling, please make a contribution of any amount to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund now that I’ve officially appealed this unjust ruling.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=9a4edab4d8bb4dc59bb93b2bb14209e3&_e=oVtZrYxn5E6fIK022vA-XlGSbBDjbSYjfTDHWPRsw34qd1I8tPG4CqPayd-atDG_9pP7KGLIcGRYRFTsADCqPvi5vSv89SLBSebvt0x0mn6eNNo0BmxqqSsaY0Zm6B0mKP22MOHizjtNbXYvz79Z3YHbnG_viDl8JbF4b9Vnl8oKREGz-TZEhFM8XBPNWt7tWz4_jkb-2cVIiNAy4pvI9sBIIR2PhXhra8v2ZVbz8xUXh47DkcGs-fh9YU3JEMfEuF2EDqJbHULCrpR56MhtMrVLM1IsfsQHrWA3SWrOSbFKiNDLankBbVJrVIST9fX6ioLwjYpaQwvNAzsjb1bU1lW0rte3lakTp4Yt5OpUWnvcEs3JDXnisjPiBsk9eTnIAzzXTmvDIkEf5PyEexJ_4AQjV5WDCMrAQs-Ii2nFA_rFDK7_rMP9JNnvcPOBUgvb)

name: EMILYs List
subject: Wish EMILYs List women a happy holiday season!
body:
From our pro-choice community: |
---

This holiday season, we're celebrating the nearly 300 incredible EMILYs List women who ran for office up and down the ballot in 2024. Win or lose, these candidates were dedicated to protecting our rights, expanding opportunities for families, and ensuring our voices are heard.

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
Speaker Johnson, YOU'RE DONE!
| [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=abb209a6427e41a49bb8b148c616f4fc&_e=6tlFUtZ_7DoUOFMzbLahns94oVYXQUvkgV8Jr_wzzmiy_jOLIOBRykuPiPM51TeD1wKYWW7c2302yYiM5N5kl_CD5S-vwxBdfyHFgTleYu00O2zAIibhWxZ4kEbB9AlNhTY_oZYOXhrF9v6n0tvfafq6nsgm53rtfvwbw2U5ij7U18y45Pic3DvmSWslYVyUAuXsJ-jnUp2p6oY31mejLCY9VtN7R18GaeLLxoxFk8fhC8k2CTV0wnHbWyfJ8jRH-sBBF1xjVXT7XyGRjsUe0ARQdHBJW_8Da2hg60rFrkJbqy71iFgPCZu8zS_WZNGMygNHTT23tRn41IgKQX0POQ%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

**If you vote for a pay raise for yourself while continuing to send MILLIONS overseas, it 's time for you to END YOUR TIME AS SPEAKER!

Mike Johnson NEEDS TO GO!**

With Mike Johnson as the Speaker of the House, we are NEVER going to pay off our debt. He needs to show some leadership. Allowing Democrats to shut the government down because he can't lead the House to a common-sense Continuing Resolution is SPINELESS!

_Our MAGA Movement is INEVITABLE - The People voted for change and gave us a MANDATE to Make America Great Again. Mike Johnson is no better than the Neocons who want to ignore the will of The People._

When these career politicians have done nothing but increase our debt and spend our tax dollars recklessly, THERE IS NO REASON TO GIVE THEM A PAY RAISE!

Mike Johnson is just thinking about his own wallet.

Every CR, debt ceiling, and con artist in DC must be identified and have a primary. MIKE JOHNSON HAS BEEN IDENTIFIED!

[**I NEED YOU TO STAND WITH ME! Royce White

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=abb209a6427e41a49bb8b148c616f4fc&_e=6tlFUtZ_7DoUOFMzbLahns94oVYXQUvkgV8Jr_wzzmiy_jOLIOBRykuPiPM51TeD1wKYWW7c2302yYiM5N5kl_CD5S-vwxBdfyHFgTleYu00O2zAIibhWxZ4kEbB9AlNhTY_oZYOXhrF9v6n0tvfafq6nsgm53rtfvwbw2U5ij7U18y45Pic3DvmSWslYVyUOawm8AMWcNEyXXjp9WYGLPCDPMAYQ5hfc7F6dxDGCcMLODyaBgVQ3c53MaK_3dxmefLclBiKYXZtRz_d7uKlBepUtQgrtlbXcF0J9kbc65YsE1338C_xq6QE9bo8Y-5WixgLPy8usREQ7L0s0K-1Ag%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=abb209a6427e41a49bb8b148c616f4fc&_e=6tlFUtZ_7DoUOFMzbLahns94oVYXQUvkgV8Jr_wzzmiy_jOLIOBRykuPiPM51TeD1wKYWW7c2302yYiM5N5kl_CD5S-vwxBdfyHFgTleYu00O2zAIibhWxZ4kEbB9AlNhTY_oZYOXhrF9v6n0tvfafq6nsgm53rtfvwbw2U5ij7U18y45Pic3DvmSWslYVyUsUaGMI7KBAVqmFgW3oA7Bd7svDzMXVbsxs1xmgoZGjrBgQoQ3WfMnvA36jibQJgObq3RRyHctR5PRHOAfQphQpquS1jXhtotJyi-h9zY9QnkbWyDWo5ZovflT3ya7W-KlvcW_YKX7d4fIuCsf-W7gQ%3D%3D)

name: Riley Gaines
subject: We’re on a slippery slope
body:
God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. | |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=abe148edc9e649cdabc35b549a88aa55&_e=NEBOZF-ySuP5F0nSRkIVYEG3gmHXfXr5eOCtxiip1SEJknNwnIYEInc44YgSHwNuSzdlbfHT8L5lew5XyB3gkZZh4jfLc8qib-ZJdHzNXkz3zWFkmNsCCCPoSydRcRh19R6zULFRqTAEjX77NYySSOLUlzok0-3sbacswXx-veF1loSE-Vn451oeIhHoNU70i3jKPCjin0W71iqBRxN2AReXYTXgNDtuysiPickW1KKSFmVChjiz7vIgTUVobTSPKqUU7W5lD--Dc6y0u6l31k0PFMguq7P4ZVwMk7eYhmr-9frEQkxn5f7bb71zLO91jGjagFlPpjkWUzri-HxntM5aiRzn0AA5BkHXzsJScaMSgucCE3XLYkn1xJMmevB1WLL0_lp0TpiQC5eZfy4SkQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=abe148edc9e649cdabc35b549a88aa55&_e=NEBOZF-ySuP5F0nSRkIVYEG3gmHXfXr5eOCtxiip1SEJknNwnIYEInc44YgSHwNuSzdlbfHT8L5lew5XyB3gkZZh4jfLc8qib-ZJdHzNXkz3zWFkmNsCCCPoSydRcRh19R6zULFRqTAEjX77NYySSOLUlzok0-3sbacswXx-veF1loSE-Vn451oeIhHoNU70i3jKPCjin0W71iqBRxN2AReXYTXgNDtuysiPickW1KKnrU7LJSAARjN0UlY7GScSVHbtjBEwHvwzdEwUiOEoOHS8oW4Psns56ftLKlDsEg6Hhfknb_uTlGVuHTKeyIeNLmx-0zkiHt3EZyWKVKzsSSmpYni_CfOKwF0B3Iz8KVQ9Ic0zvX4BqSSNYeNz-OvSI6T8j1VJInGygb_lj26DQA%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=abe148edc9e649cdabc35b549a88aa55&_e=NEBOZF-ySuP5F0nSRkIVYEG3gmHXfXr5eOCtxiip1SEJknNwnIYEInc44YgSHwNuSzdlbfHT8L5lew5XyB3gkZZh4jfLc8qib-ZJdHzNXkz3zWFkmNsCCCPoSydRcRh19R6zULFRqTAEjX77NYySSOLUlzok0-3sbacswXx-veF1loSE-Vn451oeIhHoNU70i3jKPCjin0W71iqBRxN2AReXYTXgNDtuysiPickW1KLKfbQiMegTOawydNiOzXCzHJmD88cc4VTHgw8eYq74PPkfbdLz3UO2ejK_ft1K8jbs_a9iSllbxgpuyYx0Y7qljmk5j2wPKrZfl2X1OMaLcns-7oFV-1NP9pFmFAKx09Pn9uLv8VaTZwI_SfZWn8Y6XJSM8-L_bKqGFsNzfMSjZA%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=abe148edc9e649cdabc35b549a88aa55&_e=NEBOZF-ySuP5F0nSRkIVYEG3gmHXfXr5eOCtxiip1SEJknNwnIYEInc44YgSHwNuSzdlbfHT8L5lew5XyB3gkZZh4jfLc8qib-ZJdHzNXkz3zWFkmNsCCCPoSydRcRh19R6zULFRqTAEjX77NYySSOLUlzok0-3sbacswXx-veF1loSE-Vn451oeIhHoNU70i3jKPCjin0W71iqBRxN2AReXYTXgNDtuysiPickW1KLcbgwygNzMH9DAsgljXOEntrovXWiaA01OaR5A1EUBgKZQghZU_2YoWgc6jpHEHdp5XnMUVUlk8XYvNFaaKVLR0WPFI1yfYxBD4_mbtrATUDpzXUTzvEJaShXWyBsgwelQ3smkz6Q6VGiUD1UFC2ilwv3_Q4Gs4sGhvfMOGqvSkw%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=abe148edc9e649cdabc35b549a88aa55&_e=NEBOZF-ySuP5F0nSRkIVYEG3gmHXfXr5eOCtxiip1SEJknNwnIYEInc44YgSHwNuSzdlbfHT8L5lew5XyB3gkZZh4jfLc8qib-ZJdHzNXkz3zWFkmNsCCCPoSydRcRh19R6zULFRqTAEjX77NYySSOLUlzok0-3sbacswXx-veF1loSE-Vn451oeIhHoNU70i3jKPCjin0W71iqBRxN2AReXYTXgNDtuysiPickW1KJW0dcg15guugOOt-Mx_0P1APGOGjga4VdokHxsYGeXH26y7w_qsbcO2LiS42hs8hl48b4hAWF15rEaBanOWLpVHG67QKaQ4p0nEys9QJsWwlBd5vlGTZpG9Mnr6fERJRFkIUmB6q8nAA6D3Y1-zfi0Ah75IQM_4AICiHsPwoVipg%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=abe148edc9e649cdabc35b549a88aa55&_e=NEBOZF-ySuP5F0nSRkIVYEG3gmHXfXr5eOCtxiip1SEJknNwnIYEInc44YgSHwNuSzdlbfHT8L5lew5XyB3gkZZh4jfLc8qib-ZJdHzNXkz3zWFkmNsCCCPoSydRcRh19R6zULFRqTAEjX77NYySSOLUlzok0-3sbacswXx-veF1loSE-Vn451oeIhHoNU70i3jKPCjin0W71iqBRxN2AReXYTXgNDtuysiPickW1KI4u6b8StgTdQLfDwnMzqwXWlqpbm3mbJ7gTfz-Rj7btv-04LQjSZ-O8AwaTayAlWnRpLs5JcvVn_8TSf17s50MYl9a6Dx5FtcvA8MN03K74mfiVpMocfP6F73jU2KuOOVUviZiqECkhceT2kd6U_vM_53UvBfa9NUuVcZHQb5kKQ%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=abe148edc9e649cdabc35b549a88aa55&_e=NEBOZF-ySuP5F0nSRkIVYEG3gmHXfXr5eOCtxiip1SEJknNwnIYEInc44YgSHwNuSzdlbfHT8L5lew5XyB3gkZZh4jfLc8qib-ZJdHzNXkz3zWFkmNsCCCPoSydRcRh19R6zULFRqTAEjX77NYySSOLUlzok0-3sbacswXx-veF1loSE-Vn451oeIhHoNU70i3jKPCjin0W71iqBRxN2AReXYTXgNDtuysiPickW1KKSHHQosQEFzE7kzKTSzpquB1rk5xT14F8Bbe3DCWrLSe5nYARdmYXgwlVTZ7AfVftPGaF5KGw78QKlm96lud0hSP3rkorIdV3IuL4fSHbpnm7cHeQ6lOHl9Klt8-Z9HZkqdFyygSVXkPRoUkpWbzHrUqUXNcQeyEIPT35JJ77vNA%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=abe148edc9e649cdabc35b549a88aa55&_e=NEBOZF-ySuP5F0nSRkIVYEG3gmHXfXr5eOCtxiip1SEJknNwnIYEInc44YgSHwNuSzdlbfHT8L5lew5XyB3gkZZh4jfLc8qib-ZJdHzNXkz3zWFkmNsCCCPoSydRcRh19R6zULFRqTAEjX77NYySSOLUlzok0-3sbacswXx-veF1loSE-Vn451oeIhHoNU70i3jKPCjin0W71iqBRxN2AReXYTXgNDtuysiPickW1KKNSE4KW5BNVfxG0K73zkZ1SgBms43bScg_di81iDoCnrU175dxNjbGb2267QBzjhpoKIh1wBDLYGw5Vpw409mq2MpEobs2TC8fokb9nzVA3ztGJhnG1AjLy3HzMXxl8ENMOm5CvPBwYdLJMo9wGmf3x8WMys0ccaphyLAG5_Pmdg%3D%3D)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=abe148edc9e649cdabc35b549a88aa55&_e=NEBOZF-ySuP5F0nSRkIVYEG3gmHXfXr5eOCtxiip1SEJknNwnIYEInc44YgSHwNuSzdlbfHT8L5lew5XyB3gkZZh4jfLc8qib-ZJdHzNXkz3zWFkmNsCCCPoSydRcRh19R6zULFRqTAEjX77NYySSOLUlzok0-3sbacswXx-veF1loSE-Vn451oeIhHoNU70i3jKPCjin0W71iqBRxN2AReXYTXgNDtuysiPickW1KIJh3ojALs2JndXRYY_NBAq_Y3j3AeSsP3N03h3u4kaZ4J5VCpD7er-XziCZ8ljk4RGiStc_gy7H11OYATE6BriL4RWVYh1CcgVeSeL_PUVa4dCNU6z3FF_0YyOpVjDYR9qLz77To_Th_2ZC_D6yGnKa-02gmp5dReCHRT-fQLgoQ%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=abe148edc9e649cdabc35b549a88aa55&_e=NEBOZF-ySuP5F0nSRkIVYEG3gmHXfXr5eOCtxiip1SEJknNwnIYEInc44YgSHwNuSzdlbfHT8L5lew5XyB3gkZZh4jfLc8qib-ZJdHzNXkz3zWFkmNsCCCPoSydRcRh19R6zULFRqTAEjX77NYySSOLUlzok0-3sbacswXx-veF1loSE-Vn451oeIhHoNU70i3jKPCjin0W71iqBRxN2AReXYTXgNDtuysiPickW1KJBJneBdBb56l9hBLmr_TVSt8QBngFmhJLiR5yyo9gMhNTDRgP1PUos74yjNtr_3YleCi3tmwsoVIOeGMY1Rw2nxCyrNHrDSJNB8WHfIV62iYOMoRm2-nlepgs3Z2UW06pitFXNNfzBE0G7URk9B79GQzAelOWq6a6J5Wp1b42A3A%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines
---
