clean_body: God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. | | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251

name: THREE SPECIAL ELECTIONS [From House GOP]
subject: Of all the emails you’ve received today, this is BY FAR the most important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
If we want to keep Christ in Christmas, defend American values, and keep our country safe, we need you to stay vigilant.
We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House – so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

| |
---
| | | Of all the emails you've received today, this is BY FAR the most important. Why? Because...

_We 're about to have a NEW Special Election in NY-21 for Elise Stefanik's seat, a NEW Special Election in FL-06 for Mike Waltz's seat, and a NEW Special Election in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat!_

**Remember:** We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House - so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

**Remember:** If they take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.

**Remember:** If they jam up Trump's agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE.

**_[Friend- we need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the year to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority. ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=0844e473b9454b68a0587b418f49e657&_e=Vl-t4eHN31SX1gPs2VLHjDgPOr1I-yl88o1ym7z1ivllPMdhgxq5tJJ63A_lWGx8LcIFwDS9dD1nLwJqtYZyVvdWq-x1oagjqxJKLGtnldLWj2e15MZc4eBZqs83qxvdKNR0WdlNBANlGIkXp_O8YbOJiV1vwdS6YtpoYrF0gkxjDUT0sai6xZamvqW6qEDbYEWIS2zv3yy-BWQKo9JxvrKAPeGmZdeuMLCadVTcewor6HPqTPWYKCeCmfhMDXQUixluGINAuXQJwKAn_-IdZQi9JL9XzdNg33vxwe28Em_BO6xF2L9hjYYwW7fZht94Xs3e3T9MefI9q3quthg0ViW93-k23g6XJmuEf-pyH6BC1CxtgcKkxEmL_uifMRGtaF172ojsRngzYiO9iuGs3Q%3D%3D "Friend – we’re racing to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three. We need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the year to help win these Special Elections and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority.")_**

If there was ever a moment to pitch in a few bucks, that moment is right now. Our Conservative House Majority - and the fate of President Trump's legislative agenda - hangs in the balance.
_***** CALLING ALL CONSERVATIVES *** **_
**THREE SPECIAL ELECTIONS**

Listen -

_This final deadline of 2024 was important before but now that our House Majority may depend on winning three Special Elections ..._

**THIS IS THE MOST IMPORTANT DEADLINE OF THE YEAR! **

Majority Leader Steve Scalise agreed that 20,000 more contributions is the bare minimum we need before the end of the year to help jumpstart our efforts to hold FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21.

Every contribution helps us refuel our voter contact budgets, recruit volunteers, and get our positive message out to voters - that's how we win key races like these.

Please don't underestimate the seriousness of the situation.

_**[Our deadline is closing in! We're PLEADING for your help right here and right now. ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=0844e473b9454b68a0587b418f49e657&_e=Vl-t4eHN31SX1gPs2VLHjDgPOr1I-yl88o1ym7z1ivllPMdhgxq5tJJ63A_lWGx8LcIFwDS9dD1nLwJqtYZyVvdWq-x1oagjqxJKLGtnldLWj2e15MZc4eBZqs83qxvdKNR0WdlNBANlGIkXp_O8YbOJiV1vwdS6YtpoYrF0gkxjDUT0sai6xZamvqW6qEDbYEWIS2zv3yy-BWQKo9JxvrKAPeGmZdeuMLCadVTcewor6HPqTPWYKCeCmfhMDXQUksmD6-EniYE1Ocp6EvwiiBqQ8lkXjcO6u3RtuUTEyx5Ik_kQDK2hHaKHmEg4kWtF1rcqAkaW0goBS2-PzdGkFtkWqP8nPuXuNDZUElgINbZ5cyrGyVBHCbdNTSIHMnR0cSBS_ZfDRnqTEwNJA8l1xg%3D%3D "Our deadline is closing in! We 're about to have a NEW Special Election in NY-21 for Elise Stefanik's seat, a NEW Special Election in FL-06 for Mike Waltz's seat, and a NEW Special Election in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat! Remember: We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House - so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House. Remember: If they jam up Trump's agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE. "Friend – we’re racing to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three. name: Bethany Hamilton
subject: Surfing Past Fear
body:
I was just 13 years old when I lost my arm in a shark attack. A lot of people thought I'd be too scared to ever surf again. | | | But the biggest reason I kept surfing was my belief that God had my back.
---
| | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=52bb04ce35104ea6bcc747f021cbe2be&_e=RDQvYH6BWZBiszR77rrYWcs_RGZw8b2n1yKObH6Tx4S-mn6I0rSVjLT98tn7wR1KJwjDXVJ4gKd2KmrgyDLOJaKFUXPK4JX9d54iHMWxQBbBMQU-1L05dUYUVDKBVquBzG-g_1mE9It5dgWUN-eJkNNM1LfD4hzjd0ZZi6pg3N7xi-P_ROEs7uv3uvsx7A7L7Q1cVBlOnihp-b-UlchbghAj18pzzOFW7hGWUGOG9s4SA_ccWf2q5-hs8Tpfmy3_IX0k2jty81-DqQaI5YvjfKo6xpdFQmpJX9y24dStVBGKTjtx7SgNiz5yHVVBCTdhFkA8knGiIhILC3O-eSIhuaC6hSLDsQbH9GlEH_RyX7VetuBY9Lp2dMEk2ZTUVJBT-aAW6TJ7Tn9X_uEYITSJkQ%3D%3D)

---
| | Dear Friend,I was just 13 years old when I lost my arm in a shark attack. A lot of people thought I'd be too scared to ever surf again. But just 4 weeks later I was back in the water.
---
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=52bb04ce35104ea6bcc747f021cbe2be&_e=RDQvYH6BWZBiszR77rrYWcs_RGZw8b2n1yKObH6Tx4S-mn6I0rSVjLT98tn7wR1KJwjDXVJ4gKd2KmrgyDLOJaKFUXPK4JX9d54iHMWxQBbBMQU-1L05dUYUVDKBVquBzG-g_1mE9It5dgWUN-eJkNNM1LfD4hzjd0ZZi6pg3N7xi-P_ROEs7uv3uvsx7A7L7Q1cVBlOnihp-b-UlchbghAj18pzzOFW7hGWUGOG9s4SA_ccWf2q5-hs8Tpfmy3_w3vj28sVAnvHk_bPUndcNa7MB7zgeSVOKY6mRU_wx07_dVVZySoFVuFG9G1B1eGZt_Xzh3lQLm8u6Qi1aJJ5HfuNQRPMTgEtePzxXgvhz6Rm7xqK48UQNdB6WqyoflxX_6M9s7u2a-Y9BfP5De4zWQ%3D%3D)

| | It was partly due to my parents’ unconditional support and my love of the ocean. But the biggest reason I kept surfing was my belief that God had my back. And I want more children to hear that message because too many of them are being trained up in fear, _not_ _faith_. That's why I wrote a children's book called "Surfing Past Fear" with an amazing Christian publisher called **Brave Books**. [**_I hope you'll consider giving a gift of $100 or any amount you can afford to support Brave Books_**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=52bb04ce35104ea6bcc747f021cbe2be&_e=RDQvYH6BWZBiszR77rrYWcs_RGZw8b2n1yKObH6Tx4S-mn6I0rSVjLT98tn7wR1KJwjDXVJ4gKd2KmrgyDLOJaKFUXPK4JX9d54iHMWxQBbBMQU-1L05dUYUVDKBVquBzG-g_1mE9It5dgWUN-eJkNNM1LfD4hzjd0ZZi6pg3N7xi-P_ROEs7uv3uvsx7A7L7Q1cVBlOnihp-b-UlchbghAj18pzzOFW7hGWUGOG9s4SA_ccWf2q5-hs8Tpfmy3_JHFa7Wp_5KEjj5Q0MnT-GiU7NWE0aWiRIyfvIfWSovhOZ8QwqM-95w-LPbnVWBE_tL3oKgQYviSu75X_x8wunqi_HunvjvBvtI9JGLQWY7t7V2S8vsw5y9DG3qC0uJ_JbUy2xpW-C9x4MustXXnW7Q%3D%3D) as they help parents raise strong, resilient, God-loving children. In courage,
---
| | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=52bb04ce35104ea6bcc747f021cbe2be&_e=RDQvYH6BWZBiszR77rrYWcs_RGZw8b2n1yKObH6Tx4S-mn6I0rSVjLT98tn7wR1KJwjDXVJ4gKd2KmrgyDLOJaKFUXPK4JX9d54iHMWxQBbBMQU-1L05dUYUVDKBVquBzG-g_1mE9It5dgWUN-eJkNNM1LfD4hzjd0ZZi6pg3N7xi-P_ROEs7uv3uvsx7A7L7Q1cVBlOnihp-b-UlchbghAj18pzzOFW7hGWUGOG9s4SA_ccWf2q5-hs8Tpfmy3_sl1KhUTcNAGXPcuGODoUqPpHaB_5HAcPpAkJjwfQ-XiZBabQ-Q629jHEiEqsZ0YMiPDMpwO10VgzvbDtwrq1zJjgqYDxBnOjJllkb4X8EsJiSU8EKnNzP7fto1Oi3AAkTCsYvcjWLc-v5ZI6AKo6wg%3D%3D)
---
**Bethany Hamilton** Professional Surfer and Mother

|

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Trump and Elon threw a fit

body:
We deserve better.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99038244/518635669/-211760203?refcode=EM_F_241220fit_N_SB_90DO_6_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjhkMzVjOS0wZWJmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_xgkAaQhpst3Kxxv7vfpXW7OORCPDYGq8moVfc15T6A=) Peter,

What’s happening in Congress right now, with the Musk Trump Choas, is a moment that comes down to whether or not we are fighting for working people or billionaires.

**We HAD a bipartisan deal. But then Trump and Elon Musk threw a fit.**

Republicans want a two-year free pass for Trump’s giveaways to the rich while removing previously bipartisan support for families in need and investments in health care, research, and agriculture.

Meanwhile, Democrats are voting for funding for SNAP, lower drug costs, medical research and treatment, and more.

**The American people shouldn’t bear the burden of petty partisan politics. While President Musk and his Vice President Trump push House Republicans toward a shutdown–risking farmers, veterans, and families–I’ll be here fighting for our future.**

clean_body: We deserve better. = Peter, What’s happening in Congress right now, with the Musk Trump Choas, is a moment that comes down to whether or not we are fighting for working people or billionaires. We HAD a bipartisan deal. But then Trump and Elon Musk threw a fit. Republicans want a two-year free pass for Trump’s giveaways to the rich while removing previously bipartisan support for families in need and investments in health care, research, and agriculture. Meanwhile, Democrats are voting for funding for SNAP, lower drug costs, medical research and treatment, and more. The American people shouldn’t bear the burden of petty partisan politics. While President Musk and his Vice President Trump push House Republicans toward a shutdown–risking farmers, veterans, and families–I’ll be here fighting for our future. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Together, Shontel Brown Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need? = Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress 545 E Town Street Columbus, OH 43215 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

We would like to congratulate State Senator Shelli Yoder on her election as Senate Minority Leader. She brings with her a career of advocacy for education, health care equity, and reproductive freedom. We know she will be a champion for working families and look forward to seeing her in this new role. ****_Victoria Spartz to Give Up Important Committee Assignments In New Term_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99038456/518636297/833644133?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjkwNTJhMS0wZmJmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OFCZ3kjL0Bjkl-iauM26dTpl0r1Kf1hFuSXaTNBT5uw=&emci=4c7744a3-e6be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=e69052a1-0fbf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=4925535)**[ Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99038457/518636298/833644133?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjkwNTJhMS0wZmJmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OFCZ3kjL0Bjkl-iauM26dTpl0r1Kf1hFuSXaTNBT5uw=&emci=4c7744a3-e6be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=e69052a1-0fbf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=4925535) Victoria Spartz is calling it quits on committee assignments and work related to hearing legislation before it reaches the House floor. Committee work is one of the most important aspects of the legislative process, where most bills are drafted and debated. She claims she’ll be too busy working for DOGE. All while her party has a tiny majority and she gets the same pay. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99038458/518636299/-864067666?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjkwNTJhMS0wZmJmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OFCZ3kjL0Bjkl-iauM26dTpl0r1Kf1hFuSXaTNBT5uw=&emci=4c7744a3-e6be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=e69052a1-0fbf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99038459/518636300/-864067666?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjkwNTJhMS0wZmJmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OFCZ3kjL0Bjkl-iauM26dTpl0r1Kf1hFuSXaTNBT5uw=&emci=4c7744a3-e6be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=e69052a1-0fbf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=4925535) State Rep. Victoria Garcia Wilburn is expected to file a bill tasking the state sexual assault response team to produce a report, in part, to identify solutions to addressing the untested rape kits in the state. Indiana has over 6,000 untested kits while other states have zero. The bipartisan proposal has the support of both Republican and Democratic county prosecutors in Hamilton and Marion counties. The report will assist lawmakers on where best to dedicate funding. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** State Senator Shelli Yoder Elected as Senate Minority Leader Indiana Senate Democrats chose a new Senate Minority leader this week — State Senator Shelli Yoder of Monroe County. We would like to congratulate State Senator Shelli Yoder on her election as Senate Minority Leader. She brings with her a career of advocacy for education, health care equity, and reproductive freedom. We know she will be a champion for working families and look forward to seeing her in this new role. Victoria Spartz to Give Up Important Committee Assignments In New Term Victoria Spartz is calling it quits on committee assignments and work related to hearing legislation before it reaches the House floor. Committee work is one of the most important aspects of the legislative process, where most bills are drafted and debated. She claims she’ll be too busy working for DOGE. All while her party has a tiny majority and she gets the same pay. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. State Rep. Victoria Garcia Wilburn is expected to file a bill tasking the state sexual assault response team to produce a report, in part, to identify solutions to addressing the untested rape kits in the state. Indiana has over 6,000 untested kits while other states have zero. The bipartisan proposal has the support of both Republican and Democratic county prosecutors in Hamilton and Marion counties. The report will assist lawmakers on where best to dedicate funding. ** Get Involved! Opportunities After the Election As we move past the 2024 Election, it is imperative that we unite together to create a better future for our state. One of the best ways to do that is to help us rebuild our party and grow in the coming months and years. Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Thursday, January 9th from 1-2 pm ET for a free virtual live training on So You Want to Run for Office. name: Ro Khanna
subject: A major victory in the fight against child abuse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

I’m proud to announce that the Stop Institutional Child Abuse Act is officially headed to President Biden’s desk.

The Stop Institutional Child Abuse Act, a bill I introduced last year, tackles abuse and neglect in the so-called “troubled teen” industry. Paris Hilton, a survivor of this abuse, spoke out about her experience and inspired change.

https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/1869500082707726660 [https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/1869500082707726660]

Each year, tens of thousands of children are neglected, abused, and exploited by an industry that sells itself as a solution for troubling behavior while traumatizing those in its care. Survivors of residential treatment centers have recounted experiences with physical and sexual assault, emotional abuse, medical neglect, and a denial of basic civil rights. Some facilities have even engaged in practices such as solitary confinement and forced labor.

The atrocities inflicted in these institutions have caused lifelong trauma for those who lived through it, as well as pain and suffering for those whose loved ones never came home.

We owe it to all children to ensure they are cared for and respected. I’m honored to have worked across the aisle to bring reform to a system that has failed families for decades.

Onward,
Ro

Wait! One more thing–

Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.

If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!

name: Dr. Asif Mahmood
subject: Happy Holidays!
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us14.campaign-archive.com/?e=7b1b739a89&u=306598b2f3a0f328de4c6676e&id=e265a5aafd)
---
| | | |
---
|
Dear Friends and Family,
As we come together to celebrate this wonderful season, I want to take a moment to wish you all a Merry Christmas, Happy Hanukkah and a Joyous New Year. This time of year reminds us of the blessings we share, and I am truly grateful for each of you.
In the spirit of giving, I want to highlight two remarkable organizations that are making a significant impact in our communities. [_**The Organization for Social Media Safety **_](https://drasifmahmood.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=306598b2f3a0f328de4c6676e&id=91a05feb41&e=7b1b739a89)is dedicated to combating the widespread bigotry and hate that permeate our online spaces. Their critical work protects individuals from dangers like cyberbullying and mental health crises.
Equally important is [**Hope the Mission**](https://drasifmahmood.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=306598b2f3a0f328de4c6676e&id=fc643837f1&e=7b1b739a89) , an organization striving to eliminate poverty, hunger, and homelessness. Their commitment to providing immediate assistance and long-term solutions upholds the dignity of every individual in need. Their impactful work has transformed thousands of lives by providing shelter, meals, and essential services to those facing adversity in our community.
As a member of the Board of Directors for both organizations, I have witnessed firsthand the transformative impact of their work. This holiday season, as we reflect on our blessings, I urge you to consider making a donation to support these essential causes. Your generosity has the power to create lasting change and uplift our most vulnerable neighbors, helping to build stronger, more resilient communities. For more information, please click on the links above, and to make a meaningful contribution, use the buttons below. Together, we can make a profound difference.
Thank you for being part of my life. Wishing you all love, joy, and peace during this festive season and throughout the coming year.
Sincerely,
Asif

---
[Donate to Org. For Social Media Safety](https://drasifmahmood.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=306598b2f3a0f328de4c6676e&id=f7a327b9ff&e=7b1b739a89)

name: Sean Feucht
subject: Christmas caroling at the White House 🙏🏽🎄🔥🎵
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=59075b084eee4df391a371bc4ad3e08a&_e=Vt0SlBqZvGKqIkEJgR0ji5EaKX-ceEKhpCKjpxTZbhUmYcSz3yh53pC8LXfW6vZyrLkE1SlMD6QmetpRJEuCv5lJZHfxPHFHwItxLh-TB9DXEkuM4jqnf7ZaFAJKuVdpge_LVCimMFh-64KOw9wGWM3AORE0YLeU_KZUtGyq6yU4r8UM0nY4f9squ-y3g6uqE6GJJe3-GA0Df0zcLZSAyk-8P3bsdE3rq0BLC1nFJ-B7HZTn0d4cLLLs0Sgm2iiU1QGTn-TntqZmphbpv_jHawkGB8OnXqVDkHttDc097VminKFxRl6aa-xcN9ZL2l2GIXVywy_rnJH3FhiYCOuNVA%3D%3D)

Dear Friend,
---
It's the CHRISTmas season, and we bring the worship wherever we go, even the White House! The current Administration is a "Happy Holidays" administration, not a "Merry Christmas" Administration, so we wanted to remind them of the real reason for the season!! There's a new season coming in Washington, where "Merry Christmas" is the norm, and the reason for Christmas is celebrated. We're helping launch that season with an Inauguration Worship event on January 19th! Get more information and **[RSVP HERE](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=59075b084eee4df391a371bc4ad3e08a&_e=Vt0SlBqZvGKqIkEJgR0ji5EaKX-ceEKhpCKjpxTZbhV4mbyrHhKxG-TNYgoDxUgFvTT6t-RS7-LCxwmMC_PxpHf13A2GB6PRbP8ppwIwnhllasNHjw1myE3zwI9EKjsMgRIv6CA4rec0a_NU53Vb0IilhgGmyablLC5Sssg1HHg7Utlr7Tb6Xpzqd4A1Kf_zPsIerfXDMsr71fjsoSrirpAvJdlXM-xl0mnjq5VIIrMmoqCEZddXSiytZ0lEoCMDfMIxOqckGNYkyIY0GXMzueAq6dSeG93J3sM0BeIM8tN5Kayiez9NmWzf1OQMj9e9xSC_u7S_3hJVOu8mFmN9Xg%3D%3D)**. You MUST register if you want to attend! _**WATCH THE BOLD WHITE HOUSE WORSHIP BELOW⬇️⬇️⬇️**_
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=59075b084eee4df391a371bc4ad3e08a&_e=Vt0SlBqZvGKqIkEJgR0ji5EaKX-ceEKhpCKjpxTZbhUmYcSz3yh53pC8LXfW6vZyrLkE1SlMD6QmetpRJEuCv5lJZHfxPHFHwItxLh-TB9DXEkuM4jqnf7ZaFAJKuVdpge_LVCimMFh-64KOw9wGWM3AORE0YLeU_KZUtGyq6yW0GSigbuGq-TZTkCdEUDBxBOginJ7gznQdZjP2jgxm5lInU3bNL2e6BMD4veko_ZmViYUxIPvSXk7FllYQtUty3HLPXWX5yyqCA8--Bnbd5aAvmlaZyYdusDl5MYDf4cnL_JFXUW98__zJ2Og2MTkA2WUEIm7ye6C3_OL8JAA3jQ%3D%3D)

_🎶Joy to the world the Lord is come_
_Let earth receive her king_
_Let every heart prepare Him room_
_And heaven and nature sing_
_And heaven and nature sing_
_And heaven and Heaven and nature sing🎶_
---
[**SUPPORT THE LET US WORSHIP >>>**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=59075b084eee4df391a371bc4ad3e08a&_e=Vt0SlBqZvGKqIkEJgR0ji5EaKX-ceEKhpCKjpxTZbhUmYcSz3yh53pC8LXfW6vZyrLkE1SlMD6QmetpRJEuCv5lJZHfxPHFHwItxLh-TB9DXEkuM4jqnf7ZaFAJKuVdpge_LVCimMFh-64KOw9wGWM3AORE0YLeU_KZUtGyq6yU2FwXpV9WLV0BrXUZp1kXlJR7tsPeYd38nwrJFTjeY1I6TVAWRLajGEGnQff78BGwSYlzki4jz88sSgFA2xEhvJcQ-OIpMwU23o40QAqPUtYlVh-TR4g_kekybWlro_eu5CaKJgKJSEqBROmNEGWMtgUKmU45Uc7dEmQ_2O5OKUg%3D%3D)

Sean

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Shutdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
What a mess.
#
Congress has only a few more hours to pass legislation to avoid a government shutdown.
From what Alexandria has shared, it's not going well.
* * *
We'll keep you posted as this develops.
In solidarity,
Team AOC
Alexandria didn’t come to Congress to look the other way when members of both parties get spooked by the billionaire class.**

# [Meet the Team - Dana and Sara](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=153424646&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNDI0NjQ2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzQ3Mjc3MzMsImV4cCI6MTczNzMxOTczMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.pbxzEXmntWc8YdSO_t13uWIbt2veFACrIHTtRx0wYhA)
### No Money, No Mission
| | [Andy Roth](https://substack.com/@sfcn)
---
| Dec 20
---
| [](https://substack.com/@sfcn)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=153424646&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNDI0NjQ2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzQ3Mjc3MzMsImV4cCI6MTczNzMxOTczMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.pbxzEXmntWc8YdSO_t13uWIbt2veFACrIHTtRx0wYhA)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/sfcn/p/meet-the-team-dana-and-sara?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)

Friends,
The State Freedom Caucus Network has grown rapidly over the last three years, so we thought it would be a good idea to introduce ourselves to all the new supporters and followers. If you missed our last two emails, we did a short Q&A with the [Network's President, Andy Roth](https://substack.com/redirect/a674c764-5533-439d-98b7-bc9802d03280?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [Senior Vice President Justin Ouimette](https://substack.com/redirect/bf945469-88cf-4e15-a905-b97dd7431c22?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
This week is our dynamic Development Duo, Dana Craycroft and Sara Prinzi, who are responsible for helping us fund our amazing efforts. Enjoy!
* * *
**DANA CRAYCROFT**
**What is your role at SFCN?**__ Vice President of Development
**Where are you from originally? Where do you live now?**__ I grew up in the small town of Earth, Texas-- pop. 1,001! It's a farming community in the Panhandle just south of Amarillo. After college, I spent time living in Washington, DC and Virginia while working in conservative politics, but I'm a Texas girl at heart and settled in Dallas before recently getting married and moving to the Austin area.
**Tell us about your family! And pets!** I just got married two weeks ago! My husband Greg and I met on a right-wing dating website a year and a half ago (neither of us wanted to use a dating app that asked for your pronouns!). Greg has spent his career in law enforcement and currently works as Campus Security Manager for a large Christian church and PreK-12 private school. Greg (and now I) have a German Shorthaired Pointer bird-dog named Annie and a 15 year old cat named Jihad. My sweet chihuahua-terrier Fitz passed away this summer and I don't think I can ever replace him!
**What's the best part of your job?** After spending the majority of my career raising money for candidates' campaigns that come and go, I enjoy seeing the vision and long-term investment of our donors in organizing a Network throughout the states that will be a haven for conservatives and freedom-fighters for years to come.
**How did you come to SFCN? What did you do before?**__ I was Texas Finance Director for Sen. Ted Cruz when he ran for President in 2016. Alongside that, I worked as a Fundraising Consultant for numerous campaigns from State House and Senate to Congress to Attorney General. While I will always love campaigns and elections, experiencing the constant "running" and changing tides of each cycle made me want to be involved in buliding something that would serve as a stalwart for my values after the first Tuesday in November. SFCN is just that, and lucky for me, SFCN Pres. Andy Roth and I had mutual colleagues from Cruz and Club for Growth.
**Who or what most shaped your political philosophy/ideology?** My Mom and Rush Limbaugh!
**Pick One To Answer: Favorite food? Favorite place to vacation? Favorite Book? Favorite Quote?**__ At the risk of being cliche, I have to go with Ronald Reagan's 1967 Inagural Address: _"Freedom is a fragile thing and it's never more than one generation away from extinction. It is not ours by way of inheritance; it must be fought for and defended constantly by each generation, for it comes only once to a people. And those in world history who have known freedom and then lost it have never known it again."_
You can reach Dana at dana@statefreedomcaucus.org or (214) 605-8370.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6e367d4a-52e5-4239-b726-079a4d2c73e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**SARA PRINZI**
**What is your role at SFCN?** I am the Senior Director of Fundraising
**Where are you from originally? Where do you live now?** I am originally from Ohio; but 11 years ago moved to East Tennessee, but I am still a Buckeye when it comes to college football!
**Tell us about your family! And pets!** I am married to my high school sweetheart, I have 2 daughters and I will be a grandma (Omie) in 2025. We have sooo many animals; 3 horses (all rescues), 6 dogs, 4 cats, and a pot bellied pig. We will add this spring to our hobby farm ducks and chickens as soon as construction is finished on their house. At one time we had 27 animals including a fox, cows, lamb, bunnies and goats.
**What's the best part of your job?** The best part of my job is seeing the wins our lawmakers are having and the impact it has on saving our states and country. Getting to talk with passionate supporters and showing them the many ways they can support us is so rewarding.
**How did you come to SFCN? What did you do before?** I came from PragerU as a Vice President of Development; PragerU has a great message and product but I don't believe we have 20 years to save this country with education and felt led to seek out an organization making big changes, right now! Those changes and the fight for our freedom are being won with the State Freedom Caucuses.
**Who or what most shaped your political philosophy/ideology?** I was raised in a very liberal household - I voted for Bill Clinton when I was 18. As I became a mother, practicing Christian, and a business owner my eyes were opened. My values and moral compass only align with one party. I have lost friends and family members over making these changes and becoming more vocal and outspoken. We can no longer be the "silent" majority.
**Pick One To Answer: Favorite food? Favorite place to vacation? Favorite Book? Favorite Quote?** My favorite place to vacation is somewhere new; I love exploring a new place, culture, and food. I got to check off Ireland this year and have been planning this vacation in my head since I was 13 and my grandmother showed me our genealogy, pictures, letters, and photos.
You can reach Sara at sprinzi@statefreedomcaucus.org or (865) 936-4364.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/80cfad85-97d1-410c-bdef-16e7d27bcbee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/59d6613e-56eb-4ad5-8f63-c5938344e698?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Keep fighting,**

_Andrew Roth
President
State Freedom Caucus Network_
P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider [a contribution](https://substack.com/redirect/59d6613e-56eb-4ad5-8f63-c5938344e698?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.
You're currently a free subscriber to [State Freedom Caucus Network](https://substack.com/redirect/2d53efcd-e461-48d3-9620-97cc24f11b41?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For the full experience, [upgrade your subscription.](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.tidI9IslbDLpt-29CWPy8CG8agYS7CbUUv_xmUSws4Q?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.tidI9IslbDLpt-29CWPy8CG8agYS7CbUUv_xmUSws4Q?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

name: Mark Huizenga
subject: Merry Christmas!
body:
2024 was a great electoral year but

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/brightsparkstrategies/up-next-the-michigan-senate-11035279?e=9ec31248a9)
---
| | | |
---
| Friend,
Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays!
As 2024 comes to a close, we have a lot to reflect on. In the Senate, Republicans spent the year playing whack-a-mole and fighting against bad policy initiative after bad policy initiative put forth by the Democrats. More recently, we are coming off a lame duck legislative session where Democrats, about to lose the House majority and their complete control of state government, couldn’t even garner the necessary votes from their own members to pass anything. The Democrats continue to show Michigan residents why they shouldn’t be asked to lead. Their lame-duck agenda included bills that would allow people without legal documentation to obtain driver’s licenses, bills that would enter Michigan into the National Popular Vote compact, and a mandatory fee on all water bills statewide.
Thankfully, 2024 proved to be a good election year and House Republicans, with the help of Take it Back Super PAC, were able to secure a majority for the next legislative session. This means that Governor Whitmer and legislative Democrats won’t be able to rubber stamp her policy wish-list without objection or debate. The voters were clear and conservative lawmakers will not forget the mandate given them on November 5th. People want leaders that put the American people first, not partisan hacks full of lip service worrying about their next election.
Looking ahead to 2025, we must start the hard work of making the case for Senate Republicans to regain control of the Michigan Senate with voters. That means we must listen to voters in every corner of the state and hear what they need from their elected officials. Our work won’t come easy, but it is work worth doing.
Now, enjoy some time with your family and friends and Happy New Year. But when January rolls around, the hard work begins. If you know someone who would like to join us in the fight, please encourage them to sign up for these emails [here](https://takeitbackmi.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f3a7dccdb3ca90c7483cf93d3&id=4c859ed4f5&e=9ec31248a9).
Until 2025,
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| Senator Roger Hauck Senator Mark Huizenga
---
[DONATE TODAY!](https://takeitbackmi.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f3a7dccdb3ca90c7483cf93d3&id=3eeee2543e&e=9ec31248a9)

## Stop stupid....
I wish I could feel bad for Congress right now but I don't. They have a job to do and for too long -- actually forever - they have been kicking the can down the unpaved, pot holed filled road.
Our country is $36 Trillion (Trillion - not Billion) - we run a $2 Trillion yearly deficit - we spend OVER a Trillion on interest payments on the debt and they wanted to pass a 1547 page bill to keep the government funding for 3 months -- a bill almost no one read or even had someone else read. Until Vivek and Elon tweeted about it they were all happy to vote yes and get out of Dodge.
The bill included a raise for members of Congress, allowed them to opt out of the Obamacare exchanges and moved the Commanders NFL stadium.
Once it was discovered what was in the bill they all feigned outrage.
It doesn't have to be this way
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/eda74fe0-3eb0-451b-83c7-264aef88b7d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

name: Team Fetterman
subject: No distractions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We’re still a month away from Trump’s inauguration and Washington’s already in chaos.
#
Derek, we're still a month out from Trump’s inauguration and Washington’s already in chaos.
Mike Johnson negotiated a deal with Senate leaders and the White House to continue funding the government. But would you believe it? At the last minute, Republicans reneged on their deal.
**Never seen that one before! 😱**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241220?refcode=em20241220-9710&refcode2=9710_434096_WaGeaj&akid=9710%2E434096%2EWaGeaj)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241220?amount=5&refcode=em20241220-9710&refcode2=9710_434096_WaGeaj&akid=9710%2E434096%2EWaGeaj)**
Look, they’re gonna pull this stuff _constantly_ over the next four years. And we can’t get distracted every time they do. No matter what, John will always fight for:
* **Higher wages** and **lower costs** for workers
* **LGBTQ+ rights** and **reproductive freedoms**
* **Accessible and affordable health care** for _everyone_

But he can’t do it without YOUR grassroots support.
[**Derek, will you pitch in $5 to help John keep this seat 🔵 and fight for everyone in all 67 PA counties?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241220?refcode=em20241220-9710&refcode2=9710_434096_WaGeaj&akid=9710%2E434096%2EWaGeaj)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241220?amount=5&refcode=em20241220-9710&refcode2=9710_434096_WaGeaj&akid=9710%2E434096%2EWaGeaj)**
— Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20241220-9710-footer&t=1&refcode2=9710_434096_WaGeaj&akid=9710%2E434096%2EWaGeaj)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

The Democrat judge overseeing the sham case against President Trump in New York just issued a ruling to keep in place a **[GAG ORDER](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=dcb530c061e54cf3bcacef0d837f1042&_e=4ag7bwd0Ty7UEc86Xc2MZZzDALUYDArpKniI_YEhzK5qN9MhYHkiy40tHGZASODQZEaaswWnHiWp5lVllHtH5dJi05LdZZnTunHKRpZkn42kkIXbFl9d8O-QQqoKx-AGv-k3r9WkdwGpIDSjmVffWWgj9oJQWYyqv0XEkfxb3UPzbLBHejYzJBPeRaOr4TeYVt-4P2bNJ-6whJqVV6RRWZXJ3ujUnqxsEH3KZEhVea_t36Fh5O1u_Xn4dV1lEP47LsNG8Akgs4aaNtxe5Wj5EolE3Ymvll5NN3fGC7yegL2SJL_tQXyWGAFeoYUMJIfyEfPn2P5KfQz07MYQZ4TE3dnu59vX8wQic_LJlDOzXoboz7NdzepxlwsdM6FxJn3l9pONNmGclchCe87MhL82l5c3INcLsKXGVguwzHYkzADLa_VNmVw6VzvchxuleU0hUiEXxJyMDpKr23hZh19fliyJavdJnS6EClvYrwRrIPe3zuzCRwjz7HKh05RVWQs8)** on the President-elect.

As President Trump himself said:

body:
We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House – so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

| |
---
| | | Of all the emails you've received today, this is BY FAR the most important. Why? Because...

_We 're about to have a NEW Special Election in NY-21 for Elise Stefanik's seat, a NEW Special Election in FL-06 for Mike Waltz's seat, and a NEW Special Election in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat!_

**Remember:** We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House - so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

**Remember:** If they take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.

**Remember:** If they jam up Trump's agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE.

**_[Friend- we need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the year to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority. ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8a104921506b4e10883d1a4295656a90&_e=SlOGCH7s3H2ieqMm1JpwQeRCGLu2KbYkodG69cB3AmC07RPLrMnro2gDecHulkKPpE8sThOcCOx_5K-OEykTAIInPNN1jFseIaVt0zqwJECFghBMT6FuPlykCCblvb8ovXEAfVnMBJNsiRnI4BhbZhc_XReq0jO0AVudYmxgmHAn0FG3DZDTU4nls8k5Mct8GxSvoHGgU06cSWY_GQW-jqCCAk3mC6NYpEkL9YFW27B3Ly60GCcWW9YCNNvwh2j1tFmG155fIStNc5sQvzCtLnZ674EaDf6bNhYfVkHPG6uJLZYWHUmtWnOOUF0CI0WC3Ho4KhevzNURhPilJz2CVjc4Z_KtortEj4VDhXacIqu8y63WzntZAq3oMYMNyCfsyLqlUUbuquxpyMyORxAz7U32kCDWfrz9DNtFSpE2gdZcPqkj8XwJgZj3hw5-9SZ4DdowngFYQXMOPqDIAPOx9Q%3D%3D "Friend – we’re racing to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three. name: Team Jayapal
subject: Did you catch Pramila’s op-ed in Newsweek?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Democrats have a monumental task ahead of us.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241220-4606-footer&t=1&akid=4606%2E420207%2E6jCWWM)
Peter, did you catch Pramila's recent op-ed in _Newsweek?_
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/48341?t=2&akid=4606%2E420207%2E6jCWWM) _“To win back working class and poor voters of every race, it's past time for a rebuild of the Democratic Party. We must urgently and authentically communicate to people that we will stand up for them, and we must clearly paint a vision of how we will unrig the system so we can actually deliver results that make people's lives better every day.”_
**[Read the full editorial](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/48341?t=3&akid=4606%2E420207%2E6jCWWM)**
---
[**If you’re ready to rebuild the Democratic Party around a lasting coalition of working class voters of every race, pitch in $3 now to help.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241220?refcode=em20241220-4606&amount=3&refcode2=4606_420207_6jCWWM&akid=4606%2E420207%2E6jCWWM)
We’re just one month away from the inauguration, and **Democrats have a monumental task ahead of us** in fighting back against the worst of Trump’s policies _and_ in rebuilding our party.
As Pramila says in the op-ed, _“If we do not acknowledge the depth of the problem, we may win a battle in two years if the House switches control, but we will lose the battle of winning the trifecta and any chance of real sustained progress for our country.”_
That’s why we’re doing everything we can to end the influence of corporate PACs in Democratic primaries, get Big Money out of politics, and organize the entire party around a bold, populist agenda.
**But since Pramila doesn’t take corporate PAC money, she’s counting on your grassroots support to win this fight.**
[**Peter, can we count on you to pitch in $3 or more today and help us put the Democratic Party on the path back to power?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241220?refcode=em20241220-4606&amount=3&refcode2=4606_420207_6jCWWM&akid=4606%2E420207%2E6jCWWM)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241220?amount=3&refcode=em20241220-4606&refcode2=4606_420207_6jCWWM&akid=4606%2E420207%2E6jCWWM)**
Together,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241220-4606-footer&t=4&refcode2=4606_420207_6jCWWM&akid=4606%2E420207%2E6jCWWM)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=5&akid=4606%2E420207%2E6jCWWM)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=4606%2E420207%2E6jCWWM)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Sarah McBride
subject: One thing Donald Trump and I agree on:
body:
[1]Sarah McBride - Democrat for Congress

Let’s start
with what Donald Trump and I agree on:

Donald Trump agrees with me that there are bigger issues in this country
to focus on than which bathroom someone else uses, according to his recent
interview with Time magazine.

That’s where the agreement ends — if you can even believe him on that.

Today marks one month until Donald Trump’s second inauguration, and I hope
he’s true to his word — because there are plenty of things we need to get
done for the American people, and I’m committed to delivering results for
workers and retirees.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241220-1?refcode=em20241220-1632&refcode2=1632_21716_6kdA4K&akid=1632%2E21716%2E6kdA4K ]But we know the fight ahead won’t be easy, and I need your help to
ensure our movement is equipped with the resources we need to stand up for
working people. Will you chip in right now?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241220-1?refcode=em20241220-1632&refcode2=1632_21716_6kdA4K&akid=1632%2E21716%2E6kdA4K ]Donate »

No matter who holds power in the White House — or Congress — my priority
remains the same: rolling up my sleeves, diving into the details, and
tackling the challenges that matter most to Delawareans.

From protecting Social Security and Medicare to making the American dream
more affordable and accessible, I’m committed to making bold progress for
the people who count on us.

But we also know what’s coming.

Donald Trump will be sworn back into office in just a few weeks alongside
a new Republican-controlled Congress. We must be prepared to push back
against their harmful policies and expose their distractions for what they
are.

Because they WILL try to distract us from the fact that they’re picking
the pockets of American workers and fleecing seniors by trying to
privatize critical programs like Social Security and Medicare.

I am focused, and I am ready. But I need to know we
have the funds to fight back as soon as Donald Trump sets foot in the Oval
Office: [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241220-1?refcode=em20241220-1632&refcode2=1632_21716_6kdA4K&akid=1632%2E21716%2E6kdA4K ]With one month until he does, will you chip in
$5 or more right now?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241220-1?refcode=em20241220-1632&refcode2=1632_21716_6kdA4K&akid=1632%2E21716%2E6kdA4K ]Donate »

Thanks,

Sarah McBride
Congresswoman-elect

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.sarahmcbride.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1632%2E21716%2E6kdA4K

name: Team Mazie
subject: We must stay in the fight together.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, As Democrats, and as people who care deeply about our working families, our planet, our freedoms, and our future, it has been a deeply painful and troubling time. Donald Trump won re-election and Republicans gained control of the Senate and the House. Trump has — as expected — nominated right-wing billionaires and MAGA loyalists to his cabinet and other important government agencies. _After years of divisive rhetoric, devastating blows to our fundamental rights, and endless political stunts, it’s clear that this election will have severe consequences for the values and people we hold dear._ **But we cannot give up now. We must stay the course.** No matter what happens next, Mazie is going to continue speaking out against extremism and fighting for her progressive agenda for all Americans. She needs you to stay in this fight with her — just like you always have, Peter. [**So please, add your name to show Mazie you’re still in this fight with her. We wouldn’t be where we are today, and the victories ahead of us can’t be won without you. It would mean so much to Mazie to know you’re with her for the long haul.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99040837/518643578/1418427750?contactdata=VBloE/GdyuJ29VH6+MRbFC2fE6cboxWCsUKsWjDkkQrk7rC6MJgrmENIYsPu5FIQ4zgyAelezB+nvv4ygwLXX5xH3D4gcvIejbsBGOncLnH4srZY2kooWcBkXTzohtnbYcsJmLfOnPBOfEsxCoZTosYaP185sdvk/Lt9H8w9HQM=&refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241220_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTdkYTA3Ni0xN2JmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TRb3WmOUHu-B70-3_iJu2kB-B-TKDP2rnc0PPRwVcrM=&emci=60d29f0b-5fbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=6e7da076-17bf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=23190490) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99040838/518643579/1418427750?contactdata=VBloE/GdyuJ29VH6+MRbFC2fE6cboxWCsUKsWjDkkQrk7rC6MJgrmENIYsPu5FIQ4zgyAelezB+nvv4ygwLXX5xH3D4gcvIejbsBGOncLnH4srZY2kooWcBkXTzohtnbYcsJmLfOnPBOfEsxCoZTosYaP185sdvk/Lt9H8w9HQM=&refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241220_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTdkYTA3Ni0xN2JmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TRb3WmOUHu-B70-3_iJu2kB-B-TKDP2rnc0PPRwVcrM=&emci=60d29f0b-5fbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=6e7da076-17bf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=23190490)

**Remember:** If they take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.

**Remember:** If they jam up Trump's agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE.

Folks, I’ve never been afraid to speak my mind. That’s why I was unapologetic about supporting President Biden’s decision to pardon his son, Hunter. As someone who practiced criminal defense for years before coming to Congress, take it from me: **That was a partisan, political prosecution.** I’ve never seen anything like it all my years as an attorney, and any prosecutor acting in good faith would not have pursued the charges. **But ever since President Biden announced his decisions, disingenuous and hypocritical Republicans have been having a meltdown** — even though Donald Trump is a convicted criminal who abused the pardon power to give his friends and cronies a get-out-of-jail free card when he was last President. **I’m sick to death of the double standards and fake outrage. Peter,

We’re one month away from Donald Trump being sworn in as president, and we’re already seeing what the next 4 years will hold: **chaos**.

If you haven’t been following along, here’s a quick breakdown to get you up to speed:

The current Republican-led House rolled out their draft continuing resolution, which is a piece of legislation that allows the government to stay open and fully funded. Because Republicans hold a majority in the House — THEY drafted the bill.

This would all lead you to believe that this bill would pass easily right? The majority party drafted the bill. Unfortunately, Peter, Elon Musk & Donald Trump have decided that this bill is a non-starter, and are even advocating for leaving the government closed until the inauguration.

Donald Trump hasn’t even taken office yet, and they’re playing games with the average American’s livelihood. name: Dan Carr
subject: Time for a Bill-by-Bill Federal Budget:
body:
Restoring Transparency and Accountability

| |
---|---|---
|
# Time for a Bill-by-Bill Federal Budget:
### Restoring Transparency and Accountability
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
| Dec 20
---
| [](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
For too long, Congress has relied on massive omnibus spending bills to fund the federal government. These bills, often spanning thousands of pages, are rushed through the legislative process with minimal debate or scrutiny. They bundle together funding for critical programs with unrelated pet projects and wasteful expenditures, leaving little room for accountability. It is time to fix this broken process by adopting a bill-by-bill approach to the federal budget. A bill-by-bill budget means that each government program or department would have its funding debated and voted on individually.

clean_body: Restoring Transparency and Accountability | | ---|---|--- | Time for a Bill-by-Bill Federal Budget: Restoring Transparency and Accountability | | | | Dec 20 | For too long, Congress has relied on massive omnibus spending bills to fund the federal government. These bills, often spanning thousands of pages, are rushed through the legislative process with minimal debate or scrutiny. They bundle together funding for critical programs with unrelated pet projects and wasteful expenditures, leaving little room for accountability. It is time to fix this broken process by adopting a bill-by-bill approach to the federal budget. A bill-by-bill budget means that each government program or department would have its funding debated and voted on individually. Dan Carr (C) 2024 Dan Carr 18237 Hwy 53, Gulfport, MS 39503 ? ?

| | _Attacks on voting rights and our elections. Threats to our reproductive rights. Calls for cutting the Department of Education. Expanding the use of the death penalty._ This is what Trump and his administration have planned for the federal government and our country. Their playbook, Project 2025, is full of plans to weaken our freedoms and cause long-lasting harm to thousands. These threats are very real, and we need to be vigilant about protecting our communities and our rights. We all deserve the freedom to participate in our democracy and hold those who seek to hoard power accountable — that’s why Fair Fight is committed to fighting back against Project 2025 and protecting our elections. [**Will you make a donation to Fair Fight today to power our fight to protect voting rights in Georgia and across the country?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99042640/518648484/-1136485954?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241220_f_CarolAnderson_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmUwZDJjMS0xZGJmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7hzX8vl2FjApcHXn5wtm6Nq7lxERMxJru7iRuSqboU8=) | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99042642/518648489/-1136485954?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241220_f_CarolAnderson_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmUwZDJjMS0xZGJmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7hzX8vl2FjApcHXn5wtm6Nq7lxERMxJru7iRuSqboU8=)

In the days and weeks after the inauguration, these are the threats to our voting rights that could become our new reality:
* Weakening enforcement of laws that protect the freedom to vote;
* Criminalizing parts of the voting process;
* Making it even easier for election disinformation to spread.

Project 2025 also calls for the reduction in federal assistance for election security. Even after the bomb threats we saw at polling sites this year, MAGA-Republicans want to make our elections less safe. We won’t let them.
As anti-voter lawmakers continue to push their extreme agenda, we’ll keep fighting back even harder so voters can make their voices heard. But this work is only possible because of this team.
[**If you can, please make your first gift today to keep our movement growing strong through 2025 and beyond, as we face new challenges in protecting our rights.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99042661/518648505/-1136485954?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241220_f_CarolAnderson_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmUwZDJjMS0xZGJmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7hzX8vl2FjApcHXn5wtm6Nq7lxERMxJru7iRuSqboU8=)
Thank you for all that you do.
Carol Anderson

clean_body: We must fight back against Project 2025 | | | Attacks on voting rights and our elections. Threats to our reproductive rights. Calls for cutting the Department of Education. Expanding the use of the death penalty. This is what Trump and his administration have planned for the federal government and our country. Their playbook, Project 2025, is full of plans to weaken our freedoms and cause long-lasting harm to thousands. These threats are very real, and we need to be vigilant about protecting our communities and our rights. We all deserve the freedom to participate in our democracy and hold those who seek to hoard power accountable — that’s why Fair Fight is committed to fighting back against Project 2025 and protecting our elections. = | = In the days and weeks after the inauguration, these are the threats to our voting rights that could become our new reality: Weakening enforcement of laws that protect the freedom to vote; Criminalizing parts of the voting process; Making it even easier for election disinformation to spread. Project 2025 also calls for the reduction in federal assistance for election security. Even after the bomb threats we saw at polling sites this year, MAGA-Republicans want to make our elections less safe. We won’t let them. As anti-voter lawmakers continue to push their extreme agenda, we’ll keep fighting back even harder so voters can make their voices heard. But this work is only possible because of this team. = Thank you for all that you do. Carol Anderson Fair Fight = | 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2024 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. body:
I wanted to give you a brief update

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99042690/518648546/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWUwZDJjMS0xZGJmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XhErx3xUjXzGZOYc1XlY9CcpHZe99HAWjgfPkmviT4E=)
---
**Peter, Trump’s pick to lead the FBI, Kash Patel, is _dangerously unqualified_.** _**Trump’s Pick for FBI Director Already Has an Enemies List**_ **If confirmed, Kash Patel will be Trump’s hatchet man in the FBI.** He’ll do Trump’s bidding, he’ll upend the rule of law, and he’ll do everything he can to check off each and every one of Trump’s biggest priorities, including:
* Investigate Journalists that he calls “the enemy of the people”
* Attack political “enemies” with sham investigations, burdensome subpoenas & indictments, and mountains of legal fees.
* Seek to legitimize Donald Trump’s 2020 Big Lie with fake evidence and legal threats.

Look, as the son of Japanese Americans imprisoned in internment camps, my family knows all too well what it means for the U.S. Government to be weaponized against its own citizens. Make no mistake, that’s exactly what Donald Trump and Kash Patel want to do with the FBI.

**It is up to us, the people, to defend our constitution, our liberty, and the rule of law from abuses of power. So I’m asking for your help:**

[**Will you stand with me by signing our urgent petition to call on the Senate to reject Kash Patel and the other unqualified appointees? There is real momentum on our side to hand Donald Trump his first losses of his presidency. Can we count on you to add your signature? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99042691/518648548/222319307?refcode=MTFC_20241220_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWUwZDJjMS0xZGJmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XhErx3xUjXzGZOYc1XlY9CcpHZe99HAWjgfPkmviT4E=&emci=8892085e-72b9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=25e0d2c1-1dbf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=18839602) | [ADD YOUR NAME TO OUR PETITION »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99042692/518648549/222319307?refcode=MTFC_20241220_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWUwZDJjMS0xZGJmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XhErx3xUjXzGZOYc1XlY9CcpHZe99HAWjgfPkmviT4E=&emci=8892085e-72b9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=25e0d2c1-1dbf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=18839602)

_—— READ MY ORIGINAL MESSAGE BELOW AND ADD YOUR NAME ——_
Peter, I know many of us have tuned out of politics after the losses we faced.

But Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies have wasted absolutely no time in re-creating the same chaos we saw from his team from 2017-2021.

Donald Trump has already appointed:

**Robert F. Kennedy Jr. for Secretary of Health and Human Services** — a man who has spread numerous false conspiracy claims about everything from vaccines to HIV/AIDS.

**Pete Hegseth for Secretary of Defense** — a Fox News host who paid off a woman who had previously accused him of sexual assault, was barred from working President Biden’s Inauguration because the Pentagon deemed him an “Insider threat”, and has said that women should not serve in combat roles.

**Tulsi Gabbard for Director of National Intelligence** — a pick that Putin is reportedly “gleeful” about and who has parroted Russian propaganda enough to even concern Republicans.

The bottom line is, no matter how unqualified, corrupt, or vindictive these nominees are, there is one thing that unites them: **Unquestioning loyalty to Donald Trump.**

**That is an extreme danger to our democracy and rule of law. Even Republicans in the Senate know this, Peter – there are rumors some of Trump’s picks could get voted down, so we need your voice!**

[**Will you stand with me by signing our urgent petition to call on the Senate to reject these unqualified appointees? There is real momentum on our side to hand Donald Trump his first loss of his presidency. Can we count on you to add your signature? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99042693/518648550/222319307?refcode=MTFC_20241220_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWUwZDJjMS0xZGJmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XhErx3xUjXzGZOYc1XlY9CcpHZe99HAWjgfPkmviT4E=&emci=8892085e-72b9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=25e0d2c1-1dbf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=18839602)

According to our records, you have not yet made your year-end gift to The Heritage Foundation.

Your year-end gift will help restore the American Dream and rescue our country after four years of destructive leftist leadership by:

The Heritage Membership Team

name: LCV
subject: Happy Holidays from LCV!
body:
We wish you a peaceful and restorative holiday season.

If you are unable to see the message below, [click here to view](https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTE5MzExNTES1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjEwMDc2MTYxMQS2&mt=1&rt=0).
| | | |
---
|
* * *
---
| | | | From all of us at LCV, we are so grateful for your support in 2024. We wish you a peaceful and restorative holiday season. And we hope you’ll join us renewed and ready to continue to defend our planet and democracy, for today and for generations to come, in the new year!
---
| |
# **Happy Holidays!**
---
| |
---
| | |
* * *
---

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump and Musk are a dangerous combination
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8229%2E5257348%2EPxAiVl ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — Elon
Musk is causing endless chaos as he gets increasingly involved in the
Trump Administration.

Frankly, this is why it’s so important to have people in office who won’t
be intimidated, and will hold Elon Musk and Donald Trump accountable to
the rule of law. That’s the work I promise to do in the Senate. [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2024_abs_em.CUeQhv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241220_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=8229%2E5257348%2EPxAiVl ]Chip in
to support this work today.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2024_abs_em.CUeQhv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241220_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=8229%2E5257348%2EPxAiVl ]DONATE

In recent weeks, Elon Musk has:

* Accused me of being a criminal on X (formerly Twitter) (again).

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2024_abs_em.CUeQhv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241220_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=8229%2E5257348%2EPxAiVl ]Twitter screenshot: Leading Report: BREAKING: Senator Schiff says
Americans did not vote for Trump to see him 'pardon criminals'
involved in January 6. Elon Musk Reply: Schiff is a criminal

* Threatened to weaponize his super PAC against any GOP members of
Congress who go against Trump’s agenda (this sounds a lot like the
threat Donald Trump made against GOP members when I was censured last
year).
* Come out strongly against MAGA Speaker Mike Johnson’s continuing
resolution, creating chaos for our country.
* Supported and pushed the dysfunctional, dangerous nominations of Kash
Patel, Tulsi Gabbard, and Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. to Trump’s Cabinet.

Derek, the
combination of Donald Trump and Elon Musk is a dangerous one — and now
they are inseparable. Trump has proven himself to be unshackled by the
rule of law, and Elon Musk has the wealth to enable Trump — including
spending unlimited money to attack any candidate, Democrat or Republican,
who opposes his agenda.

As we gear up for the second Trump Administration, my team and I will do
all we can to hold Trump, Musk, and their other MAGA cronies to account.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2024_abs_em.CUeQhv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241220_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1007&akid=8229%2E5257348%2EPxAiVl ]I need your ongoing support — especially with Trump and Musk already
putting a huge target on my back. Derek,
will you please chip in
$10 or any
amount to help me fight back against Elon Musk and Donald Trump?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=dec2024_abs_em.ORP7DS&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241220_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1008&akid=8229%2E5257348%2EPxAiVl ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=dec2024_abs_em.ORP7DS&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241220_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=1009&akid=8229%2E5257348%2EPxAiVl ]EXPRESS DONATE
$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=dec2024_abs_em.ORP7DS&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241220_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1010&akid=8229%2E5257348%2EPxAiVl ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=dec2024_abs_em.ORP7DS&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241220_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1011&akid=8229%2E5257348%2EPxAiVl ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=dec2024_abs_em.ORP7DS&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241220_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=250&t=1012&akid=8229%2E5257348%2EPxAiVl ]EXPRESS DONATE
$250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2024_abs_em.CUeQhv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241220_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=8229%2E5257348%2EPxAiVl ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you,

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2024_abs_em.CUeQhv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241220_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=8229%2E5257348%2EPxAiVl ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2342?c0=dec2024_abs_em.X-rtmI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241220_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1015&akid=8229%2E5257348%2EPxAiVl ]DONATE MONTHY

subject: Our work is not done
body:
Help us make progress in 2025!

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99043277/518649702/1219929396?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQxYWM3YzdkLTFmYmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5UosfnEzjmWwHqpC4h3tuUK36DOxJt75eeyNzXNcM24=) | Peter, As we predicted, the election this year was _extremely_ close. It all came down to just a few seats in the House of Representatives and every seat mattered. **Blue Dogs represent the closest and most competitive races in the country and we weren’t lying when we told you that winning these seats are key.** [_**But our work is not done! We have to keep growing our movement to win more seats in rural America and turn the page on extremism in Washington D.C., so can we count on you to donate $25 to set us up for success in 2025?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99043278/518649703/1979885964?&refcode=E11856-20241220-BlueDogSeats-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQxYWM3YzdkLTFmYmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5UosfnEzjmWwHqpC4h3tuUK36DOxJt75eeyNzXNcM24=) [DONATE $25 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99043279/518649704/1979885964?&refcode=E11856-20241220-BlueDogSeats-SB-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQxYWM3YzdkLTFmYmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5UosfnEzjmWwHqpC4h3tuUK36DOxJt75eeyNzXNcM24=) With your help, we were proud to re-elect our co-chairs Jared Golden and Marie Gluesenkamp Perez, as well as flip California’s 13th district from red to blue. subject: We’re Here and We Won’t Back Down!
body:
Keep pushing Congress to defend immigrants today! | | | Peter, Congress is down to the wire to vote on their budget resolution today to keep the government open, before they come back in January to vote to fund mass deportations. We must make it clear to our representatives that now is the time to protect our immigrant communities ahead of the next Trump Administration. All week long, our communities have shown up for each other in the fight to protect one another. We know what best what our communities need: resources for education, housing, and healthcare — not funds to fuel mass deportations. So we’ve taken our demands to Congress in person, by phone, and by email. 📣Haven’t taken action with us this week yet? Yesterday, our members and supporters drove hundreds of calls all day long to the offices of our Members of Congress to ensure our demands are heard loud and clear. After you [send letters to your representatives](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxVmA6lZUlAiElwWx8poa7vlqmwnIgvjS2xZ3Ldv0oW90V9i-tfWwThzzACgqzdPQ9OjC6HYrOQo-XBjwEWkr7BqMtUjfeGtwbRWASHmWX4HE22tegppXZeFGRESIQwzOxHaloKlTMiU3x_jePJJGuZWlyIaepUQGiIppWAX5YiBaxJrvNtffOOQ6AkGVSq1IQMauwz9xQ-NC2-mwteJwSbYzRW-0cw6MIGyNGk86hTBlyZdZemA_5a2jfRBygjucO/4cg/PDO0321MTROpdnwAgfy1Lg/h3/h001.9ZvMUfnG9wwA6Xkw3nQEG17ofwQxJgGwALJc3LKhWIY), make sure to give them a call, too! 📲 Dial 1-888-369-9935 to be connected. # **[Kari Lake](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c6cf99b39b3847afb266d2cbb9f95303&_e=7T9tfD5Fohjs8whmqyPiMN3tFGFq2J4PJPZ8ZI1Tfba8FfENVlHOoWFjZ5OAQrZOLz27Q9pYDHe17Y0mqFhJNpcdH2IogEihsyN487opUwGURRuTfNoocKWgbvF9Lkul4qd0jiYuZGbBKv6TUfdiezYCkfI8Y3_3jD0cP_1SA3djzK2afrmN9F41OR4Y6VKK509h8FObPLY11XNluVLWYkqrSkPp5z2gfAf3WoYKBOkjNRB1YzPsPlbDpeWrvd4m-zUeQky--z_b3CBtlqB67umvaAhqVPR2xTtr4J7rvTlJaY_jp7QFaI0JCsrfF4-ryojCZKl9CNOeGiCa91LOao0qbL9dLaFf_Tl38zbBrsHVwvIOP3tukmfgCY0ifNWcCQpvFznxBYwC7VRdWyp5065BV6QLA4vbwPkHZ8Gqk9M%3D)**
