|
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Fellow Patriot, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Fellow Patriot, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c6cf99b39b3847afb266d2cbb9f95303&_e=7T9tfD5Fohjs8whmqyPiMN3tFGFq2J4PJPZ8ZI1Tfba8FfENVlHOoWFjZ5OAQrZOLz27Q9pYDHe17Y0mqFhJNpcdH2IogEihsyN487opUwGURRuTfNoocKWgbvF9Lkul4qd0jiYuZGbBKv6TUfdiezYCkfI8Y3_3jD0cP_1SA3djzK2afrmN9F41OR4Y6VKK509h8FObPLY11XNluVLWYkqrSkPp5z2gfAf3WoYKBOkjNRB1YzPsPlbDpeWrvd4mWAs2V8b6DnPsoH9_Uu9npm9VKVf05xdaLOpza_qNUNk22WBZw8FmVxFzjAtgVyvptjyohFLAE9JDnebt6eixswKLTc4C_oZaUIzu2AwL0Onw3PpnpfJFHPeQxpbPdNmU5-ViHlX0ALGufjIFTT7J4_F_yg6VhrTEbZ4I6t8fwyA%3D)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Fellow Patriot, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Fellow Patriot, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---
[Will you help me defeat the left’s lawfare by rushing back a generous contribution to my “**First Amendment Fund** ”?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c6cf99b39b3847afb266d2cbb9f95303&_e=7T9tfD5Fohjs8whmqyPiMN3tFGFq2J4PJPZ8ZI1Tfba8FfENVlHOoWFjZ5OAQrZOLz27Q9pYDHe17Y0mqFhJNpcdH2IogEihsyN487opUwGURRuTfNoocKWgbvF9Lkul4qd0jiYuZGbBKv6TUfdiezYCkfI8Y3_3jD0cP_1SA3djzK2afrmN9F41OR4Y6VKK509h8FObPLY11XNluVLWYkqrSkPp5z2gfAf3WoYKBOkjNRB1YzPsPlbDpeWrvd4mAoDywOUjaotU2QojFjD9bTvmPakSbB_cu0A83Kzp6Yd7BtAH9mIR1ST1JcGRusjBlNuts13Ce91RP24VsEMoRxhGERNKYXLSBv-OoSK0HCBuiEHSLcQlQgfY0i3GDoiqDOHKOeW4u7oky_BTBDSBzwk8t_mhmrfihTS0lL452Yo%3D)Your generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Fellow Patriot, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. clean_body: As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country. | | | | | | | MERRY CHRISTMAS From Kari, Jeff, Ruby, and Leo | | From the Desk of | Dear Fellow Patriot,I wanted to send you this Christmas Card to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Fellow Patriot, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to “Make life hell” for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Fellow Patriot, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Fellow Patriot, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones. Fellow Patriot, I’m not giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you. You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country. Not the Left’s lawfare.Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth. generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Fellow Patriot, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. Every dollar given will help me finish this fight... without financially destroying my family. Thank you for always being there for me, especially during this holiday season. | | Peter, I had the opportunity to meet one-on-one with Kash Patel last week and let me tell you - President Trump absolutely nailed it with this pick. We had an in depth conversation about many issues that our country faces- including the urgent need to fix our dysfunctional and lawless Federal bureaucracy in Washington, DC.
If you're not familiar with him, Kash is a former federal prosecutor and national security aide; and more importantly, he is a man of principle who believes it is crucial that we stop the weaponization of government, most especially in regard to the Department of Justice and the FBI. And that's why in my view, he is the perfect choice for FBI Director.

I can tell you I look forward to voting "YES" on Kash Patel's confirmation and to doing all I can to support him in his mission. I'm also going to be counting on your support along the way to get out our message and rally the American people behind us.

MAGA Republicans want to replace JD Vance and Marco Rubio with more Trump loyalists -- so it's up to us to take these seats back and put a check on Trump's power. We need EVERY Democrat in this fight. **We're still behind on our must-hit $50,000 fundraising goal to get to work, so we have to ask:**

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Faith Made All The Difference In The 2024 Election!
body:
The National Faith Advisory Board posted a wonderful summary of how People of Faith made all the difference in the re-election of President Donald Tru
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9903.1.b7d233fc7123cbc91830102d9a6af0d4) |
---
The [National Faith Advisory Board](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9904.1.cb12b8097a11fe6c8f1825f620afbdc1) posted a _wonderful summary_ of how **People of Faith** made all the difference in the re-election of **President Donald Trump**. There were great concerns among many that **People of Faith** were not going to turn out and vote in the 2024 election cycle which would have produced a Kamala Harris victory. Thankfully... those concerns _were not justified_ because **People of Faith** not only got out to vote but _voted for biblical values_.
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9905.1.de565d9a1337f39570feca23ac9c54eb)
---
I believe that the best days of America are not behind us but right in front of us because **Pastors** , **Faith Leaders** and **People of Faith** are stepping up to **Make America Great Again** by **Making America Godly Again**.
To all the **Pastors** and **Faith Leaders** that stood up and made a difference, THANK YOU!
I want encourage you to continue to _speak boldly_ about your Biblical Values and _educate_ your congregations, ministries and networks.
I joined the team of the [National Faith Advisory Board](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9906.1.8957f67c07184aaa35235078cfcbea00) (NFAB), America's Faith Coalition, run by former **White House Senior Officials** and **Pastor Paula White-Cain** , a dear friend of mine.
[NFAB](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9907.1.18870d3f3c51309fd35b05be1dc0f28d) _educates_ , _equips_ and _mobilizes_ pastors and faith leaders on the most important issues affecting our faith and churches. The core principles are as follows:
**1) Protect Religious Freedom**
**2) Promote a Strong America**
**3) Defend Life at all Stages**
**4) Honor Family Values**
The [NFAB](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9908.1.1c8a238be043eca2c2eb3003b4b5afb4) holds monthly prayer calls, sends weekly emails and hosts amazing events like their **National Faith Summit** in Georgia just a couple weeks ago with **President Donald Trump**. [Check it out here](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9909.1.de0a36791122f37195a6d8345b543b6b)
I want to encourage you to join [NFAB](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9910.1.efef2ddced05cef4622f530511b7d86b) by signing up here: [www.nationalfaithadvisoryboard.org](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9911.1.21b8f675af7501d180878796fdb64ee6)
You will be part of a national faith organization that gives us a meaningful voice in America’s faith policy.
You **DO NOT** have to be a Pastor/Faith Leader to join [NFAB](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9912.1.672a28464541a2fa1006861a7afc9da1) and participate in the prayer calls or to receive updates that impact the Faith Community.
If you are a Pastor/Faith Leader please consider joining the [NFAB Association of Churches](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9913.1.58cbec86b1186cb0b9ce55f9c0c2de6e). The church that I pastor, [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9914.1.6ab9fdd433f6720d51a5e19ba7132cd6), has joined and you are invited to as well. We are much stronger together!
Join the [NFAB Association of Churches](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9915.1.135fbbb06c779bd80d0c288dc4df94ab) here: [https://nationalfaithadvisoryboard.org/association-of-churches/](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9916.1.394808334df2803c00c52b0491c2758f)
Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
| | [ Click Here To Join The National Faith Advisory Board ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9917.1.099db08a3aff36663493f854bd846347)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9918.1.3c3f90c217218b4dfdb56e2fdd4b6356)
---
You are invited to come _meet_ and _hear_ from [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9919.1.d14bccf8d802e89f5e7b7afbe5bc12d8) on Thursday, March 6 at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9920.1.329ca0007945978a635f67f211e3a974) in Tulsa, OK. In October, we had **Eric** at **Sheridan** and it was an incredible event. You can watch it here: [https://www.youtube.com/livetrump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9921.1.d33ba03d14f1f62410013657d2041fc1) However, this March will be even better because **President Trump** will already be in the **White House** and we will hear _exclusive insights_ from **Eric** of what is taking place in the **Trump administration**. There will also be other guests at this event that we will announce as we get closer. Seating is **VERY** limited for this event. Please [RSVP](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9922.1.473b46a56e8ad7c5d397f50b86ea876a) here: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1493676](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9923.1.a15c6ef2ae8f54bbbdea28d2e11edcae) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ RSVP: Eric Trump | Tulsa, OK ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9924.1.0eda348c5c2387da60ebc7f309709784)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9925.1.1284f58011f7dd7bc4789d84f3057389)
---
Recently at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9926.1.d35d1946aa7c2072a3be0712456e5fd0), I started a _mini-series_ within our _WKND series_ over the [Book of Acts](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9927.1.7afdb9cdf69555e6af2e079ea706866d). In **Acts 17** , the **Apostle Paul** spent 3 weeks in Thessalonica **reasoning** , **explaining** and **proving** **Jesus** from the Old Testament Scriptures. Therefore, I took the **Book of Genesis** and _reasoned_ , _explained_ and _proved_ **Jesus as Messiah** from those 50 chapters in the 1st book of the Bible. The next Sunday, we looked at Jesus in the **Book of Exodus**. I believe these sermons will really teach you some things that maybe you have never seen before from the _*Torah_. Watch "[Jesus In The Torah | Genesis](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9928.1.14e965fb63e22b5408db4fe5673deeb6)" here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=634OIj06ZbU](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9929.1.3e3be6901f65e19f218abf8310efaec4)
---
---
## 1st Guest Speaker of 2025 @Sheridan.Church
---
|
---
Over the last year at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9930.1.6417a076764a07526b1479693fbb0a2c), we have been BLESSED with so many great guest speakers from preachers to politicians to athletes and beyond. Including: [Perry Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9931.1.81378f94f7071481e748e0df4eb79515), **Tim Tebow** , [Donald Trump Jr](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9932.1.a2bc5fb995964d0aaae10629d72d99d5)., [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9933.1.db96b89f58ecba7481ca5fdf4295f290), [Lara Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9934.1.e85f1606f5f074acfaf3f1b9550a9446), [Rabbi Jonathan Cahn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9935.1.8dd7ac7bf0c487199fb2d5e03fb4a664), [Darryl Strawberry](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9936.1.eb0a1bfc722ac89e81e8a6ac59f17ca5), **General Michael Flynn** , [Riley Gaines](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9937.1.a69fdf1e98a8f711c5d74afb847700f6), [Mayor Rudy Giuliani](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9938.1.614eb8d0df1351908871ef0c572f6740), [Dr. Randy Caldwell](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9939.1.a4fd2ef2c9a15921463ce4b89288eaad), [Roger Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9940.1.72863790dc2bf65af20ef7085bf843ef), Rodney Howard-Browne and so many others...
But our first guest speaker of 2025, I am very excited about!
Mark your calendars for **Erick Stakelbeck** at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9941.1.2f806312173ff999f4f3ce015d4c50c4) on Sunday, January 12 at 10am CT.
Erick's show on **TBN** is _phenomenal_ and that Sunday in January will be just as great!
---
---
©2024 Jackson Lahmeyer | Tulsa, OK
---
| [Web Version](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9942.1.eace8e9fdefa4017e51ef0a494b8e7b4&p=eyJ7e21pbWktc2lnbmF0dXJlfX0iOiIxODUyNDAzMzEtMTM1ODM1OTMyMTAtMDBiNjM2ZDNjMzIyMWQwOGJhYWNmNzMyMDMyYjMxNWYyZGViOTkxNiIsInt7ZW1haWxJZH19IjoiMTgzNjUxNjcifQ== "Web Version") [Preferences](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9943.1.eea7b396ab9383cc6076726870bcdf59&p=eyJ7e21pbWktc2lnbmF0dXJlfX0iOiIxODUyNDAzMzEtMTM1ODM1OTMyMTAtMDBiNjM2ZDNjMzIyMWQwOGJhYWNmNzMyMDMyYjMxNWYyZGViOTkxNiIsInt7ZW1haWxJZH19IjoiMTgzNjUxNjcifQ== "Preferences") [Forward](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18365167.9944.1.efbf3d69f362d29a98580aba4ad3a2aa&p=eyJ7e21pbWktc2lnbmF0dXJlfX0iOiIxODUyNDAzMzEtMTM1ODM1OTMyMTAtMDBiNjM2ZDNjMzIyMWQwOGJhYWNmNzMyMDMyYjMxNWYyZGViOTkxNiIsInt7ZW1haWxJZH19IjoiMTgzNjUxNjcifQ== "Forward") [Unsubscribe](https://gem.godaddy.com/opt_out?pact=18365167-185240331-13583593210-00b636d3c3221d08baacf732032b315f2deb9916 "Unsubscribe")

name: Team NDRC
subject: What’s happened in Ohio should anger each and every one of us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We've never let a loss be the final word.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99045212/518653849/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkMTZiMzIxLTI2YmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3bwX-o5KjlKSKLDjPFn1l0eTQsEK_ZynU-yM6mX30ak=&emci=fb5fcd28-edbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=ed16b321-26bf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter — What’s happened in Ohio should anger each and every one of us. Back in 2015, Ohio voters passed a constitutional amendment to create the Ohio Redistricting Commission to draw new maps. It’d take until 2021 for the Republican-led Commission to meet for the first time — but only two years for their proposed state legislative and congressional maps to be struck down a staggering _seven times_. During the 2022 election, Ohio voters were forced to use unconstitutional maps that the Ohio Supreme Court had already overturned for unduly favoring the GOP. **This year, Ohio voters had an opportunity to create a citizen-led redistricting commission — and of course, Republicans did everything they could to sabotage the ballot initiative. ** The Ohio Ballot Board even resorted to trickery in the phrasing that’d appear on official ballots! Republican Ohio Secretary of State Frank LaRose wrote the draft language and pushed it through along party lines, claiming that Issue 1 would “establish a new taxpayer-funded commission of appointees required to gerrymander the boundaries of state legislative and congressional districts.” What did the _actual_ proposal say? Issue 1 would "ban partisan gerrymandering." (See why we’re angry, Peter?) Republicans knew they couldn’t win by telling the truth, so they resorted to bald-faced lies. Republican Governor Mike DeWine spread more confusion at a press conference — take a look at what Biz, the NDRC’s president, had to say about thoses shenanigans: | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99045214/518653851/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_StoryofOhio_email_20241220-NDRC-Tier1-StoryofOhio-NOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241220-NDRC-Tier1-StoryofOhio-NOR_&utm_campaign=StoryofOhio&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkMTZiMzIxLTI2YmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3bwX-o5KjlKSKLDjPFn1l0eTQsEK_ZynU-yM6mX30ak=)
---
**In the end, Republicans successfully defeated Issue 1. Despite their deceptive tactics, it was still a close race — and we’ve never let a loss be the final word. **
[**We’re gearing up for a congressional map redraw next year in Ohio, and we’ll be ready for the fight. Will you join us with a $30 donation today to get us off to a strong start?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99045216/518653853/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_StoryofOhio_email_20241220-NDRC-Tier1-StoryofOhio-NOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241220-NDRC-Tier1-StoryofOhio-NOR_&utm_campaign=StoryofOhio&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkMTZiMzIxLTI2YmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3bwX-o5KjlKSKLDjPFn1l0eTQsEK_ZynU-yM6mX30ak=)
[ADD MY NAME](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99045218/518653855/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_StoryofOhio_email_20241220-NDRC-Tier1-StoryofOhio-NOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241220-NDRC-Tier1-StoryofOhio-NOR_&utm_campaign=StoryofOhio&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkMTZiMzIxLTI2YmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3bwX-o5KjlKSKLDjPFn1l0eTQsEK_ZynU-yM6mX30ak=)

Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, Suite #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

Do you think there should be a criminal investigation into Liz Cheney, one of your former colleagues?" Acosta asked the republican congressman.
"If she broke the law, why should she be exempt?" Burchett fired back. "I guarantee if you broke the law they'd drag you into court in chains!"
**[Watch the heated interview below:](https://substack.com/redirect/47fb208d-a6a1-49a2-959b-7cf3e104e62e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# **Undercover reporter CONFRONTS Biden snitch who revealed on hidden camera: "He's like DEAD!"**
Investigative reporter James O'Keefe confronted National Security Council advisor Henry Appel after an undercover reporter exposed him **["spilling the tea" about President Joe Biden's true mental state. ](https://substack.com/redirect/cc1125b4-1e00-40ef-a39a-46c4e919ef40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"You're Lucky I'm Not a Chinese spy," O'Keefe told Appel after walking up to him on the street outside a restaurant.
**[Watch the confrontation below:](https://substack.com/redirect/cc1125b4-1e00-40ef-a39a-46c4e919ef40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

"What the hell is a guy who is an advisor to the National Security Council doing spilling the 'tea' to an undercover journalist?!" O'Keefe pressed further.
Appel is caught on hidden camera telling the undercover reporter; "Joe Biden is like... dead! We're very trauma-bonded."
Appel refused to engage at all with O'Keefe's questions and continued walking down the street. **[It's a little late for silence, isn't it...](https://substack.com/redirect/cc1125b4-1e00-40ef-a39a-46c4e919ef40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: The Trump Presidency hangs in the balance.
body:
I don’t care what it takes. Shut it down.
[View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kMtu8jAQhZ9msiOyxw4mCy_-HxSpEnRRCVp1Z-xxY3Auyo2Gp6-glO3RN3M-HVO1MfhZg_oPiGVwPSCC-AeI4yAOZr_fdfPCbfniIpBuMeD6QU74ZGtr6JqN7NSf-vdrFj62dTPxJz3MLT3ZR2VKlQnxlqpN4rREw71NSHMlpBJLJllSau6EQWnJO5kb4iiOjNnM546sycj6JGhkKDkiQ8EU52luPVrpjpI5ucoVA8nuRanviIYy1GfqnAlxTm1TJVGXw9D2d7ECsGjcMa1HG2nsf69sUwEWD2XAYgIsVvnle1euX1cHEMV9MrH5vPKX6vymkk679hJiDP1SgWRff1-SSeNPAAAA__--AG6v)
| | | | [](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kU-PmzAQxT-NuYHsscHLgUNbhFR1e6m0_XdBYA_EG2yisUmUfPoKtM31zU_6vacZ_GVx071h-jMDODkbGQCTnxjAluTP4e3tO91z-yrymwTcYwZfPsgrPNlgBnyUG3-P7_HXo3S_X8N6FU863S_4ZD-UBfrBLXuq28w2CgYxmQwboaXSsuKKZ6emHCdEKeVLXZq6groqB2NtZcZx5LoGzFwDHJQA4CC5FqKozQRG2VFxq15qzZnih6iYCDGdXDgj2cEt98KsPluaU0qXeBTrGHQRzUZY3FwgtDvBoPMDva_kMJ8JMWA-rZSbNcyEMe7nNPd2Df3qe6Te4pQn6in2_3sx2W3J9wnJM9lOyQoGFe0ecmFmsk20IYOqD4uzTLbzn-5bOHul5yM8XiLbvw_x1Z9_6Iwae7m5ZXGx0kzx-di2T7k28C8AAP__6SyP9g)
---
Patriot – They are trying to stuff the worst spending increase I’ve ever seen through the House **right now**.
Chuck Schumer thinks he can threaten us with a shut down. The Uniparty wants to believe we have no choice. Democrats think they are going to stuff their entire wishlist down our throats before President Trump can stop it.
[KILL THE BILL](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX-NuYHsscHJgcNuEVKl7aXVtlEviNpj4iyYaGySkl9fgba5vvmk7z1NP11H79aa6VcGcPY2MgAmXxjAkuTP_v39G625fRP5XQJuMYMvn-QNnmwwPT7KhV_iJf56lP70FuabeNJpveKT_VQWOPV-3FLdZLZW0AtnMqyFlkrLiiuenetDqYXkUB6MPVSgQLijQq760nE0RpnM18BBCQAOkmshiqNxYJT9o7hVh6PmTPFdVDhCTGcfPpBs78e1MPOUjfU5pWvci7UM2ohmISzuPhDajWDQTj1dZvKYD4QYMHcz5WYOA2GM2zkNnZ1DN08dUmfR5Yk6it3_Xky2S5q6hDQx2bhkBYOKNg_5MDDZJFqQQdWF0Vsmmx-nU_t3fR0uL3u4v0Q2vx_i6_TxXWdU2-vdj6OPlWaKD_u2bcqthn8BAAD___y6j0o)
I know they read my emails, and I’ve got news for them:
_**I don’t care if we shut the entire government down until President Trump’s inauguration.**_
_**I don’t care if career bureaucrats never receive another paycheck in their lives.**_
_**I don’t care if Chuck Schumer and Uniparty Republicans all lose their positions over this – in fact, I HOPE THEY DO!**_
I don’t just want to maim the Uniparty: _**I want to gut and destroy it.**_
_**I’ve had my fill**_ of walking through the halls of Congress and having to be cordial to my House colleagues who are only there to line the pockets of **defense contractors & pharma CEO’s**.
_**I’ve had my fill**_ of the people who are supposed to be representing the American people going and only working for the lobbyists and special interest groups that have them and their campaigns by their throats.
Patriot – I am not joking when I say, **if we allow this bill to make it through the House, it will do so much damage to our economy, our country may be unrecognizable in the aftermath.**
I know this has been a wordy message, but here is the point: __**[We desperately need your assistance if we are going to stop this before they destroy our country before President Trump can save it](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kUGL2zAQhX-NfLORRoq1PviwXRNa2IWlsG3pxdjSyFHWltORnJD8-mKTzfXNB997TDedRu-uNdPfGMDB28gAmHxmAEuSv7qPjze65vZV5BcJuMYMXu7kGR5sMB3edgs_xmP8fdv5P69hPosHna4nfLB3ZYFT58c11U1mawWdcCbDWmiptCy54tmh3vVgK2eU6qteuLKXvd6ZyopSaKO6J8x8DRyUAOAguRaiqIwDo2yvuFVPleZM8U1UOEJMBx8-kWznx2th5ikb60NKp7gV2zPYRzQLYXHxgdCuBIP91NFxJo_5QIgBczdTbuYwEMa4ntPQ2jm089QitRZdnqil2H71YnK_pKlNSBOTjUtWMChp9ZAPA5NNogUZlG0YvWWy-fdSvpdv_fP39y3cXiKbvzfxY_r8qTOq7enix9HHUjPFh23bOuVcw_8AAAD__8sIj30)**__ _**.**_
The entire Trump Presidency hangs in the balance.
This bill includes special protections for corrupt bureaucrats, and jams massive spending through to make sure that President Trump & DOGE are so busy playing catch up that they can’t accomplish any of their promised reforms for YEARS after they take office.
[KILL THE BILL](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX-NuRHZYwcnBw5tEVLV7aXqtlUvyLXH4CwYNDaJkl9fgXZzffNJ33saMy1j8Pea6c8MYAguMQAmPzGANctf5vX1O91L9yLKmwTcYgZf3skrPNloDT6OK7-kS_r9OIY_L3G-iied7ws-2XflAScTxi3VTeFqBUZ4W2AttFRaVlzxYqjhbJW13JjqCOJoER1YLtzZSH7SlfdFqIGDEgAcJNdCHM7Wg1Xun-JOnc6aM8V30cETYh5CfENyJoz3g52nYqyHnJe0F2sZtAntSni4hUjoNoJBOxm6zBSw7AkxYulnKu0ce8KUtnPuOzfHbp46pM6hLzN1lLqPXky2a566jDQx2fjsBIOKNg-F2DPZZFqRQdXFMTgmm9NJfxvaxeufe7i_RDZ_H-Lr9PZDF1S75RbGMaRKM8X7fds25VrD_wAAAP__tfGPdA)
I am already being attacked by all sides: **the Democrats, the Media, and even members of my own party have painted a BIG RED TARGET on my back.**
They want me to sit down, shut up and let them continue business as usual.
HELL NO.

clean_body: I don’t care what it takes. Shut it down. | | | | Patriot – They are trying to stuff the worst spending increase I’ve ever seen through the House right now. Chuck Schumer thinks he can threaten us with a shut down. The Uniparty wants to believe we have no choice. Democrats think they are going to stuff their entire wishlist down our throats before President Trump can stop it. I know they read my emails, and I’ve got news for them: I don’t care if we shut the entire government down until President Trump’s inauguration. I don’t care if career bureaucrats never receive another paycheck in their lives. I don’t care if Chuck Schumer and Uniparty Republicans all lose their positions over this – in fact, I HOPE THEY DO! I don’t just want to maim the Uniparty: I want to gut and destroy it. I’ve had my fill of walking through the halls of Congress and having to be cordial to my House colleagues who are only there to line the pockets of defense contractors & pharma CEO’s. I’ve had my fill of the people who are supposed to be representing the American people going and only working for the lobbyists and special interest groups that have them and their campaigns by their throats. Patriot – I am not joking when I say, if we allow this bill to make it through the House, it will do so much damage to our economy, our country may be unrecognizable in the aftermath. I know this has been a wordy message, but here is the point: . The entire Trump Presidency hangs in the balance. This bill includes special protections for corrupt bureaucrats, and jams massive spending through to make sure that President Trump & DOGE are so busy playing catch up that they can’t accomplish any of their promised reforms for YEARS after they take office. I am already being attacked by all sides: the Democrats, the Media, and even members of my own party have painted a BIG RED TARGET on my back. They want me to sit down, shut up and let them continue business as usual. HELL NO. This is a coordinated push by the lobbyists, Deep State, intel goons, RINO’s, and Democrats to stuff their wishlist through the House before President Trump can stop them. ? Yours Sincerely, Marjorie Taylor Greene | | |

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas is now home to 31 million people even as population growth slows,** " Texas Tribune's **Joshua Fechter** -- "Texas' population surpassed 31 million people within the last year as the state added more residents than any other place in the country, estimates released Thursday by the U.S. Census Bureau show.

However, the number of people who moved from other parts of the country slowed.

Texas added 562,941 residents between July 2023 and July 2024, census estimates show -- ahead of Florida and California. That growth brought the state's total population to 31,290,831.

The state didn't add residents as quickly as it did the previous year, but the rate of its population growth -- 1.8% -- was still the third-highest in the country behind Florida and the District of Columbia.

A major driver of that growth came from net international migration. Texas added 319,569 new residents from abroad, the most since the COVID-19 pandemic -- but behind Florida and California, which saw the largest increases.

The census changed the way it counts refugees and migrants this year. However, it does not distinguish legal status in its estimates.

That growth mirrors gains seen across the nation. The United States added 3.3 million residents within the last year -- 2.8 million of which came from other countries.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/abfd323e-6e36-4068-a28f-0a4dae73e3bd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Meanwhile, Texas saw fewer residents move from other states than it did during the COVID-19 pandemic -- when the state attracted residents from places like California and New York in search of more affordable homes among other factors.

Texas still led the country in domestic migration, followed by North Carolina and South Carolina, adding 85,267 people from other states within the last year. California, New York and Illinois saw the largest population losses in the last year, but those states lost fewer residents than they did in previous years.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/abfd323e-6e36-4068-a28f-0a4dae73e3bd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Why domestic migration to Texas slowed isn't clear, said **Lloyd Potter** , the state demographer, but it's possible that many of the people most likely to move to Texas from other states have simply already done so. With domestic migration appearing to slow, Texas will likely rely on international migration to meet its labor needs as the state's economy booms, he said.

"With a growing economy, we have a growing demand for labor," Potter said. "And if we're seeing a decline in domestic migration, well that labor probably is going to need to come from immigrants."" ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Texas is now home to 31 million people even as population growth slows, " Texas Tribune's Joshua Fechter -- "Texas' population surpassed 31 million people within the last year as the state added more residents than any other place in the country, estimates released Thursday by the U.S. Census Bureau show. However, the number of people who moved from other parts of the country slowed. Texas added 562,941 residents between July 2023 and July 2024, census estimates show -- ahead of Florida and California. That growth brought the state's total population to 31,290,831. The state didn't add residents as quickly as it did the previous year, but the rate of its population growth -- 1.8% -- was still the third-highest in the country behind Florida and the District of Columbia. A major driver of that growth came from net international migration. Texas added 319,569 new residents from abroad, the most since the COVID-19 pandemic -- but behind Florida and California, which saw the largest increases. The census changed the way it counts refugees and migrants this year. However, it does not distinguish legal status in its estimates. That growth mirrors gains seen across the nation. The United States added 3.3 million residents within the last year -- 2.8 million of which came from other countries. Meanwhile, Texas saw fewer residents move from other states than it did during the COVID-19 pandemic -- when the state attracted residents from places like California and New York in search of more affordable homes among other factors. Texas still led the country in domestic migration, followed by North Carolina and South Carolina, adding 85,267 people from other states within the last year. California, New York and Illinois saw the largest population losses in the last year, but those states lost fewer residents than they did in previous years. Why domestic migration to Texas slowed isn't clear, said Lloyd Potter , the state demographer, but it's possible that many of the people most likely to move to Texas from other states have simply already done so. With domestic migration appearing to slow, Texas will likely rely on international migration to meet its labor needs as the state's economy booms, he said. "With a growing economy, we have a growing demand for labor," Potter said. "And if we're seeing a decline in domestic migration, well that labor probably is going to need to come from immigrants."" * **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas is now home to 31 million people even as population growth slows,** " Texas Tribune's **Joshua Fechter** -- "Texas' population surpassed 31 million people within the last year as the state added more residents than any other place in the country, estimates released Thursday by the U.S. Census Bureau show.

However, the number of people who moved from other parts of the country slowed.

Texas added 562,941 residents between July 2023 and July 2024, census estimates show -- ahead of Florida and California. That growth brought the state's total population to 31,290,831.

The state didn't add residents as quickly as it did the previous year, but the rate of its population growth -- 1.8% -- was still the third-highest in the country behind Florida and the District of Columbia.

A major driver of that growth came from net international migration. Texas added 319,569 new residents from abroad, the most since the COVID-19 pandemic -- but behind Florida and California, which saw the largest increases.

The census changed the way it counts refugees and migrants this year. However, it does not distinguish legal status in its estimates.

That growth mirrors gains seen across the nation. The United States added 3.3 million residents within the last year -- 2.8 million of which came from other countries.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/07de456b-12ad-497a-8742-278333d57c51?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Meanwhile, Texas saw fewer residents move from other states than it did during the COVID-19 pandemic -- when the state attracted residents from places like California and New York in search of more affordable homes among other factors.

Texas still led the country in domestic migration, followed by North Carolina and South Carolina, adding 85,267 people from other states within the last year. California, New York and Illinois saw the largest population losses in the last year, but those states lost fewer residents than they did in previous years.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/07de456b-12ad-497a-8742-278333d57c51?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Why domestic migration to Texas slowed isn't clear, said **Lloyd Potter** , the state demographer, but it's possible that many of the people most likely to move to Texas from other states have simply already done so. With domestic migration appearing to slow, Texas will likely rely on international migration to meet its labor needs as the state's economy booms, he said.

"With a growing economy, we have a growing demand for labor," Potter said. "And if we're seeing a decline in domestic migration, well that labor probably is going to need to come from immigrants."" ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Texas is now home to 31 million people even as population growth slows, " Texas Tribune's Joshua Fechter -- "Texas' population surpassed 31 million people within the last year as the state added more residents than any other place in the country, estimates released Thursday by the U.S. Census Bureau show. However, the number of people who moved from other parts of the country slowed. Texas added 562,941 residents between July 2023 and July 2024, census estimates show -- ahead of Florida and California. That growth brought the state's total population to 31,290,831. The state didn't add residents as quickly as it did the previous year, but the rate of its population growth -- 1.8% -- was still the third-highest in the country behind Florida and the District of Columbia. A major driver of that growth came from net international migration. Texas added 319,569 new residents from abroad, the most since the COVID-19 pandemic -- but behind Florida and California, which saw the largest increases. The census changed the way it counts refugees and migrants this year. However, it does not distinguish legal status in its estimates. That growth mirrors gains seen across the nation. The United States added 3.3 million residents within the last year -- 2.8 million of which came from other countries. Meanwhile, Texas saw fewer residents move from other states than it did during the COVID-19 pandemic -- when the state attracted residents from places like California and New York in search of more affordable homes among other factors. Texas still led the country in domestic migration, followed by North Carolina and South Carolina, adding 85,267 people from other states within the last year. California, New York and Illinois saw the largest population losses in the last year, but those states lost fewer residents than they did in previous years. Why domestic migration to Texas slowed isn't clear, said Lloyd Potter , the state demographer, but it's possible that many of the people most likely to move to Texas from other states have simply already done so. With domestic migration appearing to slow, Texas will likely rely on international migration to meet its labor needs as the state's economy booms, he said. "With a growing economy, we have a growing demand for labor," Potter said. "And if we're seeing a decline in domestic migration, well that labor probably is going to need to come from immigrants."" * **TOP NEWS**

“**Texas is now home to 31 million people even as population growth slows,** ” Texas Tribune's **Joshua Fechter** — “Texas’ population surpassed 31 million people within the last year as the state added more residents than any other place in the country, estimates released Thursday by the U.S. Census Bureau show.

However, the number of people who moved from other parts of the country slowed.

Texas added 562,941 residents between July 2023 and July 2024, census estimates show — ahead of Florida and California. That growth brought the state’s total population to 31,290,831.

The state didn’t add residents as quickly as it did the previous year, but the rate of its population growth — 1.8% — was still the third-highest in the country behind Florida and the District of Columbia.

A major driver of that growth came from net international migration. Texas added 319,569 new residents from abroad, the most since the COVID-19 pandemic — but behind Florida and California, which saw the largest increases.

The census changed the way it counts refugees and migrants this year. However, it does not distinguish legal status in its estimates.

That growth mirrors gains seen across the nation. The United States added 3.3 million residents within the last year — 2.8 million of which came from other countries.

Meanwhile, Texas saw fewer residents move from other states than it did during the COVID-19 pandemic — when the state attracted residents from places like California and New York in search of more affordable homes among other factors.

Texas still led the country in domestic migration, followed by North Carolina and South Carolina, adding 85,267 people from other states within the last year. California, New York and Illinois saw the largest population losses in the last year, but those states lost fewer residents than they did in previous years.

Why domestic migration to Texas slowed isn’t clear, said **Lloyd Potter** , the state demographer, but it’s possible that many of the people most likely to move to Texas from other states have simply already done so. With domestic migration appearing to slow, Texas will likely rely on international migration to meet its labor needs as the state’s economy booms, he said.

“With a growing economy, we have a growing demand for labor,” Potter said. “And if we're seeing a decline in domestic migration, well that labor probably is going to need to come from immigrants.”" [Texas Tribune](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eCyDm7YZItPaA-BvJlf4tsBUDTluh9J-v_ksXqnV8Cjv8hGqkcVhA3IHjguBkCuXRsSC08_Q4pLBbjAxTtdG4hhoSl7xuVzVqPiUr-Xn5mtm1b52nqYcJnKoOXwex6OEfpIkUc2eeyXyqnNOcz1q24oIA1caIQrs31vNN9CYxDfwOUgBMwkDAzdUFCMp0CVSeVJ-bJLoVDHtGhc_x1VIj2kjtdPq_R9SMY7SM7k7u3TDzlvpn8zg_lqwGqMWtnlbDRu0skd3rU95eaBWrOUyd3R-ZjDDrLLzEJADcFNmLEkuWNA3peeRPpC-75j4VGPu6HKqV9fgiOVRMRPKx5uScmxvGcnoQlKzO631pOvJJqVS5v3qvPcdwEQjeXYdaFkZuvTaAQxVurUVjxH4-ipeRTrk3LZHtiJhnqFZa68IN01AZaleLvOsEQ7sn8nLcdRjqQ/4cg/UDh0IstvSF25lyowoP_Ctw/h12/h001.HlV0ARL4TudbNZB6RpMPiMw12eRiNSwXmIVqYjGOk8w)

($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) | TOP NEWS “Texas is now home to 31 million people even as population growth slows, ” Texas Tribune's Joshua Fechter — “Texas’ population surpassed 31 million people within the last year as the state added more residents than any other place in the country, estimates released Thursday by the U.S. Census Bureau show. However, the number of people who moved from other parts of the country slowed. Texas added 562,941 residents between July 2023 and July 2024, census estimates show — ahead of Florida and California. That growth brought the state’s total population to 31,290,831. The state didn’t add residents as quickly as it did the previous year, but the rate of its population growth — 1.8% — was still the third-highest in the country behind Florida and the District of Columbia. A major driver of that growth came from net international migration. Texas added 319,569 new residents from abroad, the most since the COVID-19 pandemic — but behind Florida and California, which saw the largest increases. The census changed the way it counts refugees and migrants this year. However, it does not distinguish legal status in its estimates. That growth mirrors gains seen across the nation. The United States added 3.3 million residents within the last year — 2.8 million of which came from other countries. » Meanwhile, Texas saw fewer residents move from other states than it did during the COVID-19 pandemic — when the state attracted residents from places like California and New York in search of more affordable homes among other factors. Texas still led the country in domestic migration, followed by North Carolina and South Carolina, adding 85,267 people from other states within the last year. California, New York and Illinois saw the largest population losses in the last year, but those states lost fewer residents than they did in previous years. » Why domestic migration to Texas slowed isn’t clear, said Lloyd Potter , the state demographer, but it’s possible that many of the people most likely to move to Texas from other states have simply already done so. With domestic migration appearing to slow, Texas will likely rely on international migration to meet its labor needs as the state’s economy booms, he said. “With a growing economy, we have a growing demand for labor,” Potter said. “And if we're seeing a decline in domestic migration, well that labor probably is going to need to come from immigrants.”" | FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. name: Senator Jennifer Boysko
subject: Boysko Bulletin: Ready for Richmond
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/102624/images/Bulletin.jpeg]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/102624/images/2024%20December/Untitled%20design.png]
Boysko Bulletin: Ready for Richmond
Dear Peter,
I am ready to head back to Richmond for the 2025 General Assembly Session. But before we reconvene there will be special elections that will determine the outcome of who has control of the majority in the House and in the Senate. It is imperative that our Democratic candidates win if we are to continue the progress and maintain the Blue Brick Wall. We have two senate races. My good friend, current Delegate Kannan Srinivasan [https://kannanforvirginia.com/] and former candidate for the 7th Congressional District Jack Trammell [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jack-trammell-2] are our Democratic candidates in the Senate and JJ Singh [https://www.jjsingh.com/] is our Democratic candidate in the House. Kannan and JJ are neighbors to our district and both are well known and well-respected leaders in our community. These are must win races for us. The election for each of these races is on January 7, 2024. Early voting has already begun. Please help them. Kannan and his team are phone banking all weekend [https://www.mobilize.us/kannanforvirginia/event/745939/] and canvassing opportunities both Saturday and Sunday. Visit their Mobilize Dashboard [https://www.mobilize.us/kannanforvirginia/] for upcoming opportunities to get involved or consider donating [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kannan-srinivasan-1] to support his campaign! If we do not win at least one of the Senate races and the House race, then we lose our Democratic majority. This means that we will not be able to pass our priority Constitutional Amendments to enshrine the right to reproductive health care, voting rights restoration, or right to marriage for consenting adults including for our LGBTQ+ couples. With the incoming Administration and US Supreme Court stripping away our protections, these elections are more important than ever.
Many of my bills are drafted and ready to be introduced. I am finalizing other bills, working closely with stakeholders to get the language right. My highest priority will be SJ247 Constitutional amendment; fundamental right to reproductive freedom (first reference) [https://tinyurl.com/ys9yaruk] . I am proud to carry this bill which will preserve reproductive freedom in Virginia despite federal efforts to undermine access to contraception, abortion and other reproductive healthcare. We should be able to make our own decisions about our fertility and get politicians out of the process. In Virginia, a Constitutional Amendment must be passed by the House of Delegates and Senate in two General Assembly sessions, with an election taking place between the votes. Then it would go to a referendum to allow you - the voters - to use your voices and make the final decision.
I’ll include more in my next newsletter and will be sending weekly updates during the session to keep you informed. For now, I’ve included information below on how you can follow legislation and participate by visiting Richmond, testifying on bills, and more. I’ve made multiple trips to Richmond throughout the past few months, often multiple times during the same week. Fortunately, I’ve also found time to hold two town halls and join the McLean Winterfest Parade and have spoken as a guest at a number of our community meetings and events. Meeting with constituents is key to effective representation and I value your input!
Earlier this week, the Governor introduced his amendments to the biennial budget [https://tinyurl.com/2p8x4rdp] at a Joint Meeting of the Finance Committees. I’ve been hearing from our advocates in response. We need to look past the words claiming to help to look at the real numbers. For example, the Virginia Education Association is concerned that, “The Governor claims a 54% increase in K-12 funding since pre-COVID. The truth? Inflation-adjusted state direct aid per student has only increased by 10% since 2008. Virginia has become significantly wealthier over the past 15 years, yet our schools have barely seen meaningful state funding increases.” The Commonwealth Institute weighed in on the Governor’s tax code proposals: "Virginia’s tax code can be a powerful tool to advance racial and economic justice and invest in the building blocks of our communities. Yet the governor missed several opportunities in his tax proposals to reach these goals.” TCI continues by advocating for the Fair Share Tax: “For example, a Fair Share Tax would have raised over $1.3 billion in the current budget (fiscal year 2026) by ensuring people who make more than $1 million each year pay more of their fair share. That is money that could have been used to make transformative investments in public education, health care, and more.” The Governor’s amendments are just the start. I serve on the Senate Finance and Appropriations Committee. We will review the Governor’s amendments and those of legislators. I’ve been asked to carry 23 amendments in addition to amendments to fund my legislation. I’ve agreed to carry amendments that help people with disabilities, English Language Learners, correct inequities in our regulation of cbd, strengthen our healthcare workforce, keep kids out of foster care, provide healthcare for children, and support midwives.
There is a lot going on at the federal level and here in Virginia. You can count on me to stand up for those who are impacted negatively. I will work to ensure that innocent people threatened by the incoming president’s determination to deport undocumented people who are living here peacefully know their rights. It is disheartening that Governor Youngkin would seek to cut funding to communities in Virginia that protect these people, many of whom came to the United States due to violence in their country of origin and who are entitled legally to seek asylum. Contrary to what the Governor and the incoming president have implied, sanctuary cities do not protect people who have committed violent crimes. [https://www.americanimmigrationcouncil.org/research/sanctuary-policies-overview#:~:text=Jurisdictions%20that%20do%20not%20honor,do%20not%20threaten%20public%20safety.%E2%80%9D] We already have policies and laws that would remove those individuals.
Each of us must decide how we contribute in the coming years to helping others feel welcome and safe. We each have gifts we can share. It can be overwhelming when we feel powerless to fix everything at once. So we choose what to focus on and what we can control. We will all need to build our resilience to help ourselves and others.
In closing for now, I wish you and you loved ones Happy Holidays! I hope that you have time to rest and enjoy your family and friends.
Kindest regards,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/102624/images/2024%20February%20Images/electronic%20signature.png]
Jennifer B. Boysko
Member, Senate of Virginia
Representing the newly created 38th Senate District making up the northernmost portions of Fairfax County (Great Falls, Herndon, McLean, Reston, WolfTrap, parts of unincorporated Vienna and a slice of Falls Church)

In the News
Tysons Casino Poses National Security Threat: Intelligence Experts [https://tinyurl.com/2yxu7szn]
9 states, including Virginia, poised to end coverage for millions if Trump cuts Medicaid funding [https://tinyurl.com/3sy3zja4]
Virginia legislature set to try and tackle school cell phone ban... again [https://tinyurl.com/bdfyfw2b]
United Nations Declares December 21 as World Meditation Day, Efforts of Swami Anand Arun, founder of Osho Tapoban – Nepal, come to fruition [https://tinyurl.com/bdd84484]
Active Listening, Improved Holocaust Education Needed to Combat Antisemitism in Fairfax County [https://tinyurl.com/5e39sebz]
Virginia housing groups look to 2025 for legislative, funding solutions [https://tinyurl.com/54u3kvce]
VDOT and Great Falls group clash over safety improvements on Walker Road [https://tinyurl.com/yc6uay5h]
Renewed push for gun safety legislation after Newport News child accidentally killed; State Senator Jennifer Boysko told 13News Now she will reintroduce her firearms safety bill in 2025 [https://tinyurl.com/ymksj6bm]
Homecoming Day, Fighting Hornet Style [https://tinyurl.com/zw4djtd5]
BREAKING: Virginia House of Delegates Privileges & Elections Committee Passes Reproductive Freedom Amendment, HJ1, on Party-Line Vote [https://tinyurl.com/4ua5u64z]
Canadian plane tech manufacturer to open Reston research facility [https://tinyurl.com/hcmfk332]
“We do not want a casino in Fairfax County” [https://tinyurl.com/yc59aubv]
Events
This weekend, help support my friend, Kannan Srinivasan, in his critical special election for the State Senate on January 7th. He and his team have an action-packed weekend full of volunteer opportunities! Our Democratic Senate Majority rests on this election so let’s come together this weekend to support his campaign to connect with voters, spread some holiday cheer, and close out the year strong!
Here’s what’s happening:
Friday, December 20th, 7:00 PM : Join for a special joint fundraiser [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/122024herndon] benefitting Kannan Srinivasan for Senate and JJ Singh for Delegate at Jimmy’s Old Town Tavern in Herndon!
Saturday, December 21st :
10 am/ Canvass with Delegate Marty Martinez! [https://www.mobilize.us/kannanforvirginia/event/747022/]
1 - 4 pm/ Merry 'Wex-Mas' Canvass Launch with Congresswoman Wexton & Congressman-elect Suhas Subramanyam! [https://www.mobilize.us/kannanforvirginia/event/746923/]
6 pm/ Holiday Party with Kannan Srinivasan! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks122124]
Can’t make it out to Saturday’s events? No problem! Kannan and his team are phone banking all weekend [https://www.mobilize.us/kannanforvirginia/event/745939/] and have more canvassing opportunities on Sunday. Visit their Mobilize Dashboard [https://www.mobilize.us/kannanforvirginia/] for more all-upcoming opportunities to get involved or consider donating [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kannan-srinivasan-1] to support his campaign!
Saturday, December 21 from noon to 3 pm / Reston Town Center Holiday Performances - RCC [https://restoncommunitycenter.com/event/reston-town-center-holiday-performances-7/]
Saturday and Sunday, January 19 from 10:30 am - 1:30 pm/ MLK Birthday Celebration Especially for Youth - RCC [https://restoncommunitycenter.com/event/mlk-birthday-celebration-especially-for-youth-3/]
We welcome notices about events that are free or very low cost.
Keep in Touch
To contact us to arrange a call or meeting, please email SenatorBoysko@senate.virginia.gov [SenatorBoysko@senate.virginia.gov] or call 703-437-0086. We are in Richmond from January 8 through February 22, 2025. My Senate team includes Chief of Staff Karen Harrison, Director of Constituent Services Kathy Shupe, Session Aide Gillie Cuda, and Legislative Aide Juliet Morro. Friend me on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/JenniferBBoysko] and follow me on X [https://bit.ly/3uLhVhC] .
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe.
Friends of Jennifer Boysko
PO Box 247
Herndon, VA 20172
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/LakmKKqoaEa-z1agKTAOVw2?unsubscribedata=v463n1SovO84k5afS89zDkFWp%2BwA2rCl6jH%2BKnd45MMxB27ZI5H%2FASuhmdw%2BPyL5nbUCreUfAnrFFROttJnqOMCfD3yr63mQJ8Z8OyQUEsjlJwuvHfZ0ylmLWe3bS3cXJU%2FcFZGS27Eq1Ymsf7VDjacR5mu56VXNTgZNKKMIMDTb6KgQgJ%2BSA1pHSVjRYuq5ZlRrBW2C9d2pVOU9MNXPIuK7c4FzhjoaQllAmZnXIG%2FCW1ygpFV8Lb3z299t0M2fISfdaPWM5Kx6jE4cjN9zbRy1bMtSYBbRIN6JnKN%2BBm%2FCf6%2BDKKU2YxQqb6v1sHw1CmStLOS6eG%2FvIY8h%2FLgQ8hgaIAoSmPDqlAPFGAvw7KjVzTyA0%2FlWJ4xU%2F26u1Nv2qDR8Y8rlNNc6XbDyCW%2BwzcD9hKP2%2FgljrfHKnsMy%2FIJj7bYLgeObi7POb5un2qJT .

It is disheartening that Governor Youngkin would seek to cut funding to communities in Virginia that protect these people, many of whom came to the United States due to violence in their country of origin and who are entitled legally to seek asylum. Contrary to what the Governor and the incoming president have implied, sanctuary cities do not protect people who have committed violent crimes. [] We already have policies and laws that would remove those individuals. Each of us must decide how we contribute in the coming years to helping others feel welcome and safe. We each have gifts we can share. It can be overwhelming when we feel powerless to fix everything at once. So we choose what to focus on and what we can control. We will all need to build our resilience to help ourselves and others. In closing for now, I wish you and you loved ones Happy Holidays! I hope that you have time to rest and enjoy your family and friends. Kindest regards, [] Jennifer B. Boysko Member, Senate of Virginia Representing the newly created 38th Senate District making up the northernmost portions of Fairfax County (Great Falls, Herndon, McLean, Reston, WolfTrap, parts of unincorporated Vienna and a slice of Falls Church) In the News Tysons Casino Poses National Security Threat: Intelligence Experts [] 9 states, including Virginia, poised to end coverage for millions if Trump cuts Medicaid funding [] Virginia legislature set to try and tackle school cell phone ban... again [] United Nations Declares December 21 as World Meditation Day, Efforts of Swami Anand Arun, founder of Osho Tapoban – Nepal, come to fruition [] Active Listening, Improved Holocaust Education Needed to Combat Antisemitism in Fairfax County [] Virginia housing groups look to 2025 for legislative, funding solutions [] VDOT and Great Falls group clash over safety improvements on Walker Road [] Renewed push for gun safety legislation after Newport News child accidentally killed; State Senator Jennifer Boysko told 13News Now she will reintroduce her firearms safety bill in 2025 [] Homecoming Day, Fighting Hornet Style [] BREAKING: Virginia House of Delegates Privileges & Elections Committee Passes Reproductive Freedom Amendment, HJ1, on Party-Line Vote [] Canadian plane tech manufacturer to open Reston research facility [] “We do not want a casino in Fairfax County” [] Events This weekend, help support my friend, Kannan Srinivasan, in his critical special election for the State Senate on January 7th. He and his team have an action-packed weekend full of volunteer opportunities! Our Democratic Senate Majority rests on this election so let’s come together this weekend to support his campaign to connect with voters, spread some holiday cheer, and close out the year strong! Here’s what’s happening: Friday, December 20th, 7:00 PM : Join for a special joint fundraiser [] benefitting Kannan Srinivasan for Senate and JJ Singh for Delegate at Jimmy’s Old Town Tavern in Herndon! Saturday, December 21st : 10 am/ Canvass with Delegate Marty Martinez! [] 1 - 4 pm/ Merry 'Wex-Mas' Canvass Launch with Congresswoman Wexton & Congressman-elect Suhas Subramanyam! [] 6 pm/ Holiday Party with Kannan Srinivasan! [] Can’t make it out to Saturday’s events? No problem! Kannan and his team are phone banking all weekend [] and have more canvassing opportunities on Sunday. Visit their Mobilize Dashboard [] for more all-upcoming opportunities to get involved or consider donating [] to support his campaign! Saturday, December 21 from noon to 3 pm / Reston Town Center Holiday Performances - RCC [] Saturday and Sunday, January 19 from 10:30 am - 1:30 pm/ MLK Birthday Celebration Especially for Youth - RCC [] We welcome notices about events that are free or very low cost. Keep in Touch To contact us to arrange a call or meeting, please email SenatorBoysko@senate.virginia.gov [SenatorBoysko@senate.virginia.gov] or call 703-437-0086. We are in Richmond from January 8 through February 22, 2025. My Senate team includes Chief of Staff Karen Harrison, Director of Constituent Services Kathy Shupe, Session Aide Gillie Cuda, and Legislative Aide Juliet Morro. Friend me on Facebook [] and follow me on X [] . If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe. | | **RFK Jr. shares excitement to ‘Make America Healthy Again’ with Sen. Katie Britt**
---
[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=bedace79ad6f42f0be98e0bca8b9a05d&_e=p0VLw3brolmbROe22k29oaDu1Jnz7yC6Swc2zzw1-TN0dxk2BgJwW6GMQ9mMcg8IEy5RqQjJrTPykr5sl2kgZSbmBOBNgPcxmcp5akE8giPzRts_PPqEZIgrBT__kMGnzP4QNTnuetJYbrrVdlpsgNddklhyOiTZUHe9Jvll7vGuLJH0bHYQL0Ypg96gP9dvEwPVNgbOFqLmvGHA_qs6AhZOvLoWPuwfh_I96KkRs7GbeT1_PObOXWYqkOjqt2pAXEbplNz1UW5uQFFwL51KJF7rdom0xV9etyJresUZQNcuW46cObNOuhluzur3b1yc)

Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is continuing to gain support from Republican legislators on Capitol Hill as he seeks to become the Department of Health and Human Services’ next Secretary.

On Wednesday, the nominee met with U.S. Senator Katie Britt for a constructive meeting and earned her full support.

“We had a thorough and direct conversation today about a number of important issues,” Britt said.

“He stressed that he believes in following sound science and good research, empowering Americans to make informed decisions rather than the government imposing mandates. We also discussed protecting life and advancing an agenda that helps women, children, and families thrive. I was encouraged by his firm commitment to restoring the pro-life policies that President Trump implemented during his first term.”
---

| | **Sen. Katie Britt: ‘A nation without borders is not a nation at all’**
---
[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=bedace79ad6f42f0be98e0bca8b9a05d&_e=p0VLw3brolmbROe22k29oaDu1Jnz7yC6Swc2zzw1-TMgz4YztKAsglxFrbiAH3PJtMnirdhFQJAzpck2b_EEVEAcm8-vGPPaFsXdXGTfeJ-Rl-_R1SDUCb9DS-iFr4U68OzKmtAOnHqHZalbDtNnQ0rS8XbwSXsj0k284NzKEVpXDg0QAvkSpT3eFJUoxYws5CKZ3FNsaEs-e1Ue4pFIw1i2QCBCTqNziCue4Z0NC954NDVchT92lpQFPCMoBwDN4uM8eu-XKD1Q_A95E-JV2akruKSjxUdvqp8vl7IbkMs%3D)
---
U.S. Senator Katie Britt is urging elected officials from across the country to take the opportunity following Donald Trump’s historic victory in the 2024 Presidential Election to once again secure the Southern border. On Tuesday, Britt sat down for an interview with the 13th & Park podcast to discuss the renewed need to defend America from the effects of illegal immigration brought on by open borders.

“We are clearly a nation of immigrants. We are also a nation of laws,” said Britt. “And the lawlessness has affected every community, every corner of our nation. It’s time to regain that stability and security that we as Americans maybe at some point took for granted, but now understand how important it is...a nation without borders is not a nation at all.”

Britt noted the detrimental issues brought on by the endless flow of undocumented individuals and emphasized the importance of having the proper resources available to lock down the area.
---

| | **Britt secures critical improvements to Alabama’s water infrastructure**
---
[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=bedace79ad6f42f0be98e0bca8b9a05d&_e=p0VLw3brolmbROe22k29oaDu1Jnz7yC6Swc2zzw1-TPlEdfVvkQep2iZSgUJaPMQy0QM6GFJZTQfOUiQV_4YsYNh2G4hQX-5MUctmQpsTIP1QwOQph4qpTDHFP7-kuMO5Hi34n27M7wjCb1XlwJED-fu5KkzNgek_ePuA2eW1DX9kg7hcjBGgS0_KAULgjdq7DjAffy2g2xQOPBklPZpA14vAkPvUF5bRUpWL-_wLjylMFnO-hv5oh1U5Gplj_gEQGcS1ylnDBTSZEYPps4Ze8FausTo6mE0WGaMgIDTQWQ%3D)
---
U.S. Senator Katie Britt is touting the passage of legislation that will help upgrade and restore vital water infrastructure throughout the state of Alabama.

The bill, the Water Resources Development Act (WRDA) of 2024, will authorize the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers Civil Works Program for projects to make several improvements to the Wilson, Coffeeville, and Demopolis lock and dams.

“Alabama’s inland water infrastructure is essential to Alabama’s economy and national security—moving feedstock, steel, energy products, components of the arsenal of America, and more,” said Britt. “The 2024 WRDA bill authorizes the construction of new, critical locks at the Coffeeville and Demopolis Lock and Dams and pushes the Secretary of the Army Corps to provide critical assistance to improve navigation at the Wilson Lock and Dam. This targeted, modernized investment in water infrastructure strengthens our state’s future.”
---

clean_body: | | | | | Official Team Britt Newsletter | | RFK Jr. shares excitement to ‘Make America Healthy Again’ with Sen. Katie Britt Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is continuing to gain support from Republican legislators on Capitol Hill as he seeks to become the Department of Health and Human Services’ next Secretary. On Wednesday, the nominee met with U.S. Senator Katie Britt for a constructive meeting and earned her full support. “We had a thorough and direct conversation today about a number of important issues,” Britt said. “He stressed that he believes in following sound science and good research, empowering Americans to make informed decisions rather than the government imposing mandates. We also discussed protecting life and advancing an agenda that helps women, children, and families thrive. I was encouraged by his firm commitment to restoring the pro-life policies that President Trump implemented during his first term.” | | Sen. Katie Britt: ‘A nation without borders is not a nation at all’ U.S. Senator Katie Britt is urging elected officials from across the country to take the opportunity following Donald Trump’s historic victory in the 2024 Presidential Election to once again secure the Southern border. On Tuesday, Britt sat down for an interview with the 13th & Park podcast to discuss the renewed need to defend America from the effects of illegal immigration brought on by open borders. “We are clearly a nation of immigrants. We are also a nation of laws,” said Britt. “And the lawlessness has affected every community, every corner of our nation. It’s time to regain that stability and security that we as Americans maybe at some point took for granted, but now understand how important it is...a nation without borders is not a nation at all.” Britt noted the detrimental issues brought on by the endless flow of undocumented individuals and emphasized the importance of having the proper resources available to lock down the area. | | Britt secures critical improvements to Alabama’s water infrastructure U.S. Senator Katie Britt is touting the passage of legislation that will help upgrade and restore vital water infrastructure throughout the state of Alabama. The bill, the Water Resources Development Act (WRDA) of 2024, will authorize the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers Civil Works Program for projects to make several improvements to the Wilson, Coffeeville, and Demopolis lock and dams. “Alabama’s inland water infrastructure is essential to Alabama’s economy and national security—moving feedstock, steel, energy products, components of the arsenal of America, and more,” said Britt. “The 2024 WRDA bill authorizes the construction of new, critical locks at the Coffeeville and Demopolis Lock and Dams and pushes the Secretary of the Army Corps to provide critical assistance to improve navigation at the Wilson Lock and Dam. This targeted, modernized investment in water infrastructure strengthens our state’s future.” | | | | | | | Katie Britt Holiday Truck White Coffee Mug Claim your EXCLUSIVE Christmas coffee mug to show your Yellowhammer State Christmas spirit! | | Follow Katie On Social Media: | | | ---|---|--- SIGN UP FOR SMS ALERTS: TEXT "KATIE" TO 27488 By texting KATIE, you consent to join a recurring SMS/MMS text messaging program that will provide alerts, donation requests, updates, and other important information. Join Us for the Patriot Stars
Inaugural Gala Reception
***
An Unforgettable Evening
Honoring Patriots

Dear Friend,

As we welcome a new chapter in American history, we invite you to join us for the Moms for America Patriot Stars Inaugural Gala
Reception in celebration of this historic inauguration.

This elegant evening will feature:
• Delicious food stations
• An open bar
• A variety of desserts
• Live music and entertainment

The night will culminate with our

Patriot Star Awards Program,

where we will honor exceptional individuals working toward a brighter future for our nation.

ENJOY SPECIAL PERFORMANCES BY:

• Jason Hewlett •
• Natasha Owens •
• Katey & Katie •

Hotel Washington, Grand Ballroom
In Washington D.C.

clean_body: Join Moms for America, Friday, January 17, 2025 for the Patriot Stars Inaugural Gala Reception in Washington, DC If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] Join Us for the Patriot Stars Inaugural Gala Reception * An Unforgettable Evening Honoring Patriots Dear Friend, As we welcome a new chapter in American history, we invite you to join us for the Moms for America Patriot Stars Inaugural Gala Reception in celebration of this historic inauguration. This elegant evening will feature: • Delicious food stations • An open bar • A variety of desserts • Live music and entertainment The night will culminate with our Patriot Star Awards Program, where we will honor exceptional individuals working toward a brighter future for our nation. ENJOY SPECIAL PERFORMANCES BY: • Jason Hewlett • • Natasha Owens • • Katey & Katie • EVENT DETAILS WHERE Hotel Washington, Grand Ballroom In Washington D.C. WHEN Friday, January 17, 2025 TIME 7:00–10:00 PM (Check-in begins at 6:30 PM) ATTIRE Cocktail TICKETS $500 General Seating $5,000 VIP Package Includes 8 General Admission tickets, a photo opportunity, and access to a VIP reception with honored guests. * $10,000 Sponsorship Package Includes 16 General Admission tickets, a VIP reception with honored guests with photos. Digital logo on screen and Recognition in Program. Purchase your tax-deductible tickets today to secure your spot for this memorable event! GET TICKETS TODAY! [] For additional questions, please contact Kyra@momsforamerica.net [Kyra@momsforamerica.net] We can’t wait to celebrate with you at this inauguration gala reception, as we honor the patriotism and spirit that make America great! [] In Truth & Freedom, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® P.S. Seats are limited – don’t miss your chance to be part of this special evening! GET TICKETS TODAY! name: Georgia HQ
subject: Do you approve of RFK Jr.?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
We’re preparing for next month’s Presidential cabinet confirmation hearings by gauging public opinion on RFK Jr.

[As we close out 2025, we here at Georgia HQ are preparing for next month’s Presidential cabinet confirmation hearings by conducting an internal poll to gauge public opinion on RFK Jr. Will you take a minute of your time to share your thoughts Peter, RFK Jr. has no professional experience in the medical field and for years has been responsible for spreading medical misinformation throughout the country.
Just last week, he asked the FDA to revoke approvals of the polio vaccine — **_something that experts have deemed safe and helped thousands of people for years now._**
[Scientists and medical experts have made it clear that they’re concerned about RFK Jr., and now we want to hear from you:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99046058/518655824/-859077168?source=SBD_DPG_EM_ENG_122124_1_1_RFK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDgwZDVjZC0yYWJmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A9t6x2vGQzASa0cBfIKk2Yns1gJdXpzZDBhMtJaJs6Q=&emci=f7a8729c-21bf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=6d80d5cd-2abf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=43566853)

Team — Donald Trump will be inaugurated in exactly one month, but his attacks on our basic rights and freedoms are already underway:
* He vowed to **repeal birthright citizenship** and begin **mass deportations** on day one of his Presidency, _both of which would separate millions of mixed-status families._

* He doubled down on his plans to gut the **Department of Education** , and _Tom Horne, one of Arizona’s top education officials, is backing this reckless decision._

* And he appointed a slew of **MAGA loyalists** to his cabinet and staff, including Kari Lake who, _after attacking journalists for months_ , will head international news broadcaster Voice of America.

Arizona Democrats will be our last line of defense against Donald Trump’s dangerous agenda. **That’s why we’re ramping up our efforts to protect our hard-fought wins, unseat out-of-touch politicians, and elect more Democrats up and down the ballot.** **[Will you make a $20.25 donation to help make this possible?
